Revuelve bien hasta que se mezclen los ingredientes, agrega una pizca de pimienta y listo, ya tienes una pasta Alfredo original.

name: Algarve Orange Pudding
instructions: Deite 150 g do açúcar num tacho e molhe com um pouco de água. Leve ao lume, sem mexer, até obter um caramelo. Retire do lume, regue com 50 ml de água e mexa bem. Caramelize uma forma de pudim e reserve.
Coloque 1 colher (sopa) do restante açúcar numa tigela, junte a farinha, mexa e reserve. Ferva o sumo de laranja com o restante açúcar, até obter ponto de pérola.

Numa tigela, bata os ovos juntamente com o preparado de farinha. Junte depois a calda anterior, em fio e mexendo sempre. Deite na forma e leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 180ºc, em banho-maria, durante 45 minutos. Retire do forno, deixe arrefecer e desenforme. Decore a gosto e sirva.

name: Algarve-style Fish Cataplana
instructions: Tempere o peixe com sal e reserve. Numa cataplana, coloque metade das cebolas, previamente descascadas e cortadas em rodelas, metade dos pimentos, limpos e cortados em tiras, e o azeite.

Adicione o peixe e tempere com o vinho branco e o brandy ou conhaque. Junte os restantes cebola e pimento, cortados da mesma forma. De seguida, acrescente os tomates, limpos de pele e sementes e cortados em rodelas, bem como os dentes de alho picados, piripiri a gosto, as folhas de louro e o ramo de salsa, reservando algumas folhas para o final.
Por último, coloque por cima o presunto e o chouriço, cortados em cubos, os camarões e as amêijoas. Feche a cataplana, leve ao lume e deixe cozinhar por cerca de 15 minutos.

Descasque as batatas, corte-as ao meio e coza-as, num tacho à parte, em água temperada com sal. Escorra-as e junte-as à cataplana no final da cozedura. Sirva de imediato, decorada com as folhas de salsa que reservou.

name: Algarve-style Hake
instructions: Tempere os filetes de pescada com sal, disponha-os num tabuleiro e deite por cima os alhos picados e a cebola cortada em rodelas.

Polvilhe com a paprica, uma pitada de pimenta e a salsa picada. Regue com o sumo de limão e azeite abundante e leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 180ºC, durante cerca de 30 minutos. Sirva com acompanhamento a gosto.

name: Algarve-style Lambujinhas
instructions: Coloque as lambujinhas numa tigela previamente temperada de sal.
Descasque e lave a cebola e os dentes de alho. Pique-os finamente.
Num tacho aqueça o azeite. Junte a cebola e os dentes de alho. Deixe refogar.
Junte as lambujinhas, o pimentão doce, sumo de limão, coentros picados, sal e pimenta.
Deixe cozinhar até abrirem. Retire do lume e sirva decorado a gosto.

name: Algarve-style Tuna With Sweet Potato
instructions: Tempere os bifes de atum com o sumo do limão, os alhos esmagados, sal e pimenta. Reserve.
Descasque, corte as cebolas em rodelas e aloure-as numa frigideira, com o azeite e o louro. Junte o tomate, cortado em pedaços pequenos, e deixe cozinhar.
Disponha os bifes de atum na frigideira, sobre os ingredientes cozinhados, e aloure. Depois, adicione a polpa de tomate e o vinho branco, envolva e deixe cozinhar, em lume brando.
Acrescente as batatas-doces, previamente descascadas e cortadas a gosto, polvilhe com os coentros picados e sirva.

name: Algarvian Style Clams Recipe
instructions: Descasque e pique finamente os dentes de alho. Pique também os coentros e reserve.
Leve ao lume um tacho grande com o azeite e os alhos e aloure ligeiramente. Adicione as amêijoas bem escorridas e uma parte dos coentros, tape e deixe cozinhar, até as amêijoas abrirem.
Regue com o vinho branco e tempere com sal e piripíri a gosto. Deixe cozinhar em lume forte, mexendo de vez em quando, até o vinho evaporar. Polvilhe com os restantes coentros picados e sirva.

name: Algerian Couscous

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

ingredients.prep: sliced lengthwise and cut into chunks
sliced lengthwise and cut into chunks

instructions: Heat 3 tablespoons olive oil in a large pot over medium-high heat. Season mutton chops and chicken drumsticks with salt and pepper; cook in batches with onions in the hot oil until browned, about 2 minutes per side. Transfer to a large plate.

Scrape the bottom of the pot with a wooden spoon to release browned bits. Return mutton chops and chicken to the pot. Pour in enough water to cover; add turmeric, cumin, and coriander. Cover and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium; simmer for 20 minutes.

Stir potatoes, turnips, and carrots into the pot. Simmer, covered, until vegetables start to soften, about 10 minutes. Mix in tomato paste and ras el hanout; cook for 10 minutes. Stir in chickpeas, zucchini, and cilantro; continue cooking, covered, until zucchini is tender, about 5 minutes.

Bring 3 cups water to a boil in a saucepan; remove from heat and stir in couscous and butter. Cover saucepan and let stand until water is absorbed completely, 5 to 10 minutes. Fluff couscous with a fork and stir in 1 tablespoon olive oil. Transfer to a serving dish.
Ladle 2 scoops of cooking liquid into a bowl; mix in harissa until smooth.
Scoop vegetables onto a serving plate. Scoop mutton and chicken onto a separate plate. Serve alongside couscous, harissa sauce, and remaining cooking liquid in the pot.

name: Alguashte
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (177°C).
Toast pumpkin seeds on a large rimmed baking sheet, tossing halfway through, until golden brown, 20–25 minutes.
Let cool completely.
Transfer cooled pumpkin seeds to a food processor, add salt, and pulse until very finely ground.
Alguashte can be made up to 4 weeks ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.

name: Alhada De Ray
instructions: Coza a raia em água temperada com sal e o vinagre. Escorra e reserve um pouco da água da cozedura.
Descasque as batatas, corte-as em rodelas grossas e coza-os num tacho à parte, em água temperada com sal.
Descasque os alhos e triture-os com a água que reservou, de modo a obter uma pasta.
Leve ao lume uma frigideira com o azeite e a pasta de alhos e deixe aquecer. Adicione o peixe, envolva e deixe apurar. Sirva com as batatas cozidas, polvilhando tudo com coentros picados.

name: Alhada Dogfish
instructions: Tempere o peixe com sal e reserve. Descasque e pique os dentes de alho e aloure-os num tacho com o azeite e a folha de louro. Acrescente o peixe e o vinagre, mexa e deixe refogar durante alguns minutos.
Polvilhe depois com a farinha maisena e os coentros picados, adicione água quente até cobrir o peixe, tempere com sal e picante e deixe apurar. Mexa e retifique os temperos.
Coloque fatias de pão numa travessa funda. Disponha por cima a alhada de cação, salpique com um pouco mais de coentros picados e sirva de imediato.

name: Alheira And Dried Fruit Vol-au-vent
original_name: Vol-au-vent de alheira e frutos secos
instructions: Pique a alheira com um garfo, coloque-a numa assadeira e leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 200ºc, durante 20 minutos. Retire, elimine a pele e esmague ligeiramente o recheio. Misture com a amêndoa e passas a gosto e reserve.
Estenda a massa folhada (não finamente) sobre uma superfície enfarinhada e corte-a em pequenos círculos. Com um cortador redondo, retire o centro a metade deles.

Pincele o rebordo dos círculos completos com o ovo, previamente batido com a água. Por cima de cada um, disponha um círculo com orifício e volte a pincelar. Leve ao forno, a 180ºC, por cerca de 15 a 20 minutos ou até crescerem e ficarem dourados.
Retire os vol-au-vent do forno e recheie-os de imediato com a mistura de alheira e frutos secos. Coloque-os num prato, decore com o cebolinho picado e sirva-os quentes ou à temperatura ambiente.

name: Alheira And Farinheira Puff Pastries
instructions: Pré-aqueça o forno a 180ºc. Elimine a pele à alheira e à farinheira e, com a ajuda de uma faca, retire os recheios e misture.

Desenrole as massas folhadas, corte-as em quadrados e divida, por elas, o recheio de alheira e farinheira. Dobre as pontas para dentro, formando uma espécie de trouxa, ou enrole em forma de croissant.
Disponha os folhados num tabuleiro, forrado com papel vegetal, com as pontas viradas para baixo, e pincele-os com a gema. Leve ao forno, durante 20 minutos, até ficarem dourados.

name: Alheira Balls With Apple
instructions: Descasque, pique a cebola e refogue-a num tachinho com a manteiga. Descasque a maçã, rale-a e reserve.

Retire a pele à alheira, coloque o recheio numa picadora ou robot, junte a cebola e triture. Deite para uma tigela, adicione a maçã ralada, a salsa, o sumo de limão e o cebolinho e misture tudo muito bem.

Forme bolinhas com a mistura anterior, passe-as pelo pão ralado, pelo ovo batido e novamente pelo pão ralado. Frite-as em óleo quente, retire e deixe escorrer sobre papel absorvente. Sirva quentes ou frias.

name: Alheira Bilharacos
instructions: Com uma faca, faça um corte em todo o comprimento das alheiras e elimine-lhes a pele.
Retire pequenas porções do recheio e molde bolinhas. Passe-as pelos ovos batidos e depois por sementes de sésamo, de modo a ficarem totalmente cobertas.
Leve ao lume uma frigideira com óleo abundante e deixe aquecer. Junte os bilharacos e frite-os, durante cerca de 2 a 3 minutos, virando-os de vez em quando. Escorra sobre papel absorvente e sirva.

name: Alheira Bras With Spinach
instructions: Retire a pele às alheiras e corte-as em pedaços pequenos. Descasque e lave a cebola e os dentes de alho. Deite metade dos alhos num tacho, junte metade do azeite, leve ao lume e deixe cozinhar até que alhos fiquem douradinhos. Adicione depois os espinafres e deixe saltear, mexendo sempre, até que fiquem macios. Retire do lume e reserve.

Deite a cebola e os restantes alhos noutro tacho, junte o resto do azeite, leve ao lume e deixe refogar, mexendo sempre até alourar. Adicione depois a alheira, tempere com pimenta, deixe cozinhar, mexendo continuamente, até começar desfazer-se, junte a batata palha e envolva.

Adicione então os ovos batidos e mexa até que os ovos fiquem cozinhados. Rectifique os temperos, retire do lume, deite numa travessa e sirva com os espinafres em montinhos e decorado com azeitonas, como vê na foto.

name: Alheira De Mirandela
instructions: Disponha as alheiras num tabuleiro, pique-as com um garfo e leve-as ao forno, pré-aquecido a 180ºC, até que fiquem assadas. Retire e reserve. Coza a couve em água temperada com sal. Escorra e reserve também.

Leve ao lume um tacho com os dentes de alho picados, o azeite e a gordura das alheiras, que se formou no tabuleiro, e deixe alourar. Junte a couve e o feijão-frade escorrido, envolva e deixe cozinhar durante 5 minutos.
Retire a côdea à broa e desfaça o miolo. Adicione ao preparado anterior, misture e retifique os temperos de sal e pimenta. Retire do lume e sirva com as alheiras.

name: Alheira In The Air Fryer
instructions: Corte a couve em pedaços e coza-os entre 7 a 10 minutos em água com sal. Escorra e reserve. Leve ao lume um tacho com o azeite e os alhos esmagados, junte o miolo da broa esfarelado e deixe alourar.
Adicione a couve, tempere com sal e pimenta e deixe cozinhar por cerca de 5 minutos.
Use papel vegetal anti-aderente e forre de modo a que fique com as laterais cobertas com o papel vegetal.
Coloque o preparado anterior, na air fryer, pique as alheiras e disponha por cima
Programe a 180ºc, durante 18 minutos. Retire e sirva de imediato.

name: Alheira Puff Pastries
instructions: Retire a pele às alheiras e divida cada uma em 3 pedaços. Reserve.
Depois de descongelada, estenda a massa folhada e divida-a em 6 retângulos. Pincele em volta com a gema, previamente misturada com o leite.
Disponha um pedaço de alheira sobre cada retângulo, feche, unindo a massa, e faça alguns cortes na superfície.
Disponha os folhados num tabuleiro polvilhado com farinha. Pincele a superfície de cada com a restante gema e leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 220ºc, durante 25 minutos. Retire do forno e sirva.

name: Alheira Tortilla

ingredients.item: Sal e pimenta de moinho q.b.

instructions: Descasque as batatas e corte-as em rodelas finas. Frite-as ligeiramente em óleo bem quente, de modo a que fiquem mais cozidas do que fritas.
Retire a pela à alheira e frite-a numa frigideira de barro sem gordura, até ficar douradinha. Retire da frigideira e deixe arrefecer.
Descasque e pique a cebola, deite-a na mesma frigideira e junte um pouco de azeite. Deixe saltear até a cebola ficar mole.
À parte, bata bem os ovos, temperando com sal e pimenta moída. Deite na frigideira e acrescente as batatas e a alheira em pedaços.
Leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 160ºC, durante cerca de 10 minutos. Sirva decorada com salsa.

name: Ali Pasha Pilaf
instructions: 1. Köfte harcını hazırlamak için; ekmeği ıslatıp ufalayın, soğanı rendeleyin.
2.  Kıymayı derin bir kaba alıp ekmek içi, soğan, tuz ve karabiber ilave ederek yoğurun.
3.  Fındık büyüklüğünde parçalar koparıp yuvarlayın ve una bulayın.
4.  Patlıcanları alacalı soyup küp küp doğrayın.
5.  Acısını çıkarmak için tuzlu suda bekletin, süzüp kurulayın.
6.  Sıvıyağı tavada kızdırıp önce köfteleri sonra patlıcanları kızartın.
7.  Kağıt havlu üzerine alıp fazla yağını çektirin.
8.  1 çorba kaşığı margarini küçük bir tavada eritip fıstıkları kavurun.
9.  Domatesi soyup küp küp doğrayın.
10.  Pirinci yıkayıp süzün.
11.  2 çorba kaşığı margarini tencerede eritip pirinci kavurun.
12.  Domatesi ekleyip karıştırın.
13.  Köfte, patlıcan ve fıstıkları ilave edip harmanlayın.
14.  Et suyu ve tuz ekleyip kapağını kapatın.
15.  Kaynayınca ateşi kısıp 20 dakika pişirin.
16.  Ateşten alıp üzerini kağıt havlu ile örterek demlenmeye bırakın.
17.  İnce kıyılmış dereotu ile süsleyip servis yapın.
18. Pilav suyunu çektiği halde pirinçler hala diri ise 1 kahve fincanı kadar sıcak su ilave edebilirsiniz.

name: Alia's Osso Buco

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).
Mix flour and parsley in a bowl; season with salt and pepper. Dip veal shanks into flour mixture, shaking off excess flour.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Fry veal in hot oil until browned, about 10 minutes; transfer to a large baking dish. Return skillet to stove.

Cook and stir onion, carrots, and celery in the skillet used to fry veal until vegetables begin to brown, about 5 minutes. Transfer vegetables to the baking dish and pour wine into the skillet. Bring to a boil, scraping up any browned bits from the skillet. Reduce heat to medium-low and continue to simmer until wine is reduced by half, about 5 minutes.
Stir tomatoes, thyme, and bay leaves into wine. Simmer until tomatoes are hot, about 10 minutes. Pour tomato mixture over veal and vegetables. Stir to combine. Cover baking dish with aluminum foil.
Bake in the preheated oven until veal is very tender, about 90 minutes.

name: Aliada
instructions: Για την αλιάδα κρατάμε μικρά κομμάτια από το ξαλμυρισμένο μπακαλιάρο για να δώσουμε νοστιμιά.
Βάζουμε τα κομμάτια ψαριού σε μια κατσαρόλα και προσθέτουμε μπόλικο νερό.
Αφήνουμε να πάρει βράση, χαμηλώνουμε την εστία και σιγοβράζουμε για 20 λεπτά να βγάλει το ψάρι όλη την νοστιμιά του.
Σουρώνουμε τον ζωμό και τον κρατάμε στο πλάι.
Καθαρίζουμε τις πατάτες, τις κόβουμε σε κομμάτια και τις βράζουμε σε μια κατσαρόλα μέχρι να μαλακώσουν, για περίπου 20 λεπτά.
Τις στραγγίζουμε πολύ καλά και τις πολτοποιούμε με την πρέσα πατάτας.
Λιώνουμε στο μπλέντερ τις σκελίδες σκόρδου με το ελαιόλαδο και τα προσθέτουμε στις πολτοποιημένες πατάτες.
Ανακατεύουμε με το κουτάλι να ομογενοποιηθούν.
Προσθέτουμε χυμό λεμονιού για να γίνει η αλιάδα όσο όξινη επιθυμούμε.
Τέλος, ανακατεύοντας, προσθέτουμε λίγο λίγο τον ζωμό του ψαριού μέχρι να ομογενοποιηθεί η σύσταση της αλιάδας.
Ρίχνουμε σταδιακά τον ζωμό για μην γίνει πολύ ρευστή.
Στο τέλος ελέγχουμε αν χρειάζεται αλάτι γιατί συνήθως ο ζωμός είναι αλμυρός.

name: Alicante Nougat Recipe
instructions: Tuestas las almendras en una sartén hasta que queden ligeramente doradas. Reserva.
Vierte la miel en una olla y lleva al fuego.
Cocina a fuego medio - bajo hasta que la miel se funda y esté más líquida.
Incorpora el azúcar y mezcla muy bien hasta que se disuelva.
Cocina a fuego bajo hasta que se forme una mezcla ligera, similar a la un caramelo.
Apaga y deja reposar 1 minuto.
Bate la clara de huevo a punto de nieve y añade a la mezcla anterior.
Mezcla muy bien hasta que todo esté perfectamente integrado.
Agrega las almendras y mezcla.
Forra un molde rectangular con papel antiadherente y coloca una oblea.
Vierte la mezcla del turrón y cubre con la segunda oblea.
Deja reposar por mínimo 6 horas.
Pasado este tiempo, debe estar compacto. Desmolda con cuidado y corta en porciones.

name: Alice's Turkey Day Light Rolls
instructions: Stir milk, 4 1/2 tablespoons shortening, sugar, and salt together in a bowl. Cool until mixture is lukewarm.
Pour water into a bowl and sprinkle yeast over the top. Let stand until yeast softens and begins to form a creamy foam, about 5 minutes; stir. Stir milk mixture into yeast mixture until smooth.
Beat 2 1/4 cups flour into yeast mixture until smooth. Gradually stir in remaining flour until dough comes together.

Turn dough out onto a lightly floured work surface and knead until dough is smooth and elastic, about 8 minutes. Place dough in an oiled bowl, brush with melted shortening, cover the bowl with a clean towel, and set in a warm place to rise until doubled in volume, about 2 hours.
Punch dough down and form into 24 rolls. Place rolls on a lightly greased baking dish, cover with a towel, and let rise until doubled in volume, about 40 minutes.
Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown, 12 to 15 minutes.

name: Alicha Denich

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or 1 0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: peeled, sliced on a diagonal  0.25" thick
peeled, halved, each half cut crosswise into 3 pieces

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or 1 tbsp. plus  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt
Ground turmeric or 1 tbsp. finely grated peeled turmeric

instructions:
Purée jalapeños, chile de árbol, garlic, ginger, cilantro, oil, and salt in a small blender or food processor until smooth. Transfer awaze to a small glass jar or airtight container, seal tightly or cover, and chill until ready to use.
Do ahead: Awaze can be made 1 week ahead. Keep chilled.

Heat oil in a large pot over medium-high. Cook onions, stirring often, until softened and golden, 12–14 minutes. Add carrots and cook, stirring, 1 minute, then add 1 cup water and cook, stirring, until carrots are tender, 7–9 minutes. Add potatoes, cabbage, green and red jalapeños, garlic, salt, turmeric, ¼ cup awaze, and 2 Tbsp. water and mix well to combine. Bring to a simmer, cover, and reduce heat to low. Cook, stirring occasionally, until potatoes are partly tender, 12–15 minutes. Remove from heat and let sit, covered, until potatoes are completely tender, 8–10 minutes. Uncover stew and give it a good stir. Stew can be served hot, warm, or room temperature.
Do ahead: Stew can be made 1 day ahead. Let cool; cover and chill. (The flavor will get even better.)

name: Alinazik Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 çay kaşığı pul biber veya toz kırmızı biber

instructions: 1. Patlıcanları közleyin, kabuklarını soyup ince ince doğrayın veya ezin.
2. Süzme yoğurdu sarımsak ve tuzla karıştırın, patlıcanları ekleyip pürüzsüz hale getirin.
3. Tavada tereyağı ve zeytinyağını ısıtın, etleri ekleyip suyunu salıp çekene kadar kavurun.
4. Tuz, karabiber ve pul biberi ekleyerek etleri yumuşayana kadar pişirin.
5. Servis tabağına patlıcanlı yoğurt karışımını yayın, üzerine etleri yerleştirin.
6. Tereyağını eritip kırmızı biberle kızdırın ve yemeğin üzerine gezdirin ve servis edin.
7.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Alita's Tomato Beef Stew
instructions: Combine flour, salt, and pepper in a resealable bag; add stew meat and shake until meat is coated.
Heat oil in a Dutch oven or large heavy-bottomed pot over medium heat. Add coated meat and loose flour from the bag to the hot oil; cook and stir until browned on all sides, 5 to 10 minutes.

Mix tomatoes, onions, tomato sauce, water, Worcestershire sauce, garlic, paprika, sugar, and bay leaves into stew meat mixture; bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low and simmer stew, scraping bottom of Dutch oven every 30 minutes, about 1 hour.
Stir carrots into stew and cook for 30 minutes more. Add potatoes to stew and cook until potatoes are tender, about 30 minutes. Add mushrooms to stew and cook until tender, about 15 minutes.

name: Alive And Kicking

ingredients.item: . compass box whisky co. orangerie or grand marnier

instructions: Combine sugar and 1 Tbsp. hot water in a jar, cover, and shake until sugar is dissolved. Chill until cold.

For each cocktail, combine 1 oz. coffee, 1 oz. fernet, ¾ oz. amaro, ¾ oz. Scotch, and ¼ oz. demerara simple syrup in a cocktail shaker. Fill shaker with ice and shake vigorously until outside of shaker is frosty, about 30 seconds. Strain into a coupe glass. Garnish with an orange twist.

name: All A’s Spring Salad With Mahi-mahi
instructions: Preheat oven to 425°. Place mahi-mahi on a rimmed baking sheet and rub all over with 1 Tbsp. oil; season on both sides with salt and pepper. Brush or rub fish on both sides with 1 Tbsp. plus 1 tsp. mustard. Using a Microplane, finely grate zest of lemon over fish. Set lemon aside.
Bake mahi-mahi until opaque throughout and flesh flakes easily with a fork, 8–10 minutes.
Meanwhile, heat 1 Tbsp. oil in a large skillet, preferably cast iron, over high. Cook asparagus, turning occasionally, until blistered in spots, about 4 minutes total; season with salt.

Remove mahi-mahi from oven. Cut reserved lemon in half and squeeze juice from 1 half over fish. Squeeze juice from remaining half into a medium bowl (catching any seeds with your other hand). Add honey, remaining 1 tsp. mustard, and remaining ¼ cup oil and whisk until smooth; season dressing with salt and pepper.
Add avocado and arugula to dressing and toss gently to coat. Taste salad and season with more salt and pepper.
Divide fish and asparagus among plates and scatter salad on top.

name: All Saints Cupcakes
instructions: Desfaça numa tigela o fermento com a água e mexa bem. Junte depois os restantes ingredientes indicados e amasse até ficarem bem ligados. Por fim, junte os frutos secos picados grosseiramente e envolva. Coloque a massa num tabuleiro polvilhado com farinha e deixe a massa levedar até que fique o dobro do seu volume.
Divida a massa em bolinhas e coloque em tabuleiros polvilhados com farinha e deixe levedar durante mais 30 minutos.
Decorrido esse tempo pincele com gema e leve ao forno pré-aquecido a 180ºC durante 25 minutos, até que os bolinhos fiquem cozidos. Retire e sirva decorado a gosto.

name: All She Wrote Punt E Mes And Vermouth Cocktail
instructions: To serve, turn bottle gently end over end to mix. Place a large ice cube in each rocks glass, then pour in cocktail. Give each drink one gentle stir before serving. Garnish with a small pinch of salt.

name: All Strawberry Cake
instructions: Για την τούρτα φράουλα, προθερμαίνουμε το φούρνο στους 170ºC στον αέρα.
Βουτυρώνουμε και στρώνουμε λαδόκολλα σε 3 ταψάκια με διάμετρο 23 εκ.
Στο μίξερ χτυπάμε τη ζάχαρη, τη σφιχτή μαρμελάδα φράουλα και το βούτυρο να αφρατέψουν.
Ένα ένα ρίχνουμε τα αβγά χτυπώντας το μείγμα για να τα πίνει κάθε φορά.
Ρίχνουμε και τη βανίλια.
Ανακατεύουμε σε μπολ το αλεύρι, το baking powder, το αλάτι και εναλλάξ με το γάλα τα προσθέτουμε στο μίγμα.
Το μίξερ πρέπει να είναι σε χαμηλή ταχύτητα.
Τέλος, προσθέτουμε τον πουρέ φράουλας.
Απαλά ανακατεύουμε και ισομοιράζουμε στα ταψάκια.
Ψήνουμε για 25′ με 30′ μέχρι να φουσκώσουν, να ξεκολλήσουν από τα πλάγια του ταψιού και να βγαίνει καθαρό το μαχαίρι από το κέντρο.
Αφήνουμε για 15′ στα ταψιά κι έπειτα ξεφορμάρουμε για να κρυώσουν καλά.

name: All-american Barbecue Sauce
instructions: Bring all ingredients to a boil in a large saucepan over medium heat. Reduce heat to low and simmer, stirring often, until sauce is thickened and begins to turn dark red, about 20 minutes. Let cool. DO AHEAD: Can be made 2 weeks ahead. Cover and chill.

name: All-american Cheeseburger Pasta

ingredients.prep: finely grated (about  0.75 cup), plus more for serving

instructions: Heat a large Dutch oven over medium-high until hot. Divide beef into 4 large loosely packed balls and place in Dutch oven. With a sturdy spatula, aggressively flatten balls as though you were making smash burgers; season with salt. Cook, undisturbed, until patties are well browned and crisp on the bottom, about 4 minutes. Turn each patty, season with salt, and continue to cook until second side is well browned, about 3 minutes longer. Transfer patties to a plate and let cool slightly.
Reduce heat to medium. Cook onion in pot, stirring often, until golden and browned around the edges, 10–15 minutes. (Some light scorching and sticking is okay here; don’t be shy.)
While onions are cooking, transfer patties to a cutting board and coarsely chop.

Add garlic to pot and cook, stirring, until fragrant, about 30 seconds. Using a wooden spoon or spatula, push onion-garlic mixture to one side of pot to make space, tilting pot if necessary to get some hot fat over to the empty side. Add tomato paste to empty space and stir in hot fat until fragrant and begins to darken, about 2 minutes. Add tomatoes, banana peppers, soy sauce, red pepper flakes, and chopped meat and stir everything in pot together. Cook, stirring occasionally, until sauce is simmering and flavors have melded, about 10 minutes. Reduce heat to low and keep warm until ready to use.

Meanwhile, cook pasta in a large pot of boiling salted water, stirring occasionally, until 1 minute shy of al dente (pasta will finish cooking in the sauce). Increase heat under sauce to medium. Using a spider or large slotted spoon, transfer pasta to Dutch oven along with 2 cups pasta cooking liquid. Stirring constantly, add cheddar and 3 oz. Parmesan a handful at a time, allowing cheese to melt and emulsify into sauce between additions, about 3 minutes.
Transfer pasta to a platter. Top with more Parmesan.

name: All-american Flag Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease and flour a 9x13-inch baking pan.

Combine cake mix, 1 cup water, eggs, and vegetable oil in a large bowl; beat with an electric mixer on low speed until moistened. Increase speed to medium and beat for 2 minutes. Pour batter into the prepared baking pan.

Bake in the preheated oven until lightly browned and a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, 23 to 28 minutes. Cool completely on a wire rack. Poke holes about 1 inch apart all over cake with a fork.

Dissolve strawberry gelatin in ½ cup boiling water in a bowl; slowly pour over cake, letting gelatin seep into holes. Refrigerate cake until gelatin sets, about 1 hour. Transfer cake to a serving platter; cut in half horizontally.

Whisk instant pudding mix into milk in a bowl until thickened, about 2 minutes; stir in ½ cup blueberries. Spread blueberry-pudding filling onto bottom cake layer; place top cake layer over filling. Spread whipped topping over top and sides of cake; arrange remaining ½ cup blueberries in a square in upper left corner of cake for stars. Arrange alternating layers of strawberries and miniature marshmallows into horizontal red and white stripes.

name: All-american Loaded Baked Potato Salad
instructions: Place potatoes in a pot and cover with cold water. Add salt and bring to a boil. Simmer until potatoes are just tender enough to be pierced with a fork, about 15 minutes. Drain and run under cold water until potatoes are slightly cool.

Mix sour cream, creamy salad dressing, and ground black pepper together in a large bowl. Stir in Cheddar cheese, green onion, and bacon bits; add potatoes. Cover and chill in the refrigerator until ready to serve.

name: All-american Trifle
instructions: Sprinkle strawberries with sugar in a bowl; stir to distribute sugar, and set aside.
Chill a large metal mixing bowl and beaters from an electric mixer.
Pour cream into the chilled mixing bowl, and add lemon yogurt, pudding mix, and about 1 tablespoon of coconut rum; beat until fluffy with an electric mixer set on medium speed.

Spread a layer of pound cake cubes into the bottom of a glass trifle dish, and sprinkle cubes with remaining tablespoon coconut rum. Cover pound cake with a layer of strawberries; sprinkle blueberries over strawberries. Spread a thick layer of whipped cream over the berries.

Repeat the layers several times, ending with a layer of strawberries sprinkled with blueberries and reserving about 1 cup of whipped cream; top the trifle with dollops of whipped cream to serve. Refrigerate leftovers.

name: All-butter Pie Dough
instructions: Pulse flour and salt in a food processor to combine. Pulse in butter until mixture resembles coarse meal with pieces of butter still visible, about 20 pulses.
Combine vinegar and ½ cup ice water in a measuring cup. Pulsing, drizzle in vinegar mixture; pulse until dough just holds together when squeezed (it should still be crumbly), about 10 pulses.
Turn out dough and divide in half. Place each half on a sheet of plastic wrap and use plastic to press into disks. Wrap and chill until firm, about 2 hours.
DO AHEAD: Dough can be chilled 3 days ahead. Or, freeze up to 2 months.

name: All-day Apple Butter
instructions: Place apples in a slow cooker. Combine sugar, cinnamon, cloves, and salt together in a medium bowl; pour over apples and mix well.
Cover and cook on High for 1 hour.
Reduce heat to Low and cook, stirring occasionally, until mixture is thick and dark brown, 9 to 11 hours.
Uncover and continue cooking on Low for 1 hour. Whisk to make smooth, if desired.
Spoon mixture into sterile containers, cover; refrigerate or freeze.

name: All-dressed-up Cauliflower Rice

ingredients.item: Plain whole-milk greek yogurt and lime wedges

instructions: Working in 2 batches, pulse cauliflower in a food processor until pieces are about the size of rice (you don’t want to overprocess; err on the large side). Transfer cauliflower to a medium bowl lined with a kitchen towel to absorb any extra moisture.

Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high. Add bell pepper, shallot, and garlic and cook, stirring occasionally, until shallot and garlic are softened slightly, about 3 minutes. Sprinkle in curry powder, turmeric, and coriander and cook, stirring, until fragrant, about 30 seconds. Add coconut milk, lime zest, lime juice, and coconut sugar; season with salt. Reduce heat to medium-low; cook, stirring, until slightly thickened, about 2 minutes. Add cauliflower and raisins; cook, tossing occasionally, until cauliflower is just tender, about 3 minutes. Taste and season with more salt if needed.

Add cilantro, pumpkin seeds, and ¼ cup mint to cauliflower rice and toss to combine. Divide among bowls; top with a dollop of yogurt if using and torn mint. Serve with lime wedges for squeezing over if desired.

name: All-fruit Smoothies
instructions: Pour pineapple juice into a blender and add banana, strawberries, and blueberries. Cover and blend until smooth, about 1 minute. Pour into 2 glasses.

name: All-purpose Ancho Spice Rub
instructions: Whisk ancho chile powder, paprika, mustard powder, coriander, oregano, cumin, salt, pepper, and chile de árbol in an airtight container; cover.
DO AHEAD: Rub can be made 1 month ahead. Store at room temperature in a dark place.

name: All-purpose Coconut Curry

ingredients.item: . (or more) grapeseed oil or vegetable oil

instructions: Pulse ginger and garlic in a food processor, adding a few drops of oil if needed to help blend smoothly, until a coarse paste forms. (Alternatively, you can finely grate ginger and garlic with a Microplane.)

Heat oil in a medium Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium-high. Add a few mustard seeds to the pot. When seeds start to wiggle and pop, reduce heat to medium and add curry leaves (if using), asafetida (if using), and remaining mustard seeds. Cover pot and cook spices, swirling, until mustard seeds start popping more gradually, about 30 seconds. Uncover pot and return heat to medium-high. Add ginger-and-garlic paste and cook, stirring constantly, until beginning to brown, about 1 minute. Add red onions and a big pinch of salt and cook, stirring often and reducing heat if needed to prevent burning, until onions are golden brown and jammy, 10–12 minutes.

Stir in turmeric, then tomatoes and bring to a simmer. Reduce heat to medium and cook, stirring often, until tomatoes are glossy and darkened in color and oil starts to separate around edges of pot, 7–9 minutes.

Add coconut milk and broth and stir to combine; season with salt. Bring curry to a simmer, then reduce heat to medium-low. Cover and cook another 10 minutes, stirring every couple of minutes to prevent sticking and burning. Taste curry and season with more salt if needed.
Do Ahead: Curry can be made 5 days ahead. Let cool, then transfer to an airtight container and chill, or freeze up to 3 months. If frozen, thaw in the refrigerator before using.

name: All-purpose Fry Batter

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Vigorously whisk 1 cup (125 g) all-purpose flour, ¾ cup (107 g) rice flour, ½ tsp. baking powder, and ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a large bowl to combine. Pour in one 12-oz. can seltzer, whisking constantly to ensure a lump-free batter.

Pour vegetable oil (for frying; about 11 cups) into a large Dutch oven or other heavy pot to come 2" up sides. Heat over medium-high until a thermometer, preferably a digital instant-read, inserted into the oil registers 350°. Working in batches, dip 1 lb. food of choice into batter, gently shaking off excess. Slide into oil and cook, stirring and turning occasionally to prevent sticking, until golden brown, 4–8 minutes, depending on the size of your food.

Using a spider or slotted spoon, transfer food to a large plate or rimmed baking sheet lined with paper towels and let drain. Sprinkle lightly with salt while still hot.
Do ahead: Dry ingredients for batter can be combined 3 months ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.

name: All-purpose No-salt Seasoning Mix
instructions: Mix together garlic powder, basil, parsley, savory, thyme, mace, onion powder, black pepper, sage, and cayenne pepper in a bowl.
Store in a sealed jar.

name: All-purpose Pie Dough
instructions: Stir sugar, vinegar, and 2 Tbsp. hot water in a small measuring glass to dissolve sugar. Add ⅓ cup ice water and stir to melt ice; chill in freezer until very cold, about 10 minutes (do not let it freeze).

Pulse flour, butter, and salt in a food processor until largest pieces of butter are pea-size. Turn out onto a work surface and, using the heel of your hand, smash butter into flour to flatten. Working quickly, continue smashing butter into flour until mixture is pale yellow and resembles coarse meal. Gather into a mound and make a well in the center. Pour in sugar mixture, using your fingertips to slowly incorporate into flour; work in until only a few dry spots remain. Knead until no dry spots remain and dough holds together when pressed.
Divide dough in half, flatten into disks, and wrap each in plastic. Chill until firm, at least 2 hours.
Do Ahead: Dough can be made 3 days ahead. Keep chilled, or freeze up to 1 month.

name: All-purpose Pizza Dough

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or 1 tbsp. plus 2 0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Whisk 2 tsp. honey, ½ tsp. active dry yeast, and 2½ cups water in the bowl of a stand mixer until honey and yeast are dissolved.

Fit bowl onto mixer fitted with the dough hook attachment. Add ⅔ cup (83 g) whole wheat flour and 3 cups (375 g) Italian 00 flour or bread flour and mix on medium-low speed, scraping down sides of bowl as needed, until mixture resembles pancake batter, about 4 minutes. Add 3 Tbsp. Diamond Crystal or 1 Tbsp. plus 2¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt and remaining 3 cups (375 g) Italian 00 flour or bread flour; mix until dough forms a ball, about 2 minutes. Increase speed to high and continue to mix until dough is smooth and sticky and pulls away from sides of bowl, 8–10 minutes more.
Remove bowl from mixer and cover with plastic wrap. Let sit at room temperature 5 hours, then chill at least 12 hours and up to 2 days.
Divide dough into 4 portions and form into balls; place on a lightly oiled baking sheet. Cover with an upturned baking sheet and let sit at room temperature 4 hours.

name: All-purpose Vinaigrette

ingredients.item: Sherry vinegar or red wine vinegar

instructions: Whisk oil, vinegar, shallot, and thyme in a small bowl. Season with salt and pepper.
Do Ahead: Dressing can be made 4 days ahead. Cover and chill.

name: Allie's Espresso Kahlua® Liqueur
instructions: Stir brown sugar into espresso in a bowl or container with a spout until dissolved; stir in rum.
Pour mixture into a clean, dark bottle; add vanilla bean.
Seal bottle tightly with a lid and let sit for 1 month before drinking.

name: Allium Confit

ingredients.prep: white and pale green parts only, coarsely chopped

ingredients.item: Coarsely chopped green garlic or whole garlic cloves

instructions: Bring chives, leek, green garlic, and oil to a simmer in a large saucepan over medium heat (this will take some time—be patient!) and cook 2 minutes. Let cool (alliums will soften and finish cooking as they sit).
Transfer to an airtight container; cover and chill.

name: Almeirim Cod Stew
instructions: Corte as postas de bacalhau ao meio; corte os enchidos em pedaços ou rodelas; descasque e corte as batatas em rodelas; descasque a cebola e os dentes de alho, corte a cebola em rodelas e pique os dentes de alho; corte os tomates em rodelas; lave a couve e corte-a em pequenos pedaços.

Leve ao lume um tacho com o azeite e deixe aquecer. Junte a cebola, os dentes de alho, o pimentão-doce, sal e pimenta e deixe refogar. Acrescente depois o tomate, os enchidos, as batatas, a água e o vinho branco e deixe cozinhar durante 15 minutos.
De seguida, retifique os temperos, adicione a couve, o bacalhau e a massa, regue com mais água a ferver, se necessário, e deixe cozinhar, em lume brando, durante mais 15 minutos. Sirva quente.

name: Almejas Con Alguashte
instructions: Toast coriander seeds in a dry small skillet over medium heat until very fragrant and just beginning to smoke, about 1 minute. Let cool slightly.
Transfer seeds to a food processor and pulse until coarsely ground. Add tomatoes, onion, garlic, jalapeños, cilantro stems, and achiote seeds and pulse until a coarse purée forms, about 1 minute.

Heat oil in a large Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium-high. Add purée and ½ cup Alguashte. Cook, stirring often with a wooden spoon, until thickened (spoon will leave a trail) and a few shades darker, 12–15 minutes. Add wine and cook until evaporated and spoon again leaves a trail when dragged through, about 3 minutes.
Add clams to pot and stir to coat. Reduce heat to medium-low, cover pot, and cook until clams have opened, 8–12 minutes. Fish out and discard any clams that have not opened after 15 minutes.
Squeeze limes over clams and toss to incorporate. If broth looks too thick, add a few tablespoonfuls of water. Taste and season with salt if needed.
To serve, sprinkle remaining 2 Tbsp. Alguashte over clams and top with cilantro leaves.

name: Almond 'you Must Be Nuts!' Crackers
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Mix almond flour, walnuts, flax seed meal, and salt together in a bowl until well combined. Add water and olive oil; mix until dough is moist and holds together.

Turn dough onto the prepared baking sheet. Place a second piece of parchment over the dough and use a rolling pin to roll it into a 1/16-inch-thick rectangle. Remove the top piece of parchment and cut the sides of dough to make an even rectangle. Add excess dough to corners or one end of the rectangle and re-roll to a uniform thickness.
Cut dough into 1-inch squares using a pizza cutter, keeping dough still attached.
Bake in the preheated oven until the outside edges of dough are browned, about 15 minutes. Cool crackers on the baking sheet, then break into squares.

name: Almond Aioli
instructions: Purée almonds, oil, salt, and ½ cup water in a high-powered blender on high speed until thick, light, and smooth, about 3 minutes.
Aioli can be made 2 days ahead. Cover and chill. Thin with water if needed.

name: Almond And Grain Sorrels
instructions: Faça a massa: deite a farinha numa tigela, junte a margarina e a banha e misture muito bem até que fique um género de areia húmida. Numa tigela à parte, bata o ovo com a água, adicione ao preparado e amasse, sem trabalhar muito, até que fique uma massa homogénea.

O recheio: leve um tacho ao lume com a água, o Açúcar Amarelo RAR, a casca de limão e o pau de canela, mexa e deixe ferver durante cerca de 10 minutos. Escorra e passe o grão cozido pelo passevite, junte ao tacho, adicione também a amêndoa granulada e mexa até começar a ferver. Numa tigela, bata as gemas, adicione um pouco da mistura do tacho mexendo sempre, junte ao tacho e deixe cozinhar, mexendo continuamente até começar a engrossar. Retire do lume e deixe arrefecer.

Estenda a massa numa bancada polvilhada com farinha, disponha um pouco do recheio, pincele à volta com um pouco de água, dobre e corte em formato de rissol. Repita a operação até acabar o recheio e a massa e leve depois as azevias fritar até ficarem douradinhas de ambos os lados. Deixe escorrer sobre uma folha de papel de cozinha, depois passe por açúcar em pó e sirva decoradas a gosto.

name: Almond And Lemon Cookies With Chocolate
original_name: Galletas de almendra y limón con chocolate

ingredients.item: 40 gr de harina de trigo común
60 gr de azúcar mascabo o azúcar de coco
60 gr de mantequilla sin sal, a temperatura ambiente
Ralladura fina de 1 limón orgánico grande
1 cda de jugo de limón recién exprimido
1 cdita de extracto natural de vainilla
80 gr de chocolate oscuro con un mínimo de 70 % de cacao
1 cdita de aceite de coco o manteca de cacao (opcional)

instructions: En un bol amplio, mezcla la mantequilla con el azúcar hasta obtener una crema suave y homogénea.
Incorpora el huevo, la vainilla, la ralladura y el jugo de limón. Mezcla hasta integrar sin batir en exceso.
En otro recipiente, combina la harina de almendra, la harina de trigo, la sal y el polvo de hornear.
Añade los secos a la mezcla húmeda en dos tandas, integrando con espátula hasta formar una masa blanda pero manejable.
Refrigera la masa durante 20 minutos para que tome cuerpo y concentre aromas.
Precalienta el horno a 170 °C.
Forma pequeñas bolas con las manos ligeramente húmedas y colócalas sobre una bandeja con papel de hornear, aplastándolas suavemente.
Hornea durante 12–14 minutos, hasta que los bordes estén apenas dorados pero el centro aún tierno.
Retira del horno y deja enfriar completamente antes de manipular.
Derrite el chocolate a baño María o en intervalos cortos en microondas. Agrega el aceite de coco si buscas un acabado más brillante.
Baña parcialmente cada galleta en el chocolate y colócalas sobre papel antiadherente hasta que solidifique.

name: Almond And Lemon Cream Cake
instructions: 1. Yumurta ile pudra şekerini mikserle çırpın.
2.  Süt, ayçiçek yağı, vanilin, elenmiş un ve hamur kabartma tozunu ekleyip karıştırın.
3.  Son olarak bademleri ilave edip karıştıramaya devam edin.
4.  Kek kalıbını yağlayıp hamuru aktarın.
5.  Önceden ısıtılmış 180 derece fırında kürdan batırıldığında temiz çıkıncaya kadar pişirin.
6.  Soğumaya bırakın.
7.  Labne peyniri, krem şanti, pudra şekeri ve şekerli vanilini mikserle çırpın.
8.  Limon kabuğunun yarısını kremaya karıştırın.
9.  Keki dilimlere bölüp üzerine krema sürün.
10.  Kalan limon kabuğu ile süsleyip servis yapın.
11. Klasik limon kremalı kek tarifine göz atmayı unutmayın.

name: Almond And Meat Pastry
instructions: 1. 30 gr tereyağını tavada eritip dolmalık fıstık ve bademleri kavurun.
2.  Kıyılmış soğanları ekleyip kısık ateşte kavurmaya devam edin.
3.  Etleri ve baharatları ekleyip 20 dakika pişirin.
4.  Hamur için, unu ve tuzu hamur yoğurma kabında harmanlayın.
5.  Ortasını havuz şeklinde açarak yumurtaları ve suyu ekleyin.
6.  İyice karıştırıp yumuşak bir hamur yoğurun.
7.  Hamuru buzdolabında 15 dakika bekletin.
8.  Hamuru iki eşit parçaya bölün.
9.  15X25 cm’lik dikdörtgenler şeklinde açın.
10.  İki hamurun üzerine tereyağının yarısını sürüp katlayın.
11.  Buzdolabında 15 dakika bekletin.
12.  Hamurları buzdolabından çıkarıp tekrar aynı büyüklükte açın.
13.  Üzerlerine kalan tereyağını sürüp tekrar katlayarak buzdolabında 15 dakika daha bekletin.
14.  Soğuk hamurları tekrar 15x25 cm ebatlarında açın.
15.  Hazırladığınız iç malzemeyi hamur parçalarının birinin üzerine yayın.
16.  Diğer hamur parçasını da iç malzemenin üzerine yerleştirin.
17.  İki hamuru kenarlarından iyice bastırarak kapatın.
18.  Üzerine çırpılmış yumurta sarısı sürün.
19.  Önceden ısıtılmış 180 derece fırında 25 dakika pişirin.
20.  Sıcak servis yapın.

name: Almond And Minced Meat Pie
instructions: 1. Kıymayı tavada ayçiçek yağında kavurun.
2.  Küp doğradığınız soğanları ekleyerek kavurmaya devam edin.
3.  Tuz, karabiber, badem, tarçın ve kıyılmış maydanozu ekleyerek soğumaya bırakın.
4.  Hamur için yoğurma kabına margarin, yumurta ve yoğurdu ekleyin.
5.  Telle çırparak sirke, kabartma tozu, vanilya, tuz ve unu ekleyin.
6.  20 dakika dinlendirdiğiniz hamuru iki eşit parçaya bölün.
7.  Merdane yardımıyla hamurları yuvarlak biçimde açın.
8.  İlk parçayı yağlanmış tepsiye yerleştirin.
9.  Üzerine hazırladığınız iç harcı yayarak kenarlarına yumurta sarısı sürün.
10.  Açtığınız diğer hamurun ortasından bir kase yardımıyla bir parça kesip çıkarın.
11.  Kalan simit şeklindeki hamuru diğerinin üzerine yerleştirerek kenarlarını bastırın.
12.  Üzerine yumurta sarısı sürerek susam serpin.
13.  Önceden 170 derecede ısıttığınız fırında üzeri kızarana kadar pişirin.
14.  Servis yapın.

name: Almond And Oat Quiche
instructions: 1. Hamur için kuru malzemeleri yoğurma kabına alıp harmanlayın.
2.  Tereyağını ekleyin.
3.  Hamur çok sert ise azar azar soğuk su ilave edebilirsiniz.
4.  Hamuru yağlanmış tart kalıbına elinizle bastırarak yerleştirin.
5.  Tabanını çatal yardımı ile hafif delin.
6.  180 derece ısıtılmış fırında, 15 dakika pişirin.
7. Yağı bir tavada ısıtın.
8.  Soğanı, pazıyı ve biberleri birkaç dakika kavurun.
9.  Sonra sütü, jambonu ve baharatı ekleyip ocaktan alın.
10.  Soğuyunca çırpılmış yumurtaları ekleyip karıştırın.
11. Ön pişirmesini yaptığınız hamuru fırından alın.
12.  İç malzemesini döküp en son küp kesilmiş peyniri serpin.
13.  20-25 dakika daha pişirin.

name: Almond And Parsley Salsa Verde
instructions: Combine chopped almonds and parsley on a cutting board; chop together again until very finely chopped.
Transfer almond mixture to a bowl and add garlic. Stir olive oil into almond mixture until a thick sauce forms.

name: Almond And Raisin Agrodolce

ingredients.prep: very thinly sliced, rinsed, patted dry

instructions: Place raisins in a medium bowl and pour vinegar over (it should cover raisins). Let sit, stirring occasionally, 10 minutes for raisins to soften.
Meanwhile, combine oil and almonds in a small skillet and set over medium heat. Cook, stirring occasionally, until flesh is golden brown, about 5 minutes. Transfer to a small bowl and let cool.
Mix raisins, onion, lemon zest, and red pepper flakes into almonds; season with salt. Let sit 10 minutes.
Toss in parsley just before serving.

name: Almond And Raspberry Swirl Ice Cream
instructions: Bring raspberries, sugar, and ¼ tsp. salt to a simmer in a medium saucepan over medium heat and cook, stirring often, until raspberries begin to burst and lose their shape, about 4 minutes. Strain through a fine-mesh sieve into a large measuring glass, pressing on solids; discard solids. Pour back into saucepan and return to medium heat. Cook, stirring occasionally, until sauce is thick enough to coat a spoon, 10–15 minutes. (You should have about 6 Tbsp.) Transfer back to measuring glass and chill until cold, about 30 minutes.
Mix condensed milk, almond extract, and remaining ¾ tsp. salt in a medium bowl to combine.
Using an electric mixer, beat cream in a medium bowl, starting on low speed and gradually increasing to medium-high as it thickens, until billowy and stiff peaks form, about 4 minutes.

Add a dollop of whipped cream to condensed milk mixture and mix in with a rubber spatula (this is just to lighten it so that the next stage—folding—is easier). Add remaining whipped cream; fold in, running spatula down sides and along bottom of bowl, then lifting up through center and over top while rotating bowl to integrate without deflating, until very few streaks of condensed milk mixture remain.

Scrape about one third of ice cream base into a loaf pan that’s at least 8½x4½". Drizzle over one third of raspberry syrup. Repeat layers 2 more times, ending with raspberry syrup (no need to be precise). Using a small offset spatula or butter knife, make figure-eight motions through ice cream base to swirl raspberry syrup throughout. Cover with plastic wrap or an airtight silicone lid and freeze until solid, at least 8 hours.
To serve, transfer loaf pan to refrigerator and let ice cream soften 10 minutes before scooping into bowls.
Do ahead: Ice cream can be made 1 week ahead. Keep frozen.

name: Almond And Turkish Coffee Cookies
instructions: 1. Süt, vanilya, Türk kahvesi ve pudra şekerini geniş bir kasede karıştırın.
2.  Tereyağı, yumurta sarıları, un ve kabartma tozunu ilave edip pürüzsüz bir hamur elde edecek şekilde yoğurun.
3.  Hamurun üzerini streç filme sarıp buzdolabında 20 dakika dinlendirin.
4.  Yumurta aklarını bir kaseye alın.
5. Dinlenen hamurdan ceviz büyüklüğünde parçalar kopartın.
6.  Elinizle yuvarlayarak şekil verip önce yumurta akına sonra toz bademe bulayın ve yağlı kağıt serili fırın tepsisine dizin.
7.  Önceden ısıtılmış 170 derece fırında 20 dakika pişirin.
8.  Soğuk servis yapın.

name: Almond Baklava Recipe
instructions: 1. Unu geniş bir kaba eleyerek başlayın.
2.  Ayrı bir kapta su, sıvı yağ, sirke, tuz ve yumurtayı çırpıcı ya da çatal yardımıyla karıştırın.
3.  Sıvı karışımın üzerine unu kontrollü şekilde ilave ederek yumuşak kıvamlı bir hamur elde edin.
4.  Hamuru hafif unlanmış tezgaha alıp birkaç dakika yoğurarak pürüzsüz bir yapı kazandırın.
5. Hazırladığınız hamuru eşit parçalara ayırın ve her birini avuç içinde yuvarlayarak beze haline getirin.
6.  Bezeleri nişasta serpilmiş bir tepsiye aralıklı dizin.
7.  Üzerlerini streç film ya da hafif nemli bir bezle örterek yaklaşık bir saat dinlendirin.
8. Şeker ve suyu bir tencereye alın.
9.  Orta ateşte karıştırarak şekerin tamamen erimesini sağlayın.
10.  Karışım kaynamaya başladığında limon suyunu ekleyin ve kısık ateşte bir süre daha kaynatın.
11.  Kıvam alan şurubu ocaktan alıp tamamen soğumaya bırakın.
12. Bademleri derin bir kaba alın ve üzerlerini geçecek kadar sıcak su ekleyin.
13.  Bir süre beklettikten sonra kabuklarını kolayca soyun.
14.  Kabuksuz bademleri mutfak robotunda çok ince olmayacak şekilde çekin.
15.  Bir kaba alıp toz şekerle karıştırın.
16.  Ardından sütü ilave ederek iç harcı nemli ama dağılmayacak bir kıvama getirin.
17. Tereyağını kısık ateşte eritin.
18.  Üzerinde oluşan köpüğü alarak daha berrak bir yağ elde edin; dibinde kalan sütlü kısmı kullanmayın.
19. Dinlenen bezelerden birini nişasta serpilmiş tezgaha alın.
20.  Üzerine de nişasta serperek oklava yardımıyla oldukça ince açın.
21.  Açtığınız yufkayı tepsi ölçüsünde kesip yerleştirin.
22.  Kenarda kalan parçaları da tepsiye ekleyin ve üzerine eritilmiş tereyağından sürün.
23. Altı kat olacak şekilde aralara yağ sürerek işlemi tekrarlayın.
24.  Ardından hazırladığınız bademli harcı eşit şekilde yayın.
25.  Kalan bezeleri de aynı yöntemle açıp kat kat yerleştirin, her katın arasına tereyağı sürmeyi unutmayın.
26. Baklavayı dilimleyin.
27.  Eritilmiş ve köpüğü alınmış tereyağını dilimlerin üzerine gezdirerek her yerine ulaşmasını sağlayın.
28. Önceden ısıtılmış fırında önce yüksek ayarda kısa süre pişirin, ardından ısıyı düşürerek içinin de iyice kızarmasını sağlayın.
29.  Üzeri nar gibi kızaran tatlıyı fırından çıkarın ve birkaç dakika dinlendirin.
30. Soğuyan şurubu sıcak baklavanın üzerine gezdirin.
31.  Tatlının şerbetini çekmesi için birkaç saat bekletin.
32.  Servis öncesi dilerseniz bademle süsleyerek sunabilirsiniz.
33.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Almond Biscotti
instructions: Stir 1 cup (200 g) sugar, ½ cup (1 stick) unsalted butter, melted, 3 Tbsp. brandy, 2 tsp. pure almond extract, and 1 tsp. pure vanilla extract with a wooden spoon in a large bowl to combine. Add 1 cup whole almonds with skin, lightly toasted, cooled, and coarsely chopped, and 3 large eggs, lightly beaten, and stir vigorously to combine. Sift in 2¾ (344 g) cups all-purpose flour, 1½ tsp. baking powder, and ¼ tsp. kosher salt and stir until just combined and no floury streaks remain. Chill dough, covered, 30 minutes.
Place rack in center of oven; preheat oven to 177°C.

Using moistened hands, divide chilled dough in half and form 2 (16x2") loaves on an ungreased large baking sheet. Bake until pale golden, about 30 minutes. Carefully transfer loaves to a rack and cool 15 minutes.

Cut loaves into ¾" slices with a serrated knife. Arrange biscotti, with a cut side down, on a clean baking sheet and bake until golden, 20–25 minutes. Transfer to wire rack to cool completely.
Do ahead: Biscotti improve in flavor if made 1–2 days ahead. Keep in an airtight container at room temperature.

Editor's note: This recipe was first printed in the January 2009 issue of ‘Gourmet’ as Nonna’s Biscotti.

name: Almond Bread
instructions: 1. Badem ununu, peyniri, kabartma tozunu ve tuzu bir kaba alarak karıştırın.
2.  Peynirin bir miktarını daha sonra kullanmak üzere ayırın.
3. Bir başka kapta yumurta beyazlarını kabarana kadar mikser ile çırpın.
4.  Hindistan cevizi yağını ekledikten sonra yaptığınız badem unu karışımını bir spatula yardımıyla yavaş yavaş ilave edin.
5.  Elde ettiğiniz karışımı yağladığınız herhangi bir kek kalıbına alarak üzerine çörekotu, ay ve kabak çekirdeği ile susamı ekleyin.
6.  Son olarak  ayırdığınız mozarella peynirini ilave edin ve daha önceden 170 dereceye ısıtılmış fırında 30 dakika süreyle pişirin.
7. Üzeri kızarınca fırından çıkarın ve soğuması için bekletin.
8.  Soğuduktan sonra dilimleyerek servis edin.
9. 1 Porsiyon Badem Ekmeği Kaç Kalori?Badem ekmeğinin bir porsiyonu, yaklaşık 165 kaloridir.

name: Almond Bread Pudding With Salted Caramel Sauce

ingredients.prep: crust removed and discarded, cut into 3/4-inch-thick slices (10-12 slices)

ingredients.item: An 8-inch-diameter cake pan with 2-inch-high sides and a 3-inch biscuit cutter

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Spread out almonds on a rimmed baking sheet; toast, tossing halfway through, until beginning to brown, 12-15 minutes. Let cool.
Transfer cooled almonds to a food processor. Add butter, almond extract, if using, and salt, and process until mixture is the texture of coarsely ground peanut butter. Set aside.

Whisk sugar, cream of tartar, and 3 tablespoons water in a medium saucepan. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat, stirring to dissolve sugar. Cook, without stirring, until mixture begins to caramelize in spots. Using a heatproof spatula, stir mixture to ensure even caramelization. Cook, stirring occasionally, until mixture is the color of honey, 10-12 minutes. Reduce heat to medium-low and continue to cook, stirring occasionally, until caramel is a deep amber color, about 5 minutes longer.

Remove caramel from heat; carefully whisk in butter (mixture will bubble vigorously), then cream and salt. Let cool slightly in pan, then pour into a small bowl. DO AHEAD: Caramel sauce can be made 2 weeks ahead. Let cool completely, cover, and chill. Rewarm before using.
Combine half-and-half and cream in a medium saucepan. Scrape in seeds from vanilla bean; add bean. Bring to a simmer over medium-high heat; remove from heat.

Whisk egg yolks, eggs, sugar, and salt in a medium bowl to blend. Gradually whisk hot cream mixture into egg mixture. Cover custard with plastic wrap and let stand for 30 minutes for flavors to meld. Strain custard into a large bowl; discard vanilla bean.

Preheat oven to 350°. Butter cake pan; set aside. Using biscuit cutter, cut out circles from each slice of bread, reserving scraps. Arrange bread scraps in pan in an even layer and press lightly to compact.

Spread each bread round with almond butter (you will have a little left over; save to spread on toast for breakfast). Place all but 1 bread round almond butter side down in pan (on top of scraps), overlapping slightly to create a shingled circle. Place the last round in the center (bread will come about 3/4-inch–1-inch above rim of pan).
Pour custard evenly over bread. Sprinkle with almonds and raw sugar.

Place cake pan in a large roasting pan. Pour hot water into roasting pan to come halfway up the sides of cake pan. Cover roasting pan with foil, tenting slightly in center if needed to avoid touching bread.

Bake pudding until top no longer jiggles but center is not quite set, 25-30 minutes. Remove foil from pan and increase oven temperature to 375°. Bake pudding until custard is set in the center and top is golden brown and crisp, about 25 minutes longer.
Remove cake pan from roasting pan. Let cool slightly. Dust pudding with powdered sugar. Slice into wedges. Place on plates, drizzle caramel sauce over and top with a dollop of crème fraîche.

name: Almond Butter And Jam Bread

ingredients.prep: or scant  0.75 cup milk or oat milk plus 1 Tbsp. apple cider vinegar

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Butter a 9x5x3" loaf pan. Line pan with parchment, then butter parchment.
Whisk all-purpose flour, rye flour, baking powder, cinnamon, and 1¼ tsp. salt in a medium bowl.

Whisk egg yolks, oil, and vanilla in a large bowl. Add almond butter and whisk until smooth. Add brown sugar and buttermilk and whisk until smooth. Sift dry ingredients into egg yolk mixture, then fold gently to combine.
Whisk egg whites in another medium bowl until frothy, about 2 minutes. Fold into batter until incorporated.
Pour half of batter into pan. Dollop half of jam over. Using a small offset spatula or butter knife, swirl into batter. Pour in remaining batter. Dollop remaining jam over and swirl again.
Mix almonds, raw sugar, and a pinch of salt in a small bowl. Sprinkle evenly over batter.

Bake bread until risen, almonds are toasted, and a tester inserted into the center comes out clean, 50–60 minutes. Transfer pan to a wire rack and let cool 5 minutes, then remove loaf from pan and let cool completely, at least 1 hour.
Do Ahead: Bread can be made 4 days ahead. Wrap tightly in plastic and store at room temperature.

name: Almond Butter Blueberry Toast
instructions: Spread almond butter over the toast and top with blueberries.
Sprinkle granola on top.
Enjoy!

name: Almond Butter Cups
instructions: First, line a mini-cupcake tin with paper liners.
Next, melt chocolate chips in a microwave-safe bowl.
Then, mix the powdered sugar and almond butter together for a thick consistency.
Once the chocolate chips are melted, place a thin layer of chocolate on each liner. Then, add a spoonful of the almond butter concoction on top of each layer of chocolate.
Top with another layer of chocolate, completely concealing the almond butter.
Finally, place the tray in the freezer and freeze for 1.5 hours.
Serve and enjoy!

name: Almond Butter Energy Bites With Date & Coconut
instructions: Combine dates, almonds, almond butter, salt, and half of the coconut in a food processor and blend until a sticky dough forms. (If dough is not coming together, add one tablespoon of water and continue blending.)
Wet your hands and form dough into 2 tablespoon-sized ball. Roll in remaining shredded coconut.
Let dry at room temperature for 2 hours before serving. Store in an airtight container.
Enjoy!

name: Almond Butter Honey Oat Bars
instructions: In a medium bowl, add oats, nut butter, and honey or maple syrup, and mix until well combined.
Spray baking dish with cooking spray. Pour in mixture and spread evenly.
Cover and place in freezer until firm.
Cut into bars. Keep in the fridge until ready to eat.
Enjoy!

name: Almond Butter Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 cda de aceite de almendras (o aceite neutro)

instructions: Precalienta el horno a 170 °C.
Esparce las almendras en una bandeja.
Tuesta las almendras en el horno de 10 a 12 minutos a  170 °C. A la mitad de cocción, muévelas para lograr un tostado parejo.
Retira del horno y deja reposar hasta que estén tibias.
Incorpora las almendras en un procesador potente.
Procesa hasta que tengas una textura arenosa.
Procesa nuevamente para que la almendra vaya desprendiendo su aceite natural.
Mientras vas procesando, pausa por momentos para raspar las almendras que se adhieren en las paredes del procesador.
Continúa procesando hasta lograr una pasta homogénea, sedosa y untuosa.
Incorpora la pizca de sal marina y el aceite de almendras o neutro. Mezcla ligeramente hasta integrar.
Pasa la mantequilla de almendras a un envase hermético y estará lista para disfrutar.

name: Almond Cake

ingredients.item: Χτυπημένη κρέμα γάλακτος ή γιαούρτι για το σερβίρισμα
Χτυπημένη κρέμα γάλακτος ή γιαούρτι για το σερβίρισμα

instructions: Προθερμαίνουμε το φούρνο στους 140-150°C, στις αντιστάσεις. Αλείφουμε με λίγο βούτυρο μια στρογγυλή φόρμα ή ένα μικρό ταψί διαμέτρου 22 εκ. και στρώνουμε αντικολλητικό χαρτί στη βάση του.
Χτυπάμε σε ένα μπολ με μίξερ χειρός το βούτυρο για 1 λεπτό να μαλακώσει.
Προσθέτουμε τη ζάχαρη συνεχίζοντας το χτύπημα για περίπου 3 λεπτά, μέχρι να διαλυθεί τελείως και να αποκτήσουμε ένα μείγμα με κρεμώδη υφή.
Ενσωματώνουμε τους κρόκους των αυγών, έναν έναν, και στη συνέχεια το αλεσμένο αμύγδαλο , με το μίξερ πάντα σε λειτουργία.
Ρίχνουμε το ξύσμα λεμονιού και τη βανίλια και συνεχίζουμε το χτύπημα μέχρι να ομογενοποιηθούν πλήρως τα υλικά.
Σε καθαρό κάδο του μίξερ και με καθαρά εργαλεία χτυπάμε τα ασπράδια των αυγών και το αλάτι, σε μέτρια ταχύτητα, μέχρι να αποκτήσουμε μια σταθερή μαρέγκα.

Όταν σχηματιστούν απαλές κορυφές στην επιφάνειά της, είναι έτοιμη. Τη ρίχνουμε, κουταλιά κουταλιά, στο μείγμα του κέικ, αναδιπλώνοντας απαλά, με μαλακή σπάτουλα, από κάτω προς τα πάνω, για να μη χάσουμε τον όγκο της μαρέγκας.
Αδειάζουμε το μισό μείγμα μέσα στο έτοιμο ταψί.
Ακουμπάμε από πάνω λίγα κόκκινα φρούτα χωρίς να τα πιέσουμε να μπουν μέσα στη ζύμη.
Καλύπτουμε με το υπόλοιπο μείγμα.
Γαρνίρουμε την επιφάνεια του γλυκού με τα υπόλοιπα φρούτα.

Ψήνουμε το κέικ στην κάτω σχάρα του προθερμασμένου φούρνου για περίπου μία ώρα, μέχρι να σταθεροποιηθεί και να βγαίνει καθαρή από ζύμη η λάμα του μαχαιριού που θα βυθίσουμε στο κέντρο του. Εναλλακτικά, ψήνουμε στον αέρα, στη μεσαία σχάρα του φούρνου, στους 140°C, μέχρι να φουσκώσει, να ροδίσει και να σταθεροποιηθεί το κέντρο του.
Αφήνουμε το κέικ αμυγδάλου στον πάγκο της κουζίνας να κρυώσει τελείως. Το ξεφορμάρουμε σε πιατέλα και το σερβίρουμε με χτυπημένη κρέμα γάλακτος και λίγα κόκκινα φρούτα.

name: Almond Cake Cannoli Trifle
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease and flour a 10-inch fluted tube pan (such as Bundt).

Combine cake mix, water, eggs, pudding mix, and almond extract in a bowl. Blend on low with an electric mixer until moistened. Increase speed to medium and blend about 2 minutes more. Pour into the prepared pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean, 40 to 45 minutes. Cool in the pan for 25 minutes; transfer cake to cooling rack.
Combine ricotta cheese, 1 cup confectioners' sugar, white sugar, and vanilla extract in a bowl. Whip cannoli cream until smooth using an electric mixer.

Beat heavy cream in a chilled glass or metal bowl with an electric mixer until foamy. Add 1/4 cup confectioners' sugar and 1 teaspoon vanilla extract at a time to achieve desired sweetness, continuing to beat until cream is stiff.

Transfer cooled cake to a cutting board and cut into small, bite-size pieces. Arrange 1 layer of cake pieces to cover the bottom of a trifle bowl. Top with a layer of chocolate chips and the cannoli cream. Continue with layers until bowl is nearly full; top with the whipped cream and chocolate chips.

name: Almond Cake Recipe
instructions: 1. Yumurtaları ve toz şekeri derin bir karıştırma kabına alın.
2.  Mikserle 3–4 dakika çırparak karışımın açık renkli ve köpüksü bir kıvam almasını sağlayın.
3. Eritilmiş tereyağını ve sütü ekleyip kısa süre daha karıştırın.
4. Toz badem ve Hindistan cevizini ilave ederek homojen olana kadar karıştırmaya devam edin.
5. Ayrı bir kapta un, kabartma tozu, vanilya ve tarçını karıştırın.
6.  Kuru malzemeleri eleyerek sıvı karışıma ekleyin ve spatula ile nazikçe karıştırın.
7. Kek hamurunu yağlanmış veya yağlı kağıt serilmiş kek kalıbına dökün.
8.  Üzerine bolca file badem serpiştirin.
9. Önceden ısıtılmış 180°C fırında yaklaşık 35–40 dakika pişirin.
10.  Kürdan testi yaparak içinin tamamen piştiğinden emin olun.
11. Fırından çıkan keki 10 dakika dinlendirin, ardından kalıptan çıkarıp dilimleyerek servis edin.
12.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Almond Cake With Apricot Sauce
instructions: 1. Tereyağını minik minik doğrayıp derin bir kaba alın.
2.  Yumuşaması için bir süre oda ısısında bekletin.
3.  Toz şekeri ekleyip krema haline gelinceye kadar çırpın.
4.  Un, badem unu, kuru maya ve yumurtaları ilave edin.
5.  Mikserle topaksız bir kar��şım haline gelinceye kadar karıştırın.
6.  Fırını 180 dereceye ayarlayıp ısıtın.
7.  Isıya dayanıklı 6 küçük kalıbı yağlayın.
8.  Hazırladığınız hamuru kalıplara paylaştırın.
9.  Kalıpların üzerini yağlı kağıtla kapatıp fırında 35-40 dakika pişirin.
10.  Ortasına kürdan batırarak pişip pişmediğini kontrol edin.
11.  Portakal suyu ile likörü bir kapta karıştırın.
12.  Kayısıları ilave edip yumuşayıncaya kadar yaklaşık 30 dakika bekletin.
13.  İçinden 3 kayısıyı çıkarıp ince ince dilimleyin.
14.  Kalan karışıma süt kreması ve pudra şekerini ekleyip robotta çekin.
15.  Hazırladığınız sosu servis tabaklarına paylaştırın.
16.  Kekleri kalıptan çıkarıp tabaklara yerleştirin.
17.  Dilimlediğiniz kayısılarla süsleyip servis yapın.
18.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Almond Cheesecakes
instructions: Faça a massa: numa tigela, misture 100 g do açúcar com os ovos e a manteiga amolecida. Junte depois a farinha e a amêndoa moída, aos poucos e amassando sempre até obter uma massa homogénea.

Faça o recheio: deite o leite num tacho, adicione os restantes 150 g de açúcar e a casca de limão, mexa, leve ao lume, deixe ferver, retire do lume e deixe arrefecer um pouco. Junte as gemas batidas, em fio e mexendo sempre, adicione depois a farinha maisena e leve novamente ao lume, mexendo continuamente e sem deixar ferver, até engrossar.

Unte formas pequenas com manteiga. Estenda a massa, corte-a em rodelas, forre as formas, apare e distribua o recheio. Coloque num tabuleiro e leve ao forno pré-aquecido a 180ºC durante cerca de 35 minutos ou até ficarem bem cozidas. Retire as queijadinhas do forno, deixe-as arrefecer, desenforme-as e sirva-as polvilhadas com amêndoa granulada e açúcar em pó.

name: Almond Contractors
instructions: Χτυπάμε πρώτα τα ασπράδια με το αλάτι σε ελαφριά μαρέγκα με μίξερ χειρός ή με σύρμα.
Σε μπολ βάζουμε την αμυγδαλόψιχα, τη ζάχαρη και τις σταγόνες αμυγδάλου.
Ανακατεύουμε καλά με κουτάλι.
Προσθέτουμε τα χτυπημένα ασπράδια και με κουτάλι ή με σπάτουλα ανακατεύουμε καλά το μείγμα.
Παίρνουμε κουταλιά από το μείγμα και την κυλάμε σε φιλέ αμυγδάλου.
Δίνουμε σχήμα στρογγυλό ή μακρόστενο.
Τα τοποθετούμε σε λαμαρίνα στρωμένη με λαδόκολλα.
Ψήνουμε σε καλά προθερμασμένο φούρνο στους 160 βαθμούς C στον αέρα για περίπου 15΄- 18΄, μέχρι να ροδίσουν.
Τα αφήνουμε να κρυώσουν.

name: Almond Cookie Recipe
instructions: 1. Oda sıcaklığındaki tereyağını ve pudra şekerini bir kaba alın, krema kıvamına gelene kadar karıştırın.
2. Yumurtayı ekleyin ve pürüzsüz olana kadar çırpın.
3. Nişasta ve unu ekleyin, yumuşak ama sıkma torbasından çıkabilecek kıvamda bir hamur elde edin.
4. Hamuru yıldız uç takılmış sıkma torbasına doldurun.
5. Yağlı kâğıt serili tepsiye halka şeklinde sıkın (görseldeki gibi ortası boş olacak).
6. Her kurabiyenin üzerine bir adet badem yerleştirip hafif bastırın.
7. Önceden ısıtılmış 170°C fırında kurabiyeler hafif pembeleşene kadar pişirin.
8. Fırından çıkarınca tepside 5 dakika bekletin, ardından tamamen soğumaya bırakın ve servis edin.
9.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Almond Cookies

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Place racks in upper and lower thirds of oven; preheat oven to 350°. Whisk 2 cups almond flour, ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and ½ tsp. ground cinnamon or cardamom (if using) in a medium bowl to combine.

Whisk 2 large egg whites, 1 cup (200 g) sugar, and 1 Tbsp. rose water in a large bowl just until foamy (don’t get carried away; you’re not making meringue). Fold almond flour mixture into wet ingredients with a rubber spatula until incorporated.

Add a few drops of rose water to a small bowl of room temperature water; dip hands in bowl to moisten (this allows you to make pretty round cookies and not a sticky mess, while also fortifying the cookies with a little more rosiness). Scoop out tablespoonfuls of dough and form into balls between your hands, moistening your hands with more rose water mixture as needed. Transfer to 2 parchment-paper-lined baking sheets as you work, spacing 2" apart. Gently press 1 almond (from 24 raw almonds) into top of each cookie.
Bake cookies, rotating baking sheets top to bottom and front to back halfway through, until spread out and edges are golden, about 15 minutes. Let cool on baking sheets.

name: Almond Cookies (dim Sum Variety)
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Pour a few drops of red food coloring into a small bowl, and set aside.
With an electric mixer, beat the shortening together with the sugar in a mixing bowl until creamy. Beat in the egg and almond extract.

In another bowl, sift together the flour, baking soda, and salt. Stir the flour mixture into the sugar-shortening mixture, and mix well. Scoop up a scant tablespoon of dough with a spoon, and form into a walnut-sized ball. Place the ball onto an ungreased cookie sheet, and press the ball slightly with your thumb to create a flat spot on top (don't flatten the cookie). Dip the end of a bamboo chopstick into the red food coloring, and touch the center of each cookie to make a red dot.
Bake in the preheated oven until slightly browned, 15 to 18 minutes. Cool on a rack.

name: Almond Cookies Recipe

ingredients.item: 100 g  miolo de amêndoa em pó

instructions: Numa tigela, bata bem a margarina com o açúcar até obter um creme. Junte os ovos e bata mais um pouco.
Acrescente o fermento, o bicarbonato e a amêndoa, envolva e depois adicione a farinha aos poucos, mexendo sempre até que a massa fique homogénea.
Molde a massa em bolinhas, disponha-as em tabuleiros untados com margarina e polvilhe a superfície com amêndoa granulada.
Leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 180ºc, durante cerca de 15 a 17 minutos. Retire do forno, descole e deixe arrefecer. Polvilhe com açúcar em pó e sirva.

name: Almond Cookies With Mastic Mastic Recipe
instructions: 1. Bir yoğurma kabına oda sıcaklığındaki tereyağını alın, üzerine pudra şekerini ekleyin ve spatula yardımıyla krema kıvamına gelene kadar karıştırın.
2. Havanda incecik ezdiğiniz damla sakızını karışıma ilave edin ve malzemeler tamamen bütünleşene dek karıştırmaya devam edin.
3. Ayrı bir kapta un, buğday nişastası, vanilya ve kabartma tozunu eleyerek harmanlayın, ardından azar azar tereyağlı karışıma ekleyin.
4. Son olarak file bademleri ilave edin ve ele yapı��mayan, yumuşak dokulu bir hamur yoğurun.
5. Hazırladığınız hamurdan ceviz iriliğinde parçalar koparıp avuç içinde yuvarlayın ve yağlı kâğıt serili fırın tepsisine aralıklı olarak dizin.
6. Fırınınızı önceden 180°C’ye ısıtın.
7.  Kurabiyeleri yaklaşık 15–18 dakika, üstleri hafifçe renk değiştirene kadar pişirin.
8. Pişen kurabiyeleri oda sıcaklığında soğumaya bırakın, ardından üzerlerine pudra şekeri serperek servis edin.

name: Almond Covered Croissant
instructions: 1. Kruvasanları enine ikiye kesin.
2.  Bir kapta tereyağı ve toz şekeri mikser ile iyice karıştırın.
3.  Üzerine yumurta akını ekleyip tekrar karıştırın.
4.  Son olarak badem ununu ilave edip karıştırdıktan sonra 4 (yarı) kruvasana sürün.
5.  Üzerlerine diğer kruvasanları kapatın.
6.  Kruvasanları yumurta akına buladıktan sonra file badem ile iyice kaplayın.
7.  Yağlı kağıt serdiğiniz fırın tepsisine dizin.
8.  Önceden ısıtılmış 170 dereceye ayarlı fırında kızarıncaya kadar pişirin.
9.  Soğuduktan sonra üzerine pudra şeker serpip servis yapın.
10. Dünyanın en popüler tatlılarından biri olan klasik kruvasan tarifini de deneyebilirsiniz.

name: Almond Cranberry Crumble

ingredients.prep: (small drop) or powdered vanilla biscuits (1 tablespoon)

instructions: In a bowl, mix together cereal powder, honey, cocoa powder, and melted butter. Slowly pour the milk and mix thoroughly until it becomes doughy. Mold into the bottom of a separate bowl to form a base crust.
In the mixing bowl, add the oats, biscuit powder, and crushed almonds. Mix thoroughly. Add the cranberries. Mix well.
Drizzle the syrup and let the mixture sit there for 2 minutes.
Mix the syrup well into the crumble (make sure it is evenly mixed). Put the mixture on top of the chocolate tart base and press in evenly. Make sure it is really compact.
Drizzle the milk over it and let it rest.
If desired, drizzle melted dark chocolate on top for a warm taste.
Bake in the microwave for about 2 minutes (may vary).
Serve warm.

name: Almond Cream And Pineapple Tart
instructions: 1. Hamur için gerekli olan malzemeleri çukur bir kabın içine alıp iyice yoğurun.
2.  Streç filme sarıp 30 dakika buzdolabında dinlendirin.
3.  Badem kreması için gerekli olan malzemeleri derin bir kapta mikser yardımıyla çırpın.
4.  Tart hamurunu tezgaha alıp üzerine un serpin.
5.  Merdane yardımıyla dikdörtgen veya kare kalıp büyüklüğüne göre açın.
6.  Yağladığınız kalıba hamuru yerleştirin.
7.  Üzerine badem kremasını döküp yayın.
8.  Ananası dilimleyin ve kremanın üzerine dizin.
9.  Önceden ısıtılmış 170 derece fırında 30-35 dakika pişirin.
10.  Fırından almaya yakın ananasların ortasına böğürtlenleri ekleyip tekrar fırına verin ve 2-3 dakika daha pişirip fırından alın.
11.  Dinlendirdikten sonra servis yapın.
12.  Afiyet olsun.
13. Yeni tatlar denemek için, ananaslı tart tarifine göz atabilirsiniz.

name: Almond Cream Recipe
original_name: Receta de crema de almendras casera
instructions: Prende el horno a 180ºC. En una bandeja para hornear coloca las almendras. Hornea por 3 minutos, saca la bandeja, sacúdela con cuidado y regresa al horno por 3-5 minutos más o hasta que las nueces estén ligeramente doradas y tengan olor a nuez.
Retira del horno y deja que se enfríen hasta que puedas agarrarlas.

Vierte las almendras tostadas a tu procesador de alimentos o licuadora potente. Procesa por 1 minutos y raspa los lados del contenedor con una espátula de silicona. Repite por 2-3 minutos más, hasta que la mantequilla esté brillante y suave.
Agrega sal, canela y vainilla. Procesa por 10-20 segundos más y prueba. Si hace falta agrega un poco más de estos 3 últimos ingredientes.
Sirve en un contenedor y disfruta.

name: Almond Cream-puff Ring
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Lightly grease and flour a cookie sheet or line with parchment paper. Trace a circle on the cookie sheet using a dinner plate as a guide.

Combine water, 1/2 cup butter, and salt in a 2-quart saucepan over medium heat; bring to a boil. Vigorously stir in flour all at once, using a wooden spoon, until mixture forms a ball and pulls away from the sides of the pan. Remove from heat; beat in eggs, one at a time, until smooth. Drop batter into 10 mounds inside the traced circle on the prepared cookie sheet to form a ring.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown, about 40 minutes. Turn off oven, leave ring inside the oven for 15 minutes. Remove from oven; cool on a wire rack.
Meanwhile, combine pudding mix and milk in a bowl to prepare pudding according to package instructions (using only 1 1/4 cups milk); fold in whipped cream and 1 teaspoon almond extract.
When cool, slice ring in half horizontally. Place bottom ring on a serving plate. Spoon almond cream filling on bottom ring; place top ring on top. Chill in the refrigerator.

Place chocolate chips, 1 tablespoon butter, 1 1/2 teaspoons milk, and 1 1/2 teaspoons corn syrup in the top of a double boiler over simmering water. Stir frequently, scraping down the sides with a rubber spatula to avoid scorching, until chocolate is melted and smooth. Spoon over top of chilled ring.

name: Almond Creamy Mushroom Soup Recipe

ingredients.item: 400 gr mantar (kültür veya kestane, ince dilimlenmiş)
5 su bardağı sıcak su veya sebze suyu

instructions: 1. Tencereye tereyağı ve zeytinyağını alın.
2.  Soğanı ekleyip yumuşayana kadar kavurun.
3. Sarımsağı ilave edip kısa süre çevirin.
4. Mantarları ekleyin ve suyunu salıp çekene kadar kavurun.
5. Unu ekleyip 1–2 dakika kokusu çıkana kadar kavurun.
6. Sütü yavaş yavaş ekleyerek karıştırın, ardından sıcak suyu ilave edin.
7. Çekilmiş bademi, tuz, karabiber ve muskat rendesini ekleyin.
8. Orta ateşte 15 dakika pişirin.
9. Blenderdan geçirerek pürüzsüz hâle getirin.
10. Kremayı ekleyip 3–4 dakika daha kaynatmadan ısıtın ve ocaktan alın ve servis edin.
11.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Almond Crescent Cookies
instructions: Beat butter and confectioners' sugar in a bowl using an electric mixer until smooth and creamy. Add vanilla extract, almond extract, and salt; mix briefly to incorporate.
Gradually stir 3/4 cup plus 2 tablespoons flour into the creamed butter, add almonds, and mix until dough is just combined.
Shape dough into tiny crescents; place on an ungreased baking sheet about 2 inches apart.
Bake cookies in preheated oven until edges are lightly golden, about 15 minutes. Cool on the baking sheet for 5 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
Roll cookies in sifted confectioners' sugar when cooled.

name: Almond Croissant Galette

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt
. diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Whisk 1⅔ cups (208 g) all-purpose flour, 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and ¼ tsp. baking powder in a large bowl to combine. Add 2 oz. chilled cream cheese, cut into 1" pieces, and rub into dry ingredients with your fingers until incorporated (mixture will look very shaggy). Add 10 Tbsp. (1¼ sticks) chilled unsalted butter, sliced ½" thick, and toss to coat in mixture, then smash into smaller, flatter pieces (about dime-size).
Make a well in the center and pour in ¼ cup ice water. Toss mixture with a fork or your hands to distribute, then knead in bowl a couple times to bring dough together (some dry bits may remain).

Turn out dough onto a surface lightly dusted with rice flour or all-purpose flour; dust top of dough with flour. Roll out to a ½"-thick rectangle. Fold dough in half, rotate 90°, and fold in half again. Roll out again to a ½"-thick rectangle and repeat folding process, dusting with more flour as needed to prevent sticking. Pat into a ½"-thick disk and wrap tightly in plastic. Chill at least 2 hours (preferably at least 12 hours if you have the time).
Do Ahead: Dough can be made 3 days ahead. Keep chilled, or transfer to a resealable plastic freezer bag and freeze up to 3 months. Thaw overnight in refrigerator before rolling out.
