Reduce oven temperature to 177°C (175 degrees C). Cover roasting pan with lid or aluminum foil. Continue to bake until ham is heated through, about 90 minutes more, basting frequently.
Remove lid and bake until ham is well browned, about 15 minutes more. Allow ham to rest for 10 to 15 minutes before carving.

name: Always-great Salsa

ingredients.item: Serrano chiles or small jalapeño peppers

instructions: Heat broiler. Place 2 lb. tomatoes, cored, cut in half crosswise, cut side down on a foil-lined rimmed baking sheet. Fit 1 medium white onion, sliced into ¼"-thick rounds, 3 serrano chiles, and 3 garlic cloves, unpeeled, around tomatoes so everything is snug but not overlapping. Broil, turning onion and chiles once, until lightly charred, about 6 minutes for chiles and garlic and 15–18 minutes for tomatoes and onion.

Peel garlic and place in a food processor along with half of tomatoes. Pulse until very smooth. Add remaining tomatoes and pulse until tomatoes are mostly broken up but mixture still has some texture. Transfer to a medium bowl. Finely chop onion and chiles and mix into purée; season with kosher salt. Let cool. Stir in 2 Tbsp. fresh lime juice and 2 Tbsp. finely chopped cilantro. Season salsa with more salt if needed. Serve with tortilla chips.
Editor’s note: This fresh salsa recipe was first printed in our August 2019 issue as “The Only Salsa You Need.” Head this way for more of our favorite dip recipes →

name: Always-tender London Broil
instructions: Whisk 4 garlic cloves, thinly sliced, ¼ cup extra-virgin olive oil, 2 Tbsp. good-quality balsamic vinegar, 2 Tbsp. soy sauce, and 1 Tbsp. Worcestershire sauce in a medium bowl or baking dish to combine; season with freshly ground black pepper. Whisk in ¾ tsp. baking soda (don’t worry if marinade fizzes; that’s the baking soda working).
Prick one 1½–2 lb. London broil all over with a fork and add to marinade, turning to coat. Let sit at room temperature at least 1 hour or cover and chill up to 12 hours.

Heat 1 Tbsp. vegetable oil in a large cast-iron pan or other heavy-bottomed skillet over medium. Remove steak from marinade and allow excess to drip back into bowl. Pat steak dry with paper towels; reserve marinade. Season steak generously with kosher salt and cook, turning once, until deeply browned and an instant-read thermometer inserted into thickest part registers 125° for medium-rare, 8–12 minutes total. Using tongs, stand steak on its sides and cook until lightly browned, about 30 seconds per side. Transfer to a cutting board and let rest 10 minutes.

Meanwhile, transfer reserved marinade to a small saucepan, add ⅓ cup water, and bring to a boil (mixture will foam up). Cook over medium-high heat, stirring constantly to avoid overflow, until foaming subsides, about 3 minutes. Reduce heat to low and add 2 Tbsp. unsalted butter; whisk vigorously to emulsify sauce. Keep warm until ready to serve.

Thinly slice London broil against the grain and arrange on a platter. Spoon sauce over; sprinkle with flaky sea salt.
Editor’s note: This London Broil recipe was first printed online in December 2022. Head this way for more of our best steak recipes →

name: Alyson's Broccoli Salad
instructions: Place bacon in a large, deep skillet. Cook over medium high heat until evenly brown. Drain, crumble and set aside.

In a medium bowl, combine the broccoli, onion and raisins. In a small bowl, whisk together the vinegar, sugar and mayonnaise. Pour over broccoli mixture, and toss until well mixed. Refrigerate for at least two hours.
Before serving, toss salad with crumbled bacon and sunflower seeds.

name: Alzira Cod
instructions: Disponha os lombos de bacalhau numa caçarola com água e o louro, leve ao lume e deixe cozer. Retire, reserve o caldo e limpe o bacalhau de peles e espinhas. Reserve.

Descasque as cebolas e os alhos, corte as cebolas em meias-luas e pique o dentes de alho. Limpe os pimentos de peles e sementes e corte em tiras finas. Leve ao lume um tacho com o azeite, junte a cebola, os dentes de alho e as tiras de pimento e deixe amolecer.
Noutro tacho derreta a manteiga, junte a farinha e a noz-moscada e envolva. Adicione o caldo do bacalhau, aos poucos até engrossar ligeiramente.

Coloque bacalhau numa tigela, junte a cebolada com os pimentos, a batata frita, os coentros e o caldo, envolvendo muito bem. Retifique os temperos e disponha num pirex. Barre com a maionese e leve ao forno pré-aquecido a 200ºc cerca de 7 minutos até ficar douradinho. Retire e decore com as azeitonas.

name: Amalfi Calamari Pasta
instructions: Line rimmed baking sheet with several layers of paper towels. Whisk flour, cornstarch, 1 teaspoon coarse salt, baking powder, and cayenne pepper in medium bowl to blend. Working in batches, toss squid rings in flour mixture to coat, then place rings in single layer on sheet of foil.

Pour both oils into large skillet; lean deep-fry thermometer on side of skillet, submerging bulb in oil. Heat oil over medium-high heat until thermometer registers 177°C to 182°C. Working in several batches, add squid rings to hot oil and cook until light golden and crisp around edges, 2 to 3 minutes per batch. Using slotted spoon, transfer squid to paper-towel-lined baking sheet to drain.

Meanwhile, cook pasta in large pot of boiling salted water, stirring occasionally, until just tender but still firm to bite. Drain, reserving 1 cup pasta cooking liquid. Return pasta to pot. Add butter and 3 tablespoons lemon juice and toss to coat pasta. Add 3/4 cup pasta cooking liquid and toss. Mix in 1/3 cup parsley. Season to taste with coarse salt and freshly ground pepper, adding more lemon juice and pasta cooking liquid, if desired.
Transfer pasta to large bowl; top with calamari. Sprinkle with remaining parsley. Serve with lemon wedges.

name: Amanda Freitag's Lemon Chicken
instructions: Bring lemons, onion, parsley, garlic, bay leaf, salt, sugar, peppercorns and 4 cups water to a boil in a large heavy pot, stirring occasionally until salt and sugar are dissolved. Let cool, then add 2 cups ice to brine; stir until melted.

Cut wings from chicken breasts. Cut through leg joint to separate thighs and drumsticks; set thighs aside. Use a sharp knife to score chicken skin along the length of each drumstick (this will make it easier to remove it in one piece). Remove skin from drumsticks; set skin aside (reserve drumsticks and wings for making stock). Place breasts and thighs in brine. Chill at least 3 hours and up to 1 day.
Preheat oven to 425°. Heat 1 Tbsp. oil in a medium skillet over high heat. Cook lemons, cut side down, until charred, about 2 minutes. Transfer to a plate.

Remove chicken from brine. Rinse, pat dry, and season with salt and pepper. Heat a large ovenproof skillet over medium-high heat. Add chicken to skillet, skin side down. Cook until golden brown, about 8 minutes. Turn and cook 4 minutes longer. Transfer to oven and cook until an instant-read thermometer inserted in thickest part of thigh registers 165°, 12–15 minutes.
Meanwhile, toss carrots with 2 Tbsp. oil on a rimmed baking sheet. Season with salt and pepper and roast, tossing halfway through, until browned and tender, 15–20 minutes; keep warm.

Cook chicken skin, fat side down (the side that was closest to the flesh), in a cast-iron skillet over medium-low heat, pressing down to flatten and help skin make contact with the pan, until golden brown and crisp, 5–7 minutes. Turn and cook until other side is brown and crisp, 5–7 minutes. Drain on paper towels; season chicken crackling with salt.

Transfer roasted chicken breast and thighs to a cutting board. Bring broth and lemon juice to a boil in skillet, stirring and scraping up any browned bits, and cook until liquid is reduced by half, 6–8 minutes; season pan sauce with salt and pepper.
Stir ricotta, lemon zest, and remaining 1 Tbsp. oil in a small bowl; season with salt and pepper.
Serve chicken with carrots and a spoonful of lemon ricotta, drizzled with pan sauce, with crackling and charred lemons alongside.

name: Amaranth-walnut Cookies With Brandy

ingredients.item: About 32 toasted walnut halves or pieces

instructions: 1 Place the 4 ounces of walnuts and 2 tablespoons of the sugar in the bowl of a food processor fitted with the metal blade. Process until the mixture looks sandy and the nuts are finely ground, about 15 seconds.

2 Whisk together the white whole wheat flour, amaranth flour, and salt in a medium bowl. In a large bowl, beat the butter with an electric mixer at medium speed until smooth, about 30 seconds. Gradually add the remaining sugar and beat until fluffy and smooth, 1 to 2 minutes, scraping the sides with a rubber spatula as needed. Add the egg yolk, brandy, and vanilla and beat until well blended, about 30 seconds. Reduce the speed to low and beat in the nut mixture, then gradually add the flour mixture until it is just incorporated. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and chill until the dough is firm, at least 3 hours or overnight.
3 Place a rack 1 notch below the center of the oven and preheat to 177°C. Line 2 large rimless baking sheets with parchment paper. Place the amaranth seeds in a small bowl.

4 Pinch off walnut-size pieces of the firm dough and roll them between your palms into smooth 1-inch balls. Roll each ball in amaranth seeds, gently pressing to adhere if needed, and place on the baking sheet, leaving 2 inches between pieces. Make an indentation with your thumb in the center of each ball, gently pressing it down about a third of its height, and then lightly press a walnut half into the center.

5 Bake, 1 sheet at a time, until the cookies just turn golden brown around the edges and firm up but still yield to gentle pressure, 17 to 18 minutes. Remove from the oven and carefully slide the parchment paper with the cookies onto a wire rack to cool. The cookies will crisp as they cool.

name: Amaretto
instructions: Bring water and both sugars to a boil in a saucepan over medium heat. Reduce the heat and simmer, stirring occasionally, until both sugars are dissolved. Remove from the heat and let cool for 10 minutes.
Stir in vodka, almond extract, and vanilla. Store in a sealed bottle.

name: Amaretto Sour
instructions: In a large cocktail shaker, combine 1 large egg white, 1 lemon twist, 1 orange twist, 4 oz. amaretto, and 2 oz. fresh lemon juice. Seal and shake vigorously without ice for 30 seconds to emulsify egg white. Unseal shaker, add ice, and shake vigorously again until shaker is well chilled. Strain into 2 stemmed coupe glasses. Dot the froth with Angostura bitters using a dropper and garnish each with a cocktail cherry on a pick, if using.

name: Amaretto Sweet And Sour

ingredients.item: Fluid ounces sweet and sour mix

instructions: Fill a glass with ice.
Pour in amaretto, orange juice, and sweet and sour mix.
Stir together and serve.

name: Amaretto Yams
instructions: Preheat oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).

Mix crushed cookies with 1/2 cup butter in a bowl. Mash sweet potatoes with 1/4 cup butter in separate bowl; add brown sugar, marmalade, amaretto liqueur, and ginger to sweet potatoes. Mix well. Pour sweet potato mixture into a 9x9-inch baking dish; top with cookie mixture.
Bake in the preheated oven until cooked through and bubbling, about 30 minutes.

name: Amaretto-mocha Truffles
instructions: Place chocolate in a medium bowl. Bring cream and amaretto to a simmer in a small saucepan over medium heat. Pour over chocolate and let sit until chocolate is softened, about 3 minutes. Whisk until smooth. Cover and chill until ganache is firm enough to roll into balls, at least 3 hours.

Place ground coffee in a small bowl. Scoop out a scant tablespoonful of ganache. Roll into a ball (if you’d like, wear disposable gloves to keep your hands clean), then roll in espresso. Place on a parchment-lined baking sheet. Repeat with remaining ganache. Chill truffles until firm, at least 1 hour.
Do ahead: Ganache can be made 3 days ahead; keep chilled. Truffles can be made 1 week ahead; store airtight in the refrigerator.

name: Amaro Cocktail
instructions: Toast pecans, peppercorns, coriander seeds, and allspice in a small saucepan over medium heat until slightly darkened in color and fragrant, about 5 minutes. Add sugar and 1⅓ cups water and bring to a boil, stirring to dissolve sugar. Let cool and strain through a fine-mesh sieve into a heatproof measuring glass; discard solids.

Combine amaro, rye, lemon juice, and ¾ oz. orgeat in a shaker filled with ice. Shake until outside of shaker is frosty, about 30 seconds. Double-strain into a glass, then return to shaker. Add egg white, cover, and shake again until frothy, about 1 minute. Pour into a chilled coupe glass and top with a pecan.
* Raw egg is not recommended for the elderly, pregnant women, people with weakened immune systems…or people who don’t like raw egg.

name: Amaro-spiked Mocha With Caramelized Brioche
instructions: Heat butter in a small skillet, preferably nonstick, over medium-low until it begins to foam. Add brioche and cook, turning occasionally, until golden brown on all sides, about 3 minutes total. Transfer to paper towels and let drain.

Wipe out skillet and sprinkle with sugar and salt; set over medium heat. Cook (undisturbed) until edges of sugar begin to melt, about 1 minute. Stir sugar, bringing edges in toward the center to prevent burned spots, and continue cooking until all sugar is melted and turns amber color, about 4 minutes. Add brioche and quickly turn to coat all sides in caramel, about 30 seconds. Transfer to a parchment-lined rimmed baking sheet and let cool.

Combine milk and cream in a 2-cup measuring glass. Pour ¼ cup milk mixture into a small saucepan and add bittersweet chocolate and milk chocolate. Heat over medium-low, stirring occasionally, until chocolate is melted, about 2 minutes. Reserve remaining milk mixture.
Meanwhile, whisk cornstarch and 2 Tbsp. cocoa powder in a small bowl. Whisk in ¼ cup reserved milk mixture, then whisk in remaining milk mixture.
When chocolate is melted, add cocoa mixture, espresso, sugar, and salt and cook, stirring often, until liquid begins to boil and thicken, about 4 minutes. Remove from heat and add amaro.
Divide mocha among mugs. Top with whipped cream and dust with cocoa powder. Serve with caramelized brioche.

name: Amasya Bun Recipe
instructions: 1. yapışmayan, yumuşak kıvamlı bir hamur yoğurun.
2.  Üzerini kapatarak hacmi artana kadar mayalanmaya bırakın.
3. İç harcı hazırlamak için haşhaş, zeytinyağı ve cevizi bir kapta karıştırarak sürülebilir bir karışım elde edin.
4. Mayalanan hamuru tezgaha alın ve eşit büyüklükte 5 bezeye ayırın.
5.  Bezelerden birini hafif unlanmış zeminde açın ve üzerine haşhaşlı karışımdan sürün.
6.  İkinci bezeyi de açarak ilk hamurun üzerine yerleştirin.
7.  Aynı işlemi tüm bezeler için uygulayarak kat kat bir hamur hazırlayın.
8. Hazırladığınız hamuru elinizle nazikçe genişletin.
9.  Ardından hamurun iki kenarını ortaya doğru katlayarak dikdörtgen form verin.
10.  Daha sonra hamuru uzun şeritler halinde kesin.
11. Kestiğiniz her parçayı hafifçe uzatın ve kendi etrafında çevirerek burgu şekli verin.
12.  Şekil verdiğiniz hamurları tepsiye aralıklı olacak şekilde dizin.
13. Üzerlerine yumurta sarısı sürün ve yaklaşık 20 dakika tepsi mayası için dinlendirin.
14.  Önceden ısıtılmış 200°C fırında, üzerleri kızarana kadar yaklaşık 20–25 dakika pişirin.
15. Fırından çıkan çörekleri birkaç dakika dinlendirdikten sonra dilimleyerek servis edebilirsiniz.
16.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Amatriciana Pasta

ingredients.item: 100 g de queso pecorino romano rallado
Una cucharada de aceite de oliva

instructions: Comienza cortando el guanciale en tiras o cubos de aproximadamente 1 cm de grosor. Calienta una sartén grande a fuego medio y agrega una cucharada de aceite de oliva. Una vez que el aceite esté caliente, añade las tiras de guanciale.    Fríe el guanciale, removiendo ocasionalmente, hasta que las tiras se vuelvan doradas y crujientes. Este proceso suele tomar alrededor de 5 a 8 minutos, dependiendo del grosor de las tiras. Es importante no apresurarse en este paso; el objetivo es cocinar el guanciale lentamente para que su grasa se derrita y se dore sin quemarse. Durante este proceso, notarás que el guanciale suelta parte de su grasa. Esta grasa es rica en sabor y servirá como base para la salsa.

Una vez que el guanciale esté dorado y crujiente, incorpora el chile rojo picado en la sartén. La cantidad de chile dependerá de tu preferencia por el picante; un poco puede añadir un agradable calor al plato, pero siéntete libre de ajustar según tu gusto. A continuación, agrega los tomates pelados. Si los tomates están enteros, puedes aplastarlos ligeramente con un tenedor o un machacador. Esto ayudará a que se mezclen mejor con el guanciale y el chile, y a que la salsa se cocine de manera más uniforme. Revuelve bien todos los ingredientes en la sartén para que se integren. Reduce el fuego a bajo y deja que la salsa se cocine lentamente, unos 20 minutos aproximadamente. Es importante no dejar la salsa sin atención, removiendo ocasionalmente para que no se pegue en la sartén. Mientras la salsa se cocina, puedes aprovechar para ir preparando la pasta y los demás elementos del plato.

Llena una olla grande con agua y llévala a ebullición. No escatimes en el tamaño de la olla; la pasta necesita espacio para moverse y cocinarse uniformemente. Añade una o dos cucharadas de sal al agua hirviendo. Una vez que el agua esté hirviendo, añade los espaguetis. Sigue las instrucciones del paquete para cocinarlos hasta que estén “al dente”. Esto significa que deben estar cocidos, pero aún firmes al mordisco. La cocción exacta variará según la marca y el grosor de los espaguetis, pero generalmente rondará entre 8 y 12 minutos. Remueve ocasionalmente para evitar que la pasta se pegue entre ella.

Cuando la pasta esté lista, escúrrela, pero no te olvides de guardar un poco del agua de cocción, que puede ser útil para ajustar la consistencia de la salsa si es necesario.    Lleva los espaguetis escurridos directamente a la sartén con la salsa. Esta técnica es clave en la cocina italiana: mezclar la pasta con la salsa en la sartén permite que la pasta absorba los sabores de manera más efectiva. Mezcla suavemente los espaguetis con la salsa, asegurándote de que quede bien impregnada.    Si la salsa parece demasiado espesa, puedes añadir un poco del agua de cocción reservada para alcanzar la consistencia deseada. Cocina todo junto durante un par de minutos más, para que los sabores se unan perfectamente.

Sirve la pasta en platos hondos, aún caliente. Espolvorea generosamente el queso Pecorino Romano rallado sobre la pasta caliente. Al hacerlo, el queso se derretirá ligeramente, creando una capa de sabor adicional que enriquece el plato. Una buena cantidad de queso Pecorino es indispensable para conseguir ese característico sabor de los auténticos espaguetis a la amatriciana.

name: Amatriciana Spaghetti

ingredients.item: Azeitonas pretas em rodelas para decorar

instructions: Descasque a cebola, pique-a e aloure-a num tacho com o azeite. Corte o bacon em tiras ou cubos, acrescente-os ao refogado e aloure-os, mexendo de vez em quando. Regue com o vinho e deixe evaporar um pouco.
No mesmo tacho, deite os pedaços de tomate e mantenha ao lume, até reduzir. Acrescente a malagueta, previamente limpa de sementes e picada, tempere com sal, mexa e reserve.
Entretanto, leve ao lume um outro tacho com água e sal e deixe ferver. Junte o esparguete, mexa, coza-o até ficar ""al dente"", depois escorra bem e distribua pelos pratos.
Regue com o molho, polvilhe com queijo pecorino ralado e decore com rodelas de azeitona. Sirva de imediato.

name: Amatriciana-style Rigatoni Recipe
original_name: Receta de rigatoni a la amatriciana

ingredients.item: 250 gr de tomates pelados en conserva
1 cda de pasta de tomate concentrado
1/4 cdita de chile seco triturado ((opcional pero recomendado))
30 gr de queso pecorino romano rallado
1 cdita de aceite de oliva  (virgen extra)

instructions: Corta el guanciale en tiras finas o cubos pequeños.
En una sartén grande, calienta el aceite de oliva y sofríe el ajo entero junto con el guanciale a fuego medio. Cocina hasta que el guanciale esté dorado y crujiente.
Retira el ajo y desglasa la sartén con el vino blanco. Deja evaporar el alcohol durante un par de minutos.
Agrega la pasta de tomate y cocina 1 minuto para intensificar su sabor.
Añade los tomates pelados triturados a mano o con un tenedor. Incorpora el chile seco si lo deseas. Cocina a fuego bajo durante 12-15 minutos, removiendo ocasionalmente.
Mientras tanto, hierve abundante agua con sal y cocina el rigatoni hasta que esté al dente.
Escurre la pasta (reserva un poco del agua de cocción) y mézclala con la salsa. Agrega un poco de agua de cocción si es necesario para emulsionar.
Apaga el fuego, incorpora el pecorino romano rallado y mezcla enérgicamente hasta que quede cremoso.
Sirve de inmediato con más pecorino por encima y una pizca de pimienta negra.

name: Amazingly Good And Healthy Tuna Salad
instructions: Mix tuna, cranberries, apple, mayonnaise, green onion, sea salt, and black pepper together in a bowl; refrigerate 1 hour.
Put 2 cups spinach on each of 2 plates. Top spinach with about half the tuna salad.

name: Amazingly Good Eggnog
instructions: Combine milk, cinnamon, 1/2 teaspoon vanilla, and cloves in a saucepan over the lowest heat setting; stir and heat for 5 minutes. Increase heat to medium-low and slowly bring to a boil. Remove from the heat.
Whisk egg yolks in a large bowl until light yellow in color. Add sugar and whisk until light and fluffy.
Pour some of the hot milk mixture into the egg yolk mixture, whisking quickly to avoid scrambling the eggs. Continue adding hot milk and whisking to combine until all milk is incorporated.
Pour the mixture back into the saucepan. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until thick, about 3 minutes; do not allow the mixture to boil.
Strain to remove cloves and let cool for about 1 hour, then stir in cream, rum, remaining 2 teaspoons vanilla, and nutmeg. Refrigerate before serving, 8 hours to overnight.
Serve and enjoy!

name: Amazingly Tomato Sauce
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large, heavy pot over medium heat. Cook and stir onion and garlic in hot oil until tender, 5 to 7 minutes.

Stir crushed tomatoes, tomato sauce, tomato paste, and water into onion mixture until smooth; add sugar, parsley, basil, salt, Italian seasoning, fennel, and pepper. Stir well and bring to a simmer; reduce heat to low and cook, stirring occasionally, until thickened, 1 to 1 1/2 hours.

name: Ambrosia For A Crowd

ingredients.item: Container frozen whipped topping (such as cool whip®)

instructions: Combine pineapple, mandarin oranges, and cherries in a large trifle bowl. Sprinkle pudding mix over top. Fold in whipped topping and sour cream. Add coconut and mix until well combined. Place in the refrigerator until firm, 4 hours to overnight.
Sprinkle marshmallows on top before serving.

name: Ambrosia Sauce
instructions: Bring sugar and 2 cups water to a boil in a medium heavy saucepan over medium-high heat, stirring until sugar dissolves. Boil for 2 minutes.
Reduce heat to medium; add mirin and next 4 ingredients. Simmer, stirring often, until sauce thickens slightly and has reduced to about 4 cups, 60-70 minutes.
Strain sauce through a fine-mesh sieve into a large heatproof pitcher. Divide among jars. Let cool. Screw on lids and chill. DO AHEAD Ambrosia sauce can be made 2 months ahead. Keep refrigerated.

name: American Burger With Potato Skin Chips
original_name: Hambúrguer americano com chips de casca de batata
instructions: Tempere a carne com a cebola roxa picada, os coentros picados, sal e pimenta, envolva tudo muito bem, molde quatro hambúrgueres e grelhe-os, até ficarem marcados. Por fim, disponha o queijo por cima da carne e deixe derreter.
Abra os pães de hambúrguer e recheie-os com a alface, os hambúrgueres com queijo e os abacates, previamente descascados e cortados em fatias ou pedaços. Tempere com sumo da lima e reserve.
Frite as cascas de batata em óleo abundante e bem quente e tempere-as com sal, orégãos e paprica, envolvendo bem. Sirva como acompanhamento dos hambúrgueres.

name: American Burger “juicy Lucy”
instructions: Mix together the patty ingredients until evenly combined.
Flatten the beef into a thin layer, then place a chunk of cheddar inside, wrapping the beef completely around the cheddar. Form a patty with your hands.
Repeat with the remaining beef and cheese.
Heat oil in a pan over medium heat.
Cook the burgers for 3 minutes on the first side, flip, then cook for 6 more minutes.
Assemble the burgers with the bun, bacon, tomato, and lettuce.
Enjoy!

name: American Buttermilk-fried Chicken
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the chicken drumsticks and thighs, salt, black pepper, oregano, paprika, white pepper, garlic powder, and buttermilk. Stir to make sure each piece of chicken is coated evenly, then cover with plastic wrap and marinate in the refrigerator for about 1 hour.
In a separate large bowl, combine the flour, salt, black pepper, paprika, garlic powder, and cayenne.
Fill a large, deep skillet halfway with oil and heat over high heat until the temperature reaches 177°C (180°C).
Remove the chicken pieces from the marinade and roll in the flour mixture to coat completely, shaking off any excess.

Fry 3 pieces of chicken at a time in the hot oil, turning a few times for even browning, for 15–20 minutes, until the breading is dark golden brown. The oil temperature should drop to about 160°C (160°C). Transfer the chicken to paper towels or a wire rack to drain and cool for 10–15 minutes before serving.
Enjoy!

name: American Chili Cheese Fries
instructions: Heat the oil in a large pot over medium-high heat. Add the beef and stir to break up. Season with the salt, pepper, cumin, chili powder, paprika, and cayenne. Stir and cook until deep brown in color, 10-15 minutes.
Add the onion, bell pepper, garlic, chipotles, and a pinch of salt. Cook until the vegetables are softened, about 10 minutes.
Add the tomato paste and cook until it darkens, becomes aromatic, and starts sticking to the bottom of the pan, 10 minutes.
Add the chopped tomatoes, beef broth, black beans, and kidney beans. Stir to incorporate, then bring to a boil. Cover, reduce the heat to low, and simmer for at least 30 minutes or up to 2 hours.
Ladle the chili over the fries and top with cheddar cheese, sour cream, and green onions.
Enjoy!

name: American Cocktail
instructions: Deite um pouco de gelo num copo, adicione o martini e o campari e termine com a água tónica.
Retire um pedaço da casca da toranja (sem a parte branca) e prenda no copo. Sirva ainda decorado com a restante toranja cortada em meias-luas.

name: American French Onion Soup

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat oven to 218°C (220 degrees C).

Melt 1/4 cup butter in a large, oven-safe skillet on medium heat. Stir in onions until they are all coated in butter. Transfer skillet to the preheated oven and cook onions, stirring occasionally, until they are tender and well browned, about 1 hour.

Transfer skillet to the stovetop; cook and stir onions over medium heat until they start to brown and stick to the bottom of the pan, about 5 minutes. Pour sherry and vinegar into the pan, and bring to a boil while scraping browned bits of onion off the bottom of the pan with a wooden spoon.

Place caramelized onions in a large soup pot. Pour in chicken broth, beef broth, and thyme. Bring to a boil, skimming off any foam and fat that appear on top. Reduce heat to low and simmer for about an hour. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Preheat the oven's broiler and set the oven rack about 6 inches from the heat source.
Generously brush French bread slices with melted butter. Place on a baking sheet and broil in the preheated oven until crisp and golden, about 5 minutes.
Ladle soup into heat-proof bowls, top each bowl with a piece of toasted bread, sprinkle with 2 to 3 tablespoons of Cheddar cheese and Monterey Jack cheese.
Broil bowls of soup under the broiler until cheese is golden and bubbly, 5 to 6 minutes.

name: American Gyros
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Lightly oil a 9x13-inch baking dish. Line with parchment paper that extends up the sides. Turn the parchment paper over so the oiled side is up.

Place ground lamb and beef in a mixing bowl. Add onions, garlic, rosemary, oregano, salt, pepper, cumin, paprika, cinnamon, cayenne pepper, and bread crumbs. Mix until well combined. Transfer to prepared baking dish and press the meat mixture firmly into the dish in an even layer that extends to the edges. Meat mixture should be packed and fairly dense.

Bake in preheated oven until nicely browned, 40 to 45 minutes. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read at least 71°C (70 degrees C). Cool to room temperature. Transfer to a plate. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate until chilled, 1 to 2 hours.
Transfer meat to a cutting board. Cut into 3 pieces crosswise. Slice each piece into 1/8-inch thick slices as you need them.
Heat oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Cook slices until browned, about 2 minutes per side.

name: American Lemon Cake
instructions: Κοσκινίζουμε πρώτα το αλεύρι και το baking powder.
Σε ένα μίξερ με κάδο, τοποθετούμε το βούτυρο και τη ζάχαρη και με το φτερό που αναμειγνύουμε το μείγμα και το χτυπάμε για 3 με 4 λεπτά μέχρι να λιώσει η ζάχαρη και να κρεμώσει.
Προσθέτουμε ένα-ένα τα αυγά, ώστε το μίγμα να απορροφάει το πρώτο αυγό πριν ρίξουμε το επόμενο.
Προσθέτουμε το ξύσμα λεμονιού και το αλάτι.
Εναλλάξ, προσθέτουμε το αλεύρι και το γάλα και χτυπάμε μέχρι να ομογενοποιηθεί.
Βουτυρώνουμε και πασπαλίζουμε με αλεύρι μία στρογγυλή ή μια μακρόστενη φόρμα για κέικ.
Τινάζουμε τη φόρμα του κέικ για να φύγει το περιττό αλεύρι.
Αδειάζουμε μέσα το μίγμα.
Το ψήνουμε σε καλά προθερμασμένο φούρνο, στις αντιστάσεις, στους 170ºC για περίπου 1 ώρα, μέχρι να ροδίσει, να φουσκώσει και να ξεκολλάει από τα τοιχώματα.
Αφού ψηθεί το αφήνουμε να σταθεί 10 λεπτά στη φόρμα του κέικ.
Το ξεφορμάρουμε και το αφήνουμε σε σχάρα, να κρυώσει καλά.

name: American Light
instructions: Combine Punt e Mes and Aperol in a cocktail shaker filled with ice and stir until outside of shaker is frosty, about 30 seconds.
Strain into a highball glass filled with ice and top off with club soda.
Garnish with orange twist.

name: American Ranch Sauce

ingredients.item: ½ taza de crema agria (se puede sustituir por suero de leche o buttermilk)
1 cucharadita de cebollino seco o fresco
1 cucharadita de eneldo seco o fresco
½ cucharadita de pimienta negra molida
Suero de leche (opcional, para ajustar la consistencia)

instructions: Si optas por mayonesa y crema agria caseras, prepáralas según tus recetas preferidas.

Mezcla en un bol la mayonesa y la crema agria con el ajo en polvo, la cebolla en polvo, el cebollino, el eneldo, la pimienta negra y la sal. Si la salsa te queda muy espesa, puedes ajustar la consistencia añadiendo un poco de suero de leche (para hacer suero de leche casero, mezcla por ejemplo ½ taza de leche entera + ½ cucharada de zumo de limón) Mezcla bien con un tenedor o una varilla Ajusta los sabores al gusto, añadiendo más de alguno de los ingredientes si es necesario.
Cubre con papel film y deja que se enfríe al menos durante media hora antes de usar esta salsa ranchera

name: American Sauce
instructions: 1. Yemek tarifleri arasında yeşil yapraklı tüm salatalara çok yakışan bir sostur.
3. 5 kahve fincanı zeytinyağı, 1 kıyılmış kuru soğan, 1.
4. 5 tatlı kaşığı hardal tozu, 1 çorba kaşığı bal, 1 çorba kaşığı sirke ve 1 tatlı kaşığı tuzu derin bir kaba alın.
5.  Çırpma teli ile pürüzsüz bir kıvam elde edinceye kadar çırpın.
6.  En son olarak 1 çorba kaşığı haşhaş tohumunu ilave edip kaşıkla karıştırın.

name: American Sauce Recipe

ingredients.item: 400 ml de caldo de pescado o mariscos
125 ml de vino blanco para cocinar
Pimienta de cayena al gusto (si quieres darle un toque picante)

instructions: Antes que nada tritura los tomates hasta hacerlos una pasta. Puedes usar una picadora eléctrica para esto.
Pica la cebolla y el ajo en cubos pequeños.
Calienta a fuego medio una olla con aceite de oliva. Echa la cebolla y los ajos y cocina durante 5 minutos removiendo constantemente y revisando que no se te vayan a quemar.
A continuación agrega el vino blanco, revuelve un poco y deja que se evapore el alcohol.
Seguidamente echa el tomate previamente picado.
Ahora pon la sala y pimienta y la pimienta de cayena en caso de que te guste el picante.
Incorpora ahora el caldo de pescado o marisco, mezcla bien y deja cocinar a fuego suave durante media hora, removiendo de vez en cuando. Revisa si el punto de sal está bien para tu gusto.
Transcurrido este tiempo puedes optar por pasar la salsa por una trituradora si quieres que tenga una textura un poco más homogénea.
Si te parece que la salsa está muy espesa, puedes agregar algo más de caldo de marisco y volver a cocinar por unos minutos.

Si por el contrario quieres una salsa más espesa puedes disolver 1 cucharada de maizena en 3 cucharadas de agua e incorporar a la salsa y poner a fuego por unos minutos hasta que tomate la textura deseada.
Listo, ya tienes una deliciosa salsa americana.

name: American Style Banana Pudding
instructions: 1. Toz şeker, mısır unu ve tuzu bir karıştırma kabında harmanlayın.
2.  Sütü ilave edip pürüzsüz bir kıvam elde edinceye kadar mikser yardımıyla çırpın.
3.  Yumurta sarılarını da ekleyip, tüm malzeme iyice özdeşleşinceye kadar çırpmaya devam edin.
4.  Karışımı bir sos tenceresine alın.
5.  Orta ateşte sürekli karıştırarak 5-6 dakika pişirin.
6.  Kaynamaya başlayınca ocağın altını kısıp bir spatula yardımıyla karıştırarak 7-8 dakika daha pişirin.
7. Ocaktan alıp tereyağı, vanilya esansı ve ezdiğiniz muzu ilave ederek, tereyağı tamamen eriyinceye kadar karıştırın.
8.  Pudingi servis kaplarına yarısını dolduracak şekilde paylaştırın.
9.  Üzerlerine iri kırdığınız bebe bisküvisi ve küp doğradığınız muzlardan yerleştirin.
10.  Kalan pudingi muzların üzerlerine paylaştırın.
11. Pudinglerinizi oda sıcaklığına geldikten sonra buzdolabına alın ve 2-3 saat dinlendirin.
12.  Üzerlerini küp doğradığınız muz ve Antep fıstığı ile süsleyip servis yapın.

name: American Tuna Sandwich, Very Creamy
original_name: Sándwich de atún americano, muy cremoso

ingredients.item: 200 gr de atún en conserva ((ya escurrido))
Rebanas de pan  ((elige el de tu preferencia))

instructions: Vamos a iniciar nuestra receta cortando en cuadritos muy pequeños los pepinillos.
Ahora, toma la cebolleta o el cebollino y los cortarás en pequeñas porciones.
Coloca en un bol el atún en conserva que ya debe estar escurrido.
Procede a añadirle el cebollino y los pepinillos. Posteriormente le agregarás la mayonesa, la salsa inglesa y la mostaza.
Ahora, condimenta con sal y pimienta al gusto. Con una cuchara o espátula vas a mezclar hasta integrar todo completamente.
Calienta una plancha o sanduchera.
Vas a tomar una rodaja de pan y le agregarás una buena porción del relleno. Procede a esparcirlo hasta que quede bien distribuido.
Le colocarás una rodaja de queso, terminas con la otra rebanada de pan y a la plancha.
Debes tostarlo hasta que el pan esté crujiente y el queso fundido.
Ahora sí, ¡a degustar!

name: Americano
instructions: Add a splash of chilled club soda to a highball glass filled with ice, then pour in 1½ oz. Campari and 1½ oz. sweet vermouth. Top off with more club soda; stir gently to combine.
Squeeze orange twist over drink to release oils, then drop into glass.

name: Amethyst Sour
instructions: Blend 1 ½ cups blueberries with 1 cup water in a blender until puréed, about 45 seconds.

Add purée to a small saucepan over medium heat and cook until mixture begins to boil. Immediately reduce heat to low and continue to cook, stirring frequently, for 7 minutes. Remove from heat and allow to cool for 5 minutes. Rinse out blender jar.

Strain purée through a tea strainer or chinois (cheesecloth optional) into a heatsafe liquid measuring cup, stirring and pressing on solids, until you have 1 cup blueberry juice. Discard any excess. Transfer blueberry juice to blender, add 2 cups granulated sugar, and blend until well mixed and sugar is completely dissolved, about 1½ minutes.
Transfer mixture to a clean, resealable glass jar and refrigerate until chilled. Shake jar before using. Blueberry syrup will keep 2 weeks in the refrigerator—or you can freeze it for several months.

Add 1 oz. rye whiskey, ¾ oz. Blueberry Syrup, ¾ oz. fresh lemon juice, ½ oz. Amaro Averna, ½ oz. Barbancourt 3 Star Rum, and 2 dashes celery bitters to a cocktail shaker and fill with ice. Shake vigorously for 15 seconds. Strain with a Hawthorne strainer into a rocks glass with fresh ice. Garnish with a lemon wheel and 3 blueberries on a cocktail pick if desired.

name: Amish Baked Oatmeal
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Lightly grease a 9x13-inch baking pan.
Mix oats, brown sugar, milk, oil, eggs, baking powder, salt, and cinnamon together in a bowl using an electric mixer. Pour into the prepared pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until set, 25 to 30 minutes, making sure not to let brown.

name: Amish Buttered Egg Noodles
instructions: Melt butter in a small saucepan over medium heat; simmer, stirring frequently, until butter is browned, fragrant, and foamy, with brown bits in it, 5 to 10 minutes.

Add chicken broth and bouillon to the pan with the butter; bring to a boil over high heat. Stir in egg noodles, bring to a second boil, cover, and turn off heat; leave pot on the same burner. Let stand for 30 minutes, stirring 2 or 3 times.

name: Amish Buttermilk Pie
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).
Combine sugar and lemon zest in a bowl. Using your hands, rub zest into sugar to release the natural oils of the zest. Add flour and mix well.
Whip in buttermilk, lemon juice, eggs, butter, and lemon extract. Pour batter into pie crust.
Bake in the preheated oven for 10 minutes. Reduce heat to 177°C (175 degrees C) and bake until center is slightly jiggly in center, 50 to 65 minutes. Custard will continue to set as pie cools.

name: Amish Friend's Caramel Corn
instructions: Preheat the oven to 121°C (120 degrees C). Grease two rimmed baking sheets. Place 1/2 of the popped popcorn and 1/2 of the peanuts onto each prepared baking sheet.
Bring brown sugar, margarine, corn syrup, and salt to a boil in a saucepan over medium heat, stirring occasionally to blend. Once boiling, boil for 5 minutes, stirring constantly.
Remove from the heat and stir in vanilla and baking soda; mixture will be light and foamy.
Immediately pour hot liquid over popcorn and nuts. Stir until pretty well coated.
Bake in the preheated oven for 1 hour, removing the pans and giving them each a good stir every 15 minutes.
Line your countertop with waxed paper. Remove popcorn and nuts from the oven; dump onto waxed paper and separate any large clumps. Allow to cool completely.
Enjoy!

name: Amish Friendship Banana Nut Bread
instructions: Preheat the oven to 163°C (165 degrees C). Grease two 9x5-inch loaf pans.
Mash together shortening and bananas in a large bowl, then stir in Amish starter, eggs, sugar, walnuts, and milk.
Sift together flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Fold into the banana mixture. Divide batter evenly into the prepared pans.
Bake in preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center of the loaves comes out clean, about 1 hour and 15 minutes.
Cool loaves until they loosen evenly from the pan before removing to a wire rack to cool completely, about 10 minutes.

name: Amish Friendship Bread Starter
instructions: Dissolve yeast in warm water in a small bowl; let stand until foamy, about 10 minutes.

Combine 1 cup flour and 1 cup sugar in a 2-quart container (glass, plastic, or ceramic); mix thoroughly. Stir in 1 cup milk and yeast mixture. Cover the container loosely and leave at room temperature until bubbly. This is day 1 of the 10-day process.
Days 2 through 4: Stir starter with a spoon.
Day 5: Stir in 1 cup flour, 1 cup sugar, and 1 cup milk.
Days 6 through 9: Stir starter with a spoon.

Day 10: Stir in remaining 1 cup flour, 1 cup sugar, and 1 cup milk. Remove 1 cup starter to make your first bread. Give 2 cups starter to friends (1 cup each) along with this recipe and your favorite Amish bread recipe. Store remaining 1 cup starter in a container in the refrigerator or begin the 10-day process over again (beginning with step 2).

name: Amish Peanut Butter
instructions: Stir corn syrup, peanut butter, and marshmallow cream together in a bowl until thoroughly combined. Store in an air-tight container.

name: Amish Tomato Pie

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Place a baking sheet on the lowest rack of the oven and preheat to 218°C (220 degrees C).
Press pastry into a 9-inch deep-dish pie plate. Cover with two layers of aluminum foil, then add pie weights or dried beans.

Slice heirloom and Roma tomatoes into 1/2-inch-thick rounds. Remove seeds with your fingers and discard. Transfer six heirloom slices to a paper towel-lined plate; cover with more paper towels and set aside for decorating the pie. Arrange remaining heirloom slices and all Roma slices on a wire rack.

Place pie crust onto the baking sheet in the preheated oven. Place the wire rack with tomatoes onto a higher rack. Reduce the oven temperature to 204°C (200 degrees C). Bake until the bottom of the pie crust has lost its translucent raw look and the edges have just started to color, 12 to 15 minutes.

Leaving tomatoes in the oven, remove pie crust and carefully lift out the foil and weights. Cover the edges with foil to prevent them from burning. Poke bottom of crust several times with a fork to keep it from puffing up. Return pie crust to the baking sheet and bake until light golden brown on the bottom, about 8 more minutes. Remove from the oven and let cool.
Continue baking tomatoes until wilted, 15 to 20 more minutes (for a total of 40 minutes). Remove from the oven and let cool for about 15 minutes; keep the oven on.

While the tomatoes are cooling, cook bacon in a large skillet over medium-high heat, turning occasionally, until some of the fat has rendered, about 5 minutes. Add leek; cook until bacon is crisp and leek is soft and brown, about 5 minutes. Transfer mixture to a paper towel-lined plate and let cool, about 5 minutes.
Combine Cheddar, Fontina, mayonnaise, basil, egg, Dijon, salt, and pepper in a bowl. Add bacon-leek mixture and mix until well combined.

Spread 1/3 of the cheese mixture into pie crust, then arrange 1/2 of the roasted tomatoes over top, alternating heirlooms and Romas; repeat layers once more. Spread remaining cheese mixture over top, then gently press in reserved fresh heirloom slices in a decorative pattern. Cover the edges with foil, leaving tomatoes uncovered.
Bake until browned and bubbly on top, about 40 minutes. Let cool completely before serving, about 1 hour.

name: Amish Turkey Casserole
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Grease an 8x8-inch casserole dish with cooking spray.

Melt butter in a skillet over medium-high heat. Add carrots, celery, and onion and saute until softened, about 5 minutes. Add cubed turkey, stuffing, turkey broth, salt, pepper, garlic, and thyme. Stir to combine and transfer into the prepared casserole dish.

Melt 1 tablespoon butter in a saucepan over medium-high heat for the sauce. Stir in flour and mix until a paste forms. Pour in 1 cup turkey broth and season with salt, thyme, onion, garlic, pepper, and poultry seasoning. Stir to combine and pour over the turkey mixture.
Bake in the preheated oven, uncovered, for 30 minutes. Remove and top with fresh bread crumbs. Melt remaining butter and drizzle over the bread crumbs.
Set an oven rack about 6 inches from the heat source and preheat the oven's broiler.
Broil casserole until bread crumbs are golden and toasted, about 2 minutes. Serve immediately.

name: Amish White Bread
instructions: Dissolve sugar in warm water in a large bowl, and then stir in yeast. Allow to proof until yeast resembles a creamy foam, 5 to 10 minutes.
Mix oil and salt into the yeast. Mix in flour one cup at a time.
Knead dough on a lightly floured surface until smooth.
Place in a well-oiled bowl, and turn dough to coat. Cover with a damp cloth. Allow to rise until doubled in bulk, about 1 hour.
Punch dough down.
Knead for a few minutes, and divide in half. Shape into loaves, and place into two well-oiled 9x5-inch loaf pans.
Allow to rise until dough has topped the pans by one inch, about 30 minutes.
Meanwhile, preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Bake the risen loaves in the preheated oven until golden brown for 30 minutes.
Enjoy!

name: Ammunition Soup Recipe With Spinach And Cabbage
original_name: Receta de sopa de munición con espinacas y col

ingredients.item: ½ taza  de zanahoria  (cortadas en cubos)

instructions: Incorpora en la licuadora el tomate, la cebolla y el ajo.
Vierte la taza de agua y licúa muy bien hasta que tengas una salsa homogénea.
La salsa debe quedarte bien triturada.
Calienta una olla con aceite vegetal y añade las municiones. Mezcla y sofríe hasta que doren.
Vierte la salsa, mezcla y cocina durante 3 minutos.
Agrega las espinacas, la col y la zanahoria. Echa el caldo de pollo, sazona con sal y pimienta al gusto.
Mezcla y cocina a fuego medio durante 10 minutos o hasta que las verduras estén suaves.
Sirve caliente y acompaña con limón.

name: Amoroso Relleno: A Croissant Ring Filled With Chicken That Every Puerto Rican Would Fall In Love With
original_name: Amoroso Relleno: Un anillo de croissant relleno de pollo del que toda boricua se enamoraría

ingredients.item: 1 libra de muslos de pollo deshuesados y sin piel.
1 taza de caldo de pollo o agua.
1 cucharadita de adobo y sazón cada uno.
Queso rallado (tanto como desees. yo utilicé 1.5 tazas.)
Opcional: agregar plátanos dulces en cubos que se fríen en 2 cucharadas de mantequilla.

instructions: Sazona tus muslos de pollo deshuesados con sal y pimienta al gusto, sofrito, orégano molido y adobo y sazón. Si puedes, déjalo marinar toda la noche.

Agrega aceite de oliva a la sartén y cocina ambos lados durante aproximadamente 4 a 7 minutos, dependiendo del tamaño de los muslos. De igual manera, el pollo no necesita cocinarse completamente todavía.
Transfiere los muslos de pollo a una olla, agrega el caldo de pollo y deja hervir a fuego lento durante unos 10 minutos a temperatura media.
Mientras el pollo hierve a fuego lento, corta los plátanos en trozos pequeños (yo corté cada rebanada en cuatro cuartos). Agrega aceite de oliva a la sartén, añade los plátanos y sazona con sal.

Alrededor de este tiempo, los muslos de pollo deberían estar listos para que se agregue la pasta de tomate a la olla. Deja hervir a fuego lento durante unos 10 minutos más, o hasta que hayas terminado de separar tus Pillsbury Crescent Rolls.Coloca un poco de papel pergamino y luego coloca un objeto circular, como una taza, en el centro. Coloca la masa para cada rollo una al lado de la otra, ligeramente puestos uno sobre el otro en una bandeja grande para cocinar. Precalienta tu horno a 375 grados.

Una vez que los trozos de plátano estén dorados y el pollo esté bien cocido, transfiérelo a un tazón para desmenuzar el pollo (ya sea con una batidora de mano o dos tenedores) y luego añade los trozos de plátano.
Agrega la mezcla de pollo y plátano al círculo de masa de croissant en un movimiento circular, amontonado en el lado de la masa que está más cerca de la taza o el centro circular.
Como verás en el video, luego tomarás los extremos largos y los doblarás sobre el relleno.
Completa el círculo, bate los huevos y pincela la parte superior de la masa para obtener ese color dorado una vez horneado.
Quita la taza del centro y coloca el anillo en la rejilla central y deja cocinar de 10 a 14 minutos o hasta que la masa esté dorada.

name: Amsterdam Van Stapele Cookies Recipe

ingredients.item: Tereyağı yerine margarin veya vegan hindistan cevizi yağı kullanılabilir.
Daha hafif bir tat için tereyağı ve zeytinyağı karışımı tercih edilebilir.
Beyaz şeker yerine esmer şeker veya hindistan cevizi şekeri kullanabilirsiniz; hafif karamelimsi bir tat verir.
Daha düşük kalorili bir seçenek için şekersiz tatlandırıcı da kullanılabilir.
Normal un yerine tam buğday unu, yulaf unu veya glutensiz un karışımı kullanılabilir.
Kakaonun yarısını bitter çikolata parçaları ile değiştirerek daha yoğun bir çikolata aroması elde edebilirsiniz.
Unsweetened kakao yerine hazır sütlü kakao da kullanılabilir (şeker miktarını azaltmayı unutmayın).
Beyaz çikolata yerine sütlü veya bitter çikolata kullanılabilir.
Vegan seçenek için hindistan cevizi bazlı veya soya bazlı beyaz çikolata tercih edilebilir.
Krema yerine süt + biraz mısır nişastası ile hazırlanan hafif bir dolgu yapılabilir.
İç dolguyu fındık kreması, nutella veya karamel sos ile değiştirmek de mümkün.

instructions: 1. Beyaz çikolatayı kareler halinde doğrayın.
2. Tereyağı ve şekeri krema kıvamına gelene kadar çırpın.
3. Yumurtayı ve vanilya özütünü ekleyip karıştırın.
4. Un, kakao ve tuzu eleyerek hamura ekleyin, yumuşak bir hamur elde edin.
5. Hamurdan ceviz büyüklüğünde parçalar koparın, ortasını açın.
6. Ortasına beyaz çikolata koyun ve hamuru kapatarak top haline getirin.
7. Önceden ısıtılmış 175 derece fırında 12–15 dakika pişirin.
8. Soğuduktan sonra servis edin.
9.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Amulet Pastry With Eggplant And Minced Meat
instructions: 1. Böreğin iç malzemesi için biberleri temizleyip kıyın.
2.  Domatesin kabuğunu soyup çekirdeklerini ve suyunu temizledikten sonra etli kısmını zar şeklinde doğrayın.
3.  Kıymayı tencerede kavurun.
4.  Doğranmış biberi, tereyağı ve domatesi ilave ederek kavurmaya devam edin.
5.  Tuzunu ve muskatı ekleyerek tatlandırın.
6.  Ocaktan alıp soğumaya bırakın.
7.  Yufkaları üst üste serip en fazla 4 parmak genişliğinde uzun şeritler halinde kesin.
8.  Her şeridi ikiye bölün ve tezgahın üzerine yayın.

9.  Yufkanın ucuna denk gelecek şekilde sırasıyla bir yemek kaşığı irice doğranmış patlıcanı, 1 yemek kaşığı kıymalı iç karışımı ve en son olarak da rendelenmiş kaşar peynirini üst üste gelecek şekilde serpin.
10.  Muska şeklinde katlayın.
11.  Yağlı kağıt serili fırın tepsisine yerleştirin.
12.  Kalan malzemeyi de aynı şekilde hazırlayın.
13.  Üzerlerine yumurta sarısı sürün.
14.  İsteğe göre baharat serpin.
15.  Önceden ısıtılmış 200 dereceye ayarlı fırında, iyice kızarıncaya kadar pişirin.
16.  Ilık servis yapın.
17.  Afiyet olsun.
18. Dilerseniz, kıymalı muska börek tarifini de deneyebilirsiniz.

name: Amulet Pastry With Hummus
instructions: 1. Haşlanmış nohutları çatalla ezerek püre haline getirin.
2.  Püreye tahin, zeytinyağı ve limon suyu ekleyip karıştırın.
3.  Tuzla tatlandırın.
4.  Maydanozları ince doğrayıp ilave edin.
5.  Yufkaları üst üste sererek ortasından kesin.
6.  Daha sonra yufkaları 5 cm’lik aralıklarla geniş şeritler halinde kesin.
7.  Yufka şeritlerinin bir ucuna nohutlu içten koyarak şeridi muska şeklinde katlayın.
8.  Yufka uçlarını hafif suya batırarak yapıştırın.
9.  Kızdırılmış yağda börekleri kızartın.
10.  Sıcak servis yapın.

name: Amy's Cauliflower Mac And Cheese
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).

Bring 2 large pots of lightly salted water to a boil. Cook elbow macaroni in the first pot, stirring occasionally, until tender yet firm to the bite, about 8 minutes. Cook cauliflower in the second pot, stirring occasionally, until tender yet firm to the bite, 3 to 6 minutes. Drain macaroni and cauliflower.

Return 1 empty pot to the stove. Add olive oil and heat over medium heat. Add garlic to the hot oil and saute until fragrant, about 1 minute. Stir in red pepper flakes. Add drained cauliflower, reduce heat to medium-low, and saute for 2 minutes.

Add the cooked macaroni to the cauliflower mixture. Add 1 3/4 cups each mozzarella and Cheddar cheeses and stir until all ingredients are well combined. Transfer to a baking dish and sprinkle with remaining mozzarella and Cheddar.
Bake in the preheated oven until nice and bubbly, about 30 minutes.

name: Amy's Kidney Bean Salad

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Whisk mayonnaise, milk, vinegar, sugar, salt, and black pepper together in a medium-large bowl until well combined.
Stir kidney beans, hard-boiled eggs, green bell pepper, and red onion into the mayonnaise mixture. Eat immediately or refrigerate before serving.

name: Amy's Vegan Chili
instructions: Heat oil in a medium Dutch oven over medium heat; add onion, bell peppers, and garlic. Cook and stir until vegetables have softened, about 5 minutes.

Mash 1/2 black beans in a small bowl; transfer to the Dutch oven with remaining whole black beans. Add diced tomatoes, 2 cups water, corn, lentils, quinoa, chili powder, brown sugar, paprika, salt, turmeric, oregano, cumin, red pepper flakes, and black pepper; stir to combine. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low, and simmer for 2 hours, stirring occasionally.

Whisk 3 tablespoons water and cornstarch together until completely dissolved, adding more water if necessary. Stir flour slurry into chili; simmer until thickened, about 15 minutes. Mash chili with a potato masher until reaches desired consistency.

name: Amêijoas À Bulhão Pato - Recipe
original_name: Amêijoas à Bulhão Pato - receita fácil
instructions: Demolhe as amêijoas numa tigela com água e sal e deixe repousar, até que libertem toda a areia. Retire e reserve.
Descasque e pique finamente os dentes de alho. Num tacho, aqueça o azeite, junte a manteiga e deixe derreter. Adicione depois os dentes de alho e deixe refogar, mexendo de vez em quando.
Adicione, por fim, as amêijoas escorridas, tempere com um pouco de piripíri e deixe cozinhar, mexendo de vez em quando, até que as amêijoas abram.
Junte depois coentros picados a gosto, regue com o sumo de limão, retifique o sal e retire do lume. Sirva de imediato.

name: An Apple A Day
instructions: Melt butter in a large heavy skillet over medium heat. Add apples, brown sugar, and ginger. Scrape in seeds from vanilla bean (reserve bean for another use). Cook, stirring often, until apples are just tender, about 5 minutes. Add jam, brandy, and lemon juice. Stir until liquid is reduced by half, about 3 minutes. Divide filling among ramekins. DO AHEAD Filling can be made 4 hours ahead. Let stand at room temperature.

Pulse almonds, flour, and powdered sugar in a food processor until almonds are finely ground. Whisk sugar and ginger in a large bowl. Using an electric mixer, add egg whites one at a time to sugar mixture, beating to blend between additions. With mixer running, gradually beat in hot melted butter. Fold in almond mixture (topping will be thin). DO AHEAD Topping can be made 1 hour ahead. Let stand at room temperature.
Preheat oven to 350°. Pour topping over filling in ramekins, dividing equally. Place ramekins on a rimmed baking sheet.
Bake until topping is puffed and tops of cakes are golden brown, 25-30 minutes. Let cool for at least 15 minutes. Serve warm, topped with a small scoop of ice cream.

name: Ana's Ny Bialys

ingredients.item: Warm water (110 degrees f (43 degrees c))

instructions: Preheat oven to 93°C (95 degrees C). Turn off and keep door closed to retain warmth.
Dissolve yeast and sugar in 1/2 cup warm water in a large bowl. Let stand until yeast softens and begins to form a creamy foam, 7 to 12 minutes.

Mix all-purpose flour, bread flour, vital wheat gluten, and 2 1/2 teaspoons salt in another bowl; add to yeast mixture. Combine remaining 1 1/4 cup warm water with onion juice; pour over flour and yeast mixture. Stir together until a dough forms.

Knead dough on a floured work surface until soft and smooth, 8 to 10 minutes. Form dough into a ball and place it in a lightly-oiled glass or ceramic bowl, turning to oil all sides. Cover with a towel. Place dough in warm oven until it triples in bulk, about 1 1/2 hours.
Punch dough down and turn it over. Cover with plastic wrap and let rise in the oven again until doubled in bulk, about 45 minutes more.
Punch dough down again and transfer to a floured work surface. Divide into 2 equal cylinders. Slice each cylinder into 8 rounds. Lay them flat and let rest, covered with a towel, about 10 minutes.

Heat oil in large skillet over medium-high heat. Add onion and cook, stirring often, until golden, about 5 minutes. Remove from heat; stir in poppy seeds and 1/2 teaspoon salt. Let filling cool to room temperature.

Flatten the dough into rounds about 3 1/2-inches in diameter with a raised middle and thinner edge. Sprinkle cornmeal lightly over 2 baking sheets. Arrange dough rounds on baking sheets. Cover with plastic wrap and let rise until increased by half, about 30 minutes.
Center oven rack and preheat oven to 218°C (220 degrees C).

Press the bottom of a greased shot glass in the center of each round to make a deep indentation. Place 1 to 2 teaspoons of filling in each indentation. Cover with plastic wrap and let bialys rise until puffy but not doubled, about 15 minutes.
Bake bialys in the preheated oven until lightly browned, rotating the baking sheets so they brown evenly, about 15 minutes.

name: Anacortes Carrot Ginger Soup
instructions: Peel and dice the carrots, sweet potatoes and ginger. Dice onion and seed and dice the pasilla pepper. Mince garlic.
Heat olive oil in soup pot over medium heat. Add onions, garlic, ginger and pasilla pepper. Sauté until translucent and fragrant, 3-5 minutes.
Add carrots and sweet potatoes and cover in vegetable stock. Add paprika and red pepper flakes to desired heat. Bring to a boil, cover, and lower heat to a simmer. Cook covered for 35-40 minutes.
Using an immersion blender, blend soup until smooth. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with pepitas and serve.
Enjoy!

name: Anadama Bread

ingredients.item: Hemp seeds or white sesame seeds
Nigella seeds or black sesame seeds

instructions: Preheat oven to 375°. Lightly butter an 8x4” loaf pan and line with parchment paper, leaving generous overhang. Place yeast in a medium bowl (or the bowl of a stand mixer) and add 1 cup warm water; stir to dissolve yeast. Add cornmeal, molasses, hemp seeds, nigella seeds, golden and brown flaxseed, poppy seeds, salt, 2 cups flour, and 2 Tbsp. unsalted butter. Using a wooden spoon (or dough hook if using stand mixer), mix until no dry spots remain.

Turn out dough onto a lightly floured surface and knead until dough is smooth and elastic, 10–15 minutes (alternatively, mix in stand mixer on medium speed 8–10 minutes). Lightly butter a medium bowl. Transfer dough to bowl and turn to coat. Cover with plastic wrap and let rise in a warm, draft-free spot until almost doubled in size, about 1 hour.
Punch down dough to deflate; cover. Let rise again until about doubled in size, about 1 hour.

Turn out dough onto a lightly floured surface and pat into an 8x4” rectangle. Starting at the short side farthest from you, roll up dough, pinching the seam as you go, to create a tight roll. Pinch seam to close; tuck ends under and pinch to seal. Place seam side down in prepared pan and cover with plastic. Let dough rise until it crests the top of the pan and springs back slightly when pressed, about 1 hour.

Brush top of dough with egg. Bake, rotating halfway through, until bread is baked through and top is a deep golden brown, 45–50 minutes. Let cool slightly in pan on a wire rack before turning out. Let cool before slicing (if you can wait that long). Serve with salted butter.
Do Ahead: Bread can be made 5 days ahead. Store tightly wrapped at room temperature.

name: Anatolian Soup
instructions: 1. Bakliyatları su içerisinde haşlayın.
2.  Bir kapta terbiye malzemelerini karıştırın.
3.  Haşlanan bakliyat suyundan yavaş yavaş terbiye içerisine alınır.
4.  Karışım pişirilir.
5.  Soğanlar ince yemeklik doğranır.
6.  Yağ içerisinde pişirilir.
7.  Baharatlar ilave edilir.
8.  Çorba karışımına eklenir, karıştırılır.
9.  Sıcak servis edilir.
10.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Ancho And Gaujillo Chile Harissa

ingredients.item: Mortar and pestle or spice mill

instructions: Place all chiles in large bowl. Pour enough boiling water over to cover. Let soak until chiles are very soft, 45 minutes to 1 hour.

Meanwhile, stir cumin seeds and caraway seeds in small dry skillet over medium heat until fragrant and lightly toasted, 2 to 3 minutes. Cool slightly, then finely grind seeds in mortar with pestle or in spice mill.

Drain chiles and transfer to processor; add garlic and process until only tiny flecks of chiles remain. Transfer chile mixture to fine-mesh strainer set over medium bowl. Press mixture through strainer into bowl; discard solids in strainer. Mix ground cumin and caraway seeds, orange juice, and olive oil into chile mixture. Season harissa to taste with salt. DO AHEAD Can be made ahead. Cover and chill up to 1 week or freeze in airtight container up to 1 month.

name: Ancho Chile Enchiladas Recipe
original_name: Receta de enchiladas de chile ancho
instructions: Hierve la pechuga en abundante agua con sal y la hoja de laurel. Cocina por aproximadamente 20 minutos o hasta que esté blandita.
Una vez cocida, escurre y deja reposar. Cuando esté a temperatura, deshebra muy bien. Reserva.
Pela la cebolla, el jitomate y corta a la mitad.  Retira la piel de los dientes de ajo.
Calienta un sartén, engrasado con un poco de aceite de oliva por 7 minutos por ambos lados o hasta que queden ahumados.
Una vez listos, retira la semillas y las venas del chile ancho. Añade a una licuadora.
Incorpora la cebolla, el jitomate y los dientes de ajo. Sazona con sal y pimienta al gusto. Vierte un poco de agua y procesa hasta que se forme una salsa. Reserva.
Calienta las tortillas, rellena con el pollo deshebrado, dobla y sirve en un plato.
Baña con la salsa de chile ancho a tu gusto. Decora con las semillas de sésamo, el queso fresco esparcido y el rábano cortado finamente.
¡Disfruta!

name: Ancho Chile Oil

ingredients.item: Red fresno chile or red jalapeño

instructions: Heat first 7 ingredients in a small saucepan over medium heat until fragrant and just beginning to bubble. Remove from heat. Let steep for 1 hour.

Purée mixture in a blender until smooth. Strain through a fine-mesh sieve into a small bowl; discard solids in sieve. Season oil to taste with salt. DO AHEAD: Can be made 1 week ahead. Cover and chill.

name: Ancho Mole Cookies

ingredients.item: (185 g; or more) raw sesame seeds

ingredients.prep: not ancho chile powder, which has added salt, cumin, and other spices)

ingredients.item: . vanilla extract or vanilla bean paste

ingredients.prep: mango, or pineapple), cut into  0.75" pieces

instructions: Place racks in upper and lower thirds of oven; preheat to 350°. Toast nuts and ¼ cup sesame seeds on a rimmed baking sheet on upper rack, tossing halfway through, until golden brown, 8–10 minutes. Let cool.

Stir together ancho powder and agave syrup in a small bowl. Whisk flour, baking powder, and cinnamon in a medium bowl to combine. Using an electric mixer on medium-high speed, beat butter, sugar, and salt in a large bowl, scraping down sides and bottom of bowl as needed, until light and creamy, about 3 minutes. Add egg yolks and vanilla and beat until incorporated, about 1 minute. Scrape in ancho mixture and beat until smooth and creamy, about 1 minute. Reduce speed to low, add dry ingredients, and beat to combine. Add dried fruit, chocolate, and toasted nuts and sesame seeds; mix with a wooden spoon until evenly distributed.

Divide dough in half. Working one at a time, roll each piece into a 10"-long log. Wrap each log tightly in plastic and roll across work surface to make as smooth and cylindrical as possible. Place on a rimmed baking sheet and freeze until surface is firm, about 20 minutes.

Slap a log down onto counter to create a flat side; roll over and slap again to flatten another side (you’re aiming for a triangular shape). Repeat to create third side of the triangle. Tap against counter to smooth if needed, then tap ends to flatten. Repeat with second log. Return logs to baking sheet; freeze until firm, about 15 minutes.

Working one at a time, unwrap logs and brush sides with egg white. Working on baking sheet, sprinkle sides with remaining 1 cup sesame seeds and gently press to coat. Surface should be covered; use more sesame if needed. Freeze logs on baking sheet, uncovered, until surface is very firm but not frozen solid, about 1 hour.

Preheat oven to 350°. Slice a log crosswise into ¼"-thick triangles and divide cookies between 2 parchment-lined baking sheets, spacing 1" apart. (If dough is soft or starts to lose its shape, freeze 10 minutes before continuing.) Bake cookies, rotating baking sheets top to bottom and back to front halfway through, until edges are just set, about 10 minutes. Let cool on baking sheets. Transfer cookies to a platter or airtight container and line baking sheets with fresh sheets of parchment paper. Repeat process with remaining dough.
Do Ahead: Dough can be rolled into logs 3 days ahead; refrigerate. Transfer to freezer 30 minutes before slicing. Cookies can be baked 1 day ahead; store airtight at room temperature.

name: Anchovies In Brine
instructions: 1. Hamsileri temizleyip yıkayın.
2.  Kılçıklarını çıkarıp süzgece alarak sularının süzülmesi için yarım saat bekletin.
3. Geniş bir kaba bir sıra hamsi, üzerine bir sıra kaya tuzu şeklinde dizin.
4.  Üzerine limon suyu ilave edip kapağını kapatın ve 1 gece bekletin.
5. Hamsileri zeytinyağı ve ince kıyılmış maydanoza bulayıp kızarmış ekmek üzerine alın ve servis yapın.
6. En lezzetli balık soslarına buradan göz atabilirsiniz.

name: Anchovies In The Oven

ingredients.item: 1μικρό ξερό κρεμμύδι σε πολύ λεπτές φέτες
1μικρό ξερό κρεμμύδι σε πολύ λεπτές φέτες

instructions: Πρώτα διαλέγουμε γαύρο χοντρό.
Καθαρίζουμε τον γαύρο με το χέρι τραβώντας το κεφάλι με κίνηση υπό γωνία. Έτσι φεύγουν και τα εντόσθια.
Πλένουμε πολύ καλά και στραγγίζουμε σε σουρωτήρι.
Αλατίζουμε ολόγυρα κι αφήνουμε να στραγγίσει μέχρι να ετοιμάσουμε τα υπόλοιπα υλικά.
Ψιλοκόβουμε το σκόρδο σε λεπτές φέτες.
Κόβουμε τα ντοματίνια στη μέση και το κρεμμύδι σε πολύ λεπτές φέτες.
Τέλος κόβουμε και το λεμόνι σε λεπτές φέτες.

name: Anchovies Recipe
instructions: Πρέπει να προσέξουμε και να πλύνουμε τα έντερα πολύ καλά. Μετά με μαχαίρι τα κόβουμε σε μεγάλα κομμάτια.
Πλένουμε το συκώτι και τα γλυκάδια και τα κόβουμε σε μακρόστενα κομμάτια για την γαρδούμπα κοκκινιστή.
Παίρνουμε ένα κομμάτι γλυκάδι και δύο συκώτια και τα τυλίγουμε με ένα κομμάτι έντερο.
Βάζουμε σε ταψί λάδι και το τοποθετούμε στο μάτι της κουζίνας.
Κόβουμε κομμάτια τα κρεμμύδια και τα ρίχνουμε στο ταψί να τσιγαριστούν.
Προσθέτουμε το σκόρδο ψιλοκομμένο.
Αποσύρουμε από τη φωτιά.
Τοποθετούμε από πάνω τα γαρδουμπάκια, ρίχνουμε αλάτι, πιπέρι, τα δαφνόφυλλα, τους κόκκους και τον πελτέ, τον οποίο έχουμε λιώσει σε λίγο νερό.
Ρίχνουμε νερό και βάζουμε το ταψί στο φούρνο. Στην αρχή στους 200°C και μόλις αρχίσουν να βράζουν χαμηλώνουμε στους 170°C και ψήνουμε περίπου 1-2 ώρες.

name: Anchovy And Sardine Toasts With Chile Butter
instructions: Place a rack in upper third of oven; heat broiler. Cut or tear bread slices in half, then arrange on a rimmed baking sheet. Brush or drizzle with oil (about 1 Tbsp. total). Broil until golden brown on top and just golden underneath, about 3 minutes (watch carefully; each broiler is different). Let cool 15 minutes (this will keep butter from melting when you spread it on).
Mix butter and chiles in a small bowl. Swipe some butter evenly over each toast (you may have some left over). Place an anchovy on 1 toast. Top remaining toasts with sardines.
Squeeze juice from a lemon half into a small bowl. Add parsley, season with salt, if desired, and drizzle a little oil over (it doesn’t need much). Toss well.
Scatter parsley salad over toasts and finely grate some zest from remaining lemon half on top.
See the rest of the Feast of the Seven Fishes menu here.

name: Anchovy Bird Recipe

ingredients.item: Hamsi yerine mezgit, küçük uskumru veya ringa balığı kullanabilirsiniz.
Daha iri bir versiyon için çipura veya levrek fileto ile de yapılabilir.
Taze soğan ve maydanoz yerine dereotu veya taze nane ekleyerek aromayı değiştirebilirsiniz.
Kuru soğan yerine sarımsak veya kırmızı soğan kullanabilirsiniz.
Mısır unu yerine galeta unu, ince ekmek kırıntısı veya panko ile de iç harcı bağlayabilirsiniz.
Mısır unu yerine galeta unu veya un karışımı kullanarak farklı bir çıtırlık elde edebilirsiniz.
Kızartmak yerine fırında 200°c’de 10–12 dakika pişirerek daha az yağlı bir versiyon hazırlayabilirsiniz.
Hava fritözünde (air fryer) 180°c’de 8–10 dakika pişirerek hafif ve çıtır bir sonuç alabilirsiniz.
Yanında sarımsaklı yoğurt veya limon sosu ile servis edebilirsiniz.
Salata eşliğinde sunarak hafif bir öğün hazırlayabilirsiniz.
üzerine nar ekşisi veya zeytinyağı gezdirerek farklı tatlar katabilirsiniz.
Hamsi kuşlarını tek tek tabakta sunabilir veya büyük bir servis tabağında toplu olarak sunabilirsiniz.
Taze otlar ve limon dilimleri ile süsleyerek görselliği artırabilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Taze soğan, maydanoz ve rendelenmiş kuru soğanı bir kaba alın.
2.  Mısır unu, tuz ve karabiber ekleyerek karıştırın.
3. Temizlenmiş hamsileri düz bir zemine yan yana dizin.
4.  İç harçtan küçük parçalar alıp hamsilerin içine yerleştirin.
5.  Hamsileri rulo şeklinde sararak kuş formu verin.
6. Hazırlanan hamsi rulolarını mısır ununa bulayın, tüm yüzeylerinin kaplandığından emin olun.
7. Geniş bir tavada ayçiçek yağını kızdırın.
8.  Hamsi kuşlarını orta ateşte her tarafı altın rengi alana kadar kızartın (yaklaşık 4–5 dakika).
9. Hamsi kuşlarını kağıt havlu üzerine alarak fazla yağını süzdürün.
10.  Sıcak olarak servis edin.
11.  Limon dilimleri ve taze maydanozla süsleyebilirsiniz.

name: Anchovy Butter
instructions: In a medium bowl, combine butter, garlic, anchovies, hot paprika, lemon juice, and kosher salt to taste. Mix with a fork until smooth and spread on steak. Or transfer to waxed paper, roll into a cylinder, chill, and slice.

name: Anchovy Casserole
instructions: 1. Soğan ve sarımsakları temizleyip kıyın.
2.  Biberleri temizleyip halka halka doğrayın.
3.  Patatesin kabuğunu soyup irice rendeleyin.
4.  Domateslerin kabuklarını soyup küp şeklinde doğrayın.
5.  Pazı yapraklarını irice doğrayın.
6.  Sebzeleri ve hamsileri geniş bir kaba alıp karıştırın.
7.  Su, tuz ve defneyapraklarını ilave edip tekrar harmanlayın.
8. Hamsili sebze karışımını güveç kaplarına paylaştırın.
9. Üzerlerine zeytinyağı gezdirin.
10.  Önceden ısıtılmış 170 dereceye ayarlı fırında 25-30 dakika pişirin.
11.  Sıcak servis yapın.
12. Dilerseniz, Karadeniz usulü hamsi buğulama tarifine de göz atabilirsiniz.

name: Anchovy Coca Recipe

ingredients.item: 9 gr de levadura de panadería  (diluida en agua )

instructions: En un bol grande, mezclar la harina con la levadura disuelta en agua, el aceite de oliva y la sal. Amasar hasta obtener una textura homogénea y elástica.
Dejar reposar la masa durante 20 minutos, cubierta con un paño limpio.
Colocar la masa sobre una bandeja de horno engrasada o con papel de hornear. Estirarla con ayuda de un poco de aceite de oliva y dejar reposar nuevamente 30 minutos para que la masa gane volumen.
Incorporar el tomate triturado o en rodajas sobre la masa y distribuir las anchoas por toda la superficie. Rociar con un poco de aceite de oliva virgen extra.
Hornear a 180°C durante 20 minutos, hasta que la masa esté dorada y crujiente. Retirar del horno y servir caliente o a temperatura ambiente.

name: Anchovy Cream
instructions: 1. Hamsilerin kılçıklarını ayıklayıp bol suyla yıkayın ve süzün.
2.  Yumurtaları çukur bir kaba kırın.
3. Taze soğan, maydanoz ve naneyi temizleyip kıyın.
4.  Yumurtaların bulunduğu kaba yeşillikler, mısır unu, tuz ve hamsileri yumurtaya ekleyip iyice karıştırın.
5. Sıvıyağı tavaya alıp kızdırın.
6.  Karışımı tavaya döküp üzerine kaşıkla düzeltin.
7.  Kaygananın bir yüzü piştiğinde dikkatlice çevirip diğer tarafını da kızartın.
8.  Sıcak servis yapın.
9. Yeni tatlar keşfetmek için, baharatlı balık köftesi tarifine göz atın.

name: Anchovy Diblesi
instructions: 1. Hamsileri temizleyip kılçıklarını çıkarın.
2.  Yıkayıp süzgece alın.
3.  Lahanayı yıkayıp süzün ve çok ince şeritler halinde doğrayın.
4.  Pirinci yıkayıp süzgece alın.
5.  Soğanları soyup küp küp doğrayın.
6.  Lahananın bir kısmını tencerenin dibine döşeyin.
7.  Pirinç, soğan ve hamsileri ekleyin.
8.  Üzerine kalan lahanayı yayın.
9.  Su ve sıvıyağ ekleyip kapağı kapalı olarak yüksek ateşte 10-12 dakika pişirin.
10.  Tuz serpip karıştırın ve ocağı kısın.
11.  Tereyağını kızdırıp üzerine gezdirin ve kısık ateşte 10 dakika demlendirin.
12.  Maydanozu yıkayıp kıyın.
13.  Tuz, karabiber, nane ve maydanozu tencereye ekleyip karıştırın.
14.  Servis tabağına alıp sıcak olarak servis yapın.
15.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Anchovy Mayonnaise

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Whisk egg yolk, mustard, and 1 tsp. lemon juice in a small bowl. Whisking constantly, gradually drizzle in grapeseed oil, then olive oil, drop by drop at first, until mayonnaise is thickened and smooth. Whisk in anchovies and remaining lemon juice; season with salt and pepper. Cover and chill.
DO AHEAD: Mayonnaise can be made 1 day ahead. Keep chilled.

name: Anchovy Pan
instructions: 1. Hamsileri ayıklayıp yıkayın.
2.  Düz bir tepsiye alıp üzerlerine limon suyunu gezdirerek dökün.
3.  Mısır ununu serpiştirin.
4.  Unun balıklara bulanması için tepsiyi sallayın.
5. Ayçiçeği yağını kızartma tenceresinde kızdırın.
6.  Balıkları ilave edip çıtır çıtır olana kadar kızartın.
7.  Limon, dilimlenmiş turp, kiraz domates ve taze soğanla birlikte sıcak servis yapın.

name: Anchovy Pan Recipe

ingredients.item: 500-600 gram taze hamsi (temizlenmiş ve kılçıkları ayıklanmış)

instructions: 1. Temizlenmiş hamsileri yıkayın ve kağıt havlu ile fazla suyunu alın.
2. Unu geniş bir tabağa alın, tuz ve karabiberi ekleyin ve karıştırın.
3.  Hamsileri tek tek una bulayın.
4. Geniş bir tavaya yeterince sıvı yağ koyun ve orta ateşte ısıtın.
5.  Hamsileri tavaya dizin, her iki tarafı da altın rengini alana kadar 2-3 dakika kızartın.
6. Kızaran hamsileri kağıt havlu üzerine alarak fazla yağını süzdürün.
7.  Sıcak olarak servis tabağına alın.
8.  Limon dilimleri ile servis edin.

name: Anchovy Pasta With Garlic Breadcrumbs

ingredients.prep: very finely chopped, or  0.5 teaspoon crushed red pepper flakes

instructions: Very thinly slice 4 garlic cloves (a mandoline works great) and set aside. Pulse remaining 4 garlic cloves in a food processor until finely chopped. Add bread and lemon zest and pulse until coarse crumbs form; season with salt and pepper.

Heat ¼ cup oil in a large Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium. Cook breadcrumb mixture, stirring often, until golden brown and crisp, about 5 minutes. Transfer breadcrumb mixture with a slotted spoon to a small bowl.

Heat remaining 3 Tbsp. oil in same pot over medium-low. Cook reserved sliced garlic, stirring occasionally, until golden at edges, about 1 minute. Add anchovies and chiles and cook, stirring, until anchovies are dissolved, about 1 minute. Stir in lemon juice.
Meanwhile, cook pasta in a large pot of boiling salted water, stirring occasionally, until very al dente, about 3 minutes less than package directions.

Using tongs, transfer pasta to pot with sauce along with 1 cup pasta cooking liquid. Cook, tossing often, until pasta is al dente. Add 3 Tbsp. pasta cooking liquid, then gradually add cheese, tossing until melted and emulsified. Remove from heat, add parsley, butter, and half of breadcrumb mixture and toss until combined and butter is melted. If pasta seems dry, add more pasta cooking liquid and oil and toss again. Season with salt and pepper, and more lemon juice if desired.
Divide pasta among bowls. Top with remaining breadcrumb mixture.

name: Anchovy Salad With Tomato And Egg, Step By Step
original_name: Ensalada de anchoas con tomate y huevo, paso a paso

ingredients.item: 1  lata de anchoas de las pequeñas

instructions: Cocina el huevo con su cáscara en una olla con agua. El tiempo aproximado para sancocharlo es de 10 minutos. Una vez listo retíralo del calor, ponlo bajo el chorro de agua fría y quítale la cáscara. Luego córtalo en ruedas con cuidado.
Corta el tomate en ruedas y haz lo mismo con el trozo de pepino
Lava la lechuga y trocéala con la mano a tu gusto.
Abre la lata de anchoas y cuelo el líquido. Procura quitarle la mayor cantidad de líquido posible.
Para armar la ensalada escoge un plato mediano o pequeño, pon primero la lechuga y encima pon los tomates, el pepino y el huevo.
Luego, puedes trocear los pequeños filetes de anchoa, ponerlos en cubos o también puedes hacerles forma de espiral como en la foto.
Finalmente ponle un poco de pimienta al gusto y un chorro de aceite de oliva.
Disfruta tu ensalada.

name: Anchovy With Fresh Herbs
instructions: 1. Hamsilerin baş kısımlarını alıp içlerini temizledikten sonra yıkayıp, havlu kağıt ile kurulayın.
2. Ufalanmış bayat ekmek içi, ince doğradığınız yeşillikler, kırmızı biber, limon suyu, rendelenmiş limon kabuğu, yumurtanın akı, tuz ve karabiberi ilave edip harmanlayın.
3. Ayıkladığınız hamsileri yağladığınız bir fırın kabına, yarısı iç kısımları üste gelecek şekilde dizin.
4.  Tuz ve karabiber ile tatlandırıp, taze otlu harcı üzerine yayın.
5.  Kalan hamsileri otlu harcın üzerine kapatın.
6. Üzerine çok az zeytinyağı gezdirip önceden ısıtılmış 170 derece fırında 35-40 dakika pişirin.
7.  Fırından alıp sıcak servis yapın.

name: Anchovy Wrap Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 kg hamsi (temizlenmiş, kılçığı alınmış, fileto haline getirilmiş)

instructions: 1. Hamsileri iyice yıkayıp süzün.
2.  Kılçıkları tamamen alınmış olmalı.
3. Kağıt havluyla kurulayın ki mısır unu iyi yapışsın.
4. Geniş bir kapta mısır ununu ve tuzu karıştırın.
5. Her bir hamsiyi tek tek mısır ununa bulayın, fazla ununu hafifçe silkerek alın.
6. Hamsinin derili kısmı dışta kalacak şekilde, baş kısmından başlayıp rulo biçiminde sarın.
7. Küçük sarmalar hâlinde tüm hamsileri sarın.
8. İsterseniz her bir sarmayı kürdanla sabitleyebilirsiniz (piştikten sonra çıkarılır).
9. Fırın tepsisini tereyağıyla bolca yağlayın.
10. Hazırladığınız hamsi sarmalarını tepsiye yan yana, aralarında boşluk kalmayacak şekilde dizin.
11. Üzerlerine hafifçe sıvı yağ gezdirin.
12. Önceden ısıtılmış 200°C fırında 20–25 dakika pişirin.
13. Altı ve üstü kızarana kadar pişmesi yeterlidir.
14. Dilerseniz aynı işlemi tavada da yapabilirsiniz:Tavayı sıvı yağla yağlayın, sarmaları yerleştirip orta ateşte iki tarafı da kızarana kadar pişirin.
15. Fırından çıkan hamsi sarmaları birkaç dakika dinlendirin.
16. Sıcak servis edin.
17.  Yanına limon dilimleri, mısır ekmeği ve yeşil soğanlı salata çok yakışır.
18.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Anchovy, Little Gem, And Tomato Salad

ingredients.item: Ripe tomatoes on the vine (about 1 1/3 pounds)
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Preheat oven to 400°. Place tomatoes in an 8x8x2" glass baking dish. Season with salt and pepper, then drizzle with oil. Roast tomatoes until softened, about 30 minutes. Let cool. Transfer tomatoes to a large bowl, leaving juices behind. Pour vinaigrette into baking dish and whisk into the tomato juices to blend.

Add anchovies and lettuce to bowl with tomatoes. Drizzle vinaigrette over. Toss salad to coat (it's best if you use your hands). Season salad to taste with salt and pepper. Sprinkle parsley over and serve.
