Combine baking mix, milk, shredded Cheddar cheese, and remaining 1/4 cup sugar in a bowl and stir until consistency is similar to a waffle batter. Spoon mixture evenly over the apples in the skillet; no need to be too precise as it will spread out while baking.

Bake skillet in preheated oven until batter reaches a firm consistency and is golden brown, 20 to 25 minutes. Remove from the oven and allow to cool on the stovetop until the caramelized sugar thickens a bit, about 5 minutes. Spoon servings onto individual plates, drizzle with caramel liquid, and serve while warm.

name: Apple And Chocolate Tartlet
instructions: 1. Elmaların kabuklarını soyup irice rendeleyin.
2.  Küp doğranmış incir, şeker ve tarçın ile birlikte tavaya alıp yumuşayıncaya kadar pişirin.
3.  Çikolatayı eritip ekleyerek karıştırın.
4.  Margarin ve şekeri iyice karıştırın.
5.  Yumurtayı ekleyin.
6.  Vanilya, kabartma tozu ve unu ilave edip yoğurun.
7.  Hamurun birazını ayırıp yağlanmış tartölet kalıplarına paylaştırın.
8.  İçlerine elmalı karışımdan yerleştirin.
9.  Kalan hamuru açın ve yuvarlaklar keserek üzerlerine kapatın.
10.  180 dereceye ayarlanmış fırında hafif kızarıncaya kadar pişirin.
11.  Servis yapın.

name: Apple And Cinnamon Cake Recipe
original_name: Receita de bolo de maçã e canela
instructions: Descasque e limpe as maçãs de sementes, corte-as em fatias e coloque de molho em água com o sumo de limão.
Bata as gemas com o açúcar até obter um creme esbranquiçado. Junte a manteiga e bata mais um pouco. Acrescente depois a farinha, o fermento, a canela e o leite e bata até ficar homogéneo.
À parte, bata as claras em castelo e envolva-as delicadamente na massa anterior. Unte uma forma de buraco com manteiga e polvilhe-a com farinha.

Verta 1/3 da massa na forma e depois 1/3 da maçã. Faça mais duas camadas intercaladas de massa e maçã e leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 180ºc, por cerca de 40 minutos. Sirva polvilhado com açúcar em pó.

name: Apple And Cinnamon Cake Recipe Without Sugar
original_name: Receta de panqué de manzana y canela sin azúcar

ingredients.item: 1 taza de puré de manzana (sin azúcar)
½ taza de harina de coco
1  manzana dorada (pelada y cortada en cubos)
⅔ taza de crema de almendras
½ cdita de polvo de hornear
¼ taza de harina de almendras

instructions: Precalienta el horno a 180 °C.

En un bol, incorpora los 3 huevos a temperatura. Añade el puré de manzana, el jarabe de maple, el aceite de coco y la crema de almendras. Mezcla muy bien con un batidor manual hasta que quede una textura homogénea.
Incorpora al bol la harina de coco, el polvo de hornear, la canela y la nuez moscada. Bate muy bien hasta que se integre.
Ahora, agrega la manzana cortada en cubos y las nueces troceadas. Mezcla muy bien.
Vierte la mezcla en un molde de panque forrado con papel para hornear. Reserva.
En un recipiente, añade el monk fruit, la harina de almendras, el aceite de coco, la canela y las nueces.
Mezcla completamente hasta que quede todo integrado.
Incorpora la cobertura en el molde hasta que quede bien esparcido.
Hornea por unos 35 o 40 minutos a 180 °C. Estará listo cuando introduzcas un palillo y salga limpio.
Retira del horno, deja reposar por unos 15 minutos, luego desmolda.
Acompaña con más crema de almendras o un glaseado.

name: Apple And Cinnamon Compote
instructions: Coloque as maçãs numa tigela e regue-as com o sumo de limão para não oxidarem. Num tacho largo, deite o açúcar, a maçã e os paus de canela. Leve ao lume e mexa até o açúcar se dissolver.
Quando levantar fervura, deixe cozinhar até os cubinhos de maçã ficarem moles e a compota engrossar (cerca de 45 minutos a 1 hora).
Divida a compota por frasquinhos, previamente esterilizados, e guarde-os em local fresco e seco durante cerca de 6 meses.

name: Apple And Coconut Milk Cupcakes
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease 10 cups of a muffin tin or line with paper muffin liners.
Combine all-purpose flour, sugar, coconut flour, baking powder, cinnamon, salt, and nutmeg together in a bowl.
Whisk egg lightly in a large bowl. Add applesauce, coconut milk, vegetable oil, honey, and vanilla extract. Stir in flour mixture until batter is just combined. Scoop into the prepared muffin pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until tops spring back when lightly pressed and a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, about 30 minutes.

name: Apple And Dried Cranberry Crisp
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C; place oven rack in the middle position. Coat a 9x13-inch baking dish with cooking spray. Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil.

Combine apples, dried cranberries, 1/2 cup flour, 1/2 cup white sugar, lemon juice, 1 tablespoon cinnamon, and 1/2 teaspoon nutmeg in a bowl until apples and cranberries are well-coated; transfer to the prepared baking dish.

Combine oats, brown sugar, 1/2 cup flour, 1/2 cup white sugar, butter, 1/2 teaspoon cinnamon, 1/2 teaspoon nutmeg, baking soda, baking powder, and salt in a bowl using your hands until well-mixed; sprinkle over apple filling. Place baking dish on the prepared baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until filling is bubbling and topping is golden brown, 55 to 60 minutes. Cool crisp before serving, 15 minutes.

name: Apple And Dried Fruit Cake
original_name: Bolo de maçã e frutos secos

ingredients.item: 150 g  frutos secos ((passas, miolo de noz e amêndoa grosseiramente partida))

instructions: Descasque, corte as maçãs em cubinhos e reserve. Numa tigela, bata muito bem as gemas com o açúcar, depois junte a manteiga e bata por mais 2 minutos. Acrescente o fermento, a farinha e o sal, envolva, adicione os frutos secos e volte a misturar.
À parte, bata as claras em castelo e incorpore-as cuidadosamente na massa. Por fim, junte os cubinhos de maçã e envolva.

Unte uma forma com manteiga e polvilhe-a com farinha. Verta nela a massa e leve-a ao forno, pré-aquecido a 180ºc, durante cerca de 45 a 50 minutos. Retire, deixe arrefecer um pouco, desenforme e polvilhe com açúcar em pó.

name: Apple And Fennel Salad

ingredients.item: 1 adet büyük elma (çekirdekli orta kısım çıkarıldıktan sonra ince doğranmış)
2 çay kaşığı bal kabağı çekirdeği (yağsız tavada kavrulmuş)

instructions: 1. Çok pratik elma ve rezene salatası için malzemeleriniz hazırsa başlayabilirsiniz.
2. Elmanın çekirdek kısmını alıp ince dilimleyin.
3.  Bir kaba alın ve kararmaması için üzerine limon suyu gezdirin (Salatanıza mayonez koyacaksanız yarım limon suyu, koymayacaksanız 1 limonun suyunu ekleyin).
4. Rezene kökünü ince kıyın, salatalığı iyice yıkayın ve kabuğunu soymadan ince dilimleyip elmalara ekleyin (Mayonez kullanacaksanız bu aşamada ilave edebilirsiniz).
5.  En son kavrulmuş kabak çekirdeklerini üzerine serpiştirip rezene ve enginar turşusu salatanızı servis yapın.
6. Nefis badem ve narlı rezene salatası tarifi için tıklayın.

name: Apple And Fig Custard
instructions: Place rack in top third of oven; preheat to 450°. Butter a shallow 2-qt. baking dish and sprinkle with demerara sugar. Combine granulated sugar and zest in a medium bowl. Scrape in seeds from vanilla bean; save pod for another use. Massage zest and seeds into sugar with your fingers until mixture is very fragrant.

Blend eggs in a blender until very frothy, about 1 minute. With motor running, gradually stream in milk, then brandy. Add sugar mixture, crème fraîche, flour, and 1 tsp. salt and blend just until smooth. Let custard rest while you roast the apples.

Cook remaining 4 Tbsp. butter in a small saucepan over medium heat, stirring often, until butter foams, then browns (do not let it burn), about 5 minutes. Remove from heat and add apples, a pinch of salt, and remaining 2 Tbsp. demerara sugar and toss to coat.

Arrange apples in a single layer on a rimmed baking sheet. Roast in oven, tossing halfway through, until caramelized and tender, 25–30 minutes. Let apples sit until they are cool enough to handle but still warm (otherwise they’ll stick), then arrange in prepared dish, reserving a few slices for placing on top. Add figs, reserving a few for on top. Place dish on a rimmed baking sheet and carefully pour custard over fruit. Arrange reserved apple slices and figs on top. Reduce oven temperature to 375° and bake custard until golden and center is firm, 30–35 minutes. Let cool slightly before serving.
Do Ahead: Custard can be blended 1 day ahead. Cover and chill. Bring to room temperature and mix gently before pouring over fruit.

name: Apple And Fontina Grilled Cheese
instructions: Spread 8 slices of bread with mustard; top with half of cheese, then spinach, and apple slices. Season with salt and pepper and top with remaining cheese and bread; butter tops.
Heat a large skillet over medium. Working in 2 batches, cook sandwiches, butter side down, pressing firmly, until underside is toasted , about 2 minutes.

Butter tops, turn, and cook until second side is toasted and cheese is melted, about 2 minutes. Transfer sandwiches to a wire rack and let cool slightly (this will keep the cheese from squeezing out when you slice them). Cut each sandwich in half on a diagonal.
Do ahead: Grilled cheese can be cooked 2 hours ahead. Store uncovered at room temperature. Reheat in a 350° oven.

name: Apple And Ginger Cake
instructions: 1. Derin bir kaba yumurtaları ve toz şekeri alıp şeker eriyinceye kadar iyice çırpın.
2.  Daha sonra sırayla süt, ayçiçek yağı ve tereyağını ekleyin.
3.  Taze zencefili de ilave edip çırpmaya devam edin.
4.  Son olarak üzerine elediğiniz unu, kabartma tozunu ve vanilyayı ekleyip tekrar çırpın.
5.  Kelepçeli kek kalıbını tereyağı ile yağlayın.
6.  Kek hamurunu kalıba aktarın.
7.  Elmaların kabuklarını soyup boyuna yarıya bölün.
8.  Kek hamurunun üzerine çekirdek kısmı size bakacak şekilde elmaları dizin.
9.  Önceden ısıtılmamış fırına keki alın.
10.  160 derecede yaklaşık 35-45 dakika pişirin.
11.  Servis yapın.

name: Apple And Honey Financier Tart

ingredients.prep: peeled, cored, and cut into 1/4-inch dice

instructions: Sift together the confectioners' sugar, flour, and salt into a bowl.

Place the butter in a food processor and process until smooth, about 15 seconds. Scatter the flour mixture over the butter, add the egg, and process just until the dough forms a mass; do not overmix. Turn the dough out onto the counter and shape into a disc, wrap in plastic wrap, and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or up to 24 hours. The dough may be well wrapped and frozen for up to 1 month.

Let the dough stand at room temperature for 15 minutes to soften. Flour 2 pieces of parchment paper. Dust the disc of dough lightly with flour and place in between the parchment sheets. Roll the dough into a 12-inch circle. Lift the dough in the parchment, remove 1 sheet, and flip to transfer the dough into the tart pan. Press the dough into the pan and roll the pin over the top of the pan to remove excess dough. Prick the bottom of the tart shell all over with a fork. Chill the tart shell for 20 minutes. (The tart shell can be refrigerated for up to 24 hours.)

Preheat the oven to 350° F. Melt the butter in a small skillet over medium heat. Reduce the heat to medium-low and cook the butter until it begins to brown and has a nutty fragrance, about 3 minutes. Set aside to cool.

In a food processor, pulse the slivered almonds until finely ground, about 45 seconds. Transfer the ground almonds to a medium bowl. Sift the confectioners' sugar over the almonds. Add the flour, cornstarch, and salt and gently whisk to combine.

In another medium bowl, combine the cooled browned butter, egg whites, honey, and cream. Scrape the seeds from the vanilla bean (reserve the pod for another use) into the bowl and whisk to combine. Add the dry ingredients and whisk just until combined. Set aside.

Melt the butter in a large skillet over medium heat and cook until it is golden brown and fragrant, about 5 minutes. Add the diced apples, honey, and Calvados and cook, stirring occasionally, until it no longer tastes of alcohol, 2 to 4 minutes. Drain the apples in a strainer set over a bowl, reserving 1/4 cup of the liquid. Transfer the apples to a bowl and stir in the 1/4 cup reserved liquid.
Place the dough-lined tart pan on a rimmed baking sheet. Spread the apple filling evenly in the tart shell. Scrape the financier batter over the apples, covering them completely.
Bake the tart until the top is golden brown and a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean 45 to 50 minutes,. Place the tart on a wire rack.

Put the honey in a heatproof glass bowl and microwave on high until hot, 10 to 15 seconds (or heat in a small saucepan). Brush the honey over the top of the hot tart. Cool the tart completely before serving.

name: Apple And Honey Rice Kugel

ingredients.prep: melted, plus room-temperature butter for pan

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: such as Carolina Gold or basmati

ingredients.item: Golden raisins or chopped dried apricots

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 350°. Generously grease a shallow 1½-qt. baking dish with room-temperature butter. Whisk together 4 Tbsp. unsalted butter, melted, 3 large eggs, ¼ cup sugar, 1 Tbsp. vanilla bean paste or extract, 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, 1 tsp. ground cinnamon, and ¼ cup honey in a large bowl until smooth. Using a rubber spatula, mix in 2 cups (packed) cooled cooked long-grain white rice and ½ cup golden raisins or chopped dried apricots, breaking up any clumps of rice, until well combined.

Scrape mixture into prepared baking dish and shake dish gently to evenly distribute. Dollop apple butter over (about 6 dollops), then swirl in with a butter knife or chopstick (don’t overmix or swirls will disappear).
Bake kugel until puffed and browned on top but still slightly jiggly in the center, 35–45 minutes. Let cool 5 minutes, then brush with more honey and sprinkle with flaky sea salt.

name: Apple And Honey Sorbet
instructions: In a large, resealable plastic bag or plastic container with a lid, mix apples with the juice of 1/2 lemon. Freeze for several hours or overnight.
In a small saucepan, bring water and sugar to a boil. Reduce heat, and simmer for 5 minutes. Remove from heat, and stir in honey. Cool completely.

Place apple in a blender, and liquidize them with juice of 1 lemon and the cooled sugar syrup until as smooth as possible. The peel will add texture, and prevent the mixture from being completely smooth.
Transfer the mixture to an ice cream machine and freeze according to directions. Leave the sorbet out to soften 10 minutes prior to serving.

name: Apple And Maple Bread Pudding

ingredients.prep: all crust trimmed, bread cut into 3/4- to 1-inch cubes (6 1/2 to 7 cups)
peeled, quartered, cored, cut into 1/3-inch-thick slices (about 7 cups)

ingredients.item: Pure maple syrup plus additional for brushing

instructions: Whisk eggs, maple syrup, brown sugar, vanilla, cinnamon, and sea salt in large bowl. Add milk, cream, and brandy and whisk until well blended. Add bread cubes and press to submerge into custard. Let soak at least 30 minutes, occasionally pressing on bread cubes to submerge.

Meanwhile, position rack in bottom third of oven and preheat to 177°C. Generously butter 9x5-inch glass or ceramic loaf pan with at least 3-inch-high sides. Melt 3 tablespoons butter in large nonstick skillet over medium-high heat. Add apple slices and sauté until deep golden and beginning to soften, stirring and turning apple slices frequently, 10 to 12 minutes. Stir in 1/4 cup maple syrup, then brown sugar. Simmer until sugar dissolves and mixture thickens to syrup, about 1 minute. Remove from heat.

Mix half of apple slices into bread-custard mixture. Transfer bread pudding mixture to prepared pan. Arrange remaining apple slices atop bread pudding in 2 lengthwise rows. Spoon any remaining syrup from skillet over apple slices. Place loaf pan on rimmed baking sheet (to catch any spills during baking).

Bake bread pudding until puffed and cracked on top, apples are deep brown, and instant-read thermometer inserted into center of pudding registers 77°C to 82°C, about 1 hour 30 minutes (pudding will rise high above top of pan). Remove from oven and let rest at room temperature 45 minutes to 1 hour (pudding will fall). Brush apples on top of pudding with additional maple syrup. Spoon pudding into bowls and serve warm or at room temperature.

name: Apple And Nut-butter Puff Pastry Tarts
instructions: Preheat oven to 425°. Roll out puff pastry on a lightly floured surface into a long rectangle. Cut in half crosswise (halves should be almost square). Transfer to a parchment-lined rimmed baking sheet; prick with a fork in several places. Using a small offset spatula, spread 2 Tbsp. peanut butter in the center of each half to make a 5" round, then spread 2 Tbsp. apple butter over top of each nut-butter round. Pile up apples in the center of each puff pastry and top with peanuts. Dot fruit with butter and sprinkle with sugar.

Beat egg and 1 tsp. water in a small bowl, then brush pastry with egg wash and fold up edges around apples, leaving the center open. Press along the folded edges to lightly seal. Brush outside of pastry with egg wash and sprinkle with more sugar. Let chill in freezer 10 minutes.
Bake tarts until puff pastry is golden, 15–20 minutes. Reduce oven temperature to 350° and continue to bake until pastry is deep golden brown and apples are tender, 20–25 minutes.
Do Ahead: Tarts can be baked 6 hours ahead. Store uncovered at room temperature.

name: Apple And Peach Compote

ingredients.prep: peeled, cored, each cut into 8 wedges

instructions: Toss apples, peaches, sugar, cardamom, cinnamon, ginger, and salt in a medium bowl. Heat butter in a large skillet over medium-high. Once butter is melted, add fruit mixture and cook, tossing occasionally, until fruit is golden brown and caramelized, 5–7 minutes.

Add cider to skillet, reduce heat to low, and bring to a simmer. Cook, stirring occasionally and adding splashes of water if liquid reduces too quickly, until juices are syrupy and fruit is tender, 15–20 minutes. Let cool slightly, then stir in lemon juice.
Do Ahead: Compote can be made 3 days ahead. Let cool; cover and chill. Gently reheat before serving, if desired.

name: Apple And Pear Crumble With Balsamic Vinegar
original_name: Crumble de maçã e pera com vinagre balsâmico
instructions: Descasque as maçãs e as peras, corte em pedaços e deite num tacho. Junte o açúcar, o sumo e a raspa de limão, o vinho do porto, o vinagre balsâmico e a canela. Leve ao lume, mexendo de vez em quando.
Quando as maçãs e as peras estiverem quase cozidas, retire do lume e espalhe num tabuleiro de forno.
Prepare a massa: numa tigela, misture todos os ingredientes e bata-os com a batedeira ou com uma vara de arames, até a manteiga e o açúcar ficarem bem incorporados.
Deite pedacinhos da massa no tabuleiro, sobre a maçã e a pera, e leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 170ºc, durante 25 minutos. Retire, deixe arrefecer e sirva.

name: Apple And Pecan Pie

ingredients.item: 4 yeşil veya kırmızı elma (amasya elması varsa 8 adet)

instructions: 1. İç harcı için kabuğunu soyduğunuz elmaları küp küp doğrayın.
2.  Şeker, tarın ve ceviz içi ile harmanlayıp suyunu çekene kadar pişirin.
3.  Tart hamuru için un dışındaki tüm malzemeyi yoğurma kabına alıp karıştırın.
4.  Azar azar un ilave ederek pürüzsüz ve yağlı bir hamur elde edinceye kadar yoğurun.
5.  Hamurun yarısını üzerinde yaprak, yonca veya yıldız desenli kurabiyeler yapmak için ayırın.
6.  Kalan hamuru tart kalıbına, kenarlarını da kaplayacak şekilde yayın.
7. Üzerini çatal yardımı ile delin.
8.  Tart hamurunun içine soğuyan elmalı cevizli karışımdan dökün.
9.  Kalan hamurdan dekoratif hamur parçacıkları elde edip, hamurun üzerini süsleyin.
10.  Hamurların üzerine yumurta sarısı ve pudra şekeri karışımından fırça yardımıyla sürün.
11.  170 dereceye ayarlı fırında, 40-45 dakika pis¸irin.
12.  Ilık servis yapın.

name: Apple And Pumpkin Ginger Crisp

ingredients.item: Sugar or pie pumpkin or butternut squash
ingredients.prep: peeled, seeded, and cut into 1/2-inch cubes (1 pound when cubed)

instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C.
In a large bowl, combine the oats, 1/2 cup flour, pecans, light-brown sugar, ginger, salt, and butter. Mix until large crumbs form, and refrigerate until ready to use.

In a 9-by-13-inch baking dish, combine the pumpkin, apples, lemon zest and juice, sugar, cinnamon, and remaining 2 tablespoons flour; toss until mixed. Sprinkle the oat crumble over the apple mixture and bake until the topping is browned and juices are bubbling, about 45 minutes. Let stand for 15 minutes. Serve warm with vanilla ice cream.

name: Apple And Quince Crumble
instructions: 1. Unu, küp şeklinde doğranmış soğuk tereyağını ve pudra şekerini çukur bir kapta parmak uçlarınızla ovalayarak kum gibi olana kadar karıştırın.
2.  Elmaların ve ayvanın kabuğunu soyup küp şeklinde doğrayın.
3.  Kuşüzümünü, tarçını ve şekeri ilave edin.
4.  Hazırladığınız meyveli karışımı ısıya dayanıklı kaplara paylaştırın.
5.  Unlu karışımı meyvelerin üzerine bastırmadan serpin.
6.  En son, birer çay kaşığı tereyağı ilave edin.
7.  170 dereceye ayarlı fırında, hamurlar kızarıncaya kadar pişirin.
8.  Fırından alıp üzerine vanilyalı dondurma ekleyip bekletmeden servis yapın.

name: Apple And Raisin Sauce
instructions: Melt butter in a skillet over low heat. Add apples, and increase the heat to medium-high. Cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally. Stir in the white wine, brown sugar, cinnamon, vanilla, and golden raisins. Cook over medium heat until the liquid has reduced and is thick.

name: Apple And Tangerine Salad Recipe
original_name: Receta de ensalada de manzana y mandarinas

ingredients.item: 10 oz  de lechuga o espinacas frescas
3/4  taza de queso panela en cubos
½ taza  de aceite de oliva

instructions: Siempre es más fácil empezar las preparaciones cuando tenemos todos los ingredientes medidos y separados.
En una sartén a fuego medio alto, agrega el azúcar y espera a que derrita  y se forme un caramelo.
Agrega las almendras y mezcla para que  el azúcar se a adhiera a las almendras.
Deja cocinar durante 4 minutos y luego retira las almendras y esparce sobre una hoja de papel de cocina para dejar enfriar y endurecer para luego separar.

Para el aderezo, en un recipiente agrega, el jugo de naranja, el jugo de limón, la mostaza y la miel, revuelve bien y luego que los ingredientes estén bien incorporados, agrega lentamente el aceite de oliva.
En un bowl grande, agrega la lechuga, las mandarinas, las manzanas, los arándanos secos y el queso panela.
Sirve agregando las almendras garapiñadas y el aderezo. Mezcla y disfruta.

name: Apple And Tomato Chutney
instructions: Place apples and water in a large saucepan. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and cook until apples are tender, stirring occasionally, about 25 minutes. Add more water as necessary to keep apples simmering.
Add tomatoes, onions, vinegar, sugar, raisins, curry, salt, mustard seeds, cayenne, and garlic to the saucepan. Stir until sugar dissolves.
Bring mixture to a boil. Reduce heat, and simmer until very thick, stirring occasionally, about 3 hours. Remove and discard mustard seed. Seal chutney in sterile containers.

name: Apple And Yogurt Cake
instructions: Coloque as gemas numa tigela, junte-lhes o açúcar e a manteiga amolecida e bata com a batedeira, até obter um creme esbranquiçado.

Junte o iogurte e as maçãs, previamente descascadas e raladas, e envolva. Adicione a farinha e o fermento e misture muito bem, até ficar tudo incorporado. À parte, bata as claras em castelo e envolva-as no preparado anterior.

Deite a massa numa forma, previamente untada com manteiga e polvilhada com farinha, e leve-a ao forno, pré-aquecido a 180ºc, por cerca de 40 minutos. Retire, deixe arrefecer, desenforme e sirva polvilhado com açúcar em pó.

name: Apple And Yogurt Cake - Recipe
original_name: Bolo de maçã e iogurte- receita fácil
instructions: Coloque as gemas numa tigela, junte-lhes o açúcar e a manteiga amolecida e bata com a batedeira, até obter um creme esbranquiçado.

Junte o iogurte e as maçãs, previamente descascadas e raladas, e envolva. Adicione a farinha e o fermento e misture muito bem, até ficar tudo incorporado. À parte, bata as claras em castelo e envolva-as no preparado anterior.

Deite a massa numa forma, previamente untada com manteiga e polvilhada com farinha, e leve-a ao forno, pré-aquecido a 180ºc, por cerca de 40 minutos. Retire, deixe arrefecer, desenforme e sirva polvilhado com açúcar em pó.

name: Apple Baked Beans
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Stir pork and beans, bacon, apples, barbeque sauce, brown sugar, and raisins together in a 9x13-inch baking dish.
Bake in preheated oven for 90 minutes.

name: Apple Bar
instructions: 1. Elmaların kabuklarını soyup küp şeklinde doğrayın ve limon suyu ile karıştırın.
2.  28x18 cmlik kalıba yağlı kağıt serin.
3.  Fırını 180 dereceye ayarlayın.
4.  Oda ısısında yumuşatılmış tereyağı, toz şeker ve vanilyayı mikserle çırpın.
5.  Teker teker yumurtaları ekleyip karıştırın.
6.  Unu eleyerek ekleyin.
7.  Elmaları ilave edip karışımı kalıba yayın.
8.  Üzeri için tüm malzemeyi karıştırın ve kırıntı şeklinde hamurun üzerine serpiştirin.
9.  Fırında kızarıncaya kadar yaklaşık 40-45 dakika pişirin.
10.  Dilimleyerek servis yapın.

name: Apple Biscuit Cup

ingredients.item: 1/2 su bardağı ince çekilmiş ceviz içi

instructions: 1. Elmaları 4’e bölerek çekirdeklerini temizleyin.
2.  Kabuklarını soyarak küp küp doğrayın.
3.  Kararmamaları için limon suyuyla harmanlayın.
4.  Ardından elmaları geniş tabanlı bir tencereye aktarın.
5. Esmer şeker eklediğiniz elmaları, suyunu salıp hafif renk alana kadar orta ateşte soteleyin.
6.  Tarçın ve vanilyayı ilave ederek ocaktan alın.
7. Muhallebisi için süt, yumurta sarıları ve nişastayı bir tencereye alıp çırpın.
8.  Toz şekeri ilave edin ve karıştırarak orta ısılı ocakta muhallebi kıvamına gelene kadar pişirin.
9.  Ocaktan alın, hafif ılındıktan sonra toz krem şantiyi ilave edip mikser yardımıyla çırpın.
10. Yulaflı bisküvileri elinizle veya robottan geçirerek ufalayın.
11.  İnce çekilmiş ceviz içiyle harmanlayın.
12.  Cam servis bardaklarına, bir kat bisküvi, bir kat elma ekleyerek malzemeyi paylaştırın.
13.  Üzerlerine ılınmış muhallebiyi ve bisküvileri paylaştırın.
14.  Buzdolabında soğuttuktan sonra servis yapın.

name: Apple Blackberry Pie
instructions: Preheat the oven to 218°C (220 degrees C).

Melt butter in a small saucepan over medium-low heat; stir in flour to make a smooth paste. Whisk white sugar, brown sugar, water, and lemon juice into butter mixture. Bring to a simmer, whisking constantly, until sauce thickens, about 3 minutes. Stir 6 blackberry halves into sauce, reduce heat to low; continue cooking while you complete remaining steps, stirring sauce occasionally.

Line a 9-inch pie dish with 1 pastry crust. Arrange apple slices and remaining blackberries in crust. Cut remaining pastry crust into 1-inch wide strips; weave into a lattice top over filling. Pinch strip ends to crust edges to seal. Spoon blackberry sauce over pie; let it soak through crust. Transfer pie to a baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven for 15 minutes. Reduce oven temperature to 177°C (175 degrees C); continue baking until crust is golden, and sauce bubbles, 35 to 45 more minutes.

name: Apple Blondies

ingredients.item: Peeled and chopped granny smith apples

instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease a 9x13-inch baking pan.
Beat brown sugar, white sugar, butter, eggs, and vanilla extract in a bowl with an electric mixer until creamy. Add flour and salt; mix well. Stir in apples and walnuts. Pour into the prepared pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until top is dry and edges have started to pull away from the sides of the pan, 30 to 35 minutes. Let blondies cool completely, 20 to 30 minutes. Dust with powdered sugar.

name: Apple Bok Choy Salad

ingredients.item: Raw cashews or 1/4 cup raw cashew butter

instructions: Combine bok choy, apple, carrot, and chopped onion in a large bowl.
Blend soy milk, cashews, vinegar, raisins, and mustard in a food processor or high-powered blender. Add desired amount to chopped vegetables.

name: Apple Brickle Dip
instructions: Beat cream cheese, brown sugar, white sugar, and vanilla extract together in a large bowl until smooth. Stir in toffee bits. Pour lime and lemon juice over apples to prevent browning. Serve dip with apples on the side.

name: Apple Brie Crostinis
instructions: Preheat the oven to 288°C (285°C), or as high as your oven will go. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Using a serrated knife, slice the baguette crosswise on a slight diagonal into ½-inch (1 cm) slices. Transfer the baguette slices to the prepared baking sheet.
Top each piece of bread with 1-2 slices of Brie cheese.
Bake for 5 minutes, or until Brie begins to bubble and the bread is toasted.
Top each piece of bread with 1-2 apple slices and candied walnuts. Drizzle with honey.
Enjoy!

name: Apple Brioche
instructions: Misture a farinha com o fermento, a raspa de limão e o açúcar branco. Adicione o ovo inteiro e 1 gema, o leite e a manteiga amolecida e amasse tudo muito bem, até obter uma bola elástica e homogénea. Coloque numa tigela enfarinhada, tape e deixe levedar, em local seco e quente, durante 2 horas.
Corte as maçãs em pedaços, junte-lhe o açúcar mascavado, as passas e a canela e misture.
Após o tempo indicado, estenda a massa em formato retangular, pincele com a manteiga derretida e espalhe por cima o preparado de maçã. Enrole e feche bem os lados.
Coloque o brioche numa forma tipo bolo inglês, previamente untada com manteiga. Tape e deixe levedar por mais 1 hora.

De seguida, pincele o brioche com a restante gema, polvilhe com açúcar e leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 180ºc, durante cerca de 25 minutos, ou até a massa ficar bem cozida no interior. Retire, deixe arrefecer um pouco, desenforme e sirva.

name: Apple Brioche Tart
instructions: In the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with the dough hook, mix the flour, granulated sugar, and salt on low speed to combine.
Add the yeast and mix to combine, 10 to 15 seconds more.
Add the eggs and milk and mix for 4 minutes. The dough should form a sticky, shaggy ball around the hook.

Increase the speed to medium and slowly add the butter 1 tablespoon at a time, being careful to incorporate each addition before adding the next; the entire process should take about 3 minutes. (If you add the butter too quickly, it can create a greasy disaster in the bowl, so pace it out.)

Scrape the bowl down once or twice to make sure everything is homogeneous. (This mixing period is called intense mixing—and it is! Don’t be alarmed if the mixing is noisy or difficult in the early to mid-stages, it will come together.)
Then knead the dough until it is smooth and uniform, 1 minute more.
Grease a large bowl with nonstick spray. Transfer the dough to the bowl, cover the bowl with plastic wrap, and refrigerate for at least 12 hours.
Use the butter to generously grease an 18-by-13-inch baking sheet, including the rim.
On a lightly floured surface, roll out the dough to a 1/2-inch-thick rectangle a little larger than the pan (about 1 inch on all sides), so that the dough will come up the sides of the pan.
Roll up the dough around the rolling pin and transfer the dough to the prepared baking sheet.
Use a pastry wheel to trim the edges so they are flush with the edges of the pan.
Cover the baking sheet with greased plastic wrap (I use nonstick spray) and let the dough rise in a warm place for 30 to 35 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 177°C / 175°C, with a rack in the middle.
Meanwhile, peel, quarter, and core the apples, then slice crosswise 1/8- to 1/4-inch thick (see Pro Tip).
In a small bowl, whisk together the brown sugar and cinnamon.
Uncover the dough and sprinkle it evenly with half the cinnamon sugar.
Arrange the apple slices across the dough (see Pro Tip).
Sprinkle the remaining cinnamon sugar evenly over the apples. Finish with the salt.
Bake the tart until the edges of the crust are golden brown, the apples are tender when pierced with the tip of a paring knife, and the sugar has caramelized, 32 to 36 minutes.
Cool the tart for at least 15 minutes before slicing and serving, warm or at room temperature.
This tart is best the same day it's made. Store any leftovers in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 2 days.

name: Apple Bundle Cookies
instructions: 1. Unu derin bir kaba eleyin.
2.  Ortasını havuz şeklinde açıp yoğurt, tereyağı, pudra şeker, kabartma tozu ve vanilyayı ilave edip ele yapışmayan bir hamur elde edin.
3.  Diğer yanda rendelenmiş elmaları şeker ile birlikte pişirin.
4.  Tarçın ilave edip ocaktan alın.
5.  Soğumaya bırakın.
6.  Ceviz ilave edin.
7.  Hamuru merdane yardımı ile açın.
8.  5 cm büyüklüğündekareler kesin.
9.  Ortasına elmalı harçtan paylaştırıp uçları ortada birleştirilerek bohça şekli verin.
10.  Önceden ısıtılmış 160 derece fırında kızarıncaya kadar pişirin.
11.  Soğuduktan sonra üzerine pudra şeker serpip servis yapın.

name: Apple Bundt Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease and flour a 10-inch Bundt or tube pan. Combine diced apples, 1 tablespoon white sugar, and 1 teaspoon cinnamon in a medium bowl; set aside. Sift together flour, baking powder, and salt; set aside.
Combine 2 cups white sugar, oil, orange juice, vanilla, and eggs in a large bowl; beat with an electric mixer at high speed until smooth. Stir in flour mixture. Fold in chopped walnuts.
Pour 1/3 of the batter into prepared pan. Sprinkle with 1/2 of the apple mixture. Alternate layers of batter and filling, ending with batter.

Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center of cake comes out clean, about 55 to 60 minutes. Let cool in pan for 10 minutes, then turn out onto a wire rack and cool completely. Sprinkle with confectioners' sugar.

name: Apple Butter

ingredients.item: Raw or white granulated sugar or light brown sugar
Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton’s kosher salt
. apple cider vinegar or lemon juice

instructions: Bring 6 lb. mixed sweet and tart apples, unpeeled, uncored, chopped, 6 cups apple cider, 1 cup raw or white granulated sugar, or light brown sugar, one 3" cinnamon stick, 3 whole cloves, and ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton’s kosher salt to a boil in a large wide pot. Cook over medium-high heat, stirring occasionally, until most of the liquid has evaporated and apples are very soft, 1–1½ hours.
Discard cinnamon stick. Pass apple mixture through the fine disk of a food mill, or strain through a coarse-mesh sieve, pressing with a rubber spatula. Discard peel, seeds, and cloves.

Preheat oven to 350°. Transfer apple mixture to a 13x9" baking pan and bake, stirring every 30 minutes, until reduced by half and very thick and dark amber, 1½–2 hours. Stir in 1 Tbsp. apple cider vinegar or lemon juice; let cool in pan.
Do ahead: Apple butter can be made 1 month ahead; transfer to an airtight container and chill, or freeze up to 3 months.
Editor’s note: This recipe was first printed online in September 2016. Head this way for more of our best apple recipes →

name: Apple Butter Bread
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease an 8x4-inch loaf pan.
Mix flour, baking soda, baking powder, salt, nutmeg, and cloves together in a large bowl.

Beat sugar and butter together with an electric mixer in a separate large bowl until smooth. Add apple butter and egg; continue beating until smooth. Stir in flour mixture until just combined. Fold in raisins and walnuts. Pour into the prepared loaf pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, 40 to 50 minutes. Cool in the pan for 10 minutes before removing to cool completely on a wire rack.

name: Apple Butter Cream Cheese Spread
instructions: Combine cream cheese, apple butter, vanilla extract, and cinnamon in the container of a food processor fitted with a metal blade.
Process until just smooth, about 20 seconds. Scrape down the sides of the container and process again until well combined.
Scrape spread into a small bowl; cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate until slightly firm, about 30 minutes.

name: Apple Butter In The Oven
instructions: Combine apples, apple cider, sugar, and salt together in a large Dutch oven over medium heat. Add cinnamon, star anise, allspice, and cloves. Bring to a simmer. Cover partially and cook until apples are soft, 20 to 25 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 135°C (135 degrees C).

Remove and discard allspice and cloves with a slotted spoon. Remove and reserve cinnamon and star anise. Purée apples with an immersion blender until smooth. Stir in lemon juice and reserved cinnamon and star anise.

Bake uncovered in the preheated oven, stirring every 30 minutes, until mixture thickens and deepens in color, about 3 hours total. Let cool completely. Discard cinnamon and star anise before transferring to airtight containers.

name: Apple Butter Spice Cake With Cinnamon Crumble
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Rub ½ Tbsp. room temperature butter all over bottom and sides of an 8.5x4.5" loaf pan with your fingertips. Line pan with a piece of parchment, leaving an overhang on two longer sides. Butter parchment with another ½ Tbsp. butter; set aside.
Chop 2 oz. apple rings into ½" pieces; set aside.
Whisk 1½ cups flour, 1¼ tsp. baking powder, ½ tsp. salt, ¼ tsp. baking soda, and 2 tsp. cinnamon in a large bowl.
Using an electric mixer on high speed, beat 1 cup sugar and ½ cup butter in another large bowl until very pale and light, about 4 minutes.
Add 2 eggs and beat on medium speed until mixture is very fluffy, about 1 minute.
Add 1 cup apple butter and ½ tsp. vanilla and beat until combined.
Add dry ingredients and beat on low speed until flour disappears and batter is thick and smooth. Using a spatula, fold batter a few times by hand, scraping bottom and sides of bowl.
Fold chopped dried apple pieces into batter, then scrape into prepared pan and smooth top.
Melt remaining 1 Tbsp. butter in a small bowl (if you don’t have a microwave, do this part in a small saucepan). Stir in remaining ¼ cup sugar and ¼ tsp. cinnamon with a fork until wet crumbs form.
Sprinkle cinnamon-sugar crumbs evenly over top of batter. Bake cake until top is cracked and firm to the touch and a tester inserted into center comes out clean, 60–70 minutes.
Let cool in pan 15 minutes, then cut around short sides and use parchment to lift out cake. Transfer to wire rack and let cool completely.
Slice and serve.
Do Ahead: Cake can be made 1 day ahead. Let cool completely, wrap with plastic, and store at room temperature.

name: Apple Cake

ingredients.item: Nonstick vegetable oil spray or unsalted butter
Diamond crystal or  0.75 tsp. morton kosher salt
. vanilla bean paste or vanilla extract

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 350°. Line bottom of pan with a parchment paper round and lightly coat bottom and sides of pan with nonstick vegetable oil spray or room-temperature unsalted butter. Toast ½ cup raw walnuts on a small rimmed baking sheet, tossing halfway through, until golden brown, 6–8 minutes. Let cool, then coarsely chop. Set aside.

Whisk 1 cup (200 g) granulated sugar and ½ cup (1 stick) unsalted butter, room temperature, in a medium bowl until smooth and creamy, about 2 minutes. Add 2 large eggs and whisk vigorously until fluffy, about 2 minutes. Add ½ cup sour cream and 2 Tbsp. apple cider vinegar and whisk to combine. Add 1 tsp. ground cinnamon, 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, 1 tsp. baking powder, and 1 tsp. vanilla bean paste or vanilla extract and whisk again until incorporated. Add 2¼ cups (281 g) all-purpose flour and, using a large rubber spatula, fold in until no large dry streaks remain. Add 3 Honeycrisp or Fuji apples (about 1½ lb.), peeled, cored, cut into ½" pieces, and gently mix until each piece is coated in batter. Scrape batter into prepared pan and smooth surface with an offset spatula or a spoon.

Mix ½ cup (100 g) dark brown sugar, remaining 1 tsp. ground cinnamon, remaining ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and reserved walnuts in a small bowl to combine. Sprinkle mixture evenly over cake.

Bake cake until top springs back when lightly pressed in the center or a tester inserted into the center comes out with only few moist crumbs attached, 45–55 minutes. Transfer pan to a wire rack and let cake cool in pan before slicing.

name: Apple Cake In A Jar
instructions: Preheat the oven to 163°C (165 degrees C). Lightly grease the insides of 8 straight-sided, wide-mouth pint canning jars.
Sift flour, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, and nutmeg together in a large bowl. Set aside.
Beat sugar and shortening together in a medium bowl until fluffy. Beat in eggs until well combined. Add flour mixture, alternating with water; mix until smooth. Fold in apples, raisins, and nuts.

Fill jars 1/2 full of batter; wipe off any batter that gets on the rims. Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean, about 45 minutes. Meanwhile, sterilize the lids and rings in boiling water.

Remove jars from the oven one at a time; wipe rims with a moist paper towel to remove any residue. Top with lids and screw rings on tightly. Press the center of each lid with a finger to ensure the lid does not move up or down. If it doesn't move at all, it's sealed.
Cake should be eaten immediately, or cooled and refrigerated for up to one week.

name: Apple Cake Recipe

ingredients.item: 3 adet orta boy elma (tercihen tatlı-ekşi, kabukları soyulmuş ve küçük küpler halinde doğranmış)
1/2 su bardağı sıvı yağ (tercihen ayçiçek veya zeytinyağı)

instructions: 1. Önceden 180°C’ye ısıtın.
2.  Kek kalıbını yağlayın ve hafifçe unlayın.
3. Küp doğranmış elmaların üzerine tarçın serpip karıştırın.
4. Yumurtaları ve şekeri mikserle 3–4 dakika, köpük köpük olana kadar çırpın.
5. Süt ve sıvı yağı ekleyip kısa süre çırpın.
6. Un, kabartma tozu, vanilin ve tuzu bir kapta karıştırın.
7.  Sıvı karışıma ekleyin ve spatula ile nazikçe karıştırın.
8. Tarçınlı elma küplerini hamura ekleyip spatula ile karıştırın.
9. Hamuru kalıba dökün ve önceden ısıtılmış fırında 40–45 dakika, kürdan testi temiz çıkana kadar pişirin.
10. Kek fırından çıkınca 10–15 dakika kalıpta dinlendirin, ardından tel ızgara üzerine alıp soğutun.
11.  İsteğe bağlı üzerine pudra şekeri veya file badem serpin.
12.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Apple Cake With Almonds
instructions: Unte com manteiga e polvilhe com farinha uma forma sem buraco. Corte as maçãs ao meio, descasque-as e descaroce-as. Reserve.
Numa tigela, bata a manteiga com o açúcar. Junte os ovos, um a um e batendo muito bem entre cada adição. Por fim, envolva a farinha, a amêndoa ralada e o fermento em pó.

Deite a massa na forma e, por cima, disponha as metades de maçã. Leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 180ºc, durante cerca de 25 a 30 minutos. Quando retirar do forno, polvilhe com amêndoas laminadas tostadas. Desenforme e sirva.

name: Apple Cake With Caramel Topping
original_name: Bolo de maçã com cobertura de caramelo
instructions: Unte uma forma com margarina e polvilhe-a com farinha. Reserve. Ligue o forno a 180ºc.
Numa tigela, bata muito bem os ovos, adicionando o açúcar aos poucos, até obter um creme bastante fofo. Peneire a farinha e envolva no preparado. Envolva também a margarina derretida.
Deite a massa na forma e leve ao forno durante 30 minutos. Retire, desenforme e reserve. Lave as maçãs, lamine-as e disponha-as harmoniosamente sobre o bolo.
Prepare o molho de caramelo: coloque o açúcar e a água numa frigideira e leve ao lume até obter um caramelo. Retire do lume, adicione as natas, mexa e deite sobre o bolo. Sirva de seguida.

name: Apple Cake With Cream Cheese Frosting
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease and flour a 9x13-inch pan. Mix flour, baking soda, cinnamon, and salt together in a medium bowl; set aside.

Combine eggs, oil, and sugar in a large bowl; beat with an electric mixer until lighter in color. Add flour mixture and beat well. Add vanilla and stir in chopped apples and walnuts. Pour cake batter into prepared pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the cake comes out clean, about 45 to 50 minutes. Allow cake to cool.
To make the frosting: Combine cream cheese, softened butter, confectioners sugar, and 1 teaspoon vanilla in a medium bowl; beat until smooth. Spread on cooled cake.

name: Apple Cake With Oats And Flaxseed
original_name: Bolo de maçã com aveia e linhaça
instructions: Descasque as maçãs, retire-lhes as sementes e corte-as em pequenos cubos. Pique grosseiramente o miolo de noz e derreta a manteiga no micro-ondas.

Coloque as maçãs numa tigela, junte o açúcar e misture. Aos poucos, acrescente a farinha, a aveia, a noz, a linhaça, a canela e, por último, o fermento em pó, mexendo sempre. À parte, bata os ovos com a manteiga derretida, durante cerca de 1 minuto, e envolva-os no preparado.

Verta a massa para uma forma, previamente untada com manteiga e polvilhada com farinha, e leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 180ºC, durante 45 a 55 minutos, até estar cozido. Retire, deixe arrefecer e desenforme.

name: Apple Cake With Walnuts

ingredients.item: 100 g  miolo de noz + miolo de noz q.b.

instructions: Unte uma forma com margarina e ligue o forno a 180 graus. Numa tigela, bata bem a margarina com o açúcar. Junte depois os ovos, sem parar de bater. Adicione o fermento e a farinha, bata bem, e, por fim, acrescente o leite quente, aos poucos, batendo até obter um creme liso.
Descasque 1 maçã e 1/2, elimine o caroço e corte-as em cubos pequenos. Junte ao preparado anterior, bem como os 100 g de miolo de noz grosseiramente partido, envolva e deite na forma.

Retire a casca e o caroço à restante maçã, corte-a em fatias e disponha-as na superfície da massa. Polvilhe com mais nozes e canela em pó, se gostar, e leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 180ºc, durante cerca de 30 a 35 minutos. Retire, desenforme e deixe arrefecer.

name: Apple Calzone
instructions: A massa: numa tigela bata o açúcar com a manteiga, junte uma pitada de sal, a farinha, umas gotas de água e a raspa de limão, amasse bem e deixe-a repousar 25 minutos.
O recheio: descasque as maçãs e corte-as em pedaços. Leve ao lume uma frigideira com a manteiga, junte o açúcar e deixe derreter.
Junte os pedaços de maçã, mexendo até as maçãs amolecerem.

Adicone as sultanas, mexa e deixe arrefecer. Polvilhe uma forma de tarte grande com farinha. Estenda a massa e forre a tarteira. Disponha o recheio de maçã em metade da forma, sem atingir os bordos e pincele-os com ovo batido. Dobre a outra metade da massa sobre o recheio e feche-a em forma de meia-lua. Pincele com o ovo batido por cima e polvilhe com açúcar. Leve ao forno pré-aquecido a 180ºc durante 35 minutos. Depois retire, sirva quente e com gelado a acompanhar.

name: Apple Caramels
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Lightly coat a 9x5" loaf pan with nonstick spray. Line pan with parchment paper, leaving a 2" overhang on long sides of pan; spray parchment.
Spread hazelnuts on a small, rimmed baking sheet and toast, tossing occasionally, until fragrant and light brown, 7–10 minutes. Let cool 10 minutes, chop, and set aside.

Bring cinnamon, cider, and sugar to a boil in a medium saucepan fitted with candy thermometer over high heat, swirling pan to dissolve sugar. Cook, swirling pan occasionally, until thermometer registers 280° and caramel is dark amber, 15–20 minutes.

Remove pan from heat and add cream, butter, and 1 tsp. salt (mixture will bubble vigorously). Return to medium-high heat and cook, swirling pan occasionally, until thermometer registers 250°, 5–10 minutes. Remove from heat and swirl in Calvados, vanilla, and reserved hazelnuts.

Pour into prepared pan and chill until firm but not hard, about 1 hour. Let sit at room temperature 5 minutes to loosen caramel, then lift from pan with parchment overhang. Peel parchment from caramel, trim edges, and cut into ¾" pieces. Wrap individually in parchment paper and chill, or serve on a platter. Sprinkle with salt just before serving.
Do Ahead: Caramel can be made 2 days ahead. Tightly wrap and chill.

name: Apple Carrot Cake Recipe In Air Fryer
original_name: Air Fryer'da Elmalı Havuçlu Kek Tarifi
instructions: 1. Airfryer’ı kek modu ile çalıştırın ve ön ısınmasını sağlayın.
2. Rendelenmiş havuç ve elmayı küçük bir tavaya alın.
3.  Üzerine 1 yemek kaşığı toz şeker ekleyin ve karışım suyunu salıp çekene kadar kısık ateşte pişirin.
4.  Ardından ocaktan alıp soğumaya bırakın.
5. Derin bir kaba yumurta ve toz şekeri alın, şeker tamamen eriyene kadar mikser veya çırpıcı ile çırpın.
6. Karışıma sıvı yağ ve sütü ekleyerek çırpmaya devam edin.
7.  Sonrasında unu, vanilini ve kabartma tozunu eleyerek karışıma ilave edin ve spatula ile homojen bir hamur elde edene kadar karıştırın.
8. Soğuyan havuç ve elmayı hamura ekleyin.
9.  Üzerine tarçın ve dövülmüş cevizi de ilave ederek spatula ile nazikçe karıştırın.
10. Airfryer’ın büyük boy kek kalıbını eritilmiş tereyağı ile yağlayın ve hazırladığınız hamuru kalıba dökün.
11. Kalıbı Airfryer’ın sıcak haznesine yerleştirin, haznenin kapağını kapatın ve süreyi 15 dakikaya ayarlayarak pişirmeye başlayın.
12. İlk süre dolduğunda keki dikkatlice ters çevirip tekrar kalıba yerleştirin ve haznenin kapağını kapatın.
13. Airfryer’ı tekrar kek modunda çalıştırın.
14.  10 dakika sonra kürdan testi yapın; kürdan temiz çıkarsa pişirme işlemini durdurun.
15. Kek hafifçe ılındıktan sonra üzerini pudra şekeri ile süsleyerek servis yapın.

name: Apple Charlotte
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Spray a 6½-inch springform pan with nonstick cooking spray and line with parchment paper. Spray parchment paper with nonstick cooking spray.
Toss apples with lime juice and set aside. Mix flour, cinnamon, ginger, and salt in a bowl and set aside.

Combine eggs with brown sugar, white sugar, and vanilla extract in a second bowl and beat with an electric mixer until creamy. Add dry ingredients and mix until just combined. Pour about 1/3 of the batter into the prepared pan. Add apples and top with remaining batter.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted in center comes out clean, 50 to 60 minutes. Transfer to a wire rack and cool for 15 minutes.
Run a knife around the springform pan, release springform, and flip apple Charlotte onto a plate. Immediately flip the cake onto a serving platter.

name: Apple Cheddar Pie

ingredients.item: Plus 2 tbsp. (1 0.75 sticks) chilled unsalted butter
Granny smith or other sweet-tart firm baking apples (about 7)

instructions: Pulse flour, granulated sugar, and salt in a food processor to combine. Add cheese and butter and process until pea-size pieces of butter remain, about 15 seconds. Transfer to a large bowl. Drizzle whiskey and ¼ cup ice water over. Using a fork, mix thoroughly until larger clumps form and dough stays together when pressed with your fingertips. Using your hands, knead dough until no dry spots remain (you may need to add 1–2 Tbsp. ice water if dough is too dry). Do not overwork!
Divide dough in half. Press into 2 disks about 1" thick. Smooth out any cracks around perimeter of disks, then wrap tightly in plastic wrap. Chill at least 1 hour.
Do Ahead: Dough can be made 5 days ahead. Keep chilled.

Place apples, brown sugar, whiskey, lemon zest and juice, cinnamon, allspice, cloves, and salt in a large resealable plastic bag. Seal and toss to evenly coat. Let chill at least 1 hour or up to overnight, tossing bag occasionally to make sure apples are evenly coated in liquid.
Preheat oven to 400°. Cook butter in a medium saucepan over medium heat, stirring often, until it foams, then browns, 3–4 minutes.
Transfer apple mixture along with juices to a large bowl. Add brown butter and cornstarch and toss to coat.

Line a rimmed baking sheet with parchment paper. Let dough sit at room temperature 5 minutes, then roll out 1 disk on a lightly floured surface to a 12" round. Carefully transfer round to pie dish. Lift up edges and allow dough to slump down into dish, then press dough firmly against sides and bottom of dish. Trim, leaving about a ½" overhang.

Beat egg with 1 tsp. water in a small bowl and brush around edge of dough. Chill while you roll out remaining disk of dough to a 12" round. Carefully transfer to prepared baking sheet and chill until ready to use.

Arrange apple mixture in pie dish, creating rough concentric circles and nestling together so there aren’t gaps. (Don’t go too crazy here, but nestle them in enough so that they’re tightly packed—a lot of extra space can lead to a sunken top crust.) Pour any remaining juices from apple mixture over.

Place second round over filling. Trim edges of top round, leaving a 1" overhang. Fold edge of top round up under bottom edge; press together to seal. Crimp edge and brush whole top with remaining egg wash. Sprinkle with demerara sugar. Cut a few 3" slits in top to let steam escape. Place pie dish on a foil-lined rimmed baking sheet and chill 20 minutes.

Bake pie until crust is beginning to take on color, 15–20 minutes. Reduce oven temperature to 350° and continue to bake, tenting with foil if crust is getting too dark, until crust is deep golden brown and juices are thick and bubbling, 85-100 minutes longer. Note: It is difficult to overbake this pie. Make sure the juices are really bubbling and the bottom crust is well browned. That’s key for a crisp crust and a well-set filling. If you take the pie out too soon, you could have underdone apples and a soggy bottom!
Transfer pie to a wire rack and let cool at least 4 hours before serving. Serve with cheese slices alongside.
Do Ahead: Pie can be made 1 day ahead. Let cool; store covered with foil at room temperature.

name: Apple Cheesecake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
To make the crust: Mix graham cracker crumbs, pecans, melted butter, sugar, and cinnamon together in a bowl until well combined.
Press the graham cracker mixture into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan. Bake in the preheated oven for 10 minutes. Remove from the oven; leave the oven on.

To make the filling: Beat cream cheese and sugar in a mixing bowl with an electric mixer on medium speed until smooth. Add eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition. Beat in vanilla extract. Pour filling into the baked crust.
To make the topping: Place apples in a bowl. Stir sugar and cinnamon together in a smaller bowl; pour over apples and toss to coat. Spoon sugared apples over filling, then sprinkle pecans over top.

Bake in the oven until edges are puffed, 60 to 70 minutes. Run the tip of a table knife around the edges of the pan, set the pan on a wire rack, and allow the cheesecake to cool at room temperature, about 1 hour. Refrigerate until completely chilled, 4 hours to overnight.

name: Apple Cheesecake Snack Bars
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Lightly butter a 9x13-inch baking pan.
Mix graham cracker crumbs and melted butter together in a bowl until crumbly, adding more crumbs if mixture is too wet. Press crust into the prepared baking pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden and set, 7 to 8 minutes. Remove from the oven and set aside.

Beat cream cheese and 1/2 cup sugar using an electric mixer in a large bowl until smooth. Add eggs, one at a time, beating after each addition. Beat in vanilla extract on low speed until mixture is blended. Pour filling over warm crust.
Stir apples, 2 tablespoons sugar, cinnamon, nutmeg, and allspice together in a separate bowl; spoon evenly over filling.
Mix brown sugar, flour, walnuts, and cinnamon for streusel together in a bowl. Mix or cut butter into walnut mixture using your fingers or a knife until crumbly. Sprinkle over apple layer.
Bake in the preheated oven until cheese filling is set, 30 to 35 minutes.
Remove from the oven and let cool completely, about 30 minutes. Cut into small squares and refrigerate until ready to serve.

name: Apple Chicken Brine
instructions: Combine vegetable broth, apple juice, kosher salt, black pepper, and herbes de Provence in a pot; bring to a boil, stirring until salt is completely dissolved. Cool completely, transfer to a container or resealable plastic bag, and refrigerate until chilled.

name: Apple Chicken Salad Recipe For Two People
original_name: Receta Fácil de Ensalada de Pollo con Manzana para Dos Personas

ingredients.item: Unas cuantas hojas de lechuga fresca
3 cucharadas de mayonesa (puedes ponerle más al gusto)

instructions: En un tazón grande, mezcla la pechuga de pollo desmenuzada, los cubos de manzana verde, las rodajas de cebolla morada y el apio.
Añade 3 cucharadas de mayonesa (o al gusto) y mezcla bien para que todos los ingredientes se impregnen con la mayonesa de manera uniforme.
Prepara el lecho de lechuga en los platos donde servirás la ensalada y coloca la mezcla de pollo y manzana encima.
¡Listo para disfrutar! Sirve fresco y saborea esta deliciosa ensalada.

name: Apple Chicken Wings Recipe
original_name: Receta de alitas de pollo con manzana
instructions: Salpimienta las alitas y en una sartén con un chorrito de aceite de oliva y sofríe la cebolla, con el diente de ajo machacado.
Agrega las alitas y cocínalas a fuego medio junto a la cebolla y el ajo
Transcurridos 10-15 minutos agrega a la sartén el vino blanco y deja cocinar hasta que reduzca el alcohol.
Añade la manzana cortada en cubos muy pequeños. Tapa y deja cocer tranquilamente.
Baja el fuego y cocina por 20 minutos sin dejar de mover. Puedes agregar agua de a poco si la salsa se reduce mucho.
Disfruta con lo que gustes.

name: Apple Chips Recipe

ingredients.item: Aceite de oliva líquido o en spray

instructions: Precalentar el horno a 320˚F.
Lava bien la manzana y quita las hojas y el tallo, y pica con un cuchillo filoso sobre una tabla.
Corta las manzanas en rodajas de ⅛ a ¼ de pulgada.
Coloca las rodajas sobre una bandeja para hornear con papel de cera y unta o rocía un poco de aceite de oliva en ellas.
Espolvorea canela al gusto en algunas de las rebanadas, y chile en polvo las demás.
Hornea a 160°C durante 30 a 40 minutos, dándoles vuelta a los 20 minutos.
Estarán listas cuando empiecen a tomar un color dorado.
Retira del horno y deja enfriar.
Disfruta solas o con algún dip.

name: Apple Cider

ingredients.prep: or fuji apples, cored and cubed

instructions: Place the apples, cinnamon sticks, ginger, cloves, and salt in an 8-quart (7.5-liters) slow cooker. Pour the water over the apples.
Cover and cook on high for at least 8 hours, or overnight (up to 24 hours).
Remove the solids from the cider, pressing the pulp to extract as much liquid as possible.
Whisk in the brown sugar until dissolved.
Serve hot, or store in the refrigerator to serve later. Reheat before serving.
Enjoy!

name: Apple Cider And Maple Cream Tart With Maple-cranberry Compote

ingredients.item: Fresh apple cider or cold-pressed apple juice

instructions: Blend flour, powdered sugar, and coarse salt in processor 5 seconds. Add butter and blend until dough comes together in moist clumps. Gather dough into ball. Press dough evenly onto bottom and up sides of 9-inch-diameter tart pan with removable bottom. Cover and chill crust at least 1 hour and up to 2 days.

Preheat oven to 191°C. Bake chilled crust uncovered 10 minutes. Using back of fork, press bottom of crust to flatten (do not pierce). Continue to bake until crust is deep golden brown, pressing again if bottom of crust puffs, 16 to 18 minutes longer. Cool crust completely.

Bring apple cider or apple juice to rolling boil in large pot over high heat. Boil until bubbling thickly and reduced to generous 3/4 cup, stirring occasionally, 40 to 45 minutes. Transfer to small bowl and cool. DO AHEAD Can be made 2 days ahead. Cover and chill.

Grind maple sugar to powder in spice mill, blender, or mini processor. Transfer powdered maple sugar to 4-cup glass measuring cup; add cream, eggs, 1/4 teaspoon coarse salt, nutmeg, extract, and 3/4 cup cooled cider reduction and whisk to blend well.

Place tart pan with crust on baking sheet; set on rack in oven. Pour in filling. Bake tart until filling is puffed and cracked around edges and gently set in center, about 33 minutes. Transfer tart to rack and cool to room temperature, 1 to 2 hours.
Push up pan bottom, releasing tart. Cut tart into wedges and serve with compote and whipped cream, if desired.

name: Apple Cider And Rum Punch

ingredients.prep: very thinly sliced, plus more for serving
very thinly sliced, plus more for serving

instructions: Combine rum, vermouth, lemon juice, simple syrup, and bitters in a large pitcher. Add 2 cups ice and stir until ice has mostly melted and punch is very cold. Stir in apple slices and orange zest; gently stir in cider.
Divide punch among ice-filled old-fashioned glasses and garnish with more apple slices and orange zest.
Do Ahead: Punch (without apple, orange zest, and cider) can be made 1 day ahead. Chill.

name: Apple Cider Crisp
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Place apples in a 9x13-inch glass baking dish. Mix in apple cider and lemon juice.
Mix together sugar, brown sugar, graham cracker crumbs, and 1/2 cup flour in a bowl. Sprinkle sugar mixture over sliced apples and top with evenly spaced caramel squares.

Mix together brown sugar, oats, 1/2 cup flour, cinnamon, nutmeg, and pumpkin pie spice for the topping in a large bowl. Cut in butter cubes with 2 knives or pastry blender until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Sprinkle topping over apples in the baking dish.
Bake, uncovered, in the preheated oven until filling is bubbly and topping is golden brown, about 50 minutes. Let cool before serving.

name: Apple Cider Cupcakes
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (180°C).
In a large bowl, whisk together the brown sugar, granulated sugar, salt, olive oil, and vanilla.
Whisk in the eggs, 1 at a time, until fully incorporated.
Add the baking soda, cinnamon, half of the flour, and half of the cider and whisk to combine.
Add the remaining flour and the rest of the cider and whisk until completely combined.
Line a 12-cup muffin tin with paper liners. Pour the batter into the muffin tin, filling each cup about ⅔ full.
Bake for 20 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center of a cupcake comes out clean. Let cool.
Make the frosting: In a large bowl, cream the butter and cream cheese together with an electric hand mixer until light and fluffy, about 5 minutes.
Add the powdered sugar in 3 to 4 additions, mixing in between each until incorporated.
Add the cinnamon, apple cider, and vanilla and mix to combine.
Transfer the frosting to a piping bag or zip-top bag.
Pipe the frosting onto the cupcakes. Top with a sprinkle of cinnamon.
Enjoy!

name: Apple Cider Donuts
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Butter two 6-cup donut pans.

Pour apple cider into a saucepan and place over medium heat. Bring to a simmer and let it cook, watching carefully, until the cider is reduced to 1/2 cup. If it reduces too much, add enough water to make 1/2 cup. Set aside until needed.
Add flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, 1 teaspoon cinnamon, cardamom, and nutmeg to a large bowl. Mix with a whisk until combined and set aside until needed.

Whisk 1/2 cup white sugar, brown sugar, milk, 2 tablespoons melted butter, vanilla extract, and egg together in another bowl until combined. Add the apple cider reduction and the dry ingredients. Whisk together to form a slightly thick batter; do not overmix.
Spoon or pipe the batter into the prepared donut pans, filling them about 3/4 of the way up.

Bake in the center of the preheated oven until the tops are lightly browned, and the donuts spring back slightly to the touch, 10 to 12 minutes. Let cool for 10 minutes in the pans before removing to a sheet pan lined with a silicone baking mat. Cut out any donut holes as necessary.
If desired, while still slightly warm, brush the donuts lightly with remaining melted butter.
To make the coating: Mix 1 cup white sugar and 1 tablespoon cinnamon together in a shallow dish; toss donuts in sugar mixture to coat. Let cool completely before serving.

name: Apple Cider Doughnut Loaf Cake

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Mix a generous pinch of kosher salt, ¼ cup (50 g) sugar, ½ tsp. cinnamon, and ¼ tsp. nutmeg in a small bowl, set aside.

Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 325°. Lightly butter an 8½x4½" or 9x5" loaf pan. Line with parchment paper, leaving overhang on both long sides. Bring 1½ cups apple cider to a boil in a medium saucepan over medium-high heat. Reduce heat and simmer until cider is reduced by half (about ¾ cup), 8–10 minutes. Pour 4 Tbsp. reduced cider into a small measuring glass or bowl and set aside. Transfer remaining reduced cider to a small bowl and let cool 5 minutes. Stir in ½ cup sour cream and 1 tsp. vanilla extract and set aside.
Melt 8 Tbsp. unsalted butter in saucepan over low heat. Let cool slightly.

Whisk 1¼ cups plus 2 Tbsp. (172 g) all-purpose flour, 2 Tbsp. (15 g) cornstarch, 1 tsp. baking powder, ½ tsp. baking soda, 1¼ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, ½ tsp. cinnamon, and ¼ tsp. nutmeg in a medium bowl to combine.

Vigorously whisk 2 large eggs, room temperature and ¾ cup (150 g) sugar in a large bowl until pale and frothy, about 2 minutes. Whisking constantly, gradually add melted butter in a steady stream; continue to whisk until fully combined and emulsified (no spots of fat should remain). Reserve saucepan.
Add dry ingredients into egg mixture in 3 additions, alternating with reserved sour cream mixture, beginning and ending with dry ingredients; whisk just until no lumps remain. Batter will be thin.

Scrape into pan and set on a rimmed baking sheet. Bake cake, rotating halfway through, until deep golden brown and a tester inserted into the center comes out clean, 60–80 minutes. Transfer pan to a wire rack and poke top of cake all over with a toothpick. Spoon 3 Tbsp. reserved reduced cider over cake; let cool 10 minutes.
Melt remaining 1 Tbsp. unsalted butter in reserved saucepan and mix into remaining 1 Tbsp. reduced cider.

Using parchment paper, lift cake onto rack and set rack inside rimmed baking sheet. Peel away parchment from sides. Brush warm butter-cider mixture over top and sides of cake. Sprinkle generously with cinnamon-sugar topping to coat every surface (use parchment to help rotate cake and collect any excess sugar). Remove parchment and let cool completely before slicing.
Do Ahead: Cake can be made 4 days ahead. Store tightly wrapped at room temperature.

name: Apple Cider Funnel Cake
instructions: Combine flour, salt, cinnamon, allspice and baking powder in a bowl.
In separate bowl, combine eggs, sugar and vanilla. Blend.
Add apple cider and milk. Blend until well incorporated.
Slowly add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients, blend until you have a smooth and creamy batter.
Heat vegetable oil in a deep skillet.
Transfer the batter into a zipper bag and trim the corner.
Pour batter in funnel cake shapes into the hot oil. Once golden brown, flip and cook the other side (1 min max).
Remove and drain on paper towel.
Dust with powdered sugar and top with ice cream.
Nutrition  Calories: 2301 Fat: 139 grams  Carbs: 249 grams  Fiber: 4 grams  Sugars: 161 grams  Protein: 18 grams
Enjoy!

name: Apple Cider Turkey Brine
instructions: Combine 4 cups water, apple cider, kosher salt, sage, rosemary, thyme, and peppercorns together in a large stockpot. Bring to a boil; cook and stir brine until the salt is just dissolved. Remove from heat; add ice cubes.

name: Apple Cider Vinaigrette
instructions: Whisk apple cider vinegar, Dijon mustard, maple syrup, salt, and pepper together in a small bowl. Add olive oil and whisk until incorporated.
Pour vinaigrette into a screw-top jar or bottle; seal. Store in the refrigerator and shake before serving.

name: Apple Cider-marinated Grilled Chicken
instructions: Combine apple cider, apple jelly, lemon juice, Worcestershire sauce, hot sauce, salt, and pepper in a saucepan over medium heat. Cook and stir just until jelly melts, 3 to 5 minutes. Remove from heat and let marinade cool to room temperature, about 10 minutes.
Place chicken thighs and marinade into a 1-gallon plastic zip-top bag and let marinate for at least 1 hour.
Preheat an outdoor grill for medium heat and lightly oil the grate. Remove chicken from the bag and discard marinade.

Grill chicken thighs until no longer pink in the centers, turning frequently being careful not to let chicken burn, 20 to 25 minutes. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center of a thigh should read at least 74°C (74 degrees C).

name: Apple Cider–cooked Farro

ingredients.item: Fresh parsley leaves with tender stems

instructions: Combine bay leaf, apple cider, and 2 cups water in a medium saucepan; season with salt. Bring to a boil, reduce heat to medium-high, and add farro. Simmer until al dente, 25–30 minutes; drain. Spread out on a rimmed baking sheet; let cool.
Toss farro, vinegar, and oil in a large bowl; season with salt and pepper. Add celery root, apple, onion, parsley, olives, and Pecorino and toss to combine; season with salt and pepper.

name: Apple Cinnamon Cake

ingredients.item: 1 yemek kaşığı tereyağı ya da margarin (tereyağı ise eritilmiş)

instructions: 1. Yumurta ve şeker çırpılır.
2.  Süt, sıvıyağ ve katıyağ eklenerek çırpılmaya devam edilir.
3.  Un, tarçın, kabartma tozu ve vanilya bir kapta harmanlanır.
4.  Elekten geçirilerek karışıma eklenir.
5.  Homojen bir kıvam alana kadar çırpılır.
6. Ceviz eklenerek spatula ile karıştırılır.
7. Yağlanan kek kalıbına koyulur.
8.  Elmalar ikiye bölünür ve kabukları çıkartılır.
9.  Yarım ay şeklinde doğranır.
10.  Bir kapta tarçın ile harmanlanarak kek hamurunun üzerine dizilir.
11. 180 derece önceden ısıtılmış fırında 35 dakika kontrollü pişirilir.
12.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Apple Cinnamon Cake Recipe

ingredients.item: 3 adet elma (rendelenmiş veya küçük küp doğranmış)
Armut (çok yakışır, daha yumuşak doku verir)
Ayva (daha yoğun aroma, biraz daha sert kalabilir)
Esmer şeker (tarçınla mükemmel uyum, daha karamelimsi tat)
Şeker miktarını azaltıp 1–2 yemek kaşığı bal ekleyebilirsiniz (koku çok güzel olur)
Yoğurt (keki daha nemli ve yumuşak yapar)
Zeytinyağı (hafif meyvemsi aroma verir, çok baskın olmayan bir zeytinyağı seçin)
Unun 1 su bardağı kadarını tam buğday unu ile değiştirebilirsiniz.
Glutensiz un karışımı + 1 çay kaşığı ekstra kabartma tozu (kıvamı dengelemek için)
Hamura 1 tatlı kaşığı limon kabuğu rendesi (kokuyu şahane yapar)

instructions: 1. Fırını 180°C alt-üst ayarda ısıtın.
2.  Kek kalıbını yağlayıp unlayın.
3. Elmaları rendeleyin veya küçük küp doğrayın.
4.  Üzerine şeker, tarçın ve ceviz ekleyip karıştırın.
5. Yumurta ve şekeri 3–4 dakika, açık renk köpük köpük olana kadar çırpın.
6. Süt ve sıvı yağı ekleyip karıştırın.
7. Un, kabartma tozu, vanilin, tarçın ve tuzu eleyerek ekleyin.
8.  Spatula ile nazikçe karıştırın.
9. Hazırladığınız elmalı harcı hamura ekleyip kısa bir şekilde karıştırın.
10. Karışımı kalıba dökün.
11. Önceden ısıtılmış fırında 35–40 dakika pişirin.
12.  (Kürdan testi yapın.
13. )Fırından çıkarınca 10 dakika dinlendirip kalıptan çıkarın ve servis edin.
14.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Apple Cinnamon Chimichangas
instructions: Heat apple pie filling in a small pot over medium-low heat until warmed through, about 5 minutes.
Place cinnamon sugar in a shallow dish.
Spoon 1 1/2 tablespoons filling into the center of each tortilla. Fold the sides in and over filling, then roll up like a burrito. Use a toothpick to secure.
Heat oil in a large, deep saucepan over medium heat.

Working in batches, fry tortillas, seam-side down, in hot oil until browned and crispy, 1 to 2 minutes per side. Blot on paper towels. Remove toothpicks and roll chimichangas in cinnamon sugar to coat.

name: Apple Cinnamon French Toast Bake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350˚F (180˚C). Grease a 9 x 13-inch baking dish with nonstick spray.
Cut the bread into 1-inch (2 ½ cm) cubes.
Chop the peeled apples into bite-size pieces.
In a large bowl, toss together the bread cubes, apples, sugar, and cornstarch.
In a medium bowl, whisk together the eggs, milk, vanilla, and cinnamon.
Pour the egg mixture over the bread cubes and toss to coat evenly.
Pour the bread mixture into the prepared baking dish and drizzle with the maple syrup.
Bake for 45 minutes, or until golden brown.
Serve with a dusting of powdered sugar and dollops of whipped cream.
Enjoy!

name: Apple Cinnamon Muffins
instructions: Καθαρίζουμε το μήλο και το κόβουμε σε πολύ μικρά καρέ.
Ραντίζουμε με τον χυμό λεμονιού και προσθέτουμε την κανέλα και 1 κουταλιά της σούπας από τη ζάχαρη.
Ανακατεύουμε καλά για να μαριναριστούν και τα αφήνουμε στην άκρη μέχρι να τα χρειαστούμε.
Σε ένα μπολ, ρίχνουμε το λιωμένο και κρύο βούτυρο, τη ζάχαρη, το γιαούρτι και το αυγό.
Ανακατεύουμε με σύρμα χειρός μέχρι να ενωθούν καλά τα υλικά.
Κοσκινίζουμε το αλεύρι, το μπέικιν πάουντερ, τη σόδα και το αλάτι πάνω από τα υγρά υλικά.
Αναδιπλώνουμε το μείγμα απαλά με σπάτουλα, χωρίς να το παραδουλέψουμε.
Προσθέτουμε τα μαριναρισμένα μήλα μαζί με όλον τον χυμό που έχουν βγάλει στο μπολ.
Ανακατεύουμε απαλά, ώστε τα μήλα να ενσωματωθούν ομοιόμορφα στο μείγμα.
Τοποθετούμε 6 χάρτινες θήκες σε ταψάκι για muffins και μοιράζουμε ισόποσα το μείγμα.
Ψήνουμε σε καλά προθερμασμένο φούρνο, στους 170°C στον αέρα, στη μεσαία σχάρα, για περίπου 25 λεπτά, μέχρι να φουσκώσουν και να ψηθούν στο κέντρο.
Ελέγχουμε το ψήσιμο βυθίζοντας μια οδοντογλυφίδα στο κέντρο· αν βγει καθαρή, είναι έτοιμα.
Αφήνουμε να σταθούν μέσα στη φόρμα για 10 λεπτά και στη συνέχεια ξεφορμάρουμε.

name: Apple Cinnamon Pancake Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 adet orta boy elma (rendelenmiş veya küçük küpler halinde)
1 yemek kaşığı sıvı yağ veya tereyağı (tavayı yağlamak için)

instructions: 1. Un, kabartma tozu, tarçın, şeker ve tuzu bir kapta karıştırın.
2. Yumurtayı ve sütü ekleyip pürüzsüz bir hamur elde edene kadar çırpın.
3. Rendelenmiş veya küçük küpler halinde doğranmış elmayı hamura ekleyip karıştırın.
4. Tavayı orta ateşte ısıtın ve hafifçe yağlayın.
5. Hamurdan bir kepçe dökün, yüzeyde kabarcıklar oluşana kadar pişirin (~2–3 dk), sonra tersini çevirip diğer tarafını da 1–2 dk pişirin.
6. Sıcak olarak servis edin.
7.  Üzerine bal, akçaağaç şurubu veya pudra şekeri serpin.
8.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Apple Cinnamon Roll Muffins
instructions: Put frozen rolls on a baking sheet, spray a piece of plastic wrap with cooking spray and place over rolls. Let rise until doubled in size, about 3 hours.
Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line a muffin tin with paper liners.
Mix white sugar, brown sugar, and cinnamon together in a bowl. Place melted butter in a small bowl.

Grab approximately 1 tablespoon of thawed and risen dough and roll into a ball. Dip the ball in the melted butter and roll in the cinnamon-sugar mixture. Repeat to fill each muffin liner with 3 buttered and sugared dough balls.
Combine apples and raisins in a bowl. Sprinkle about 1 teaspoon apple-raisin mixture over each muffin.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown, about 25 minutes.
Beat cream cheese, confectioners' sugar, whipping cream, and vanilla extract together in a bowl until glaze is smooth, 3 to 5 minutes. Drizzle glaze over muffins.

name: Apple Cinnamon Skillet Cobbler
instructions: Preheat your oven to 350ºF (180ºC).
In a cast-iron skillet over medium-low heat, add the apples, sugar, cornstarch, lemon juice, spices, and salt.
Mix to combine and stir for 5-10 minutes until the mixture starts to thicken.
Let simmer for 5 minutes on low heat.
Sprinkle the box cake mix over the apple filling.
Add the nuts and evenly distribute the sliced butter over the top to ensure even baking.
Bake for 45 minutes to an hour, until the top is golden brown.
Serve warm with ice cream.
Enjoy!

name: Apple Clafoutis
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).
Make custard: Mix eggs and brown sugar in a large bowl until smooth. Whisk in flour and salt. Slowly add milk, stirring constantly until well combined. Stir in vanilla and set aside to rest.

Prepare apples: Melt butter, brown sugar, and water in a 10 1/4-inch cast iron skillet over medium-high heat. Stir frequently until mixture starts to boil. Reduce heat to medium; swirl the skillet, but do not stir, until mixture starts to thicken, about 2 minutes. Add apples and cinnamon. Cook and stir until apples are crisp-tender and starting to brown, 15 to 18 minutes. Remove from heat.
Stir custard and pour over apples in the skillet.
Bake in the preheated oven until edges are golden brown and custard is set, 28 to 35 minutes.

name: Apple Cocktail
instructions: 1. Kokteyl kadehlerini buzlukta bekletin.
2.  Elmanın çekirdekli kısımlarını temizleyip çok ince dilimleyin.
3.  Kararmasını önlemek için elma dilimlerinin üzerine limon suyu gezdirin.
4. Dört buz parçası, elma suyu, crema de cassis, brandy ve şampanyayı shaker?a alıp karıştırın.
5.  Süzgeçten geçirip iki kadehe paylaştırın.
6.  4 elma dilimini ayırıp kalanını kadehlere ilave edin.
7.  Ananas dilimini ortadan ikiye kesip elma dilimleriyle birlikte kadehlerin kenarına yerleştirin.
8.  Servis yapın.

name: Apple Coffee Cake
instructions: To make the cake: Stir flour, cinnamon, baking soda, and salt together in a bowl.

Beat brown sugar and butter with an electric mixer in a large bowl until light, fluffy, and noticeably lighter in color. Mix in egg, then mix in sour cream, yogurt, and vanilla until well incorporated.
Gradually mix in flour mixture, then fold in apples. Pour batter into the prepared baking dish.
To make the crumb topping: Mix brown sugar, flour, butter, and cinnamon together in a bowl with a fork until crumbly. Sprinkle over cake batter.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, 35 to 40 minutes. Remove from the oven and cool on a wire rack.
Serve and enjoy!

name: Apple Coffee Cake A La Gram
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease a 9x13-inch glass baking pan.
Combine apples and sugar in a bowl and toss to coat. Stir in oil, eggs, and vanilla extract.
Stir flour, cinnamon, baking soda, salt, nutmeg, and allspice in a separate bowl. Add to the apple mixture and mix well. Pour into the prepared pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, about 45 minutes. Let cool in the pan on a wire rack.

name: Apple Compote, Healthy Recipe
instructions: Comenzaremos con la piel de naranja. Podemos usar un pelador para obtenerla, pero hay que evitar al máximo la parte blanca. Otro punto importante es que la piel esté bien limpia y que de preferencia, se trate de una naranja bio o que no esté tratada, para evitar que su piel esté impregnada de pesticidas.
La piel de naranja puede utilizarse en cintas o trozos, de la misma manera que vaya despegándose con la ayuda del pelador. Una vez pelada la naranja, reservaremos su piel.

También nos encargaremos de las manzanas. Las dejaremos ya peladas y retiraremos el centro con las semillas y el corazón. También las dejaremos cortadas en trozos (no importa que no sean uniformes o que no estén bien cortados). No hay que tirar la piel de las manzanas porque según el gusto de cada quien, podemos incorporar una parte a esta receta. Yo suelo hacerlo porque esto le da más gusto a la compota y más contenido de fibra.
Lo siguiente será calentar una cacerola con 350 mililitros de agua, el azúcar, el jugo de limón y la piel de la naranja.
