Wrap plastic tightly around fish, then wrap with another large sheet of plastic. Gently poke 24 small holes through plastic (not fish) on both sides of fish with a thin skewer or the tip of a sharp knife to allow juices to escape. Put fish on a rimmed baking sheet. Top with another rimmed baking sheet; weigh it down with two 15-oz. canned goods. Refrigerate for 2 days, turning fish after 1 day.

Remove canned goods and top baking sheet. Unwrap and discard plastic, keeping cure intact. Rewrap in clean plastic and poke holes in plastic as before. Place in a clean resealable plastic bag; refrigerate, skin side up. Chill for 1 more day. Gently scrape off cure.

Whisk crème fraîche, 2 tsp. dill, and remaining 1 tsp. crushed green peppercorns in a small bowl. Season with salt. Thinly slice gravlax on a diagonal and serve on crackers. Top with créme fraîche and garnish with re-maining 2 tsp. grapefruit zest and 1 tsp. dill.

name: Arctic Char Tostadas

ingredients.item: -oz. boneless arctic char or salmon fillet

ingredients.prep: sliced serrano chiles, capers, and lime wedges (for serving)

instructions: Heat a small saucepan over medium. When hot, pour in 1 Tbsp. fish sauce. It should bubble up vigorously and then get thicker and slightly darker, about 30 seconds. Repeat with remaining fish sauce, incorporating 1 Tbsp. at a time. Carefully add vinegar (it may spatter), then transfer mixture to a small bowl; let cool. Stir in scallions and ginger. Taste and season with salt.
Do Ahead: Vinaigrette can be made 1 week ahead. Cover and chill.

Preheat oven to 300°. Mix lemon zest into cheese in a small bowl; season with salt and set aside. Place fish on a rimmed baking sheet and drizzle very lightly with oil; season with salt. Bake until just opaque throughout, about 5 minutes for char and 8–10 minutes for salmon. Remove from oven and break apart into large flakes. Drizzle with ¼ cup Salty-Sour Vinaigrette.
Divide reserved cheese mixture among tostadas. Top with fish, then cilantro, chiles, and capers. Serve with lime wedges.

name: Arctic Char With Cucumber-feta Relish And Jalapeño-goat-cheese Hush Puppies

ingredients.item: - to 6-ounce arctic char fillets with skin

instructions: Toss first 7 ingredients in medium bowl. Season relish with salt and freshly ground black pepper. DO AHEAD Can be made 2 hours ahead. Cover and chill.

Sprinkle fish on both sides with salt and freshly ground pepper. Heat oil in heavy large skillet over medium-high heat. Place fish, skin side down, in skillet. Cook until skin is brown, occasionally flattening with spatula to prevent curling, about 4 minutes. Turn fish over. Cook until just opaque in center, about 1 minute.
Using slotted spoon, mound relish on plates. Top with fish, skin side up. Arrange hush puppies alongside and serve.

name: Arctic Char With Greens And Gribiche Dressing
instructions: Season fish with salt and pepper. Swirl oil in a cold large nonstick skillet to coat; lay in fish in pan, skin side down. Set over medium heat and cook fish, occasionally pressing down lightly (lightly!) on fillets to ensure skin is in even contact with pan, until skin is deep golden brown and flesh is opaque around the edges, 6–8 minutes. Turn fillets and cook just until opaque on flesh side, about 1 minute longer. Transfer to a platter.
Gently toss greens in a medium bowl with enough dressing to lightly coat; season with salt and pepper. Scatter over fish and spoon some additional dressing on top.

name: Arctic Char With King Trumpet Mushrooms, Fingerlings, And Meyer Lemon Butter Sauce

ingredients.item: Leeks (white and pale green parts only)
ingredients.prep: halved lengthwise, cut crosswise into 1/4-inch-thick slices
cut crosswise into 1/4-inch-thick rounds or 1 pound oyster mushrooms

instructions: Melt butter in heavy medium skillet over medium-high heat. Add leeks and sauté until tender, about 8 minutes. Season to taste with salt and pepper. DO AHEAD Can be made 2 days ahead. Cover and refrigerate.
Puree chives and oil in blender. Strain through fine sieve. Season oil to taste with salt and pepper. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and refrigerate. Bring to room temperature before using.

Bring large saucepan of salted water to boil; add thyme and bay leaf. Add potatoes and boil until tender, about 14 minutes. Drain. Cut into 1-inch pieces. Return to pan; add butter and toss to coat. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Set potatoes aside.
Melt butter in heavy large skillet over medium-high heat. Add mushrooms and sauté until tender, about 8 minutes. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Set aside.

Using small sharp knife, cut off peel and white pith from lemons. Working over small bowl to catch juices, cut between membranes to release segments. Add segments to juice in bowl. Bring cream to simmer in small skillet over medium heat. butter and whisk until melted. Mix in lemon segments and juice. Simmer until thick, whisking occasionally, about 2 minutes (segments will fall apart). Season to taste with salt and pepper. DO AHEAD Potatoes, mushrooms, and lemon butter sauce can be made 2 hours ahead. Let stand at room temperature.

Heat oil in heavy large skillet over high heat. Sprinkle fish with thyme, salt, and pepper. Add fish to skillet, skin side down, and cook until skin is brown, about 5 minutes. Remove from heat. Turn fish over. Place lid on skillet to hold fish; tilt skillet to drain off excess oil. Discard oil. Add butter to skillet and tilt to melt butter and distribute evenly. Let stand covered until fish is just opaque in center, about 3 minutes.

Rewarm leeks, potatoes, and mushrooms over medium heat and spoon onto plates; top with fish. Rewarm lemon butter sauce over medium heat, whisking frequently; spoon over fish. Drizzle with chive oil. Garnish with chervil and serve.

name: Arctic Char With Truffled Mashed Potatoes, Sugar Snap Peas, And Truffle Vinaigrette

ingredients.item: Sliced black truffles from jar plus 1 teaspoon juice from jar*
Chopped sliced black truffles from jar
- to 7-ounce arctic char fillets with skin

instructions: Blend first 4 ingredients in mini processor until well blended. Gradually add both oils and blend until thick and creamy. Season to taste with salt and pepper. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill. Let stand 1 hour at room temperature before serving.

Cook potatoes in pot of boiling salted water until tender, about 30 minutes. Drain potatoes. Cool slightly, then peel. Return potatoes to pot; add butter and mash. Mix in truffles and truffle oil, then enough milk by tablespoonfuls to moisten. DO AHEAD Can be made 2 hours ahead. Let stand at room temperature. Rewarm over low heat before serving.

Preheat oven to 149°C. Butter rimmed baking sheet. Arrange fish, skin side down, on prepared sheet. Sprinkle fish with salt, pepper, and chives. Bake fish until barely opaque in center, 10 to 15 minutes.

Meanwhile, melt butter in large skillet over medium heat. Add sugar snap peas and 2 tablespoons water; sauté until peas are crisp-tender and water evaporates, about 4 minutes. Season with salt and pepper.
Spoon mashed potatoes onto plates. Top with fish and sugar snap peas. Drizzle vinaigrette around fish and serve.

name: Arepa Recipe

ingredients.item: 2 su bardağı önceden pişirilmiş mısır unu (masarepa – beyaz ya da sarı)
1 yemek kaşığı sıvı yağ (isteğe bağlı, yumuşaklık için)
1 yemek kaşığı tereyağı (pişirme sonrası lezzet için – opsiyonel)
Geleneksel masarepa (önceden pişirilmiş mısır unu) yoksa mısır irmiği (cornmeal) veya ince öğütülmüş mısır unu kullanılabilir. ancak sonuç biraz daha farklı dokulu olur.
Glutensiz seçenek için pirinç unu veya kinoa unu eklenerek harmanlanabilir.
Normal tuz yerine deniz tuzu, sarımsak tozu, soğan tozu gibi aromalı tuzlar kullanılabilir.
Hamura ekstra tat katmak için rendelenmiş peynir (mozarella, kaşar, queso fresco) eklenebilir.
Ilık su yerine ılık süt ya da et/ tavuk suyu kullanarak daha aromalı ve besleyici hale getirilebilir.
Hafif tatlı bir versiyon için hindistan cevizi sütü ya da badem sütü kullanılabilir.
Sıvı yağ yerine zeytinyağı, hindistancevizi yağı veya tereyağı tercih edilebilir.
Pişirme sonrası üzerine sürmek için tereyağı yerine avokado yağı ya da bitkisel margarin kullanılabilir.
Hamura ince doğranmış taze otlar (maydanoz, taze soğan, kişniş) eklenebilir.
Daha besleyici bir tarif için hamura haşlanmış sebze püresi (kabak, havuç, tatlı patates) katılabilir.

instructions: 1. Geniş bir kaseye mısır ununu ve tuzu koyun.
2.  Ilık suyu yavaş yavaş ekleyip karıştırın.
3.  Elinizle yoğurarak yumuşak, ele yapışmayan bir hamur elde edin.
4. Hamuru 5 dakika dinlenmeye bırakın.
5.  Bu süre hamurun suyu çekmesini sağlar.
6. Hamurdan mandalina büyüklüğünde parçalar alın, yuvarlayın ve elinizle bastırarak 1–1,5 cm kalınlığında yuvarlak diskler yapın.
7. Yapışmaz bir tavayı veya döküm tavayı hafif yağlayın.
8.  Orta ateşte her iki tarafını yaklaşık 5–7 dakika, dışı altın rengi ve hafif çıtır olana kadar pişirin.
9. Sıcak arepaları ortadan ikiye kesip içine peynir, avokado, tereyağı, jambon, yumurta veya et gibi malzemeler doldurarak servis edin.
10.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Arepa Recipe With Devils And Cheese
original_name: Receta de arepa con diablitos y queso

ingredients.item: 2 tazas  de harina de maíz precocida

instructions: En un bol, incorpora el agua y diluye la sal.
Agrega progresivamente la harina de maíz precocida y mezcla hasta formar una masa suave y manejable.
Si te hace falta más agua o harina, puedes añadir sin problemas.
Divide la masa en porciones iguales y dales forma de bolita.
Aplana las bolitas para formar la arepa y queden como un disco, bien redonditas con aproximadamente 1,5 cm de grosor.
Calienta una plancha con el aceite vegetal.
Coloca las arepas y cocina por ambos lados a fuego medio hasta que queden doraditas y con una costra crujiente.
Una vez listas las arepas, ábrelas por la mitad con un cuchillo de plástico para que la masa interna no se adhiera al utensilio.
Unta las arepas con la mantequilla hasta que se derrita.
Rellena con una porción del diablitos y agrega queso al gusto.
Sírvela y disfrútala recién hechas.

name: Arepa Reina Pepiada (the Most Popular Venezuelan Arepa Recipe)
original_name: Arepa Reina Pepiada (la receta de arepa venezolana más popular)

ingredients.item: 2 tazas de harina de maíz precocida

instructions: En un bol grande, mezcla la harina de maíz con la sal.

Añade el agua tibia poco a poco y mezcla con tus manos hasta formar una masa suave y homogénea. Si deseas, puedes añadir una cucharada de aceite para darle un extra de suavidad. Deja reposar la masa durante 5 minutos.
Forma bolas de masa del tamaño de una naranja pequeña y aplástalas suavemente para formar discos de aproximadamente 1 cm de grosor.
Calienta una plancha o sartén a fuego medio-alto. Cocina cada arepa unos 5 minutos por cada lado, hasta que estén doradas y se formen una corteza ligeramente crujiente.

Cocina la pechuga de pollo en agua con sal hasta que esté tierna. Deja enfriar y desmenuza. En una sartén, calienta una cucharada de aceite y sofríe la cebolla y el ajo hasta que estén transparentes. Añade el pollo desmechado y saltea durante unos minutos. Salpimenta al gusto.
En un bol, mezcla el pollo con la mayonesa y el aguacate cortado en cubos. Agrega el jugo de un limón y, si deseas, cilantro picado para un toque fresco.
Abre una arepa por la mitad, como si fuese un bolsillo. Rellena generosamente con la mezcla de pollo y aguacate.

name: Arepa Tumbarrancho Maracucha Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 taza de harina de maíz precocida
½ taza  de harina de trigo
½ vaso de agua (si es necesario)
½ kg.  de queso de mano
2  tomate cortados en tiritas y sin semillas

instructions: En un bol agrega la sal, el agua y el aceite, mezcla con una cuchara hasta que se diluya la sal por completo.
Añade la harina de maíz con el agua, la sal y el aceite hasta obtener una masa compacta y suave.
Haz cuatro bolitas del mismo tamaño y aplástalas con las palmas de las manos y redondea hasta formar unas arepas.
Sobre una plancha o budare caliente cuece las arepas hasta que tengan una capa dura en su exterior.
Luego introdúcelas en el horno a 120 ºC, este proceso es solo para que se inflen y puedas rellenarlas con más facilidad.
Una vez listas, espera que reposen un poco y ábrelas.
Agrega en otro bol la harina de trigo, los huevos, la sal, la mostaza y la leche; revuelve con un tenedor hasta unificar la mezcla.
Agregar poco a poco el agua hasta obtener una mezcla espesa para el rebozado (solo debe colocarse el agua necesaria).
Añade una rebanada de mortadela dentro de la arepa (es importante que la mortadela no sobresalga de la arepa).
Cierra la arepa con la ayuda de palillos, sumerge la arepa en la mezcla del rebozado utilizando unas pinzas. Debe quedar cubierta por ambos lados.
En una sartén con abundante aceite fríe hasta que dore por ambos lados.
Ponla sobre papel absorbente. Repite con todas las arepas.
Abre la arepa y rellenar con queso de mano, repollo, tiritas de tomate, mayonesa, salsa de tomate (kétchup) y mostaza.
Sirve caliente para que se mantenga la textura crujiente.

name: Arepas

ingredients.item: Desired fillings (such as shredded cooked chicken or pork
ingredients.prep: stewed black beans with cheese and lime, corn salad with onion and fresh herbs; for serving)

ingredients.item: Arepa flour is precooked corn flour
ingredients.prep: not to be confused with masa harina. Sometimes sold as masarepa or harina precocida, it can be found in Latin markets and some supermarkets.

instructions: Combine arepa flour and salt in a medium bowl. Make a well in the center and add 2½ cups warm water. Using a wooden spoon, gradually incorporate dry ingredients, stirring until no dry lumps remain. Let rest 5 minutes to hydrate.
Knead dough a few times in bowl, then divide into 8 pieces. Roll each piece on work surface into a ball, then gently flatten to about ½” thick.

Heat 1 Tbsp. oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium heat. Add 4 arepas, cover, and cook until golden brown, 6–8 minutes. Uncover, flip, and cook (keep uncovered) until other side is golden brown, 6–8 minutes. Transfer arepas to a wire rack. Repeat with remaining 1 Tbsp. oil and dough.
Split arepas and stuff with desired fillings; serve with lime wedges for squeezing over.

name: Arepas Recipe In Air Fryer
original_name: Receta de arepas en freidora de aire

ingredients.item: 2 tazas de harina de maíz precocido

instructions: Inicia la receta y calienta una olla con agua.
Luego, vierte el agua en un bol y sazona el agua con sal y mezcla hasta que tome sabor.
Vierte de a poco el harina de maíz precocido y con la ayuda de una paleta o tus manos, mezcla muy bien hasta que se forme una masa suave.
Ahora, precalienta la freidora de aire a 180° C.
Humedece tus manos y toma una bolita de masa, y forma la arepa aplanándola hasta que quede redondita.
Coloca la arepa en el agua hirviendo y deja por 4 minutos. Posteriormente, retira del agua, escurre un poco y lleva a la freidora de aire.
Cocina de 7 a 10 minutos más a 160° C, hasta que queden crujientes y listo.
Disfrutas tus arepas como gustes.

name: Arepas With Black Beans And Avocado

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or 1 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Preheat oven to 325°. Toast seeds on a parchment paper–lined rimmed baking sheet, tossing once, until darkened and fragrant, 8–10 minutes. Transfer to a small bowl; reserve baking sheet and parchment.

Meanwhile, combine flour and 2 tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1 tsp. Morton salt in a large bowl. Add 2 tsp. oil and 1 cup warm water and mix with a sturdy spatula or your hands to combine. If dough feels dry, add more water 1 tablespoonful at a time until it holds together. Smash and knead dough until smooth and no small clumps or dry bits remain (be patient and really knead it—it will hydrate and come together); it shouldn’t crack when you squeeze it. Cover bowl with a damp kitchen towel and set aside to let dough hydrate, 15 minutes.

Halve chile lengthwise, removing seeds and membranes if less heat is desired. Place one half in a food processor. Finely chop remaining chile and set aside. Add avocado, ½ cup cilantro, and juice from 1 lime to food processor and pulse until mostly smooth. With the motor running, drizzle in 2 Tbsp. oil until a smooth sauce forms. Taste and season with salt.

Add all but 2 Tbsp. toasted seeds to hydrated dough. Knead in bowl until seeds are incorporated and dough is firm and homogenous, 1–2 minutes. Turn out dough onto reserved parchment and divide into 4 pieces. Press and pat into disks that are 5"–5½" in diameter and ⅛"–¼" thick. Return disks with parchment to baking sheet.

Heat 1 tsp. oil in a large cast-iron or nonstick skillet over medium-high until shimmering. Working in batches, add arepas and cook, turning once with a spatula and reducing heat to medium if they’re browning too quickly, until a crisp, slightly charred crust forms, 3–5 minutes per side. Transfer arepas to same baking sheet and bake until slightly puffed and springy, 10–12 minutes.

While arepas bake, wipe out skillet, then pour in remaining 1 Tbsp. oil and heat over medium. Add chili powder and cook, stirring, until fragrant, about 20 seconds. Add beans and cook, stirring frequently, until warmed through, 3–4 minutes. Add reserved chopped chile and cook, stirring, until fragrant, about 1 more minute. Remove from heat and add remaining ½ cup cilantro. Season with salt.
Spread arepas with avocado sauce. Top with bean mixture, cheese (if using), and reserved seeds.

name: Argentine Empanadas With Turkey Meat
original_name: Empanadas argentinas con carne de pavo

ingredients.item: 16 oz. carne de pavo molida jennie-o®
2 cdas. aceitunas verdes sin hueso, cortadas en láminas
2 cdas. aceite de girasol o de oliva

instructions: Descongela los discos de empanadas: ponlos a temperatura ambiente por al menos 20 minutos.

name: Argentine Gaucha Sauce, And Delicious
original_name: Salsa gaucha argentina, fácil y deliciosa
instructions: En una sartén agrega el tomate natural triturado, la ramita de romero y la hoja de laurel y dejamos cocinar por unos 20 minutos.
Pasado el tiempo de cocción retira el romero y la hoja de laurel y retiramos la sartén del fuego.

En el vaso de la licuadora, vierte el contenido de la sartén y añade el ajo, el perejil, el comino, el orégano, el pimentón dulce, el vinagre de vino, un poco de sal, un poco de pimienta y trituramos todo.
Incorpora el aceite de oliva, poco a poco, en forma de hilo.
Deja enfriar y disfruta con lo que te provoque.

name: Argentinean-inspired Beef Mini Empanadas

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Prepare filling: Cook ground beef, onion, bell pepper, and garlic in a large, nonstick skillet over medium to medium-high heat until vegetables are tender and beef is browned and crumbly, about 10 minutes. Add olives, paprika, cumin, salt, and pepper. Stir in chopped eggs.
Scrape mixture into a bowl. Cover and refrigerate until fully chilled, 1 to 2 hours; this ensures the dough will not be soggy when the empanadas are baked.
Prepare dough: Whisk flour and salt together in a medium bowl until combined. Cut in butter with a pastry blender until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.

Whisk cold water, egg, and vinegar together in a small bowl. Pour into the dry ingredients and blend with a fork. Use your hands to finish blending the ingredients until they come together in a ball. Flatten the ball into a disc, wrap with plastic wrap, and refrigerate for 1 hour.
When you are ready to cook, preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Roll the dough on a lightly floured surface. Use a 3-inch round cutter to cut circles, rerolling the scraps as necessary. I got about 18 circles.
Hold each circle in your hand and place a heaping tablespoon of filling in the center. Gently fold the ends over the top and press to seal all the way around. Reserve extra filling for another use.
Set empanadas on a baking sheet. Press around the sealed edges with a fork if desired.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown on the bottoms, about 18 minutes. Flip and bake until the other side is browned, about 5 more minutes.

name: Argentinian Beef Empanadas

ingredients.item: (12 each) puff pastry dough for turnovers/empanadas

ingredients.prep: rinsed well, cut in half lengthwise, divided

instructions: Heat 2 Tbsp. oil in a large pot over high. Cook 2 lb. ground beef, breaking up with a spoon, until browned but not completely cooked through, 6–8 minutes. Transfer to a medium bowl with a slotted spoon, leaving as much fat in pan as possible.

Reduce heat to medium and cook 2 medium onions, chopped, 2 small red bell peppers, seeded, chopped, and remaining 1 Tbsp. oil, stirring, until tender but not browned, 6–8 minutes; season with salt and black pepper. Add 3 Tbsp. ground cumin, 2 Tbsp. sweet paprika, 1 Tbsp. dried oregano, and ¼ tsp. cayenne pepper and cook, stirring, until fragrant, about 1 minute. Add 1½ cups low-sodium chicken stock or broth and reserved beef along with any accumulated juices to pot. Stir in 2 tsp. sugar, 4 tsp. salt, and ¼ tsp. black pepper. Bring to a simmer and cook, stirring and scraping up any brown bits, until most of the liquid is evaporated, 15–20 minutes; taste and season with salt and black pepper, if needed. Stir in ½ cup raisins. Transfer to a medium bowl, cover, and chill at least 3 hours.
Do Ahead: Beef filling can be made 3 days ahead. Keep chilled.

Preheat oven to 375°. Let 3 packages Puff Pastry Dough for Empanadas sit at room temperature 15 minutes to temper. Remove 6 rounds from package, keeping plastic divider underneath, and arrange on a work surface. Place 2 Tbsp. filling in the center of each round.
Top with 2 olive halves. Brush water around half of outer edge of each round.
Using plastic divider to help you, fold round over filling and pinch edges to seal.
Using a fork, crimp edges. Remove plastic and transfer empanada to a parchment-lined sheet tray, spacing 1" apart. Repeat with remaining rounds (you’ll get about 12 empanadas on each tray).

Bake empanadas, rotating tray halfway through, until golden brown and slightly darker around the edges, 25–35 minutes.
Do Ahead: Unbaked empanadas can be made 3 months ahead; freeze on sheet tray, then transfer to freezer bags and keep frozen.

name: Argentinian Chicken Empanadas

ingredients.item: (12 each) puff pastry dough for turnovers/empanadas

instructions: Bring chicken, bay leaves, and 2½ cups water to a simmer in a medium pot over medium and cook until chicken is cooked through, 30–40 minutes. Transfer chicken to a plate; discard bay leaves and reserve broth. Let chicken sit until cool enough to handle, then coarsely chop.

Meanwhile, heat oil in a large pot over medium and cook onion and bell peppers, stirring, until tender but not browned, 6–8 minutes; season with salt and black pepper. Stir in tomato paste and cook until brick red, 1–2 minutes. Add paprika, oregano, and cayenne and cook, stirring, until fragrant, about 1 minute. Add reserved broth and chicken along with any accumulated juices to pot. Stir in 4 tsp. salt and ¼ tsp. black pepper. Bring to a simmer and cook, stirring and scraping up any brown bits, until most of the liquid is evaporated, 15–20 minutes; taste and season with salt and black pepper, if needed. Transfer to a medium bowl, cover, and chill at least 3 hours.

Preheat oven to 375°. Let dough sit at room temperature 15 minutes to temper. Remove 6 rounds from package, keeping plastic divider underneath, and arrange on a work surface. Place 2 Tbsp. filling in the center of each round. Brush water around half of outer edge of each round. Using plastic divider to help you, fold round over filling and pinch edges to seal. Using a fork, crimp edges. Remove plastic and transfer empanada to a parchment-lined sheet tray, spacing 1" apart. Repeat with remaining rounds (you’ll get about 12 empanadas on each tray).
Bake empanadas, rotating tray halfway through, until golden brown and slightly darker around the edges, 25–35 minutes.
Do Ahead: Filling can be made 3 days ahead. Keep chilled. Unbaked empanadas can be made 3 months ahead; freeze on sheet tray, then transfer to freezer bags and keep frozen.

name: Argyros Giant Salad
instructions: Ξεκινάμε με το μούλιασμα σε μπόλικο νερό με σόδα (χρειάζονται το λιγότερο 12 ώρες).
Την επομένη ξεπλένουμε και τους βράζουμε (ξαφρίζοντάς τους) για 45 ΄ να μαλακώσουν.
Στραγγίζουμε και τους βάζουμε σε σαλατιέρα.
Ψιλοκόβουμε με ένα μαχαίρι τα κρεμμυδάκια , τις πιπεριές Φλωρίνης και τα βάζουμε στη σαλάτα, μαζί με τα δαχτυλίδια κρεμμυδιού, τις ελιές ξιδάτες ή τσακιστές και τα ψιλοκομμένα μυρωδικά.
Στο χυμό λεμονιού διαλύουμε με πιρούνι ή σύρμα το αλάτι.
Προσθέτουμε το πιπέρι και τη μουστάρδα και ανακατεύουμε.
Βάζουμε το ελαιόλαδο και χτυπάμε μέχρι να γίνει η σάλτσα σαν κρέμα.
Περιχύνουμε, ανακατεύουμε και σερβίρουμε αυτή τη φανταστική σαλάτα με γίγαντες!

name: Argyros Milk Pie
instructions: Βουτυρώνουμε και αλευρώνουμε ένα στρογγυλό ταψί διαμέτρου 30εκ ή μακρόστενο 23×35εκ.
Ανακατεύουμε σε ένα μπολ το αλεύρι με το σιμιγδάλι και το αφήνουμε στην άκρη.
Σε μια κατσαρόλα με χοντρή βάση βάζουμε το 1 λίτρο γάλα και κρατάμε το υπόλοιπο χωριστά.
Προσθέτουμε την ζάχαρη, την κανέλα, το ξύσμα, τη βανίλια και το αλάτι και το αφήνουμε να ζεσταθεί σε μέτρια φωτιά.
Σε ένα μπολ βάζουμε τα αυγά και τα ανακατεύουμε με το σύρμα.
Προσθέτουμε το υπόλοιπο γάλα, το αλεύρι και το σιμιγδάλι και συνεχίζουμε το ανακάτεμα.
Όταν ενωθούν τα υλικά παίρνουμε με κουτάλα από το καυτό γάλα κι ανακατεύουμε να ζεσταθεί το μίγμα των αυγών.
Προσθέτουμε κι άλλο ζεστό γάλα ανακατεύοντας πάντα και ρίχνουμε το αραιωμένο μίγμα στην κατσαρόλα με το γάλα.
Ανακατεύουμε με σύρμα για λίγα λεπτά μέχρι να πήξει η κρέμα και αποσύρουμε μόλις πάρει βράση.
Προσθέτουμε μέσα στην κρέμα το βούτυρο και ανακατεύουμε μέχρι να λιώσει.
Αδειάζουμε στο βουτυρωμένο ταψί.
Ισιώνουμε την επιφάνεια κουνώντας το ταψί.

name: Argyros Orange Liqueur With Cinnamon
original_name: Λικέρ πορτοκάλι με κανέλα της Αργυρώς
instructions: Πλένουμε πρώτα καλά τα πορτοκάλια και με κοφτερό μαχαίρι αφαιρούμε με προσοχή μόνο το εξωτερικό μέρος της φλούδας (μόνο το κίτρινο δηλαδή). Η φλούδα πρέπει να είναι όσο πιο λεπτή γίνεται. Εάν αφήσουμε το άσπρο μέρος θα πικρίσει το λικέρ πορτοκάλι!
Βάζουμε τις φλούδες σε μπολ. Τις πασπαλίζουμε με 2-3 κ.σ. από τη συνολική ζάχαρη και τις ζουλάμε με τα χέρια, να μαραθούν ελαφρώς.
Τις βάζουμε στο αποστειρωμένο βάζο και ρίχνουμε μέσα το κονιάκ και τη βότκα. Σφραγίζουμε το βάζο και το αφήνουμε να σταθεί κλειστό για 10 μέρες.
Βάζουμε το νερό και τη ζάχαρη σε μια κατσαρόλα κι ανακατεύουμε μέχρι να πάρει βράση. Βράζουμε για 2΄-3΄. Αφήνουμε το σιρόπι να κρυώσει και το προσθέτουμε κρύο στο βάζο με τις φλούδες.
Ρίχνουμε και την κανέλα. Σφραγίζουμε το βάζο και αφήνουμε το λικέρ να ωριμάσει για άλλη 1 εβδομάδα.
Σουρώνουμε το λικέρ σε τουλπάνι ή σε φίλτρο του καφέ. Το βάζουμε σε μπουκάλια και το σερβίρουμε παγωμένο.
Χρόνος ωρίμανσης: 3 εβδομάδες
Βρείτε εδώ όλες τις οδηγίες χρήσης για εσπεριδοειδή .

name: Aries Tea Blend
instructions: In a medium bowl, combine the black tea leaves, dried orange peel, and cinnamon. Mix well.
Store in an airtight container for up to 1 month.
To brew, steep 1-2 teaspoons of the tea blend in 8 ounces (240ml) of hot water for 5 minutes. Serve warm or over ice.
Enjoy!

name: Arkansas Fried Veggie Skillet

ingredients.prep: sliced into rings, or more to taste

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Whisk milk and egg together in a large bowl. Pour cornmeal into another large bowl.
Dip squash, potatoes, tomatoes, okra, onion, and green bell pepper into milk mixture; press vegetables into cornmeal to coat.
Heat bacon grease in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Cook and stir vegetable mixture in hot grease until golden and tender, 15 to 25 minutes. Season with salt and black pepper.

name: Armenian Stuffed Eggplant (imam Bayildi)

ingredients.item: Tomato sauce with no salt added

instructions: Preheat the oven to 232°C (230 degrees C).
Cut eggplants in half lengthwise, then cut each half into thirds, making 12 eggplant spears. Place on a baking sheet; brush with 2 tablespoons olive oil.
Cook in the preheated oven until fork-tender, 15 to 20 minutes. Reduce the oven temperature to 177°C (175 degrees C).

Meanwhile, heat remaining 2 tablespoons olive oil in a medium to large saucepan over medium heat. Add bell pepper, onion, and garlic: cook until onion becomes tender, 5 to 7 minutes. Stir in chopped tomatoes; cook until most of the liquid has evaporated, 2 to 3 minutes. Set aside to cool.
Remove eggplants from the oven; cool slightly, 5 to 10 minutes. Transfer eggplants to a 9x13-inch baking dish.

Slice each spear vertically using a knife and fork, being careful not to cut through the skin. Pry each pocket open; fill with 2 to 3 tablespoons tomato filling. Cover filled eggplant spears with tomato sauce.
Bake in the preheated oven until bubbling, about 30 minutes. Season with salt and black pepper; garnish with parsley.

name: Armenian-style Rice Pilaf

ingredients.item: (2 ounces; 57g) thin pasta (such as vermicelli or fine spaghetti)
ingredients.prep: broken into 1-inch pieces, or 1/2 cup of small, non-tubular pasta, like orzo

ingredients.item: Homemade or store-bought low-sodium chicken stock
Diamond crystal kosher salt; if using table salt use half as much by volume or same weight
Minced fresh parsley or dill (or a combination)

instructions: Place rice in a medium bowl and rinse with hot tap water until water runs clear, about 30 seconds. Cover rice completely with fresh hot tap water and set aside for 10 minutes. Drain rice thoroughly in a fine-mesh strainer; discard soaking water.

Melt butter in a 3-quart saucepan over medium heat. Add the pasta and cook, stirring regularly, until evenly golden brown, 4 to 6 minutes. Add rice and cook, stirring occasionally, until edges of rice begin to turn translucent, about 3 minutes. Add stock, salt, and pepper, increase heat to high, and bring to boil. Reduce heat to low, cover, and cook until liquid is absorbed, about 10 minutes.

Remove pan from heat, remove the lid, cover pot with a folded dish towel, and set lid back in place. Let sit for 10 minutes. Fluff rice with a fork, stir in half of parsley, if using, and transfer to a serving dish. Top with remaining parsley and serve.

name: Armenoville (ice Cream Cake)

ingredients.item: 500 mlκρέμα γάλακτος χτυπημένη σε παχύρρευστη μορφή
500 mlκρέμα γάλακτος χτυπημένη σε παχύρρευστη μορφή

instructions: Για την τούρτα παγωτό αρμενοβίλ, τοποθετούμε πρώτα τη φυτική σαντιγί σε μπολ και µε το μίξερ χειρός τη χτυπάμε για 5 με 6 λεπτά δυνατά, μέχρι να σχηματιστούν απαλές κορυφές.
Προσθέτουμε το ζαχαρούχο γάλα και τη βανίλια και συνεχίζουμε το χτύπημα για 3 με 4 λεπτά.
Τέλος προσθέτουμε την παχύρρευστη κρέμα γάλακτος και απαλά µε σπάτουλα ανακατεύουμε το µείγµα.
Προσθέτουμε την τριμμένη σοκολάτα, τα αμύγδαλα κροκάν και τους μπεζέδες σπασμένους.
Κρατάμε μερικά αμύγδαλα κροκάν και μερικούς μπεζέδες για το γαρνίρισμα.
Ανακατεύουμε καλά το μείγμα µε σπάτουλα.
Θα χρησιμοποιήσουμε φόρμα στρογγυλή 22 εκ. ή μακρόστενη του κέικ.
Ντύνουμε τη φόρμα µε μεμβράνη.
Αδειάζουμε το μείγμα.
Το παγώνουμε για µία νύχτα στην κατάψυξη.
Ξεφορμάρουμε, αναποδογυρίζουμε το αρµενοβίλ σε τουρτιέρα και αφαιρούμε τη μεμβράνη.
Γαρνίρουμε µε τα αμύγδαλα κροκάν (που κρατήσαµε) και τη λιωμένη σοκολάτα.
Γύρω γύρω στην πιατέλα τοποθετούμε σπασμένους μπεζέδες (µαρέγκες).

name: Arnie’s Gimlet Slush
instructions: Combine vodka, simple syrup, tea, and lime juice in a blender and freeze 3–12 hours (mixture will be partially frozen).
Add 2 cups ice to mixture and blend until thick and smooth. Divide among glasses and garnish with mint sprigs.

name: Aromatic Basil Oil With Garlic
instructions: Για να φτιάξουμε το αρωματικό λάδι βασιλικού με σκόρδο, πολύ σημαντικό είναι πρώτα να πλύνουμε και να στεγνώσουμε πολύ καλά το βασιλικό.
Τον ψιλοκόβουμε.
Θα χρειαστούμε αποστειρωμένο βάζο ή μπουκάλι με χοντρό λαιμό.
Ρίχνουμε μέσα το σκόρδο, τις πιπερίτσες, το βασιλικό και τα πιπέρια.
Στη συνέχεια καλύπτουμε με το ελαιόλαδο και σφραγίζουμε το μπουκάλι.
Το φυλάμε σε σκοτεινό και δροσερό μέρος ή και στο ψυγείο, για τουλάχιστον 2 εβδομάδες, να αρωματιστεί καλά.

name: Aromatic Gingerbread Recipe
original_name: Receta de pan de jengibre aromático

ingredients.item: 500 gr de harina de trigo común

instructions: Derrite la mantequilla y posteriormente se la vas a agregar a la melaza de caña y mezclarás muy bien. Reserva.
En un bol grande, añadirás la harina, el jengibre, la canela y el polvo de hornear, mezcla para que todo se integre.
Toma tu batidora y vas a batir los huevos junto a el azúcar hasta que obtengas una textura cremosa.

Haz una espacio en el medio de tus ingredientes secos, tipo volcán, para que agregues la melaza mezclada junto a la mantequilla, los huevos con el azúcar , el agua y la vainilla. Añade también las avellanas troceadas.
Con la ayuda de tu espátula, vas a mezclar todo los ingredientes muy bien. Tendrás una masa densa, pero un poco pegajosa, será normal, es la textura.
Precalienta tu horno a 180° grados centígrados.
Vierte tu mezcla en el molde previamente engrasado, le darás unos toquecitos para que todo se asiente.
Hornea por 45 minutos aproximadamente. Cuando termine el tiempo, harás la prueba del palillo. Si sale húmedo, lo debes dejar más minutos, de lo contrario estará más que listo.
Déjalo enfriar, para que rebanes y lo degustes.

name: Aromatic Orange Pudding
instructions: Leve ao lume 180 g do açúcar e deixe ferver, até obter um caramelo. Deite dentro de uma forma e caramelize-a. Reserve.
Coloque num tacho o tomilho, o leite e a raspa de laranja. Leve ao lume e deixe levantar fervura. Baixe o lume e deixe ferver por mais 2 minutos. Retire do lume e passe por um coador.
Numa tigela, bata os ovos e as gemas com o restante açúcar. Adicione o sumo de laranja e mexa bem. Por fim, junte o leite aromatizado e deite na forma caramelizada.
Coloque a forma no forno, pré-aquecido a 165ºC, em banho-maria, durante 1 hora. Deixe arrefecer totalmente antes de desenformar. Sirva fresco.

name: Aromatic Pork And Noodle Soup

ingredients.item: Chiles de árbol or  0.5 tsp. crushed red pepper flakes
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

ingredients.prep: fresh cilantro leaves with tender stems, thinly sliced scallions, chopped unsalted, roasted peanuts, and lime wedges (for serving)

instructions: Heat a dry large cast-iron skillet over medium-high. Cook onion, cut side down, until lightly charred, about 5 minutes; transfer to a plate.

Add chiles (if using crushed red pepper flakes, add with fennel seeds), garlic, cinnamon stick, and star anise to skillet and cook, stirring, until fragrant, about 1 minute. Add fennel seeds and cook, stirring, until fragrant, about 20 seconds (do not burn). Quickly transfer to a large saucepan (reserve skillet) and add onion, ginger, and broth; bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer until broth is flavorful.

Meanwhile, heat oil in reserved skillet over medium-high heat. Season pork with salt and pepper and cook until browned and cooked through, about 4 minutes per side. Transfer to a cutting board and let rest 5 minutes before thinly slicing.
Cook noodles according to package directions. Divide among bowls; add pork. Strain broth and ladle into bowls. Top soup with bean sprouts, cilantro, scallions, and peanuts and serve with lime wedges.

name: Aromatic Puff Pastry Tart With Pumpkin And Carrot
original_name: Αρωματική τάρτα σφολιάτας με κολοκύθι και καρότο
instructions: Πλένουμε και στεγνώνουμε τα λαχανικά.
Χρησιμοποιώντας τον αποφλοιωτή (πίλερ) ή το μαντολίνο, κόβουμε σε πολύ λεπτές σχεδόν διάφανες– μακρόστενες φέτες το κολοκύθι και το καρότο.
Ρίχνουμε τις λεπτές φέτες των λαχανικών σε ένα μπολ, προσθέτουμε το ξύσμα και το χυμό λεμονιού, το ελαιόλαδο, το σκόρδο, λίγο αλάτι και πιπέρι και ανακατεύουμε να λαδωθούν καλά.
Τα αφήνουμε να μαριναριστούν όσο ετοιμάζουμε τη βάση της τάρτας .
Ανακατεύουμε σε ένα μπολ το τυρί κρέμα (ή το ανθότυρο), με τη φέτα, το γιαούρτι, τον κρόκο, το δυόσμο και λίγο πιπέρι μέχρι να αποκτήσουμε ένα μείγμα με κρεμώδη υφή.
Απλώνουμε το φύλλο σφολιάτας σε ένα ρηχό ταψί στρωμένο με αντικολλητικό χαρτί. Με μαχαίρι χαράζουμε ένα πλαίσιο 2½ εκ., ώστε να δημιουργήσουμε μια μπορντούρα περιμετρικά του φύλλου.
Απλώνουμε με ένα κουτάλι στη βάση της σφολιάτας το μείγμα του τυριού σε λεπτή στρώση αφήνοντας κενό το πλαίσιο που χαράξαμε.
Αλείφουμε την περίμετρο της σφολιάτας με το ασπράδι του αυγού.
Αραδιάζουμε από πάνω τα λαχανικά σε μία στρώση καλύπτοντας πλήρως το μείγμα του τυριού.
Ψήνουμε την τάρτα σε καλά προθερμασμένο φούρνο, στους 200°C, στον αέρα, στη μεσαία σχάρα, για 10 λεπτά.

Χαμηλώνου με τη θερμοκρασία στους 180°C, πασπαλίζουμε την επιφάνεια της τάρτας με κεφαλογραβιέρα και συνεχίζουμε το ψήσιμο για 25 λεπτά ακόμα μέχρι να φουσκώσει περιμετρικά η σφολιάτα και να ροδίσει ομοιόμορφα.
Αραιώνουμε το πέστο με λίγες σταγόνες ελαιόλαδου και λίγες σταγόνες χυμό λεμονιού ώστε να γίνει πιο ρευστό και ραντίζουμε την τάρτα.
Την αφήνουμε να σταθεί 5 λεπτά και να πέσει η θερμοκρασία της και στη συνέχεια την κόβουμε και σερβίρουμε.

name: Aromatic Red Rice
instructions: In a small saucepan, bring rice, a pinch of salt, and 2 cups water to a boil.
Stick cloves into onion halves and add to pot along with chile.
Cover, reduce heat to a simmer, and cook until rice is tender, 30–40 minutes.
Let stand off heat, covered, 5 minutes.
Fluff with a fork before serving.

name: Aromatic Rice Pilaf

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt
Chopped tender herbs (such as parsley or cilantro) and lemon wedges

instructions: Whisk together 2 tsp. store-bought fried onions, 1 tsp. ground cumin, ½ tsp. ground cinnamon, ⅛ tsp. ground cardamom, and ⅛ tsp. ground cloves in a small bowl.

Melt 3 Tbsp. unsalted butter in a medium saucepan over medium heat. Add seasoning blend and cook, stirring often, until fragrant, about 1 minute. Add 1 cup jasmine rice, rinsed until water runs clear, and cook, stirring often and reducing heat if needed to keep spices from scorching, until grains are coated and opaque around the edges, about 2 minutes.

Pour in 1½ cups water and add 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt; stir to combine. Increase heat to medium-high and bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and cover saucepan with a tight-fitting lid. Cook until water is completely absorbed and rice is tender, 15–18 minutes. Remove pot from heat and let rice sit (still covered) 5–10 minutes.
Uncover rice and fluff gently with a fork. Transfer pilaf to a platter and top with chopped tender herbs (such as parsley or cilantro) if desired. Serve with lemon wedges if desired.

name: Aromatic Shrimp And Noodle Medicine Soup

ingredients.prep: tough outer layer removed, lightly smashed
tough outer layer removed, finely chopped

ingredients.item: Fresh tender herbs (such as thai basil

instructions: Toast cloves, cardamom, star anise, chiles, cinnamon, and peppercorns in a large pot over medium heat, tossing often, until fragrant, about 2 minutes. Add cilantro, shallots, garlic, lemongrass, ginger, broth, and fish sauce and bring to a boil. Reduce heat; simmer until flavors meld, 1–1 ½ hours. Strain into a large bowl, pressing on solids. Return broth to pot; season with salt and pepper.

Pulse cashews in a food processor until very finely ground. Add shallot, chile, lemongrass, ginger, brown sugar, and shrimp paste; process until smooth. Heat oil in a small skillet over medium and cook paste, stirring, until beginning to brown, about 2 minutes.

Cook noodles according to package directions. Drain; rinse under cold water. Bring broth to a simmer, add shrimp, and cook until cooked through, about 2 minutes. Divide noodles among bowls. Add 2 Tbsp. paste to each and ladle broth over; stir to incorporate paste. Top with shrimp, sprouts, scallions, and herbs; season with pepper. Serve with chili oil and lime wedges alongside.

name: Aromatic White Rice

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Heat 3 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in a heavy medium saucepan over medium. Add 1 medium onion, finely chopped, 3 garlic cloves, finely chopped, and 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt. Cook, stirring often, until onion is softened, 5–7 minutes. Add 1 bay leaf and 3 cups long-grain white rice, rinsed; cook, stirring, until grains are coated in oil, about 30 seconds.

Pour in 4½ cups low-sodium chicken broth and stir once. Bring to a boil, then cover and reduce heat to low. Cook until rice is tender and liquid is absorbed, 15–20 minutes. Remove from heat, uncover, and let sit to allow excess moisture to evaporate, 5–10 minutes.
Fluff rice with a fork; pluck out and discard bay leaf. Transfer to a shallow bowl to serve.

name: Aromatic Wilted Greens With Coconut Milk

ingredients.prep: ribs and stems removed, leaves torn
ribs and stems removed, leaves sliced 1-inch thick

instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium. Cook garlic, stirring, until golden brown, about 3 minutes. Add shallots, chile, ginger, and two-thirds of scallions. Season with salt; cook, stirring often, until softened, about 5 minutes. Add kale and collard greens a handful at a time, letting them wilt slightly before adding more. Cook, tossing occasionally, until greens are crisp-tender, 6–8 minutes. Add half of coconut milk and toss to coat.
Transfer greens to a serving bowl and top with remaining coconut milk and scallions. Serve with lime wedges.

name: Arouca Ball
instructions: Numa tigela, dissolva o fermento no leite morno. Adicione 3 colheres (sopa) bem cheias da farinha e misture. Deixe levedar, em local temperado, durante 15 minutos.
De seguida, acrescente a restante farinha, o açúcar, uma pitada de sal fino e os ovos e amasse tudo muito bem. Junte a manteiga amolecida e amasse novamente muito bem.
Divida a massa em duas partes iguais, molde-as em dois rolos e entrelace-os, dando no final o formato de coroa.
Disponha a coroa de massa numa forma redonda, previamente untada com manteiga, e deixe levedar até dobrar de volume.

Nessa altura, dissolva um pouco de açúcar na água e pincele a coroa com esta mistura. Polvilhe com açúcar em pó e leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 180ºC, durante cerca de 30 a 40 minutos. Retire, deixe arrefecer um pouco, desenforme e sirva.

name: Arouca Chestnuts

ingredients.item: 250 g  miolo de amêndoa em pó

instructions: Leve ao lume o açúcar com a água, até obter ponto de pérola. Numa tigela, mexa as gemas e depois adicione a calda anterior, em fio e mexendo sempre. Junte a amêndoa e misture.
Transfira tudo para o tacho e leve a lume brando até engrossar, sem deixar ferver. Retire e deixe arrefecer.
Molde depois as castanhas com a ajuda de farinha e deixe arrefecer totalmente. Pincele-as com a gema batida e queime a superfície com um maçarico de cozinha ou leve-as ao forno.

Ponto de pérola Encha uma colher com a calda e, lentamente, despeje-a para um recipiente. Se, ao cair, formar um fio um tanto resistente e, na sua extremidade, aparecer uma bolinha, a calda atingiu o ponto de pérola.

name: Arrabiata Sauce Recipe
instructions: Calienta el aceite de oliva en una olla mediana a fuego medio-alto. Agrega las cebolla y saltea por 3 minutos. Agrega el ajo y saltea por 30 segundos más.
Baja la flama a fuego medio y agrega los tomates picados, la pasta de tomate, el caldo de pollo, albahaca, perejil, las hojuelas de chile y la sal.
Deja hervir a fuego lento hasta que reduzca ligeramente, cerca de 10 minutos. Revuelve los ingredientes ocasionalmente.
Licúa hasta que los ingredientes se incorporen de forma uniforme y en la consistencia que deseas.
Prueba y sazona con más sal si es necesario.
Deja que enfríe por completo antes de vaciar la salsa arrabiata en un contenedor hermético para guardar en el refrigerador.

name: Arrachera (mexican Skirt Steak For Tacos)
instructions: Place a single layer of steak in a shallow casserole dish. Sprinkle a portion of lime juice, sazón, and adobo seasoning. Top with chopped onion pieces. Repeat layers until all pieces of steak are seasoned. Pour beer over the mixture. Cover and refrigerate for at least 1 hour, and up to 24 hours.
Preheat a grill to medium-high.
Discard marinade. Grill steak until lightly charred on the outside but still slightly tender in the center for medium doneness, 6 to 7 minutes per side.

name: Arroz Chaufa, Chinese Peruvian Rice
original_name: Arroz chaufa, el arroz peruano chino

ingredients.item: 300 g de arroz de grano largo
400 g de pechuga de pollo (o contramuslo deshuesado, si lo prefieres más jugoso)
2 dientes de ajo (o 1 cucharada de ajo en pasta)
1 trozo pequeño de jengibre fresco (unos 3–4 cm)
3 cucharadas de salsa de soja oscura
1 cucharada de salsa de soja clara (opcional, para ajustar color)
2 cebollas tiernas (parte blanca y verde separadas)
½ pimiento rojo, cortado en cubitos pequeños
Aceite de girasol o de oliva suave
Unas gotas de aceite de sésamo (opcional)

instructions: Cocemos el arroz con el agua durante unos 15–18 minutos, sin pasarnos, para que quede suelto. No añadimos sal, ya que la salsa de soja aportará el punto salado. Una vez cocido, lo extendemos en una bandeja y lo dejamos enfriar por completo para que los granos se separen bien.
Mientras el arroz se enfría, rallamos el jengibre y lo exprimimos con una gasa o colador para obtener su zumo. Reservamos.

Cortamos el pollo en tiras y después en cubos de unos 2–3 cm. Lo aderezamos con el ajo, 1 cucharada de salsa de soja oscura, pimienta, comino (si usamos) y cinco especias chinas. Mezclamos bien y dejamos reposar entre 15 y 20 minutos.
Picamos la parte blanca de la cebolla tierna en cubitos pequeños y la parte verde en rodajas finas. Cortamos también el pimiento rojo en cubitos pequeños y lo reservamos.
Batimos los huevos y hacemos una tortilla fina en una sartén con un poco de aceite. La retiramos, dejamos que se enfríe y la cortamos en dados pequeños.
Calentamos bien una sartén amplia o wok. Añadimos aceite y salteamos el pollo a fuego alto durante unos 4 minutos, hasta que esté bien dorado. Lo retiramos y reservamos junto con sus jugos.

En la misma sartén añadimos un poco más de aceite y salteamos la parte blanca de la cebolla tierna durante menos de un minuto, sin que se queme. Incorporamos el ajo y el pimiento rojo y salteamos un minuto más.

Añadimos el arroz frío y mezclamos con cuidado. Agregamos el resto de la salsa de soja, la salsa de ostras y el azúcar. Subimos el fuego y salteamos hasta que el arroz pierda el color blanco y quede bien impregnado, pero suelto.
Incorporamos el pollo reservado con sus jugos, la tortilla de huevo en cubitos y el zumo de jengibre. Mezclamos bien para integrar todos los sabores.
Apagamos el fuego y añadimos la parte verde de la cebolla tierna y unas gotas de aceite de sésamo, solo para aromatizar.
Servimos el arroz chaufa de pollo recién hecho, bien caliente y con los granos sueltos.

name: Arroz Con Gandules

ingredients.item: Sazón with culantro and achiote seasoning

instructions: To the bowl of a food processor, add the cilantro, culantro, onion, red and green bell peppers and garlic. Pulse until combined. Add the cumin and oregano and pulse a few more times to incorporate. The sofrito should have the consistency of a tapenade.

Heat ¼ cup of canola oil in a large pan over medium-high heat. When the oil is shimmering, add the sofrito and fry, stirring constantly, until deepened in color but not brown, about 3 minutes. Add the olives, tomato sauce, adobo seasoning, Sazón seasoning, pigeon peas, and water, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then add the rice. Cook for 15–20 minutes, until the liquid is fully evaporated and the rice around the edges of the pot looks dry.
Stir, then reduce the heat to low, cover, and cook the rice for another 30 minutes, stirring every 10 minutes, until the rice is tender and fluffy.
Serve the arroz con gandules warm alongside dishes of your choice.
Enjoy!

name: Arroz Con Gandules (rice With Pigeon Peas)

ingredients.prep: seeds removed, coarsely chopped (about 1 cup), or 1 medium green bell pepper, ribs and seeds removed, coarsely chopped
ribs and seeds removed, coarsely chopped (about 1 cup)

ingredients.item: Homemade chicken stock or low-sodium chicken broth
-oz. packets sazón con culantro y achiote
. diamond crystal or 2 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Purée tomatoes, onion, Cubanelle peppers, bell pepper, cilantro, and garlic in a food processor until smooth. Scoop out ½ cup sofrito and set aside. Reserve remaining sofrito for another use (you can use it for the pernil).
Do Ahead: Sofrito can be made 3 days ahead. Transfer to an airtight container, cover, and chill, or freeze up to 3 months.
Bring ham hock and stock to a simmer in a medium saucepan over medium-low heat, cover, and cook until ham hock is tender, at least 1 hour or up to 2.

Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium-high. Cook reserved 1 cup sofrito, stirring occasionally, until beginning to brown and most of the liquid is evaporated, 5–8 minutes. Add Sazón, salt, and pepper and cook, stirring, until fragrant, about 1 minute. Add rice and olives, pimientos, and capers and cook, stirring often, until some grains are translucent, about 3 minutes. Add ham hock and stock (you should have 3 cups; if not, add water or more stock to get you there). Scatter pigeon peas over. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to medium-low. Cover saucepan and simmer until rice is tender and liquid is absorbed, 20–30 minutes.
Remove pan from heat, transfer ham hock to a plate, and fluff rice with a fork. Cover pan and let sit 15 minutes. Shred meat from ham hock, cover loosely, and let sit until ready to serve.
Transfer rice to a platter. Top with reserved ham hock and cilantro.

name: Arroz Con Leche With Candied Mango
instructions: Combine the water, rice, and cinnamon sticks in a pot over medium-high heat. Bring to a boil, uncovered, and cook until the rice is tender (about 18 minutes).
Add more water to achieve the correct texture for slightly overcooked rice.
Strain the liquid (save it for adjustments at the end) and discard the cinnamon.
Return the rice to the pot and stir in the whole milk, Bring to boil, then reduce the heat to
a simmer.  Add condensed and evaporated milk.
Cook uncovered, stirring constantly, until the mixture is thick, about 20 minutes. Remove from heat and serve.
For candied mango, bring all the ingredients to a boil in a saucepan.
Blend with an immersion blender, then pour over the finished rice.

name: Arroz Congri

ingredients.item: 80 gr yeşil biber, küp küp doğranmış
80 gr kırmızı biber, küp küp doğranmış
200 gr soğan, küçük küpler halinde doğranmış

instructions: 1. Basmati pirinç yıkanır, ıslatılır.
2.  Tencere orta ateşte ısıtılır.
3.  Soğan ve biber sotelenir.
4. Pirinç süzülerek tencereye alınır.
5.  Baharatlar eklenir ve su eklenerek pişmeye bırakılır.
6. Pirinç suyun yarısını çektiğinde konserve fasulye yıkanır, süzülür ve tencereye eklenerek pişmeye bırakılır.
7.  Piştikten sonra 10 dakika dinlendirilir ve servis edilir.
8.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Arroz Verde With Spiced Mushrooms

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  1 0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: shiitake, maitake, and/or crimini), torn into various sizes

instructions: Cut 1 lime in half; squeeze juice into a blender. Add 2 medium jalapeños, stems removed, 5 garlic cloves, 2 cups (packed) cilantro leaves with tender stems, ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and ½ cup water and blend until smooth. Transfer 2 Tbsp. cilantro purée to a small bowl; set aside.

Place 3 Tbsp. cilantro purée in a medium bowl; finely grate in zest of 1 lime. Cut lime in half; squeeze in juice. Mix in ½ cup sour cream, 2 Tbsp. mayonnaise, and ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt. Cover herb sauce and chill until ready to serve.
Place 1½ cups jasmine or other long-grain rice in a medium bowl. Pour in cold water to cover and swish vigorously with your hands; drain. Repeat process until water runs clear (3–5 more times).

Heat 2 Tbsp. vegetable oil in a large Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium-high. Add rice and ½ tsp. ground cumin and cook, stirring, until rice is coated in oil, about 30 seconds. Add 1½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¾ tsp. Morton kosher salt, remaining cilantro purée in blender, and 2¼ cups water; stir to combine. Bring to a boil. As soon as bubbles appear along sides, reduce heat to low and cover; cook 15 minutes. Remove pot from heat; let rice sit (still covered) 15 minutes.

Meanwhile, heat 2 Tbsp. vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high. Add ¾ lb. mixed mushrooms (such as oyster, shiitake, maitake, and/or crimini), torn into various sizes, and spread out in a single layer. Cook until golden, about 3 minutes per side. Transfer to a medium bowl. Add 1 Tbsp. vegetable oil to pan and cook remaining ¾ lb. mixed mushrooms until nearly golden, about 3 minutes per side.

Return all mushrooms to pan; reduce heat to low. Scoot mushrooms to one side and add remaining 1 Tbsp. vegetable oil, then 1 tsp. paprika, remaining 1 tsp. ground cumin, and ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt to empty side of skillet; season with freshly ground pepper. Give spices a quick stir to combine, then toss mushrooms to coat in spiced oil. Remove from heat.

Cut remaining 1 lime into wedges. Gently mix reserved 2 Tbsp. cilantro purée into rice with a fork; fluff rice. Transfer to a platter and top with mushrooms. Drizzle some reserved herb sauce over (if it has thickened, stir in 1 Tbsp. cold water to loosen) and top with cilantro leaves with tender stems. Serve with lime wedges and remaining sauce.

name: Art Of Choke Cocktail
instructions: Muddle one of the mint sprigs with the liquid ingredients in a mixing glass. Add ice and stir until chilled, about 15 seconds. Strain into a rocks glass filled with ice. Garnish with the remaining mint sprig.

name: Artichoke And Feta Tarts

ingredients.item: -ounce (1 sheet) or 17.3-ounce (2 sheets) package frozen puff pastry

instructions: Preheat oven to 425°. Blend cream and 2 ounces feta in a food processor until smooth; season with salt and pepper.

If using 14-ounce package of puff pastry, cut in half and roll out each half on a lightly floured surface into a 16x10-inch rectangle. (If using 17.3-ounce package, use 1 sheet of pastry for each tart.) Transfer each piece of pastry to a parchment-lined baking sheet. Using a paring knife, lightly score pastry (do not cut all the way through), leaving a 1-inch border.

Spread feta mixture over pastry, dividing evenly and staying within border. Arrange artichoke hearts over feta mixture and crumble remaining 2 ounces feta over; drizzle with oil. Brush pastry border with egg.

Bake tart until pastry is puffed and beginning to brown, 10-15 minutes. Reduce oven temperature to 375° and continue to bake until pastry is deep golden brown and cooked through, 20-25 minutes longer. Serve warm or at room temperature.
DO AHEAD: Tart can be made 2 hours ahead. Let stand at room temperature.

name: Artichoke And Mushroom Risotto Recipe
original_name: Receta de risotto de alcachofas y setas

ingredients.item: 3 cdas de aceite de oliva (virgen extra)

instructions: Limpia las alcachofas retirando las hojas exteriores más duras y corta las puntas. Corta las alcachofas en cuartos y sumérgelas en agua con zumo de limón para evitar que se oxiden.
En una sartén grande, calienta una cucharada de aceite de oliva y saltea las alcachofas a fuego medio hasta que estén tiernas y doradas. Retíralas y reserva.

Limpia y corta las setas en trozos medianos. En la misma sartén, añade otra cucharada de aceite de oliva y saltea las setas con un poco de sal hasta que estén doradas y hayan soltado su agua. Reserva junto con las alcachofas.

En una cacerola grande, calienta el resto del aceite de oliva y añade la cebolla picada. Cocina a fuego medio hasta que esté transparente, luego añade el ajo y cocina por un minuto más. Agrega el arroz y remueve durante un par de minutos hasta que esté ligeramente tostado.
Vierte el vino blanco y cocina a fuego medio-alto hasta que el alcohol se haya evaporado y el líquido se haya reducido.

Añade un cucharón de caldo caliente al arroz y remueve constantemente. A medida que el arroz absorba el caldo, sigue añadiendo más, un cucharón a la vez, hasta que el arroz esté cocido al dente. Este proceso debería durar unos 18-20 minutos.

Una vez que el arroz esté cocido, retira del fuego y añade la mantequilla y el queso parmesano rallado. Remueve bien hasta que todo esté bien integrado y el risotto tenga una consistencia cremosa. Añade las alcachofas y las setas reservadas y mezcla suavemente.
Sirve el risotto en platos individuales, decorando con un poco de perejil fresco picado.

name: Artichoke And Salmon Salad
instructions: Mix cream cheese, parsley, lemon, and Greek seasoning together in a bowl; fold in salmon and artichoke hearts.

name: Artichoke Dish With Olive Oil
instructions: 1. Enginarların alt kısımlarından 5 cm bırakarak kesin.
2.  Yaprak kısımlarını da 5 cm bırakarak kesin.
3. Çanak yaprakları 1 cm bırakarak kesin.
4.  Saplarını körpe kısmına kadar kesin.
5.  Ortasındaki tüylü kısmı kaşıkla temizleyin.
6. Temizlenmiş enginarları limonla ovun.
7.  Bir miktar suya 1 limonun suyu ve un ilave edip karıştırın.
8.  Enginarları kararmamaları için bu karışımda bekletin.
9. Havuçları temizleyip dörder parça halinde kesin.
10.  Verev şekilde doğrayın.
11.  Arpacık soğanları soyun.
12. Patatesleri soyup küp şeklinde doğrayın.
13.  Enginarların çukur kısımları üste gelecek şekilde tencereye dizin.
14.  Ortasına havuç, soğan ve dereotunu ilave edin.
15. Zeytinyağı, tuz, şeker, yarım limonun suyu ve 1 bardak suyu ekleyin.
16.  Üzerini yağlı kağıtla kapatıp orta ateşte 15 dakika pişirin.
17. Patatesleri ilave edip 10 dakika daha pişirin.
18.  Ocaktan alıp soğumaya bırakın.
19. Enginarları servis tabağına yerleştirin.
20.  Tencerede kalan suyu üzerine gezdirerek döküp servis yapın.

name: Artichoke Florentine Pasta

ingredients.item: Campbell’s flavorup!™ caramelized onion & burgundy wine cooking concentrate

ingredients.prep: plus 2 tablespoons, divided, plus more for garnish
cooked according to package instructions, drained

instructions: In a medium bowl, combine ¼ cup (10 g) spinach, the parsley, Campbell’s FlavorUp!™ Caramelized Onion & Burgundy Wine Cooking Concentrate, 2 tablespoons of Parmesan cheese, the garlic, lemon juice, black pepper, red pepper flakes, 2 tablespoons of olive oil, and the crème fraîche. Stir until smooth and light in color.
In a medium saucepan over medium heat, sauté the remaining 1½ cups (60 g) of spinach until wilted, 1–2 minutes. Remove the spinach from the pan.

Heat the remaining ¼ cup (60 ml) olive oil in the same pan over medium-high heat until shimmering. Add ½ cup (85 g) of the artichoke hearts and fry until golden brown, 3–5 minutes. Transfer to a paper towel-lined plate to drain.
To the same pan, add the cooked pasta, remaining ¼ cup Parmesan cheese, remaining ½ cup artichoke hearts, the sautéed spinach, and the sauce and toss until well-combined.
Divide the pasta among serving bowls and garnish with the fried artichoke hearts and more Parmesan cheese.
Enjoy!

name: Artichoke Heart Salad Recipe
instructions: 1. Enginar kalplerini haşlanmış şekilde kullanacaksanız, süzün ve soğumaya bırakın.
2.  Konserve enginar kullanıyorsanız fazla suyunu süzdürün.
3. Enginarları iri küpler halinde doğrayın ve geniş bir salata kasesine alın.
4. Rokaları yıkayıp kurulayın, iri parçalar halinde doğrayarak ekleyin.
5. İnce dilimlenmiş kırmızı soğanı, ikiye bölünmüş cherry domatesleri ve haşlanmış mısırı kasenin içine ilave edin.
6. Küçük bir kapta zeytinyağı, limon suyu, tuz, karabiber ve nar ekşisini karıştırın.
7. Hazırladığınız sosu salatanın üzerine gezdirin ve tüm malzemeleri nazikçe harmanlayın ve servis edin.

name: Artichoke Leaf Soup With Walnuts
instructions: 1. Enginarların dış kalın yapraklarını ortasındaki açık ve en ince yapraklara kadar temizleyin.
2.  Uç kısmını 2 parmak kalınlığında kesip atarak 4 parçaya bölün ve ortasındaki tüylü kısımları temizleyin.
3.  Tencereye zeytinyağı ilave edip soğan ve sarımsağı soteleyin.
4.  Enginar ve yaprakları da zencefille birlikte soteleyin.
5.  Un ekleyip sotelemeye devam edin.
6.  Daha sonra su ilave ederek kaynamaya bırakın.
7.  Kaynadıktan sonra blender’dan geçirerek süzün.
8.  Tekrar tencereye alınıp krema ekleyin.
9.  Biraz daha kaynadıktan sonra ufalanmış cevizleri ekleyerek servis yapın.
10.   Ekmek kızartma makinesinde parmesan ve fesleğen ile kızartılmış ekmek ile servis yapın.

name: Artichoke Meatballs With Bechamel Sauce
instructions: 1. Enginarların kabuklarını soyup limonlu suda bekletin.
2.  Suyu tencereye alıp kaynatın.
3.  Tuz ekleyin.
4.  Enginarları kaynar suda yumuşayıncaya kadar pişirin.
5.  Çatalla ezip püre haline getirin.
6.  Sos için tereyağını bir tavada eritin.
7.  Unu ilave edip 3 dakika karıştırarak kavurun.
8.  Sütü ilave edin.
9.  Enginar püresi, rendelenmiş kaşar peyniri, tuz, karabiber ve kıyılmış maydanozu ekleyip karıştırın.
10.  Karışımı yağlanmış tepsiye bir cm kalınlığında yayıp soğumaya bırakın.
11.  Köfteleri istediğiniz şekilde hazırlayın.
12.  Yumurtaları bir kapta çırpın.
13.  Enginar köftelerini sırasıyla un, yumurta ve galeta ununa bulayın.
14.  Zeytinyağında kızartın.
15.  Beşamel sosla birlikte servis yapın.

name: Artichoke Omelet Recipe, For A Good Breakfast
original_name: Receta de tortilla de alcachofas, para un buen desayuno

ingredients.item: 120 gr de jamón cocido  (elige el tipo que prefieras)

instructions: Antes de preparar la tortilla, lo que debes hacer será limpiar y preparar las alcachofas. Para ello, con un cuchillo extrae las primera hojas de la alcachofa y pela el tallo hasta llegar al corazón del vegetal que es la parte más blanda e ideal para nuestra receta.
Una vez peladas las alcachofas, vamos a agregarle un poco de limón para que no se oxiden, ya que tienden a amargarse y ponerse oscura.
Procedemos a cortar el ajo y la cebolla en cuadritos.
Ahora vamos con el jamón córtalo en cuadros pequeños o láminas delgadas.
Pon a calentar un sartén y agrega aceite de oliva, sofríe el ajo y la cebolla.
Cuando estén transparentes, añade el jamón y mezcla muy bien.
Tomamos nuestras alcachofas y la vamos a cortar el finas láminas. Las agregaremos al sartén y vamos a mezclar muy bien hasta integrar. Deja cocinar por 3 minutos.
En un tazón, rompe los huevos y bate bien con un poco de sal y pimienta al gusto.
Incorpora los huevos batidos. Baja la intensidad del fuego y deja cuajar tu tortilla.
Cuando esté cocida por un lado la volteas con una espátula o tapa y deja cocinar bien.
Apaga el fuego, retira la tortilla del sartén y sirve en un plato.
¡Degusta!

name: Artichoke Paste
instructions: 1. Enginarları kaynar suda yumuşayıncaya kadar haşlayın.
2.  Suyunu süzün.
3.  Sarımsakların kabuğunu soyun.
4.  Enginar, sarımsak ve kimyonu ezerek püre haline getirin.
5.  Azar azar Sızma zeytinyağı ekleyip karıştırmaya devam edin.
6.  Tuzla tatlandırın.
7.  Ezmenin ��zerini streç folyoyla kapatıp buzdolabında 1 saat bekletin.
8.  Servis yapmadan önce üzerine çok az sızma zeytinyağı gezdirip taze çekilmiş karabiber serpin.
9.  Sıcak pide veya ekmek dilimleriyle servis yapın.

name: Artichoke Pâté Recipe

ingredients.item: 200 gr de corazones de alcachofa (frescos o en conserva)
2 cdas de aceite de oliva extra virgen
1 cda de jugo de limón fresco
50 gr de crema de leche o yogur griego natural
Pimentón dulce o picante para decorar (opcional)

instructions: Preparar las alcachofas: si usas frescas, limpia y retira las hojas duras, corta las puntas y hierve los corazones en agua con sal durante 15-20 minutos. Si usas en conserva, escúrrelas bien.
Pelar y picar los dientes de ajo.
Calienta el aceite de oliva en una sartén y sofríe ligeramente el ajo hasta dorarlo, sin quemarlo.
En un procesador, agrega las alcachofas, el ajo sofrito, el queso parmesano, las nueces y el jugo de limón. Procesa hasta lograr una pasta homogénea.
Añade la crema de leche o yogur griego y vuelve a procesar hasta obtener textura cremosa.
Ajusta la sal y la pimienta al gusto y coloca en un bol, decora con pimentón y perejil fresco.
Refrigera mínimo 30 minutos antes de servir.

name: Artichoke Pâté Recipe With Lemon
original_name: Receta de paté de alcachofas con limón

ingredients.item: 4  corazones de alcachofa cocidos (frescos, unos 240 g)
1 cda de jugo de limón recién exprimido
1 cdita de ralladura fina de limón
1 ½ cda  de aceite de oliva extra virgen
1 cda de almendras tostadas o anacardos naturales
2 cdas de queso crema o yogur griego natural (opcional para textura más suave)
Pimienta negra recién molida al gusto
3  hojas de albahaca fresca o perejil

instructions: Si utilizas alcachofas frescas, límpialas retirando hojas duras, corta las puntas y cuécelas en agua con sal y unas gotas de limón durante 20 a 25 minutos hasta que estén tiernas. Escúrrelas muy bien y deja enfriar.
Si usas alcachofas en conserva, enjuágalas ligeramente para eliminar excesos y sécalas con papel absorbente.
Coloca los corazones de alcachofa en el vaso de la licuadora o procesador de alimentos.
Añade el jugo y la ralladura de limón, el aceite de oliva, el ajo, las almendras tostadas y el queso crema o yogur si decides usarlo.
Incorpora la sal, pimienta y las hierbas frescas.
Procesa durante 1 a 2 minutos hasta obtener una textura cremosa y homogénea. Si queda muy espeso, agrega una cucharadita adicional de aceite de oliva o una cucharada de agua fría.
Prueba y ajusta acidez, sal o especias según tu preferencia.
Refrigera al menos 20 minutos antes de servir para que los sabores se integren mejor.

name: Artichoke Recipe With Olive Oil

ingredients.item: Hafif tat için sadece zeytinyağı kullanılabilir
Farklı aroma katmak için az miktarda tereyağı eklenebilir

instructions: 1. Enginarların sap kısımlarını kesin, dış yapraklarını ayıklayın ve limonlu suda bekletin.
2.  İç kısımdaki tüyleri temizleyin.
3. Tencereye zeytinyağını ekleyin ve ince doğranmış soğanı hafifçe kavurun.
4.  Havuç ve bezelyeyi ekleyip birkaç dakika soteleyin.
5. Enginarları tencereye yerleştirin, tuz, şeker ve limon suyunu ekleyin.
6.  Sıcak suyu gezdirip tencerenin kapağını kapatın.
7. Kısık ateşte yaklaşık 25–30 dakika enginarlar yumuşayana kadar pişirin.
8. Oda sıcaklığına geldikten sonra üzerine ince kıyılmış dereotu veya maydanoz serpiştirip servis edin.
9.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Artichoke Rice
instructions: 1. Pirinci tuz ilave ettiğiniz sıcak suda 2 saat bekletin.
2. Soğanları doğrayıp zeytinyağında soteleyin.
3.  Erikleri ve enginar kalplerini ilave edip bir kaç dakika daha soteleyip yarım limon suyunu ekleyin.
4. Pirinci ilave edip karıştırarak kavurun.
5.  Bir su bardağı suyu ekleyin.
6.  Üzerini kapatıp pilav suyu çekinceye kadar kısık ateşte pişirip ocağın altını kapatın.
7.  10 dakika demlenmeye bırakıp ılık servis yapın.
8. Lezzetli ve pratik patlıcanlı pilav tarifine de göz atın.
9. Dilerseniz, mevsimine göre erik turşusu veya enginarla da bu pilavı yapabilirsiniz.

name: Artichoke Rice Recipe

ingredients.item: 3 su bardağı sıcak su veya sebze suyu
Taze enginar yerine konserve veya dondurulmuş enginar kalpleri kullanılabilir. bu durumda enginarlar doğrudan pilava eklenebilir.
Pirincin yerine aynı ölçüde bulgur kullanılarak farklı bir pilav hazırlanabilir.
Dereotu yerine ince kıyılmış maydanoz veya taze nane eklenebilir.
Zeytinyağı yerine tereyağı kullanılabilir ya da yarı yarıya zeytinyağı ve tereyağı tercih edilebilir.
Pilava farklı bir aroma katmak için içine 1 çay bardağı bezelye veya küçük doğranmış havuç eklenebilir.
Sebze suyu yerine tavuk suyu kullanılarak pilava daha yoğun bir lezzet kazandırılabilir.
Daha zengin bir tat için pilava birkaç yemek kaşığı kavrulmuş badem veya fıstık eklenebilir.
Limon suyu yerine pilava bir tutam limon kabuğu rendesi eklenerek ferah bir aroma elde edilebilir.

instructions: 1. Pirinci bir kaba alın ve üzerini geçecek kadar ılık tuzlu su ekleyerek yaklaşık 15 dakika bekletin.
2.  Daha sonra nişastası gidene kadar bol suyla yıkayıp süzün.
3. Kuru soğanı küçük küpler halinde doğrayın.
4.  Bir tencereye zeytinyağı ve tereyağını alarak ısıtın.
5.  Doğranmış soğanı ekleyip pembeleşene kadar kavurun.
6. Küp şeklinde doğranmış enginarları tencereye ilave edin ve birkaç dakika kavurun.
7. Ardından yıkanmış ve süzülmüş pirinci ekleyin.
8.  Pirinçler şeffaf bir görünüm alana kadar karıştırarak kavurmaya devam edin.
9. Tuz, karabiber ve limon suyunu ekleyin.
10.  Üzerine sıcak suyu veya sebze suyunu ilave edip karıştırın.
11. Tencerenin kapağını kapatın ve pilavı kısık ateşte yaklaşık 15 dakika pişirin.
12. Suyunu çeken pilavın üzerine ince kıyılmış dereotunu ekleyin.
13.  Tencerenin kapağını kapatıp pilavı 10 dakika demlenmeye bırakın.
14. Demlenen pilavı nazikçe karıştırarak servis edebilirsiniz.
15.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Artichoke Risotto, Step By Step Recipe
original_name: Risotto de alcachofas, receta paso a paso

ingredients.item: 1 lt. caldo de verdura o pollo
2  tallos de cebolleta (cebollín o cebolla de verdeo)

instructions: Vamos a lavar las alcachofas y quitar las hojas más duras dejando los tallos.
Cortar las alcachofas en rodajas finas y poner en agua con zumo de limón para que no se oscurezcan.
Pelar los dientes de ajo y la cebolla y el cebollín finamente cortado, sofreír en una sartén honda con el aceite de oliva unos minutos y añadir las alcachofas escurridas, la sal y la pimienta.
Cocinar con la tapadera puesta, a fuego vivo durante 15 minutos.
Añade el arroz, se revuelve y diluye con un poco del caldo caliente. Se cuece durante 18-20 minutos a fuego lento. La cantidad ideal para que cubra todo el arroz.
Si hay que añadir más caldo lo calentaremos hasta ebullición antes para que no corte la cocción.
Durante la cocción se añade poco a poco el caldo. Cuando el arroz lo absorbe se va añadiendo más.
Se espolvorea el queso parmesano rallado sobre el arroz, se remueve. Es recomendable servirlo muy caliente.

name: Artichoke Salad
instructions: 1. Enginarları dörde bölerek yarım limonun suyu eklenmiş suda haşlayın, suyunu süzün ve bir kaseye alın.
2.  Kiraz domatesleri ortadan ikiye keserek ekleyin.
3.  Roka yapraklarını yıkayıp süzdükten sonra ilave edin.
4. Sarı biberin çekirdeklerini temizleyin ve kare doğrayın.
5.  Tuz, zeytinyağı ve limon suyu ekleyip harmanlayın.
6.  Servis tabağına alarak servis yapın.

name: Artichoke Salad With Curd Cheese
instructions: 1. Enginarları tencereye alıp limon suyu ve üzerini geçecek kadar su ekleyin.
2.  Orta ateşte yumuşayıncaya kadar pişirin.
3.  Suyunu süzdürüp soğumaya bırakın.
4.  Domateslerin çekirdeklerini temizleyip küçük küp şeklinde doğrayın.
5.  Sos için, zeytinyağı, küp doğranmış kırmızı soğan, kıyılmış biberiyeyi sos tenceresinde 3-4 dakika pişirin.
6.  Ocaktan alıp limon suyu, rendelenmiş sarımsak ve domatesleri ekleyin.
7.  Tuz, karabiber ile tatlandırın.
8.  Enginarları doğrayıp servis tabağına alın.
9.  Lor peynirini parçalar halinde enginarların üzerine yerleştirin.
10.  Maydanozları sos karışımına ekleyip enginar ve lor peynirlerinin üzerine gezdirin.
11.  Taze çekilmiş karabiber serpiştirip servis yapın.

name: Artichoke Soup With Yellow Lentils
instructions: 1. Sofraların olmazsa olmazı çorba tariflerine bir yenisi daha.
4. Soğanı ince kıyıp zeytinyağı ve tereyağında yumuşayana kadar kavurun.
5.  Küp doğranmış patatesi ve enginarı ekleyin.
6.  Sürekli karıştırarak kavurmaya devam edin.
7.  Sarı mercimekleri, suyu, rendelenmiş muskatı, tuzu ve karabiberi ilave edin.
8.  Orta ateşte, 25 dakika pişirin.
9.  Çorbayı ocaktan indirmeye 5 dakika kala kremayı ilave edin.
10.  Birkaç taşım daha kaynatıp ocaktan alın.
11.  Sarı mercimekli enginar çorbasını servis tabaklarına paylaştırın.
12.  Üzeri için kıyılmış frenk soğanı, lor peyniri ve çörek otunu karıştırıp serpin ve bekletmeden servis yapın.

name: Artichoke Spin Dip Pasta
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Add the pasta and cook according to the package directions.

While the pasta is cooking, in a large pan over medium-low heat, add the olive oil. Add the green onions and cook in the hot oil, stirring occasionally, until soft, about 5 minutes. Add the garlic and red chili flakes; cook for 2-3 minutes, until fragrant.

Increase heat to medium. Add the artichokes to the pan and season with salt and pepper. Cook for 1 minute. Add the spinach and cook for 2-3 minutes, until wilted. Add the Boursin and cook until the cheese is melted.
Strain the pasta, reserving 1-2 cups pasta water.
Add ½ cup pasta water to the artichoke-spinach mixture in the pan. Stir until the sauce is creamy. Add another ½ cup pasta water; mix well.
Add the mozzarella cheese and butter; stir until well combined. Check for seasoning, adjusting the salt and pepper as needed. Adjust consistency with more pasta water if needed.
Add the pasta to the pan and mix until evenly coated with the sauce.
Enjoy!

name: Artichoke With Broad Beans
instructions: 1. Rendelediğiniz soğanı zeytinyağında pembeleşinceye kadar soteleyin.
2.  Enginarlar, ayrı bir kasede çırptığınız toz şeker, tuz, un, limon suyu ve soğuk suyu ilave edin.
3.  Kısık ateşte kapağı kapalı olarak 30 dakika pişirin.
4.  Enginarlar yumuşamaya başladığında iç baklaları enginarların üzerine ilave edip 15 dakika daha pişirin.
5.  İnce kıyılmış dereotu ve Frenk soğanını ilave edip 3-4 dakika daha pişirin ve ocaktan alın.
6.  Kapağı kapalı olarak 10-15 dakika kadar dinlendirdikten sonra ılık servis yapın.
7. Tadına doyamayacağınız zeytinyağlı baklalı enginar tarifine buradan ulaşabilirsiniz.

name: Artichoke With Buckwheat
instructions: 1. 1 tatlı kaşığı tereyağı ve 1 çay kaşığı tuz ilave edilmiş 3 çay bardağı suyu tencerede kaynatın.
2.  Su kaynayınca karabuğdayı ekleyin.
3.  Tencerenin kapağını kapatın.
4.  Kısık ateşte 10 dakika pişirin.
5.  Enginarları yayvan bir tencereye yerleştirin.
6.  Ceviz büyüklüğünde parçalara ayrılmış brokoliyi, kıyılmış reyhanı, tuzu, havuzu, bezelyeyi ve zar şeklinde doğranmış sarı biberi bir kapta karıştırıp enginarların üzerine paylaştırın.
7.  En son haşlanmış karabuğdayı serpin.
8.  Zeytinyağını ve 1 su bardağı portakal suyunu üzerine gezdirin.
9.  Yemek pişerken iç malzemenin dağılmasını önlemek için enginarların üzerini porselen bir tabakla kapatın.
10.  Orta ateşte 25 dakika pişirin.
11.  Ilık veya soğuk servis yapın.

name: Artichoke With Citrus Peel And Pine Nuts
original_name: Narenciye Kabuklu Ve Çam Fıstıklı Enginar
instructions: 1. Temizlenmiş enginarları dörde bölüp kararmamaları için limonlu suda bekletin.
2.  Soğan ve sarımsağın kabuğunu soyup kıyın.
3.  Zeytinyağının yarısını tavaya alıp soğan ve sarımsakları kısık ateşte 1 dakika kavurun.
4.  Enginarları ekleyip kavurmaya devam edin.
5.  Tuzla tatlandırın.
6.  İnce rendelenmiş narenciye kabuklarını ekleyip 2-3 dakika daha kavurun.
7.  Kalan zeytinyağını başka bir tavada ısıtıp çam fıstıklarını hafifçe pembeleşene kadar kavurun.
8.  Yemeğin üzerine serpip servis yapın.
9.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Artichoke With Lamb Meat
instructions: 1. Tereyağını tencereye alıp eritin.
2.  Küçük parçalar şeklinde kesilmiş eti ilave edip suyunu salıp tekrar çekinceye kadar ara sıra karıştırarak kavurun.
3. Etler suyunu çektikten sonra 5 dakika daha kavurup unu ekleyin.
4.  1-2 dakika sonra temizlenip dörde bölünmüş enginarları ve arpacık soğanları ilave edin.
5. Limon suyunu ekleyin ve tuzla tatlandırın.
6.  Suyu ilave edip 10 dakika orta ateşte pişirin.
7. Ocağı kısıp enginarlar yumuşayana kadar pişirin.
8.  Üzerine kıyılmış dereotu serpiştirin.
9. Etli enginar yemeğini, yanına çok yakışan sebzeli bulgur pilavı ile birlikte servis edebilirsiniz.
10.  Şimdiden afiyet olsun.
11. Kuzu Etli Enginar Tarifinin Püf Noktaları Nelerdir?Tarife başlamadan önce sirkeli su hazırlayın ve enginarları 20 dakika boyunca bekletin.
12.  Bu sayede daha canlı kalmasını sağlayabilirsiniz.
13. Etin yumuşaması için bir gece önceden dinlendirebilirsiniz.
14. Yemeğin tadını arttırmak için, pişirme esnasında bir çay kaşığı toz şeker ilave edin.
15. Kuzu etini haşlarken kullandığınız suyu cam kavanozda saklayın.
16.  Bu suyu, pilav ve makarna yapımında kullanabilirsiniz.
17. Yemeği pişirdikten sonra içerisine birkaç damla limon sıkın.
18. 1 Porsiyon Kuzu Etli Enginar Kaç Kaloridir?Kuzu etli enginarın bir porsiyonu, yaklaşık 75 kaloridir.
19.  Demir ve potasyum değeri yüksek olan bu tarifi, diyet listelerine ekleyebilirsiniz.
20. Sebzelerle birlikte sunulan et yemekleri sizin de damak zevkinize hitap ediyorsa, pratik bir şekilde hazırlanan etli bamya tarifine göz atarak sofralarınızı renklendirebilirsiniz.

name: Artichoke With Potatoes: And Delicious
original_name: Alcachofa con patatas: fáciles y deliciosas
instructions: Pela las patatas, lávalas y trocéalas. Limpia las alcachofas retirando las puntas, las hojas exteriores y el heno central.
Córtalas en gajos gruesos. Pela y pica la cebolla y los dientes de ajo, lava el laurel y pica muy finamente el cilantro.
En una sartén mediana sobre la estufa, a fuego medio, coloca el aceite de oliva y cuando esté caliente coloca la cebolla, luego el ajo picado, el laurel y rehoga unos 2 minutos más.
Incorpora las alcachofas y las patatas y cocínalo todo junto unos instantes. Salpimienta, espolvorea con el cilantro lavado y picado.
Añade el vino, deja que reduzca unos instantes a fuego fuerte y cubre escasamente con agua.
Tapa y deja cocer todo junto, a fuego lento, durante 15 minutos. Sirve bien caliente.

name: Artichoke Wrap
instructions: 1. Enginarları kararmamaları için limonla ovduktan sonra limonlu suyun içinde bekletin.
2.  İki soğanın kabuğunu soyup kıyın.
3.  Dolmalık fıstıkla birlikte zeytinyağında kavurun.
4.  Pirinci ekleyip kavurmaya devam edin.
5.  Kuşüzümü, şeker, tuz ve sıcak suyu ekleyin.
6.  Kısık ateşte suyu çekene kadar pişirin.
7.  Dolma baharı, kıyılmış taze nane ve dereotunu ilave edin.
8.  Karıştırıp tencereyi ocaktan alın ve soğumaya bırakın.
9.  Geniş bir tabağın üzerine sıcak suda haşlanmış 4 adet taze asma yaprağını bir kare oluşturacak şekilde yayın.
10.  Üzerine enginarı yerleştirin.
11.  Enginarın üzerine hazırladığınız iç harçtan 2 yemek kaşığı dolusu doldurun.
12.  Taze asma yaprağı ile enginarın her tarafını örtecek şekilde sarın.
13.  Diğer enginarları da aynı şekilde hazırlayın.
14.  Kalan soğanları piyazlık doğrayıp tencerenin dibine yayın.
15.  Halka kesilmiş havuçları ekleyin.
16.  Enginarları dizin.
17.  Zeytinyağı, limon suyu ve suyu karıştırıp tencereye ekleyin.
18.  Su kaynayana kadar hızlı daha sonra ise kısık ateşte pişirin.
19.  Ilık servis yapın.

name: Artichoke, Cherry Tomato, And Feta Salad With Artichoke-pesto Crostini

ingredients.item: Finely chopped fresh italian parsley plus additional for sprinkling
Container yellow and red cherry tomatoes

instructions:
Place all ingredients in processor. Blend until finely chopped. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
Do Ahead: Pesto can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.
Whisk shallot, vinegar, 2 tablespoons chopped parsley, mustard, and garlic in medium bowl. Gradually whisk in oil. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
Spread 1 tablespoon pesto over each baguette slice. Sprinkle parsley over crostini.

Mix baby greens, artichoke hearts, and cherry tomatoes in very large bowl. Toss with enough dressing to coat lightly. Sprinkle feta over and serve salad with crostini.
Do Ahead: Vinaigrette can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.

name: Artichokes Ala Polita

ingredients.item: 4-5φρέσκα κρεμμυδάκια με τα φύλλα τους κομμένα σε φέτες
Λίγοζεστό νερό (ίσα που να σκεπάζει τα υλικά )
