4-5φρέσκα κρεμμυδάκια με τα φύλλα τους κομμένα σε φέτες
Λίγοζεστό νερό (ίσα που να σκεπάζει τα υλικά )

instructions: Ζεσταίνουμε πρώτα το ελαιόλαδο και σοτάρουμε το κρεμμύδι, το πράσο και τα λευκά μέρη των φρέσκων κρεμμυδιών για 4-5 λεπτά.
Προσθέτουμε τον αρακά, τις πατάτες, τις αγκινάρες και το καρότο.
Αλατοπιπερώνουμε και περιχύνουμε με ζεστό νερό, ίσα που να σκεπάζει τα υλικά.
Χαμηλώνουμε τη φωτιά και σιγοβράζουμε για 20 λεπτά να μαλακώσουν τα λαχανικά.
Προς το τέλος του βρασμού ξεσκεπάζουμε το φαγητό, προσθέτουμε άνηθο, μάραθο και τα πράσινα φύλλα των κρεμμυδιών.
Βράζουμε λίγα λεπτά σε δυνατή φωτιά να πυκνώσει η σάλτσα.
Στο τέλος μένει σχεδόν με το λάδι του το φαγητό και με πολύ λίγη δεμένη σάλτσα.
Περιχύνουμε με φρεσκοστυμμένο λεμόνι.
Αν θέλουμε δένουμε με κορν φλάουρ ή κάνουμε αυγολέμονο .

name: Artichokes In The Oven

ingredients.item: 1 ματσ.φρέσκα κρεμμυδάκια με τα φύλλα τους
1 ματσ.φρέσκα κρεμμυδάκια με τα φύλλα τους

instructions: Το πρώτο πράγμα που κάνουμε για να φτιάξουμε τις αγκινάρες λεμονάτες με πατάτες στο φούρνο είναι να καθαρίσουμε τις αγκινάρες.
Αφού τις καθαρίσουμε, τις ρίχνουμε σε μπόλικο νερό με 2-3 στυμμένα λεμόνια, για να μην οξειδωθούν.
Καθαρίζουμε, πλένουμε και κόβουμε τις πατάτες σε μεγάλες μπουκιές.
Ξεπλένουμε τις αγκινάρες και τις βάζουμε σε μικρή γάστρα μαζί με τις πατάτες.
Προσθέτουμε τα φρέσκα κρεμμύδια κομμένα σε φέτες, τα φρέσκα σκόρδα, αλατοπιπερώνουμε και περιχύνουμε με το ελαιόλαδο.
Σπάμε τα ντοματίνια με τα δάχτυλα και τα ρίχνουμε στη γάστρα.
Προσθέτουμε μισό φλιτζάνι νερό.
Σκεπάζουμε το φαγητό με τα κλωνάρια του μάραθου.
Βάζουμε το καπάκι της γάστρας και ψήνουμε στο φούρνο στους 200ºC για περίπου 35΄.
Ξεσκεπάζουμε, περιχύνουμε με το χυμό από 2 λεμόνια και ψήνουμε για 25΄περίπου μέχρι να μαλακώσουν τα υλικά και να μείνουν οι λεμονάτες αγκινάρες με πατάτες μόνο με το λάδι τους.

name: Artichokes With Bagna Cauda

ingredients.prep: cloves separated, papery skin removed (but cloves left unpeeled)
stems trimmed, top 3/4 inch removed, tips of remaining leaves trimmed

instructions: Place unpeeled garlic cloves in small saucepan. Add enough water to cover garlic cloves by 1 inch. Bring to boil; reduce heat to medium-low, cover, and simmer until garlic is tender, about 25 minutes. Drain; transfer to plate. Chill garlic cloves until cool enough to handle, about 10 minutes. Squeeze garlic cloves from peel and place cloves in small bowl. Using fork, mash garlic cloves until smooth.

Melt butter in heavy small saucepan over medium heat. Add anchovies and sauté 1 minute. Add mashed garlic and oil. Simmer over low heat 10 minutes to allow flavors to blend, stirring occasionally. Season to taste with salt and pepper. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 hour ahead. Let stand at room temperature. Rewarm before serving, stirring occasionally (bagna cauda will separate when served).

Add artichokes to large pot of boiling salted water. Cover and cook until just tender when pierced through stem with fork, turning occasionally, 30 to 40 minutes, depending on size of artichokes. Drain.
Place 1 hot artichoke on each of 6 plates. Divide bagna cauda among small bowls or ramekins. Serve artichokes with warm bagna cauda.

name: Artichokes With Garnish On A Bed Of Spinach
instructions: 1. Enginarları tencereye dizin.
2.  Üzerlerine küp soğanların yarısını paylaştırın.
3.  3/4 çay bardağı zeytinyağı ve limon suyunu üzerlerine gezdirip suyu ekleyin ve orta ateşte kapağı kapalı olarak 25 dakika pişirin.
4. Garnitürlü enginarın garnitürünü göbeklerine paylaştırıp 20 dakika daha pişirin.
5.  Kalan soğanı zeytinyağında pembeleşinceye kadar kavurun.
6.  Küp doğranmış kırmızıbiberi ekleyip soteleyin.
7.  Ispanakları ekleyip sotelemeye devam edin.
8.  Tuz, karabiber ile tatlandırın.
9.  Ocaktan alıp krema ekleyerek karıştırın.
10.  Servis tabağına önce ıspanağı yayın.
11.  Üzerine garnitürlü enginarları dizip kıyılmış dereotu serpiştirerek servis yapın.
12. Düşük kalorili zeytinyağlı enginar tarifine buradan göz atabilirsiniz.

name: Artichokes With Ham Recipe

ingredients.item: 100 gr de jamón serrano o ibérico

instructions: Vamos a iniciar nuestra receta, tomando las alcachofas y quitándoles las hojas más duras o amarillentas. Siempre serán la primera y segunda capa. Corta un poco el talo y las puntas. Luego la picarás a la mitad.

Toma un bol grande, agrega agua y el zumo del limón. Sumerge las alcachofas en este líquido, mientras preparamos el resto de los ingredientes para que no se marchiten y mantengan el color verde natural.
Coloca una olla con agua a fuego alto.
Cuando el agua esté en su punto de ebullición, agrega las alcachofas y cocinarás por 5 minutos.
Pasado ese tipo, pagarás el fuego y colocarás a escurrir la alcachofas hasta que estén completamente secas y a temperatura ambiente. Reserva.
Ahora, cortarás en brunua o cuadritos medianos la cebolla, filetearás el ajo.
Colocará un sartén amplio al fuego y añadirás aceite de oliva. Procederemos a sofreír nuestro ajo, cuando lo veas medio doradito agrega la cebolla y mezcla.
También corta el jamón en cubos pequeños o medianos, y agrégalos al sartén para saltear por 3 minutos. Mezcla muy bien.
Pasado ese tiempo, añade las alcachofas al sartén y mezcla hasta que todo se una.
Condimenta con sal y pimienta al gusto, mezcla y deja saltear por 3 minutos aproximadamente.
Es momento de incorporar el vino blanco, sube el fuego y deja que se reduzcan y las alcachofas terminen de cocinarse.
Apaga, deja que estén tibias y sírvelas.
¡Disfruta!

name: Artichokes With Parmesan–black Pepper Yogurt

ingredients.prep: stems trimmed, top 1" removed, tips of remaining leaves trimmed

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Place a metal steamer basket in a large saucepan and pour in water to a depth of 2”. Add 2 Tbsp. lemon juice. Bring water to a boil, then add artichokes. Cover, reduce heat, and simmer artichokes until stems and hearts are easily pierced with a paring knife, 30–40 minutes.

Meanwhile, blend Parmesan, yogurt, oil, lemon zest, remaining 1 Tbsp. lemon juice, and 3 Tbsp. water in a blender until smooth; season with salt and a generous amount of pepper. Serve artichokes with yogurt sauce for dipping.

name: Arugula And Apple Salad
original_name: Ensalada de rúcula y manzana fácil

ingredients.item: 1  manzana verde o roja (la que más te guste)

instructions: Comienza cortando la manzana por la mitad y quítale el centro con las semillas. No es necesario pelarla, a menos que quieras un look más suave en la ensalada. Luego, córtala en rodajas finas o en cubitos, según tu estilo.

En un tazón pequeño o taza, mezcla la salsa de soja, el aceite de oliva, el jugo de limón, el vinagre balsámico y la miel de abejas. Remueve bien hasta que consigas una mezcla homogénea que tenga el poder de darle vida a las hojas verdes.

En un bol grande para ensaladas, coloca la rúcula y las rodajas de manzana. Vierte el aderezo por encima y mezcla suavemente para no aplastar la rúcula. Añade una pizca de sal al final para darle el toque justo.
Sirve y acompaña con lo que te provoque. Ya tienes una ensalada lista para equilibrar cualquier exceso culinario.

name: Arugula And Cheese Pizza
instructions: 1.  Suyu geniş bir kaba aktarın.
2.  Üzerine maya, toz şeker ve tuzu döküp karıştırın.
3.  Unu ekleyip tahta kaşıkla karıştırıp yoğurun.
4.  Zeytinyağı ile yağladığınız çukur cam kaba hamuru alın ve üzerini nemli temiz bezle örtüp 1 saat oda sıcaklığında mayalanmaya bırakın.
5. Hamurun içindeki havayı almak için hamuru yumruğunuzla 5 dakika yoğurun ve un serptiğiniz tezgahta merdaneyle ince açın.
6.  Hamuru yağlı kağıt serili fırın tepsisine veya pizza tepsisine yerleştirin.
7.  Sos için gerekli malzemeleri bir kapta karıştırıp hamurun üzerine yayın.
8. Kırmızı soğan, biber ve mantarları ince kıyıp hamura serpin.
9.  Mısırları ve zeytinleri yerleştirip önceden ısıtılmış 180 dereceye ayarlı fırında 35 dakika pişirin.
10.  Fırından çıkınca ince dilimlenmiş parmesan peyniri ve rokayla tamamen kaplayıp servis yapın.

name: Arugula And Goat Cheese Pizza
instructions: Preheat the oven according to pizza package instructions.

Dab pesto onto the center of the pizza base, and spread toward the outer edges. Cut the goat cheese into thin coins, and spread or crumble across the pizza. Arrange tomato slices over goat cheese. Sprinkle with garlic. Brush the crust edges lightly with olive oil.
Place pizza directly on preheated oven rack. Bake for 5 to 10 minutes, or until the crust edges are golden.

After taking pizza out of the oven, allow to cool for a few minutes so that the cheese has time to set. After a couple of minutes, cover the pizza with a few handfuls of arugula. Cut, serve, and enjoy!

name: Arugula And Roasted Chickpea Salad With Feta

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Preheat oven to 400°. Place half of chickpeas on a rimmed baking sheet, drizzle with 2 Tbsp. oil, and toss to coat. Season with salt and pepper. Roast until chickpeas are golden brown and crispy, 20–23 minutes. Let cool; set aside.
Whisk remaining 3 Tbsp. oil, 1 Tbsp. lemon juice, dried mint, and vinegar in a small bowl. Season vinaigrette with salt, pepper, and more lemon juice, if desired.

Combine remaining chickpeas, arugula, fresh mint, and onion in a large bowl. Drizzle vinaigrette over and season with salt and pepper; gently toss to coat. Divide salad among plates or bowls. Garnish with reserved roasted chickpeas and feta.

name: Arugula And Roasted Pear Salad

ingredients.prep: almost-ripe pears (Bartlett or Bosc), peeled, cored, and cut lengthwise

instructions: 1. Preheat the oven to 204°C.
2. In a medium bowl, toss the pears, sugar, and butter. Arrange the pears in a single layer in a baking sheet. Bake, turning once, until the pears are barely tender, 10—15 minutes.
3. Dry roast the pine nuts in a skillet for 5 minutes, until toasty brown. Remove from the heat and set aside.
4. In a large salad bowl, prepare the dressing by whisking together the oil, vinegar, garlic, salt, pepper, mustard, and maple syrup. Add the arugula or salad greens and toss to coat.

5. Divide the salad onto four chilled plates. Arrange the roasted pears in a fan around the center, and sprinkle with the cranberries, Parmesan cheese, and pine nuts. Scatter with petals from the calendula blossoms.

name: Arugula And Romaine Salad With Red Grapes

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Whisk water, white vinegar, and sugar together in a bowl until sugar has dissolved.
Stir cucumber and onion into the vinegar mixture; cover and refrigerate for 3 hours. Drain vegetables.
Toss romaine lettuce and arugula with olive oil and balsamic vinegar in a large bowl. Season with salt and black pepper.
Divide salad on 2 plates and scatter cucumber mixture and grapes on top to serve.

name: Arugula Fennel Salad
instructions: Make the dressing: Whisk oil, lemon juice, lemon zest, and salt together in a small bowl.
Make the salad: Combine arugula, fennel, tomatoes, Parmesan, and pine nuts in a large salad bowl. Drizzle dressing over top and toss to coat.

name: Arugula Gimlet
instructions: Combine gin, lime juice, and simple syrup in a cocktail shaker. Fill partway with ice, then top with arugula. Cover and shake vigorously until the outside of shaker is very cold, about 20 seconds. Strain through a very fine-mesh sieve into a coupe glass; garnish with lime wheel.

name: Arugula Pasta Salad

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Bring 3 cups water in a medium pot to a boil; add rotini and cook, uncovered, stirring occasionally, until tender yet firm to the bite, about 8 minutes. Drain; cool for 3 minutes.
Place rotini in a serving bowl. Add tomatoes, olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, salt, and black pepper; toss to coat. Add arugula; toss until well combined.

name: Arugula Pesto
instructions: Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Add arugula and cook until bright green, about 30 seconds. Remove arugula to a bowl full of ice water for several minutes until cold. Drain and wring out arugula.
Pulse arugula, olive oil, almonds, and garlic together in a blender, scraping down the sides, until mixture just becomes a coarse puree. Pour puree into a bowl and season with salt.

name: Arugula Pesto Sauce
instructions: 1. Öncelikle rokayı parçalar haline getirin ve bol su ile durulayın.
2.  Ardından suyunun süzülmesini bekleyin.
3. Bu esnada parmesan peynirini rendeleyin.
4.  Sarımsakları küçük parçalara getirin.
5. Ardından roka, sarımsak, çam fıstığı ve rendelenmiş parmesan peynirili mutfak robotunda ekmek kırıntısı haline gelinceye kadar ezin.
6. Üzerine yavaş yavaş zeytinyağı dökerek püre kıvamına gelinceye kadar robotu çalıştırmaya devam edin.
7. Hazırladığınız sosu 5 dakika dinlendirin.
8.  Rokalı pesto susu makarna tarifleri ile birlikte servis edebilirsiniz.
9.  Afiyet olsun.
10. Rokalı Pesto Sosun Püf Noktaları Nelerdir?Pesto sos yapımında taze malzemeler kullanmaya özen gösterin.
11. Dilerseniz, sosun lezzetini ve kokusunu arttırmak için fesleğen ilave edebilirsiniz.
12. Sosun tadını yoğunlaştırmak için, çam fıstıklarını 2 dakika kavurun ve karışıma ekleyin.
13. Pesto sosun mükemmel kıvama ulaşması için, sarımsakların parçalar halinde kalmamasına özen gösterin.
14. 1 Porsiyon Rokalı Pesto Sos Kaç Kaloridir?Rokalı pesto sosun 10 gramlık bir porsiyonu, yaklaşık 45 kaloridir.
15.  Vitamin değeri yüksek olan bu tarifi, diyet listelerine de ekleyebilirsiniz.
16. Ana yemekleri lezzetlendirmek için kullanabileceğiniz sos tarifleri arıyorsanız, Meksikan usulü salsa sos tarifine göz atabilirsiniz.
17.  Beğendiğiniz tarifleri sevdiklerinizle paylaşmayı unutmayın.

name: Arugula Salad
instructions: 1. Yeşillikleri ve rokaları iyice yıkayıp süzün.
2.  Elinizle ufak parçalara ayırıp salata kasesine alın.
3.  Tane mısır, kapari ve ufak küp doğranmış otlu peynirleri ekleyin.
4.  Kiraz domatesleri dörde bölüp ilave edin.
5.  Dilimlenmiş zeytinleri serpin.
6.  Servis öncesi zeytinyağı, limon suyu ve tuzu bir kapta karıştırın.
7.  Hazırladığınız sosu üzerine gezdirip servis yapın.

name: Arugula Salad Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 adet kırmızı biber (isteğe bağlı, ince doğranmış)
1 yemek kaşığı limon suyu (isteğe göre sirke de eklenebilir)
1 yemek kaşığı rendelenmiş parmesan peyniri (isteğe bağlı)
Standart yeşil roka yerine kırmızı roka, karışık yeşillikler (marul, roka, tere) veya ıspanak kullanabilirsiniz.
Cherry domates yerine normal domates, turp dilimleri, salatalık turşusu veya renkli dolmalık biberler tercih edebilirsiniz.
Salatalık yerine kabak veya havuç ince dilimler halinde kullanılabilir.
Biber yerine kapya biber veya hafif acılı jalapeno ekleyerek farklı tatlar elde edebilirsiniz.
Limon suyu yerine nar ekşisi, balsamik sirke, elma sirkesi veya limon-lime karışımı kullanabilirsiniz.
Zeytinyağı yerine avokado yağı, ceviz yağı veya susam yağı tercih edilebilir.
Tuz ve karabiber yerine deniz tuzu, pul biber, sumak veya baharatlı karışımlar kullanılabilir.

instructions: 1. Rokaları iyice yıkayın ve süzün.
2.  Büyük yaprakları iri parçalar halinde doğrayın.
3. Salatalık, kırmızı biber ve cherry domatesleri hazırlayın.
4. Derin bir salata kasesinde tüm malzemeleri birleştirin.
5. Zeytinyağı, limon suyu, tuz ve karabiberi ayrı bir kapta karıştırıp salatanın üzerine gezdirin.
6. İstersen üzerine rendelenmiş parmesan serpiştirerek servis yapın.
7.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Arugula Salad Recipe With Olive Oil
instructions: 1. Rokaları bol suyla yıkayıp süzün.
2.  Yapraklarını iri parçalar halinde koparın ve geniş bir salata kasesine alın.
3.  Üzerine ikiye bölünmüş cherry domatesleri ve ince doğranmış kırmızı soğanı ekleyin.
4. Ayrı bir kapta zeytinyağı, limon suyu, nar ekşisi ve tuzu karıştırarak sosu hazırlayın.
5.  Sosu salatanın üzerine gezdirip tüm malzemeleri nazikçe harmanlayın.
6. Arzu ederseniz üzerine rendelenmiş parmesan veya ufalanmış beyaz peynir ekleyerek servis yapın.

name: Arugula Salad With Avocado And Strawberries
original_name: Salada de rúcula com abacate e morangos
instructions: Coloque a rúcula numa tigela. Junte o abacate, os morangos e a cebola laminada.
Coloque o azeite, o vinagre balsâmico e as mostardas, num copo, tempere com sal e pimenta e envolva tudo muito bem, até ficar ligado.
Regue a salada com o molho e polvilhe com as nozes picadas.
Coloque a rúcula numa tigela. Junte o abacate, os morangos e a cebola laminada.
Coloque o azeite, o vinagre balsâmico e as mostardas, num copo, tempere com sal e pimenta e envolva tudo muito bem, até ficar ligado.
Regue a salada com o molho e polvilhe com as nozes picadas.

name: Arugula Salad With Caramelized Onions, Goat Cheese, And Candied Walnuts
instructions: Heat oil in heavy large skillet over medium-high heat. Add onions. Sauté until golden, about 18 minutes. Remove from heat. Sprinkle with vinegar; stir to blend. Season with salt and pepper.

Combine first 4 ingredients in another heavy large skillet. Bring to boil, whisking. Boil 1 minute. Add walnuts; stir. Toss until syrup forms glaze on nuts, about 3 minutes. Transfer nuts to sheet of foil and quickly separate nuts with forks. Cool. DO AHEAD Can be made 2 hours ahead. Let stand at room temperature.

Preheat oven to 177°C. Place bread cubes in large bowl. Drizzle with oil, tossing constantly to coat evenly. Scatter cubes in single layer on rimmed baking sheet. Sprinkle with salt and pepper. Bake croutons until crisp, stirring occasionally, about 15 minutes. DO AHEAD Can be made 2 hours ahead. Let stand on sheet at room temperature.
Whisk oil and vinegar in small bowl. Season dressing with salt and pepper.
Place arugula in very large bowl. Drop in onions, tossing to distribute evenly. Add nuts, croutons, and goat cheese. Toss with enough dressing to coat lightly.

name: Arugula Salad With Celery And Walnuts
instructions: 1. Kerevizi soyup ince jülyen doğrayın.
2.  Kararmaması için üzerine limon suyu sıkıp karıştırın.
3. Rokaları yıkayıp süzün ve iri parçalar halinde doğrayın.
4. Bir kasede zeytinyağı, limon suyu, nar ekşisi, tuz ve karabiberi çırpın.
5. Servis tabağına kereviz, roka ve elma dilimlerini koyun.
6.  Üzerine cevizleri serpiştirin.
7.  Hazırladığınız sosu gezdirerek karıştırın.
8. Salatanızı taze olarak servis edin.
9.  Dilerseniz üzerine rendelenmiş parmesan peyniri veya keçi peyniri ekleyebilirsiniz.
10.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Arugula Salad With Fresh Figs

ingredients.item: 100 gr beyaz peynir (tercihen keçi peyniri veya ezine)
Roka yerine baby spinach (bebek ıspanak), semizotu, marul veya karışık yeşillikler kullanılabilir.
Daha aromatik bir tat için tatlı roka veya radicchio tercih edebilirsiniz.
Taze incir yoksa, kuru incir, taze armut, üzüm veya şeftali dilimleri ile aynı tarif uygulanabilir.
Kurutulmuş meyveler kullanacaksanız, önce kısa bir süre suda bekletip yumuşatmak lezzeti artırır.
Beyaz peynir yerine keçi peyniri, ezine peyniri, ricotta veya lor peyniri kullanılabilir.
Daha hafif bir dokunuş için peynir miktarını azaltabilirsiniz.
Balsamik sirke yerine elma sirkesi, limon suyu veya nar ekşisi ile farklı aromalar yaratabilirsiniz.
Zeytinyağı yerine avokado yağı, ceviz yağı veya fındık yağı kullanılabilir.
Salataya ceviz, badem, fındık veya kabak çekirdeği ekleyerek doku ve aroma çeşitliliği sağlayabilirsiniz.
İsteğe bağlı olarak taze otlar (nane, fesleğen, maydanoz) ekleyerek lezzeti zenginleştirebilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Rokaları bol suyla yıkayıp iyice kurulayın.
2.  İsteğe göre iri parçalar halinde doğrayabilir ya da bütün olarak bırakabilirsiniz.
3.  Taze incirleri yıkayıp saplarını alın ve dörde bölün.
4.  Beyaz peyniri küp küp doğrayın veya ufalayın.
5.  Geniş bir salata kasesine roka, incir, peynir ve siyah zeytinleri alın.
6.  Ayrı bir kasede zeytinyağı, balsamik sirke ve nar ekşisini karıştırın.
7.  Hazırladığınız sosu salatanın üzerine gezdirin.
8.  Tüm malzemeleri nazikçe karıştırın ve hemen servis edin.

name: Arugula Salad With Halloumi Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 demet taze roka (iyice yıkanmış ve kurulanmış).
1 adet orta boy kabak, 1 adet patlıcan, 1 adet kırmızı kapya biber.
Bir avuç sarı ve kırmızı çeri domates (ikiye bölünmüş).
Yarım mor soğan (ince halka şeklinde doğranmış).
Zeytinyağı, bir tutam tuz ve karabiber.
1 yemek kaşığı balzamik sirke veya taze limon suyu.
1 tatlı kaşığı hardal (isteğe bağlı, derinlik katar).
1 çay kaşığı bal veya nar ekşisi (asitliği dengelemek için).

instructions: 1. Patlıcan ve kabakları halka halka dilimleyin.
2.  Patlıcanların acısını almak isterseniz 10 dakika tuzlu suda bekletip kurulayabilirsiniz.
3. Kapya biberi geniş parçalar halinde doğrayın.
4. Tüm sebzeleri hafifçe zeytinyağı, tuz ve karabiber ile harmanlayın.
5. Döküm tava veya ızgarada sebzeler üzerinde ızgara izi oluşana ve yumuşayana kadar pişirin.
6.  Kenara alıp hafif ılımasını bekleyin.
7. Hellim dilimlerini kağıt havluyla kurulayın (bu daha iyi kızarmalarını sağlar).
8. Yağsız veya çok az yağlanmış sıcak tavada, her iki yüzü de altın sarısı-kahverengi bir renk alana kadar yaklaşık 1-2 dakika kızartın.
9.  Küçük bir kavanozda veya kasede zeytinyağı, balzamik sirke, hardal ve balı iyice çırpın.
10.  Sosun pürüzsüz ve emülsifiye (koyulaşmış) bir kıvam almasını sağlayın.
11. Geniş ve yayvan bir salata tabağının tabanına rokaları yerleştirin.
12. Üzerine ızgara yaptığınız kabak, patlıcan ve biberleri dağıtın.
13. Çeri domatesleri ve ince kıyılmış mor soğan halkalarını ekleyin.
14. Hellim peynirlerini en üste yerleştirin.
15.  Hazırladığınız sosu salatanın her yerine gelecek şekilde gezdirin ve servis edin.
16.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Arugula Salad With Lemon-parmesan Dressing
instructions: Blend first 4 ingredients in processor. Season dressing with salt and pepper. Transfer to bowl.Cover; chill up to 3 days.
Combine arugula and tomatoes in large bowl. Toss with enough dressing to coat.

name: Arugula Salad With Mint
instructions: 1. Roka ve nane yapraklarını temizleyip bol suyla yıkayın.
2.  Suyunu süzüp naneyi ince doğray��n ve roka ile bir kapta harmanlayın.
3.  Biberin çekirdeklerini temizleyip küp şeklinde doğrayın ve rokaya ekleyin.
4.  Sumak, doğranmış soğan, tuz, nar ekşisi ekleyerek harmanlayın ve servis yapın.

name: Arugula Salad With Pickled Beets And Preserved-lemon Viniagrette
instructions: Place each beet in its own small pot, cover with water, and simmer until a paring knife can easily pierce the beets, about 30 minutes. Cool beets, peel, and slice into thin half-moons. Reserve each beet in a separate bowl to ensure that the red beet slices don't stain the yellow ones. Meanwhile, combine the vinegar, sugar, and 1 cup water in a small pot. Bring to a boil, remove from heat, and divide the hot brine among the beets; let sit at room temperature until pickled, 3 to 4 hours.

Preheat the oven to 149°C. In a small mixing bowl, whip the egg white until frothy, then add the pistachios and spices, toss to coat, and spread on a parchment-lined baking sheet. Bake until golden and fragrant, 15 minutes. Nuts will crisp as they cool.
In a medium bowl, whisk together all the ingredients until combined.

Arrange the pickled beets on a serving platter. Toss the arugula in the preserved-lemon vinaigrette and place on top of the beets. Sprinkle with the spiced pistachios, drizzle with balsamic, and top with fresh black pepper. Serve immediately.

name: Arugula Salad With Pomegranate Seeds And Red Onion
original_name: Nar Taneli Ve Kırmızı Soğanlı Roka Salatası
instructions: 1. Patatesleri ve havucu bol suyla yıkayıp kurulayın.
2.  Patatesleri kabukları üzerinde kalacak şekilde dört parçaya kesin.
3.  Havucu iki parmak kalınlığında dilimleyin.
4.  Patates ve havucu yağlı kağıt konmuş tepsiye alın.
5.  Soğanın kabuğunu soyup elma dilim şeklinde 6 parçaya kesin.
6.  Fırın tepsisine ekleyin.
7.  Sebzeleri harmanlayıp üzerine zeytinyağı gezdirip tuz ve karabiber serpin.
8.  200 derece fırında 25 dakika pişirin.
9.  Fırından alıp ılındırın.
10.  Roka yaprakları ve sebzeleri servis tabağına alıp harmanlayın.
11.  Nar taneleri ve tulum peynirini üzerine serpin.
12.  Nar ekşisini salatanın üzerine gezdirip servis yapın.

name: Arugula Salad With Prosciutto, Blue Cheese, And Pear
instructions: Coarsely chop chives and put in a food processor. Add olive oil and purée for 1 minute. Transfer to a squeeze bottle dispenser and set aside.
Evenly distribute arugula onto 4 medium plates. Top with prosciutto and blue cheese.
Peel and core pears, then cut in half. Cut each half into thin slices and add to plates in a fan shape.
Drizzle chive olive oil over each salad and decoratively add some to the sides of the plates. Repeat with balsamic glaze.

name: Arugula Salad With Salmon Recipe

ingredients.item: 1/4 adet kırmızı soğan (yarım halka doğranmış, tuzla ovulmuş)
Izgara veya füme levrek kullanabilirsiniz; hafif ve aromatik olur.
Füme alabalık ile farklı bir lezzet yakalayabilirsiniz.
Diyet veya vejetaryen alternatif için ızgara tavuk göğsü veya nohut/mercimek ekleyebilirsiniz.
Ispanak veya karışık yeşillikler (baby leaf) tercih edebilirsiniz.
Daha acısız bir tat için marul veya kıvırcık salata kullanabilirsiniz.
Cherry domates yerine normal domatesi küp doğrayabilirsiniz.
Salatalık yerine havuç veya kapya biber ekleyerek renk ve tat çeşitliliği yaratabilirsiniz.
Kırmızı soğan yerine yeşil soğan veya taze pırasa kullanabilirsiniz.
Limon suyu yerine portakal suyu veya nar ekşisi ile farklı bir ekşi-tatlı aroma elde edebilirsiniz.
Zeytinyağı yerine avokado yağı veya fındık yağı kullanabilirsiniz.
Bal yerine akçaağaç şurubu veya az miktarda hardal kullanarak sosu tatlandırabilirsiniz.
Izgara veya füme levrek kullanabilirsiniz; hafif ve aromatik olur.
Füme alabalık ile farklı bir lezzet yakalayabilirsiniz.
Diyet veya vejetaryen alternatif için ızgara tavuk göğsü veya nohut/mercimek ekleyebilirsiniz.
Ispanak veya karışık yeşillikler (baby leaf) tercih edebilirsiniz.
Daha acısız bir tat için marul veya kıvırcık salata kullanabilirsiniz.
Cherry domates yerine normal domatesi küp doğrayabilirsiniz.
Salatalık yerine havuç veya kapya biber ekleyerek renk ve tat çeşitliliği yaratabilirsiniz.
Kırmızı soğan yerine yeşil soğan veya taze pırasa kullanabilirsiniz.
Limon suyu yerine portakal suyu veya nar ekşisi ile farklı bir ekşi-tatlı aroma elde edebilirsiniz.
Zeytinyağı yerine avokado yağı veya fındık yağı kullanabilirsiniz.
Bal yerine akçaağaç şurubu veya az miktarda hardal kullanarak sosu tatlandırabilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Somon dilimlerini zeytinyağı, limon suyu, tuz ve karabiberle ovun.
2.  Izgara tavada veya fırında her iki yüzünü de hafifçe kızartarak pişirin.
3.  Roka, domates, salatalık, kırmızı soğan, mısır ve avokadoyu geniş bir kaseye alın.
4. Küçük bir kapta zeytinyağı, limon, hardal, bal, tuz ve karabiberi çırpın.
5. Salata malzemelerinin üzerine sosu dökün, karıştırın.
6.  Üzerine somon parçalarını yerleştirdikten sonra susam serpiştirin ve servis edin.
7.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Arugula Salad With Walnuts

ingredients.item: Yarım su bardağı iri çekilmiş ceviz içi

instructions: 1. Rokayı ince kıyın.
2.  Domatesleri üzerine rendeleyin.
3.  İri çekilmiş ceviz içi ve sosunu ekleyip karıştırın.

name: Arugula Salad With Yogurt Recipe

ingredients.item: Ispanak, marul veya karışık yeşillikler ekleyerek farklı tatlar elde edebilirsiniz.
Taze nane veya maydanoz ile roka karışımı kullanarak aromayı artırabilirsiniz.
Süzme yoğurdun yerine yoğurt–krema karışımı veya light yoğurt kullanabilirsiniz.
Vegan alternatif için bitkisel yoğurt (badem veya soya yoğurdu) tercih edilebilir.
Sarımsak yerine sarımsak tozu veya ince doğranmış taze soğan ekleyebilirsiniz.
Daha hafif bir tat için sarımsağı tamamen çıkarabilirsiniz.
Limon suyu yerine nar ekşisi veya elma sirkesi ile farklı bir aroma yaratabilirsiniz.
Zeytinyağı yerine ceviz yağı veya avokado yağı kullanabilirsiniz; salataya hafif fındıksı bir tat katar.
Kavrulmuş ceviz, badem, fındık ekleyerek çıtırlık katabilirsiniz.
Kuru üzüm veya granat ekleyerek tatlı-ekşi bir aroma sağlayabilirsiniz.
Rendelenmiş havuç veya salatalık ile daha renkli ve besleyici bir salata elde edebilirsiniz.
Dilersen biraz pul biber veya sumak ekleyerek salataya baharatlı bir dokunuş verebilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Rokaları yıkayın ve iri iri doğrayın, fazla suyu süzün.
2. Yoğurdu bir kasede çırpın, içine ezilmiş sarımsağı, limon suyunu ve tuzu ekleyin, karıştırın.
3. Rokaları servis tabağına alın, üzerine yoğurtlu sosu dökün.
4. Zeytinyağını küçük bir tavada ısıtıp salatanın üzerine gezdirin.
5. İsteğe göre pul biber veya nar ekşisi serpiştirerek servis edin.
6.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Arugula Salsa Verde

ingredients.item: Finely grated zest of 1 small lemon

instructions: Mix tomatoes, if using, lemon zest, garlic, arugula, breadcrumbs, capers, and vinegar in a small bowl. Using a wooden spoon, slowly mix in ¾ cup oil, then Parmesan. Pour a little oil on surface to keep salsa from discoloring.

name: Arugula With Italian Plums And Parmesan
instructions: Toss plums, cocktail onions, lemon juice, and 2 Tbsp. oil in a large bowl. Add arugula, season with salt and pepper, and toss again. Transfer to a platter; top with Parmesan and drizzle with more oil.

name: Arugula, Apple, And Parsnip With Buttermilk Dressing

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

ingredients.prep: peeled, thinly sliced lengthwise on a mandoline

instructions: Whisk buttermilk and 2 Tbsp. oil in a small bowl; season dressing with kosher salt and pepper.
Toss apple, parsnip, arugula, and dill in a large bowl. Drizzle salad with vinegar and toss to coat; season with kosher salt, pepper, and more vinegar, if desired.

Spoon half of dressing onto serving plates or a large platter. Add remaining 2 Tbsp. oil to salad and toss to coat. Mound salad on top of dressing. Spoon remaining dressing over and season with sea salt.
DO AHEAD: Dressing can be made 2 days ahead. Cover and chill.

name: Arugula, Fennel, And Apricot Salad

ingredients.prep: very thinly sliced, plus 1 tablespoon chopped fronds

instructions: Whisk vinegar and shallot in medium bowl. Gradually whisk in oil. Season dressing to taste with salt and pepper.

Place arugula, sliced fennel, and apricots in large bowl. Whisk chopped fennel fronds into dressing. Drizzle dressing over salad and toss to coat evenly. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Transfer salad to large serving bowl. Sprinkle pistachios over and serve.

name: Arugula, Grape, And Almond Salad With Saba Vinaigrette

ingredients.item: Kosher salt plus more for seasoning
Saba or aged balsamic vinegar plus more for drizzling

ingredients.prep: Manchego, or Pecorino cheese, shaved with a peeler

instructions: Finely chop 7 grapes; transfer to a small bowl. Cut remaining grapes in half; transfer to another small bowl and set aside. Using a fork, mash chopped grapes in bowl into a purée. Stir in shallot, 1 tablespoon Sherry vinegar, and 1/4 tsp. salt and let sit for 5 minutes. Whisk in oil and 1 tablespoon saba. Season vinaigrette to taste with salt, pepper, and more Sherry vinegar, if desired.

Combine arugula and halved grapes in a large bowl; drizzle with vinaigrette and season with salt and pepper. Toss salad to coat. Arrange salad on chilled dinner plates, dividing evenly. Scatter cheese and almonds over. Drizzle salads with more saba.
DO AHEAD: Vinaigrette and halved grapes can be prepared 8 hours ahead. Cover and chill vinaigrette and grapes separately. Bring vinaigrette to room temperature and rewhisk before continuing.

name: Arugula, Peach, And Goat Cheese Flatbread
instructions: Make the dough: In a large bowl, combine the warm water, yeast, all-purpose and whole wheat flours, and salt. Mix with a rubber spatula until well-combined and the dough comes together into a ball.
Lightly dust a clean surface with flour, then turn the dough out and knead for 1–2 minutes to smooth and encourage gluten development. Shape the dough into a ball.
Drizzle the olive oil in the bowl. Add the dough and turn to coat in the oil. Cover with a kitchen towel and let rise for 1 hour, or until doubled in size.

Caramelize the onions: Heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil in a large pan over medium heat. Add the onion, ½ teaspoon salt, and the pepper. Sauté for 5 minutes, until slightly softened. Add the balsamic vinegar, stir, and reduce the heat to low. Cook for about 25 minutes more, until the onions are tender and caramelized. Remove the pan from the heat and set aside to cool.
Punch down the dough, then divide into 4 pieces. On a lightly floured surface, roll out each piece to an 8-inch (20 cm) round, about ⅛ inch (3 mm) thick.

Heat a grill pan over medium-high heat. Brush each side of the dough lightly with olive oil. One at a time, grill each flatbread for about 4 minutes on each side, until grill marks appear and the dough is cooked through.
Add the arugula to a medium bowl, along with the caramelized onions, remaining ½ tablespoon olive oil, and remaining ¼ teaspoon salt. Toss well.
Top each flatbread with some of the arugula mixture, 6 peach slices, and 1 ounce of crumbled goat cheese. Drizzle with the balsamic glaze.
Enjoy!

name: Arugula, Yellow Tomato, And Nectarine Salsa

ingredients.item: Tcups chopped yellow or orange tomatoes

instructions: Mix all ingredients in medium bowl. Season to taste with salt and pepper.

name: Arugula-fig Salad With Creamy Gorgonzola

ingredients.item: Sea salt and cracked black pepper to taste

instructions: Combine olive oil, lemon juice, orange blossom water, orange juice, and orange zest in a glass jar and shake dressing until emulsified.
Arrange arugula on a salad platter, place figs on top, then top with Gorgonzola cheese and scatter the crushed pistachios over to garnish.
Season with salt and pepper.
Pour the dressing over the salad and serve immediately.

name: Arugula-pistachio Pesto
instructions: Finely chop garlic in processor. Add cheese and nuts. Process until nuts are finely chopped. Add arugula, 1 tablespoon lemon juice, and peel. Blend to coarse paste. Blend in oil. Season pesto with salt and pepper and more lemon juice, if desired. Transfer to bowl. Cover and chill up to 3 days.

name: Arvidson Swedish Pancakes
instructions: Beat eggs in a large bowl until smooth. Add milk, flour, sugar, vanilla extract, nutmeg, and salt; whisk until just combined. Stir in 1/2 cup melted butter until batter is very thin and slightly lumpy.

Heat a nonstick griddle over medium-high heat. Brush generously with 1 teaspoon butter. Drop batter onto the griddle to make 6-inch pancakes. Cook until bubbles form and the edges are dry, 30 seconds to 1 minute. Flip and cook until the other side is dry, 30 seconds to 1 minute. Repeat with remaining batter.

name: Asado De Puerco (mexican Pork Stew)
instructions: Combine pork, water, and 1/2 teaspoon salt in a Dutch oven over medium heat. Cover and cook for 20 minutes, stirring every 5 minutes. Uncover, increase the heat to medium-high, and cook, stirring constantly, until water evaporates, 2 to 3 minutes. Continue to cook until pork has browned in its rendered fat, 15 to 20 more minutes.

Meanwhile, stem dried chile peppers and discard seeds. Place chiles into a large skillet over low heat just until they start to soften; don't toast them. Transfer to a bowl of hot water and soak for 20 minutes.
Transfer pork to a plate, leaving all drippings in the Dutch oven.

Drain chiles and reserve soaking water. Place chiles into a blender with cilantro, bouillon, garlic, bay leaves, peppercorns, cloves, cinnamon stick, oregano, thyme, and cumin seeds. Pour in 1 cup reserved soaking water and blend until combined. Pour in 1 more cup soaking water, season with salt, and blend until completely smooth.

Place the Dutch oven over medium heat and add lard to the drippings. Very carefully add blended chile mixture, being careful as it may splatter. Scrape up any browned bits from the bottom. Bring to a boil, then add pork and any accumulated juices.
Reduce the heat and cover partially, leaving about 1 inch uncovered. Simmer, stirring occasionally, until sauce has thickened and reaches the desired consistency, 15 to 20 minutes.

name: Ascolymbrio Egg-lemon With Meat

ingredients.item: 1 kgασκόλυμπροι καθαρισμένοι (άγρια αγκαθωτά χόρτα με την ρίζα τους)
6κρεμμυδάκια φρέσκα με τα φύλλα τους, ψιλοκομμένα
1 kgασκόλυμπροι καθαρισμένοι (άγρια αγκαθωτά χόρτα με την ρίζα τους)
6κρεμμυδάκια φρέσκα με τα φύλλα τους, ψιλοκομμένα

instructions: Οι ασκoλύμπροι είναι ένα άγριο αγκαθωτό χόρτο που τρώγεται σκέτο, με αυγολέμονο ή με κρέας. Φύονται στα βουνά και είναι διαθέσιμοι από Νοέμβριο μέχρι Μάρτιο.
Καθαρίζουμε τους ασκολύμπρους καθώς και την ρίζα τους. Αν είναι πολύ μεγάλοι τους κόβουμε σε χοντρά κομμάτια, tους πλένουμε πολύ καλά και τους στραγγίζουμε.
Ζεσταίνουμε το ελαιόλαδο σε φαρδιά κατσαρόλα και σοτάρουμε τις μερίδες κρέατος για 10 λεπτά να ροδίσουν ολόγυρα.
Προσθέτουμε φρέσκο και ξερό κρεμμύδι και σοτάρουμε για 5 λεπτά.
Προσθέτουμε 2 φλυτζάνια ζεστό νερό και μόλις πάρει βράση χαμηλώνουμε την εστία σκεπάζουμε και σιγοβράζουμε για 40 λεπτά περίπου μέχρι να μαλακώσει το κρέας και να τρυπιέται με το πιρούνι.
Τότε προσθέτουμε τους ασκόλυμπρους, αλάτι πιπέρι και αφήνουμε για λίγα λεπτά σε μέτρια φωτιά να μαλακώσουν.
Όταν μαλακώσουν μετά από 5 λεπτά ανακατεύουμε τα υλικά σκεπάζουμε την κατσαρόλα και σιγοβράζουμε για 20 λεπτά να ολοκληρωθεί το μαγείρεμα.
Στο τέλος μένει λίγος ζωμός στην κατσαρόλα.
Σβήνουμε την εστία και κάνουμε το αυγολέμονο.
Χτυπάμε τα ασπράδια με το σύρμα προσθέτουμε ένα έναν τους κρόκους και συνεχίζουμε το χτύπημα.
Προσθέτουμε με ροή τον χυμό λεμονιού και ανακατεύοντας αραιώνουμε το αυγολέμονο ρίχνοντας λίγο λίγο τον ζωμό από το φαγητό, ώστε να εξισορροπήσουμε την θερμοκρασία.
Περιχύνουμε τους ασκόλυμπρους με αυγολέμονο και ανακινούμε τη κατσαρόλα από τα χερούλια ώστε να πάει παντού.
Αφήνουμε σε πολύ χαμηλή εστία για 2-3 λεπτά να βγαίνει ατμός χωρίς να βράσει το φαγητό και σβήνουμε την εστία.
Αφήνουμε να σταθεί για 10 λεπτά και μετά σερβίρουμε.

name: Ash Reshteh (persian Noodle And Bean Soup)

ingredients.item: Salt and fresh ground pepper to taste

instructions: Place chickpeas and kidney beans into a large container; cover with several inches of cool water. Let stand 8 hours to overnight; drain.

Heat 1 tablespoon olive oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add red onion; cook and stir until onion has softened and turned translucent, about 5 minutes. Reduce heat to low; continue cooking and stirring until onion is tender and golden brown, about 40 minutes more. Stir in dried mint; cook until onions become dark brown and crisp, about 15 minutes. Set aside for garnish.

Heat remaining olive oil in a stock pot; stir in yellow onions. Cook and stir until onion has turned translucent, about 5 minutes. Add garlic and stir until fragrant, about 1 minute. Stir in chickpeas, kidney beans, and turmeric; toss to combine. Stir in vegetable stock; simmer soup for 1 hour.
Stir scallions, parsley, cilantro, mint, and lentils into soup; simmer 30 minutes more. Break linguine into 3 sections, stir into soup, and cook at a low boil until noodles are soft, 8 to 10 minutes.
Stir 1/2 of the spinach into the soup until wilted, about 1 minute. Stir in remaining spinach and simmer for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.

Stir flour with 3 tablespoons of the soup liquid together in a small bowl until smooth. Stir flour mixture back into soup. Continue to simmer soup over low heat, stirring frequently, until thickened, about 30 minutes.
Serve soup with yogurt and fried red onions.

name: Ash-roasted Sweet Potatoes
instructions: Light a campfire and let it burn down to embers. Nestle potatoes in embers and cook, rotating a quarter turn every 10 minutes or so, until very tender when pierced with a knife, 45–60 minutes. The potatoes will blacken and char on the outside; don't worry, you're only eating the flesh. If you prefer, wrap potatoes individually in foil and cook using the same procedure.

Using tongs, transfer potatoes to plates and let cool at least 10 minutes. Cut a slit lengthwise down each potato and mash flesh with a fork. Spread 1 tablespoon butter inside each potato and drizzle with maple syrup. Top with gingersnaps and marshmallows, if using, and serve.

name: Ashlei's Smoked Trout Dip
instructions: Stir trout, cream cheese, sour cream, Worcestershire sauce, green onion, garlic powder, paprika, lemon juice, horseradish, cayenne pepper, and black pepper together in a bowl until well blended. Cover and refrigerate for 30 minutes before serving.

name: Ashley And Whitney's Yellow Squash And Tomato Packet

ingredients.item: Sheets reynolds wrap® heavy duty aluminum foil

instructions: Preheat oven to 232°C.
Place 1/4 of vegetables in center of a sheet of Reynolds Wrap® Heavy Duty Aluminum Foil. Drizzle with butter; top with basil. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.

Bring up sides of foil over vegetables; fold down two times. Double fold both ends of foil to seal packet, leaving room for heat circulation inside. Repeat to make four packets. Place packets on baking sheet with 1-inch sides.
Bake 15 to 18 minutes on the cookie sheet.
Open packets carefully by cutting beside top fold with a sharp knife, allowing steam to escape. Sprinkle 1 tablespoon Parmesan cheese over vegetables in each packet.

name: Ashotou Soup (erzurum)
instructions: 1. Buğdayı 4 su bardağı su ile yumuşayana kadar haşlayın.
2.  Yoğurt, yumurta sarısı ve unu derin bir kapta karıştırın.
3. Buğdayı haşladığınız sudan 1 kepçe kadar alıp yoğurtlu karışıma ekleyerek karıştırın.
4.  Kaynamakta olan buğdaya ilave edip karıştırma işlemine devam edin.
5. Tavaya tereyağını ekleyip eritin.
6.  Üzerine yemeklik doğradığınız soğanı ilave edip soteleyin.
7.  Soğan yumuşayınca çorbaya ekleyip karıştırın.
8. Kıyma, tuz ve karabiberi iyice yoğurun.
9.  Misketten daha küçük köfteler hazırlayın.
10.  Kaynayan çorbaya ilave edin.
11.  Kişniş, tuz ve karabiberi ilave edip köfteler yumuşayana kadar pişirin.
12. Aşotu çorbasını, sebzeli pilav ile birlikte servis edebilirsiniz.
13.  Şimdiden afiyet olsun.
14. Aşotu Çorbasının Püf Noktaları Nelerdir?Soğanların iri parçalar halinde kalmasını önlemek için, doğramak yerine rendelemeyi tercih edebilirsiniz.
15. Aşotunu saklamak için; bol suda durulayın ve ince ince kıyın.
16.  Üzerine tuz ilave edip 2 saat bekletin.
17.  Bekleme işleminin ardından tekrar sudan geçirin ve elinizle sıkarak suyunu süzün.
18.  Son olarak tuz serpiştirerek cam kavanozlarda saklayabilirsiniz.
19. Çorbanın lezzetini arttırabilmek için, kullanacağınız kıymanın orta yağlı olmasına ve iki kere çekilmesine dikkat edin.
20. Dilerseniz, servis etmeden önce üzerini taze maydanoz yaprakları ile süsleyebilirsiniz.
21. 1 Porsiyon Aşotu Çorbası Kaç Kaloridir?Mineral bakımından zengin olan aşotu çorbasının bir porsiyonu, yaklaşık 45 kaloridir.
22.  Kan şekerini düzenlediği için diyabet hastalarının yiyebileceği yemekler arasında yer alır.

name: Ashura Bread
instructions: 1. Un, tuz, toz şeker ve mayayı geniş bir karıştırma kabında harmanlayın.
2.  Süt, gül suyu, zeytinyağı ve yumurtayı ilave edip yumuşak kıvamlı bir hamur elde edecek şekilde yoğurun.
3.  Hamurun üzerini nemli bir bezle örtün ve 1 saat dinlendirin.
4.  Kuru üzümü geniş bir kaseye alın.
5.  Küp doğradığınız kuru kayısı ve kuru inciri ilave edip üzerine sıcak su ekleyin.
6.  Meyveler yumuşayıncaya kadar yaklaşık 30 dakika bekletin.
7.  Yumuşayan kuru meyveleri kağıt havlu üzerine alarak fazla suyunu çektirin ve mayalanan hamura ilave edin.
8.  Tüm malzemeler iyice özdeşleşinceye kadar hamuru 7-8 dakika daha yoğurun ve hafif unlanmış tezgah üzerine alın.
9.  Tekrar yoğurun ve elinizle yuvarlayarak şekil verin.
10.  Ekmeği yağlı kağıt serili fırın tepsisine alın ve mayalanması için bir saat daha bekletin.
11.  Kabaran hamurun üzerine bıçakla kare şeklinde kesik atıp, bir fırça yardımıyla yumurta akı sürün.
12.  File badem ve susam serpin.
13.  Önceden ısıtılmış 200 derece fırında üzeri kızarıncaya kadar yaklaşık 30 dakika pişirin.
14.  Dilimleyip servis yapın.

name: Ashure
instructions: To make the pudding: Place bulgur, garbanzo beans, white beans, and raisins in 4 separate bowls and add water to cover. Let stand overnight.

The next day, combine garbanzo beans and white beans in a saucepan with water to cover. Bring to a boil; reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, until beans are tender, 1 to 1 ½ hours. Drain and set aside.

Drain bulgur and transfer to a large saucepan. Add 15 cups water (3 quarts plus 3 cups) and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low and simmer until tender, about 15 minutes, skimming and discarding any foam that appears.

When bulgur has thickened, stir in sugar and bring mixture to a boil. Add cooked beans to bulgur mixture. Stir in drained raisins, apricots, orange peel, and cloves. Reduce heat and simmer until pudding thickens and fruit is tender, about 15 minutes.
Pour pudding into individual serving bowls. Garnish with sesame seeds, walnuts, pistachios, currants, and cinnamon. Allow pudding to cool, then serve.

name: Asia Minor Boran With Minced Meat
instructions: Ψιλοκόβουμε το κρέας σε  κιμά με 2 μαχαίρια. Το «κιντιστό» κρέας, αρνί ή μοσχάρι, μοιάζει με χοντροκομμένο κιμά. Ραντίζουμε το ελαιόλαδο στο ψιλοκομμένο κρέας και το αφήνουμε στην άκρη για λίγο. Καθαρίζουμε τα χόρτα, τα πλένουμε και τα στραγγίζουμε  καλά. Τα κόβουμε σε χοντρά κομμάτια Πλένουμε το ρύζι και το στραγγίζουμε. Το ραντίζουμε με τον χυμό ενός λεμονιού. Σε φαρδιά κατσαρόλα, βάζουμε το βούτυρο λιώσει. Προσθέτουμε το ψιλοκομμένο κρέας και το αφήνουμε να ροδίσει για 4-5’, σε δυνατή φωτιά. Προσθέτουμε τα ψιλοκομμένα ξερά κρεμμύδια. Σοτάρουμε μέχρι να γίνει το κρεμμύδι  διάφανο για 4-5’. Προσθέτουμε τα χόρτα κι ανακατεύουμε να πέσει ο όγκος τους και να μαραθούν για 3-4’. Προσθέτουμε την ντομάτα, το ρύζι και 1/2 φλ. βραστό νερό. Προσθέτουμε λίγο αλάτι και λίγο πιπέρι. Σκεπάζουμε την κατσαρόλα και το αφήνουμε να μαγειρευτεί για 15’ σε χαμηλή φωτιά. Σβήνουμε και αφήνουμε να σταθεί για 5’. Σερβίρουμε το μπουρανί σε πιατέλα και περιχύνουμε με την σάλτσα γιαουρτιού. Πασπαλίζουμε με λίγο κόκκινο πιπέρι.

Ραντίζουμε το ελαιόλαδο στο ψιλοκομμένο κρέας και το αφήνουμε στην άκρη για λίγο. Καθαρίζουμε τα χόρτα, τα πλένουμε και τα στραγγίζουμε  καλά. Τα κόβουμε σε χοντρά κομμάτια Πλένουμε το ρύζι και το στραγγίζουμε. Το ραντίζουμε με τον χυμό ενός λεμονιού. Σε φαρδιά κατσαρόλα, βάζουμε το βούτυρο λιώσει. Προσθέτουμε το ψιλοκομμένο κρέας και το αφήνουμε να ροδίσει για 4-5’, σε δυνατή φωτιά. Προσθέτουμε τα ψιλοκομμένα ξερά κρεμμύδια. Σοτάρουμε μέχρι να γίνει το κρεμμύδι  διάφανο για 4-5’. Προσθέτουμε τα χόρτα κι ανακατεύουμε να πέσει ο όγκος τους και να μαραθούν για 3-4’. Προσθέτουμε την ντομάτα, το ρύζι και 1/2 φλ. βραστό νερό. Προσθέτουμε λίγο αλάτι και λίγο πιπέρι. Σκεπάζουμε την κατσαρόλα και το αφήνουμε να μαγειρευτεί για 15’ σε χαμηλή φωτιά. Σβήνουμε και αφήνουμε να σταθεί για 5’. Σερβίρουμε το μπουρανί σε πιατέλα και περιχύνουμε με την σάλτσα γιαουρτιού. Πασπαλίζουμε με λίγο κόκκινο πιπέρι.

Σε φαρδιά κατσαρόλα, βάζουμε το βούτυρο λιώσει. Προσθέτουμε το ψιλοκομμένο κρέας και το αφήνουμε να ροδίσει για 4-5’, σε δυνατή φωτιά. Προσθέτουμε τα ψιλοκομμένα ξερά κρεμμύδια. Σοτάρουμε μέχρι να γίνει το κρεμμύδι  διάφανο για 4-5’. Προσθέτουμε τα χόρτα κι ανακατεύουμε να πέσει ο όγκος τους και να μαραθούν για 3-4’. Προσθέτουμε την ντομάτα, το ρύζι και 1/2 φλ. βραστό νερό. Προσθέτουμε λίγο αλάτι και λίγο πιπέρι. Σκεπάζουμε την κατσαρόλα και το αφήνουμε να μαγειρευτεί για 15’ σε χαμηλή φωτιά. Σβήνουμε και αφήνουμε να σταθεί για 5’. Σερβίρουμε το μπουρανί σε πιατέλα και περιχύνουμε με την σάλτσα γιαουρτιού. Πασπαλίζουμε με λίγο κόκκινο πιπέρι.

Τα κόβουμε σε χοντρά κομμάτια Πλένουμε το ρύζι και το στραγγίζουμε. Το ραντίζουμε με τον χυμό ενός λεμονιού. Σε φαρδιά κατσαρόλα, βάζουμε το βούτυρο λιώσει. Προσθέτουμε το ψιλοκομμένο κρέας και το αφήνουμε να ροδίσει για 4-5’, σε δυνατή φωτιά. Προσθέτουμε τα ψιλοκομμένα ξερά κρεμμύδια. Σοτάρουμε μέχρι να γίνει το κρεμμύδι  διάφανο για 4-5’. Προσθέτουμε τα χόρτα κι ανακατεύουμε να πέσει ο όγκος τους και να μαραθούν για 3-4’. Προσθέτουμε την ντομάτα, το ρύζι και 1/2 φλ. βραστό νερό. Προσθέτουμε λίγο αλάτι και λίγο πιπέρι. Σκεπάζουμε την κατσαρόλα και το αφήνουμε να μαγειρευτεί για 15’ σε χαμηλή φωτιά. Σβήνουμε και αφήνουμε να σταθεί για 5’. Σερβίρουμε το μπουρανί σε πιατέλα και περιχύνουμε με την σάλτσα γιαουρτιού. Πασπαλίζουμε με λίγο κόκκινο πιπέρι.

Πασπαλίζουμε με λίγο κόκκινο πιπέρι.

name: Asia Minor Pies From Kostis Kostakis
original_name: Μικρασιάτικες πίτες από τον Κωστή Κωστάκη
instructions: Σε μία κατσαρόλα ρίχνουμε το ελαιόλαδο και τον κιμά . Ανακατεύουμε μέχρι να σωταριστεί καλά.
Ρίχνουμε τα κρεμμύδια κομμένα σε φέτες, την τριμμένη ντομάτα, τη δάφνη, το πιπέρι και λίγο αλάτι. Ο κιμάς είναι έτοιμος όταν απορροφηθούν όλα τα υγρά.
Τον αφήνουμε να κρυώσει καλά.
Ρίχνουμε τα τυριά τριμμένα, ανακατεύουμε και η γέμιση είναι έτοιμη.

name: Asiago Cremini Pasta Bake With Radicchio

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Cook shell pasta in the boiling water, stirring occasionally until still firm to the bite, about 9 minutes. Drain.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Butter a 9x13-inch baking dish.

Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add mushrooms, onion, and salt and pepper to taste. Cook and stir until mushrooms have browned and onion is translucent, about 7 minutes. Add radicchio, garlic, and sage; cook until radicchio has wilted and garlic is fragrant, about 3 minutes. Remove from heat and stir in pasta.

Melt butter in a saucepan over medium-high heat. Whisk in flour; cook until foaming. Pour in milk, whisking constantly, until mixture comes to a boil and thickens, about 5 minutes. Remove from heat; whisk in Asiago cheese, heavy cream, 1 cup Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese, 1/2 teaspoon salt, and 1/4 teaspoon black pepper until sauce is melted and smooth.
Pour sauce over pasta mixture; stir until thoroughly combined. Transfer to prepared baking dish. Top with remaining 1/2 cup Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese and panko.
Bake in the preheated oven until bubbly, about 30 minutes. Broil until topping is golden brown, about 1 minute.

name: Asiago Lemon Tomato Pasta With Shrimp
instructions: Preheat oven to 204°C.
Arrange all vegetables in a baking pan and drizzle with olive oil, salt and pepper. Bake for 20 minutes. During this time, cook pasta according to directions on the box.
Once sauteed, set aside vegetables and set aside pasta in a separate pot.
In a frying pan, add diced tomatoes, 1 cup stock, Italian seasoning, pepper, and 1 cup asiago cheese. Add vegetables and cook, stirring frequently.
Then add vegetables.  Cook until hot, stirring frequently.
Add shrimp and lemon juice and stir until shrimp is heated.
Melt remaining asiago, garnish with parsley, sliced lemon, and serve.
Enjoy!

name: Asiago-stuffed Dates With Bacon And Smoked Paprika
instructions: Preheat oven to 218°C.
Using small knife, make small cut in side of each date; remove pit.
Insert 1 piece of cheese into each date.
Brush bacon slices generously on 1 side with smoked paprika.
Wrap each date with 1 piece of bacon, with paprika side against date.
Secure bacon with toothpick.
Arrange dates on rimmed baking sheet.
Roast until bacon is browned on bottom, about 6 minutes.
Turn dates; roast until bacon is cooked, about 6 minutes longer.
Transfer to plate; cool slightly.
Remove toothpicks.

name: Asian Beef Lettuce Wraps

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat. Cook and stir ground beef in the hot skillet until browned and crumbly, 5 to 7 minutes. Add hoisin sauce and peanut sauce; cook until heated through, 2 to 3 minutes.
Spoon beef mixture into the center of lettuce leaves, taco-style. Top with cucumber, carrot, and mint. Season with salt and pepper.

name: Asian Broccoli Slaw
instructions: Crush ramen noodles and set seasoning packets aside.
Heat a large skillet over medium-low heat. Cook and stir crushed ramen noodles and sunflower seeds in the hot skillet until toasted and fragrant, 5 to 10 minutes. Remove from heat and set aside.
Combine broccoli coleslaw mix, pineapple, cilantro, and green onions in a large serving bowl.
Make dressing: Whisk together sugar, vinegar, olive oil, sesame oil, black pepper, cayenne pepper, and ramen seasoning packets in a medium bowl until smooth. Pour over slaw mixture; toss to coat.
Mix in toasted ramen noodles and sunflower seeds just before serving.

name: Asian Chicken And Cabbage Salad

ingredients.item: Red jalapeño or fresno chile with some seeds

ingredients.prep: whites and pale greens only, thinly sliced

instructions: Whisk chile, oil, lime juice, soy sauce, brown sugar, fish sauce, and ginger in a large bowl; season with salt. Add cabbage, carrots, scallions, chicken, spinach, and cilantro; toss to coat. Top with peanuts and sesame seeds.

name: Asian Chicken Chopped Salad
instructions: In a large bowl, combine marinade ingredients.
Add chicken into the bowl, coat the chicken, and marinate for 30 minutes in the fridge.
Fully cook chicken.
Cut into cubes.
In a mason jar, combine ingredients for the dressing. Shake and set aside.
Prep the salad. Add all of the salad ingredients into a large bowl and add the cubed chicken and dressing. Toss.
Enjoy!

name: Asian Chicken Marinade For Grilling
instructions: Combine fish sauce, sesame oil, sunflower seed oil, lemon juice, Chinese five-spice powder, and salt in a container; mix well.

name: Asian Chicken Salad Cups
instructions: Combine chicken, cabbage, corn, cilantro, green onions, and almonds in a bowl.

Whisk mayonnaise, rice vinegar, lemon juice, sugar, black pepper, salt, chile-garlic sauce, paprika, red pepper flakes, garlic, sesame oil, honey, and ginger in a separate bowl until sugar has dissolved.
Stir dressing into chicken mixture to thoroughly coat salad with dressing.
Hollow out dinner rolls to make small bowls; fill rolls with salad to serve.

name: Asian Chicken Sesame Salad
instructions: In a small bowl, mix together the vinegar, oil, soy sauce, tahini, brown sugar, and salt.
Add the lettuce, cabbage, green onions, almonds, chicken, and the seeds and stir into the sauce until the sauce covers all the ingredients.
Serve.

name: Asian Chicken Soup Recipe
original_name: Receta de sopa de pollo asiática

ingredients.item: 2  zanahorias medianas ( cortadas en rodajas pequeñas)
2 tallos hierba de limón ( en trozos)

instructions: Comienza la preparación colocando en la licuadora los ingredientes para la pasta de especias, distribuyéndolos uniformemente para facilitar el proceso de mezcla.
Prosigue triturando los ingredientes en la licuadora de manera gradual, obteniendo así una mezcla homogénea y suave.
Marina el pollo con aceite de oliva y salsa de soya, mezclando bien para que el adobo cubra cada trozo. Deja reposar la carne unos minutos para que absorba los sabores.
En un sartén o parrilla caliente, cocina el pollo por ambos lados durante 30-60 segundos por lado hasta dorar. Luego, permite que se cocine a fuego más suave durante 10 minutos.
Una vez listo el pollo, retíralo del fuego y córtalo en rebanadas cuidadosamente.
Calienta un poco de aceite en una olla y añade la pasta de especias, revolviendo y cocinando durante 2 a 3 minutos.
Añade el caldo de pollo a la olla y déjalo cocinar a fuego medio durante 10 minutos para infusionar los sabores.
Cuela el caldo para remover residuos de las especias y vierte el caldo limpio de nuevo en la olla.
Introduce las zanahorias y papas cortadas, junto con la sal, al caldo. Cocina la mezcla a fuego bajo hasta que las verduras estén tiernas, aproximadamente 20 a 30 minutos.

Finalmente, sirve el caldo acompañado de las rebanadas de pollo, brotes de soja, cilantro fresco y chile rojo, distribuyendo los ingredientes de forma que cada bocado sea una experiencia de sabores y texturas.

name: Asian Green Bean Salad
instructions: Place green beans in a pot with water to cover; bring to a boil. Cook until tender, 6 to 8 minutes; drain.
Combine green beans, sugar, soy sauce, oil, mirin, and sweet chile sauce in a bowl. Mix thoroughly. Cover with plastic wrap; refrigerate 30 minutes to 4 hours. Mix in sesame seeds.

name: Asian Greens With Chicken

ingredients.prep: (such as Near East® Toasted Pine Nut)

instructions: Heat 2 teaspoons olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Saute onions in hot oil until slightly softened, 3 to 5 minutes. Place chicken in skillet and season with garlic salt and black pepper. Cover the skillet with a lid and cook until chicken is browned on one side, 3 to 5 minutes. Turn chicken and season with garlic salt and black pepper on the other side. Transfer chicken and onions to a cutting board and chop chicken.
Stir bok choy into the same skillet, reduce heat to low, cover the skillet with a lid, and cook until greens are slightly tender, about 1 1/2 minutes.

Bring water to a boil in a saucepan; remove from heat. Stir couscous spice packet contents and 1 tablespoon olive oil into water; add couscous. Cover saucepan and let stand until water is absorbed completely, about 10 minutes. Fluff couscous with a fork.
Spoon couscous onto plates, top with greens, onions, and chicken, respectively, and sprinkle tomatoes and Mizithra cheese over the top.

name: Asian Lime And Cilantro Sauce For Salmon
instructions: Whisk together the lime juice, soy sauce, and sugar until sugar dissolves. Stir in the cilantro.

name: Asian Noodle Salad With Eggplant, Sugar Snap Peas, And Lime Dressing

ingredients.prep: unpeeled, cut on diagonal into 1/3-inch-thick slices

instructions: Prepare barbecue (medium-high heat). Combine first 3 ingredients; add Asian sesame oil and toss to coat. Sprinkle with salt and pepper. Grill vegetables until tender, turning often, about 7 minutes for eggplant and mushrooms and 5 minutes for green onions. Transfer mushrooms and onions to cutting board; cool slightly. Slice mushrooms and onions.

Meanwhile, cook noodles in large pot of boiling salted water until almost tender but still firm to bite, about 3 minutes. Add sugar snap peas to noodles; cook 1 minute longer. Drain well. Transfer noodle mixture to large serving bowl. Add grilled vegetables.
Whisk last 4 ingredients in small bowl to blend. Toss noodle salad with dressing; season with salt and pepper.
The cooking time of Japanese-style chuka soba noodles varies by a minute or two depending on the brand of noodle. Test them after three minutes to avoid overcooking.

name: Asian Noodle Salad With Shrimp

ingredients.item: Thinly sliced japanese cucumbers or persian cucumbers

instructions: Cook noodles in large saucepan of boiling salted water until tender, stirring occasionally, 4 to 5 minutes. Drain. Rinse with cold water; drain well. Using scissors, cut noodles into thirds.
Whisk lime juice, fish chili-garlic and sugar in small bowl until dissolves. Place shrimp in medium bowl. Add 2 tablespoons dressing; toss to coat.
Divide noodles among bowls. Top with cucumber slices and all remaining ingredients. Spoon with dressing over, and drizzle with remaining dressing.

name: Asian Pear And Ginger Vinaigrette

ingredients.prep: peeled, cored, cut into large pieces

instructions: Cook ginger and oil in a small saucepan over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until ginger is golden, 10–15 minutes. Let cool. Strain ginger oil into a small bowl and set aside. Discard ginger.

Purée Asian pear, vinegar, miso, lime zest, and both peppercorns in a blender, scraping down sides of blender as needed, until smooth. With motor running, gradually add reserved ginger oil and blend until emulsified; season vinaigrette with salt.
DO AHEAD: Ginger oil can be made 1 week ahead; store airtight at room temperature. Vinaigrette can be made 1 day ahead; cover and chill.

name: Asian Pear Salad With Crispy Shallots

ingredients.item: (packed) cilantro leaves with tender stems and mint leaves

instructions: Heat ⅓ cup vegetable oil in a small saucepan over medium-high. Cook 2 large shallots, thinly sliced, stirring occasionally, until golden brown and crisp, 7–9 minutes. Pour through a fine-mesh sieve set over a small bowl. Remove sieve from bowl and sprinkle shallots with a big pinch of kosher salt; toss to coat. Set fried shallots aside. Let oil cool slightly, then measure out ¼ cup shallot oil.

Whisk ¼ cup white wine vinegar, 2 Tbsp. Dijon mustard, and 1 Tbsp. honey in a large bowl to combine. Gradually stream in ¼ cup shallot oil, whisking constantly until emulsified. Season dressing with salt and freshly ground pepper.

Add 4 Asian pears, cored, cut into 3x½" sticks, to dressing and toss to coat. Add 1 Fresno chile, very thinly sliced, 1 cup (packed) cilantro leaves with tender stems and mint leaves, and most of reserved fried shallots and toss to combine. Top salad with more cilantro and mint and remaining fried shallots.

name: Asian Pear Salad With Peanut-lime Dressing

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions:
Melt butter with orange juice, five-spice powder, salt, and sugar in a medium skillet over medium heat. Add peanuts and cook, stirring, until peanuts darken and orange juice mixture reduces to a glaze, 5–7 minutes. Scrape peanuts onto a plate; let cool.
Do Ahead: Peanuts can be prepared 3 days ahead. Let cool; store airtight at room temperature.
Whisk peanut butter, oil, lime juice, honey, soy sauce, and vinegar in a large bowl until smooth. Season dressing with salt.

Cut cauliflower into quarters through stem; trim core. Thinly slice on a mandoline or with a sharp knife; coarsely chop any stray florets. Add cauliflower, Asian pear, arugula, cilantro, and half of peanuts to dressing and toss to coat.
Divide salad among plates or arrange on a platter and top with remaining peanuts.

name: Asian Pear–shiso Salad With Quinoa

ingredients.prep: white and pale green parts finely chopped, dark green parts thinly sliced

ingredients.item: Shiso leaves or  0.25 cup mint leaves

instructions: Bring a large saucepan of salted water to a boil. Add quinoa, return to a boil, and cook, stirring occasionally, until tender, 12–15 minutes. Drain; set aside.

Whisk together white and pale green scallion parts, chile, vinegar, 1 tsp. lime juice, and 1 tsp. honey in a large bowl. Add pear and cucumber; toss to coat. Season with salt; let salad sit 15 minutes.
Meanwhile, whisk yogurt, sesame paste, a pinch of salt, remaining 1 tsp. lime juice, and remaining 1 tsp. honey in a small bowl until smooth.

Just before serving, toss salad with dark green scallion parts and shiso. Spread yogurt mixture over a shallow bowl. Using tongs, mound salad on top, leaving behind any liquid in bowl. Scatter sesame seeds and reserved quinoa over.

name: Asian Pork Tenderloin Packets
instructions: Preheat oven to 232°C or grill to medium-high.
Center one-fourth of pork slices, broccoli, carrots, water chestnuts, bell pepper and onions evenly on a sheet of Reynolds Wrap® Aluminum Foil.
Mix sweet and sour sauce, stir fry sauce, sesame oil and ginger in a small bowl; spoon evenly over pork and vegetables.
Bring up foil sides. Double fold top and ends to seal packet, leaving room for heat circulation inside. Repeat to make four packets.
If freezing, place packets in Hefty® Slider Bags. Label bags with permanent marker. Freeze till ready to thaw and cook.
Place frozen packets in refrigerator to thaw for 10 to 12 hours.
Place thawed packets on baking sheet to cook in oven or transport to grill.
Bake 20 to 22 minutes in oven OR GRILL 15 to 16 minutes in covered grill, till pork reaches 71°C and vegetables are crisp-tender. Serve with rice and more sauce, if desired.

name: Asian Pot Roast In An Instant Pot

ingredients.item: Chuck roast trimmed of excess fat
Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Turn on a multi-functional pressure cooker (such as Instant Pot) and select Sauté function. Heat 2 tablespoons olive oil in the pot. Sear chuck roast in hot oil until brown on all sides, about 10 minutes. Remove roast and set aside. Add remaining 1 tablespoon olive oil to the pot. Cook and stir onion, ginger, garlic, salt, and pepper in hot oil until onion is translucent, about 5 minutes. Add water, tamari, stevia, and bouillon.
Return roast to the pot. Close and lock the lid; set pressure to High and set the timer for 60 minutes. Allow 10 to 15 minutes for pressure to build.

Release pressure using the natural-release method according to manufacturer's instructions for 10 minutes. Release remaining pressure carefully using the quick-release method according to manufacturer's instructions, about 5 minutes. Unlock and remove the lid. Remove roast to a plate.
Add red bell peppers to the pot and whisk in arrowroot. Set to Sauté mode; cook and stir until sauce is thickened and bell peppers are softened, about 5 minutes.
Return roast to the pot; stir until heated through, about 3 minutes more. Top with chopped cilantro.

name: Asian Quinoa
instructions: Bring water and quinoa to a boil in a saucepan. Reduce heat to medium-low, cover, and simmer until quinoa is tender, 15 to 20 minutes.
Meanwhile, butter in a medium saucepan. Add zucchini, mushrooms, garlic, and ginger; cook and stir until tender, 8 to 10 minutes. Stir in 1 tablespoon soy sauce and hoisin sauce.
Mix remaining soy sauce into the cooked quinoa; scoop into a serving bowl. Top with the vegetable mixture. Garnish with furikake seasoning and sea salt.

name: Asian Rice Salad
instructions: Coza o arroz em água abundante temperada com sal, até ficar no ponto desejado. Escorra-o, passe-o por água fria e reserve numa taça grande.
Limpe e corte em pedacinhos o pimento amarelo, a rama de aipo e a cenoura. Junte estes ingredientes ao arroz e envolva delicadamente com um garfo.
Numa pequena tigela, misture bem com uma vara de arames o miso com a água morna, o açúcar, o mel, o vinagre e um pouco de pimenta moída. Retifique o sal, se necessário.
Corte a alga em tiras muito finas e coloque sobre a salada. Polvilhe com as sementes de sésamo e sirva à temperatura ambiente, temperando com o molho de miso.

name: Asian Slaw

ingredients.item: Beef flavor ramen noodles with seasoning packet
Bottled oil and vinegar salad dressing

instructions: Crush ramen noodles in a bowl. Stir in seasoning packet, sunflower seeds, almonds, green onions, oil and vinegar dressing, and sugar; mix until sugar is dissolved.
Place slaw mix into a large salad bowl; pour dressing mixture on top and toss lightly to combine well.

name: Asian Sticky Ribs

ingredients.prep: whites and green parts separated, plus more for garnish
sliced, divided, plus more for garnish

instructions: Add the pork ribs to a large bowl and season with the salt, 1½ teaspoons sugar, the garlic powder, and black pepper.
Slice the white parts of the green onions lengthwise and chop the green parts; set the greens aside.
Heat the oil in a large pan over medium heat. Add the shallot, half of the jalapeño, white parts of the green onions, and garlic and sauté until light golden, 3 minutes.

Add the ribs to the aromatics and brown on all sides, about 4 minutes, then add the grated lemongrass, remaining 2½ tablespoons of sugar, the nước màu, fish sauce, enough water to come about halfway up the ribs, the rest of the jalapeño, and the scallion greens. Cover and simmer for 20 minutes, or until the liquid has reduced by half and the ribs are caramelized.
Garnish with sesame seeds and more jalapeño and scallions and serve over rice.
Enjoy!

name: Asian Stir-fry
instructions: Arranje os bifes de peru, corte-os em cubinhos e deite-os numa tigela. Tempere com o dente de alho picado e uma pitada de sal.
Arranje e lave o pimento, corte-o ao meio, rejeite-lhe as sementes e peles brancas e corte-o em cubos. Arranje e lave os cogumelos e corte-os em pedaços. Descasque e corte o gengibre em tiras finas.

Aqueça o azeite numa frigideira grande, junte a carne e deixe saltear até ganhar cor. Adicione depois o pimento, os cogumelos e os rebentos de soja e deixe cozinhar, mexendo, até que os legumes fiquem macios. Junte o gengibre e envolva.

À parte, misture bem o açúcar, o vinagre, o ketchup, a mostarda, o molho de soja, tomilho picado e 1 dl de água, verta para a frigideira e deixe cozinhar até apurar muito bem. Adicione as amêndoas torradas e sirva com massa de arroz ou massa fresca.

name: Asian Style Carrot Salad Recipe
original_name: Receta de ensalada de zanahoria al estilo asiático

ingredients.item: 2 cdas de salsa de soja (baja en sodio)
1 ½ cdas de vinagre de arroz

instructions: Pela las zanahorias y rállalas con un cortador hasta que queden finas láminas alargadas.
Coloca las zanahorias en un bol.
Pela el diente de ajo y trocéalo finamente. También corta el cebollín en trocitos pequeños. Incorpora ambos al bol.
Vierte el aceite de sésamo, vinagre de arroz y la salsa de soja.
Agrega el chile crujiente, las semillas de sésamo y la miel.
Sazona con una pizca de sal y pimienta al gusto.
Mezcla todo muy bien hasta que todo queden completamente integrado.
Sirve y disfruta.

name: Asian Style Chicken Recipe
original_name: Receta de pollo al estilo asiático

ingredients.item: 1  chorro de salsa de soja oscura

instructions: Sazona los muslitos con sal y pimienta al gusto.
Pela la cebolla y trocea en cuadritos pequeños. Haz lo mismo con los pimientos, los dientes de ajo y el jengibre.
Calienta una sartén o wok con aceite de oliva y el aceite de chile.
Incorpora los muslitos y saltea hasta que estén bien doraditos.
Agrega la cebolla, pimientos, ajo y jengibre troceados. Mezcla muy bien.
Añade a la sartén la soja clásica, la soja oscura y medio vaso de agua. Mezcla y tapa. Cocina por 45 minutos a fuego - bajo hasta que queden tiernos y jugosos.
Una vez estén listos, apaga y sirve. ¡Disfrútalos!

name: Asian Tuna Salad
instructions: Mix tuna, cranberries, carrot, green onions, cilantro, sesame seeds, ginger, ground chile pepper, and kosher salt together in a large bowl.
Whisk mayonnaise, chile paste, sesame oil, soy sauce, and honey together in a separate bowl; add to tuna mixture and stir to coat.

name: Asian Turkey Meatballs
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.

Make the meatballs: Combine turkey, cilantro, bread crumbs, egg, scallions, vegetable oil, sesame oil, and soy sauce in a large bowl. Gently mix with your hands until combined. Roll tablespoon-sized scoops between your palms to form meatballs. Arrange meatballs on the prepared baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until well browned, 20 to 25 minutes. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read at least 74°C (74 degrees C).

While the meatballs are cooking, make the dipping sauce: Smash ginger with the heavy side of a knife and place into a small pot. Add brown sugar, soy sauce, and rice vinegar. Cook over medium-low heat, stirring often, until sugar dissolves, about 3 minutes. Simmer, stirring frequently, until slightly thickened, about 3 minutes. Fish out ginger and pour sauce into small cups for serving.
Serve meatballs alongside sauce, with toothpicks for dipping.

name: Asian Turkey Meatballs With Chile-garlic Glaze
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Grease a large baking tray with cooking spray.
Combine turkey, corn flake crumbs, egg, scallions, ginger, soy sauce, sesame oil, parsley, salt, and garlic in a large bowl. Shape into 1-inch meatballs. Arrange on the prepared baking tray.
Combine soy sauce, water, chile-garlic paste, and palm sugar in a separate bowl to make the glaze.
Bake meatballs in the preheated oven until no longer pink on the outside, about 10 minutes. Coat the meatballs with the glaze. Continue baking until glaze thickens, 10 to 12 minutes.

name: Asian Turkey Sliders
instructions: Preheat oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Cover a baking sheet with aluminum foil and grease with cooking spray.
Combine turkey, 3/4 cup bread crumbs, green onions, egg, soy sauce, brown sugar, ginger, and garlic in a bowl; mix well.

Pour remaining bread crumbs into a shallow bowl. Roll turkey mixture into sixteen 1 1/2-inch balls with wet hands and coat in bread crumbs. Flatten gently between your palms to create a patty and place on the baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until cooked through and no longer pink in the center, 20 to 25 minutes.
Stir mayonnaise and teriyaki sauce together in a bowl. Season with sugar.
Serve turkey sliders on Hawaiian dinner rolls with a small amount of mayo-teriyaki sauce.

name: Asian-inspired Chicken Lettuce Wraps

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Set 2 to 3 tablespoons green onions aside for garnish. Combine remaining green onions, water chestnuts, hoisin sauce, soy sauce, Sriracha, rice vinegar, ginger, and red pepper flakes in a small bowl. Set aside.

Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Cook and stir yellow onion in hot oil until softened, about 5 minutes. Add ground chicken, garlic, and sesame oil. Cook and stir until chicken is crumbly and no longer pink, 5 to 10 minutes.
Add hoisin mixture to chicken mixture in the skillet and cook until heated through, about 5 minutes. Season with salt and pepper.
Fill lettuce leaves with chicken mixture and top with reserved green onions.

name: Asian-style Ground Beef Cabbage Wraps

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat. Cook ground beef in the hot skillet, breaking up any large clumps, until browned and crumbly, about 5 minutes. Add mushrooms and onion; cook and stir until vegetables soften, about 4 minutes.

Add coconut aminos, Sriracha sauce, ginger, garlic, and vinegar. Cook, stirring occasionally, until most of the liquid has evaporated, about 10 minutes. Remove from heat and stir in sesame oil. Season with salt and pepper.

Evenly divide mixture among 8 cabbage leaves; sprinkle carrots and onions on top. Sprinkle green onions, cilantro, sesame seeds, and red pepper flakes on top. Roll each cabbage leaf over and around filling to form a packet.

name: Asparagus And Blue Cheese Avocado Toast
instructions: Toast bread and spread with butter. Top with smashed avocado. Lay the asparagus spears horizontally over the avocado, alternating which way they face. Sprinkle with blue cheese and drizzle with olive oil.

name: Asparagus And Endive Salad With Comté Cream

ingredients.prep: trimmed, cut on a diagonal into 2" pieces
coarsely grated, plus more shaved for serving

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven and preheat to 350°. Toast ½ cup blanched hazelnuts in a single layer on a rimmed baking sheet, tossing halfway through, until golden brown and fragrant, 17–22 minutes. Remove from oven; sprinkle with kosher salt. Let cool, then coarsely chop. Set aside.

Meanwhile, cook 1 bunch white and/or green asparagus (about 1 lb.), trimmed, cut on a diagonal into 2" pieces, in a large pot of boiling salted water until crisp-tender, about 2 minutes. Immediately transfer to a bowl of ice water and let cool 2 minutes. Drain and transfer to paper towels; pat dry. Set aside.

Blend 1 garlic clove, finely grated, 4 oz. Comté cheese, coarsely grated, 1 Tbsp. fresh lemon juice, ¼ cup extra-virgin olive oil, a pinch of kosher salt, and 6 Tbsp. cold water in a blender on high speed until very smooth and creamy (and slightly fluffy; almost like mayonnaise), 1–2 minutes for a high-speed blender or about 3 minutes for a regular blender. Taste and season Comté cream with more salt if needed. (It will thicken as it sits.)

Place 3 Tbsp. red wine vinegar, 1 Tbsp. Comté cream, and remaining 2 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in a small bowl; season with salt and freshly ground pepper and whisk to combine. Toss 3 medium endives, leaves separated, 2 medium shallots, thinly sliced into rings, reserved asparagus, and reserved hazelnuts in a large bowl to combine. Drizzle dressing over as desired (you may not need all of it); toss to coat. Taste salad and season with more salt if needed.
Evenly spread remaining Comté cream over a platter and arrange salad on top. Scatter shaved Comté cheese over and season with more pepper.

name: Asparagus And Goat Cheese Quiche
instructions: 1. Hamur işi tarifleri arasında okurlarımız tarafından çok ilgi gören bir seçim.
2.  Hamur için un ve tuzu karıştırma kasesine eleyip ekmek gibi ufalanıncaya kadar yağı yedirin.
3.  Azar azar suyu ekleyip hamuru top haline getirin.
4. Hamuru yağlanmış tart kalıbına yayın ve üzerine yağlı kağıt serin.
5.  Üzerine ağırlık yapması için kuru fasulye yerleştirin.
6.  180 dereceye ayarlı fırında 10 dakika pişirin.
7.  Kağıdı ve fasulyeleri alıp hamuru sertleşinceye kadar 5 dakika daha pişirin.
8.  Soğumaya bırakın.
9. Kuşkonmazların sert olmayan saplarını ince doğrayın.
10.  İnce doğranmış soğan ile tavada yumuşayıncaya kadar ayçiçeği yağı ile kavurun.
11.  Kuşkonmaz karışımını tart tabanına yayın.
12. Bir kasede yumurta ile kremayı çırpın.
13.  Peynir, tuz ve karabiberi ekleyip tartın üzerine dökün.
14.  Kalan kuşkonmazları iç malzemenin üzerine çark biçiminde dizin ve tekrar fırına vererek üzeri sertleşinceye kadar yaklaşık 25–30 dakika pişirin.
15.  Dilimleyerek servis yapın.
16.  Afiyet olsun.
17. Lezzeti ile yemeye doyamayacağınız sebzeli kiş tarifine göz atmayı unutmayın.

name: Asparagus And Mushroom Pesto Spaghetti Squash
instructions: Preheat oven to 400ºF (200ºC).

With a sharp knife, slice the squash in half. If the squash is too tough, puncture in several places forming a dotted line around the squash. Microwave for 3-5 minutes to soften. Allow to cool before cutting in half.
Scoop out the seeds, brush with oil, and sprinkle with salt, and pepper. Bake for 40-45 minutes, or until a fork can easily pierce the skin.
Meanwhile, in a blender combine basil, olive oil, vegetarian Parmesan cheese, garlic, pine nuts, and salt. Set aside.
In a pan add the olive oil and garlic over medium-high heat, sautè 30 seconds-1 minute, add in mushrooms and cook for 3 minutes. Add asparagus and stir until cooked.
Remove squash from the oven, with a fork pull at the edges to produce that stringy “spaghetti” quality until you’ve completed both of them.
In the mushroom and asparagus pan combine “spaghetti” and pesto and mix. Return to the squash and serve with or without plates. Garnish with parmesan.
Enjoy!

name: Asparagus And Mushroom Risotto Recipe
original_name: Receta de risotto de espárragos y champiñones
instructions: Pela la cebolla y corta finamente en cuadritos. Filetea los dientes de ajo.
Limpia los champiñones y rebana. Haz lo propio con los espárragos, pero corta en trozos.
Calienta una cazuela con una cucharada de mantequilla y un poco de aceite.
Saltea los espárragos y los champiñones por 3 minutos. Retira de la cazuela y reserva.
Añade un poco más de aceite de oliva y sofríe los dientes de ajo y la cebolla por un par de minutos.
Agrega el arroz, sazona con sal y pimienta al gusto. Mezcla muy bien.
Vierte el vino blanco y cocina a fuego medio hasta que se evapore el alcohol.
Luego,  vierte de taza en taza en caldo de vegetales y cocina sin dejar de mezclar.
Recuerda que debes ir mezclando, mientras vas agregando el caldo para que quede bien cremoso.
Cuando falte añadir la última taza de caldo, agrega el espárragos y los champiñones previamente salteados. Rectifica de sal y pimienta.  Termina de cocinar, debe quedar bien cremoso.
Por último, incorpora la cucharada de mantequilla que falta y el queso parmesano. Mezcla muy bien.
Sirve calienta. ¡Disfruta!

name: Asparagus And Mushroom Tarts
instructions: Roll out each pastry sheet on work surface to 10-inch square. Cut each into 4 squares. Using small knife, score 1/2-inch border (do not cut through pastry) around inside edges of each square. Arrange squares on 2 rimmed baking sheets. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.
