name: Aveiro Rolled Pie
instructions: Unte um tabuleiro com manteiga e reserve. Numa tigela, bata 7 ovos com 7 gemas e 300 g do açúcar, até obter um creme volumoso e esbranquiçado. Junte a farinha e envolva.

Deite a massa no tabuleiro e leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 180ºc, até a massa ficar cozida mas não completamente seca. Deixe arrefecer e desenforme sobre uma folha de papel vegetal polvilhada com açúcar.

Leve ao lume o restante açúcar com 200 ml de água, deixe ferver durante 3 minutos, depois retire e reserve. Numa tigela, misture os restantes ovos e gemas com a farinha maisena. Adicione a calda de açúcar, aos poucos e mexendo sempre, e leve novamente ao lume, sem parar de mexer. Deixe ferver durante 1 minuto, depois retire e deixe arrefecer.
Barre a massa com 1/3 do creme anterior e enrole-a cuidadosamente. Deite o restante creme sobre a torta e salpique com amêndoa laminada tostada.

name: Avgolemono Seafood Stew

ingredients.prep: fronds reserved, bulb quartered, cored, thinly sliced

ingredients.item: . small clams (such as littleneck or manila; about 12)
. diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt
. flaky white fish fillets (such as cod
ingredients.prep: halibut, or snapper), cut into 4" pieces
plus parsley leaves and/or dill sprigs for serving

instructions: Blend 3 large egg yolks, 1 large egg, and ½ cup fresh lemon juice in a blender until smooth.

Heat 3 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in a medium Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium. Cook 1 medium fennel bulb, quartered, cored, thinly sliced, 1 medium onion, thinly sliced, and 6 garlic cloves, finely chopped, stirring often, until fennel is softened and onion is translucent, 6–8 minutes. Add 1 lb. small clams (such as littleneck or Manila; about 12), scrubbed, 1 lb. large shrimp, peeled, deveined, and 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt. Cook, stirring occasionally, until shrimp is just starting to turn opaque, about 4 minutes. Stir in 1½ cups water. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to a simmer.

Measure out ¾ cup broth in a heatproof measuring glass. With blender on low speed, slowly pour broth into egg mixture and blend to combine. Whisking constantly, slowly pour egg mixture into pot. Arrange 1 lb. flaky white fish fillets (such as cod, halibut, or snapper), cut into 4" pieces, in pot, overlapping if needed, and bring to a simmer. Reduce heat to low and add ¼ cup heavy cream and 1 tsp. freshly ground pepper. Cook, stirring occasionally, until fish is opaque throughout and clams have opened, about 4 minutes; discard any clams that haven’t opened. Remove from heat and stir in 2 Tbsp. finely chopped parsley and/or dill. Taste and add more salt if needed.
Ladle stew into shallow bowls; top with fennel fronds and parsley leaves and/or dill sprigs. Serve with lemon wedges.

name: Avgolemono Soup
instructions: Place chicken, 1 chopped onion, celery, carrot, bay leaves, salt, and oregano in a large pot. Pour water over the top; bring to a boil, reduce heat to medium-low, and simmer, skimming foam as necessary, until chicken is falling off the bone, 60 to 90 minutes. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of the thigh, near the bone, should read 74°C (74 degrees C).
Transfer chicken to a large bowl to cool. Strain all vegetables from simmering broth, discard vegetables, and return broth to the pot.
Chop chicken meat into bite-sized pieces and set aside.
Combine 2 cups diced onion, olive oil, and a pinch of salt in a large skillet over medium heat. Cook and stir onion mixture until onion is soft, sweet, and golden, 7 to 10 minutes.

Stir onion mixture into broth in the pot and set over medium-low heat; add Arborio rice and a pinch of salt. Bring to a simmer; cook, stirring occasionally, until rice is very tender and broth flavors combine, about 45 minutes.
Whisk together eggs, black pepper, and cayenne pepper in a medium bowl; whisk in lemon juice until combined. Slowly pour 1 cup broth mixture into egg mixture, whisking constantly.
Whisk another 1 cup broth mixture into egg mixture, then pour egg mixture into the pot. Stir well.
Add chopped chicken and cook until heated through, about 5 minutes more.
Serve hot and enjoy!

name: Aviation
instructions: Combine gin, lemon juice, and maraschino liqueur in a cocktail shaker. Fill shaker with ice, cover, and shake vigorously until outside of shaker is very cold, about 20 seconds.
Place cherry in a martini glass and strain cocktail through a Hawthorne strainer or a slotted spoon into glass.

name: Aviation Cocktail
instructions: Combine gin, maraschino liqueur, and lemon juice in a cocktail shaker. Add ice, cover and shake until chilled. Strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
Garnish with maraschino cherry.

name: Avocado And Bacon Frittata
instructions: Numa tigela, bata ligeiramente os ovos com o leite, sal e pimenta. Descasque o abacate, retire-lhe o caroço e corte-o em pedaços pequenos.
Unte com manteiga uma forma redonda sem buraco e forre-a com papel vegetal. Deite nela o preparado anterior, espalhe por cima os pedaços de abacate e as tiras de bacon e polvilhe com o queijo ralado.
Leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 180ºC, durante 30 minutos. Retire a pizza do forno, deixe arrefecer ligeiramente, desenforme e sirva cortada em fatias.

name: Avocado And Black Bean Dip
instructions: Mix avocado, black beans, lime juice, and garlic together in a microwave-safe bowl. Sprinkle with Cheddar cheese.
Microwave dip on high until cheese is melted, about 1 minute. Season with sea salt if desired.

name: Avocado And Black Eyed Pea Salsa

ingredients.item: Salt and black pepper to taste

instructions: Mix together avocados, peas, corn, tomatoes, cilantro, and green onion lightly in a salad bowl until well combined.

Whisk together red wine vinegar, olive oil, cumin, and garlic in a medium bowl and pour over salad. Season with salt and pepper; lightly toss salad again. Chill in the refrigerator to blend the flavors before serving, about 1 hour.

name: Avocado And Bulgur Salad
instructions: Bring ¾ cup water to a boil in a small saucepan. Stir in ¾ cup bulgur, ½ tsp. ground cumin, and a pinch of kosher salt, then immediately cover and remove from heat. Let sit 10 minutes. Fluff bulgur with a fork.

Meanwhile, heat 2 Tbsp. olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high. Cook 12 scallions, turning occasionally, until well charred, about 5 minutes. Transfer to a cutting board, leaving excess oil behind in pan, and coarsely chop.
Reduce heat to medium; add ½ cup coarsely chopped raw pistachios to same pan. Cook, stirring often, until browned in spots, 1–2 minutes. Transfer to a small bowl; season with salt.

Toss bulgur, scallions, zest and juice of 1 lemon, 1–2 jalapeños, very thinly sliced, depending on your heat preference, ½ cup coarsely chopped cilantro, and remaining 3 Tbsp. olive oil in a large bowl to combine; season with lots of salt and freshly ground black pepper.

Add 2 large avocados, cut into large pieces and 3 cups baby or trimmed mature arugula to salad and toss gently to combine. Divide among plates and top with pistachios and more cilantro; season with more pepper.

name: Avocado And Cherry Tomato Salad With Mozzarella
original_name: Ensalada de aguacate y tomate cherry con mozzarella

ingredients.item: 200 g de tomates cherry (aprox. 1 taza y media)
125 g de bolitas de mozzarella fresca (1 bola grande también sirve)
2 cucharadas de aceite de oliva virgen extra
(opcional) unas gotas de vinagre balsámico o limón

instructions: Lavamos bien los tomates cherry y los cortamos por la mitad. Si son muy grandes, en cuartos.
Pelamos el aguacate, retiramos el hueso y lo cortamos en dados medianos. Lo añadimos al bol.
Incorporamos las bolitas de mozzarella enteras (o troceamos si usamos una grande)
Picamos la albahaca en tiras finas y la añadimos por encima
Aliñamos con aceite de oliva virgen extra, sal al gusto y, si nos gusta, un toque de vinagre balsámico o limón. Mezclamos con cuidado para que el aguacate no se deshaga y servimos de inmediato.

name: Avocado And Chicken Flat Bread

ingredients.item: 100 g süzme yoğurtavokado mısır salsa için

instructions: 1. Zeytinyağı, acı biber, acı biber sosu, sarımsak ve baharatları blender’dan geçirin.
2.  Daha sonra tavuklarınızı bu karışım ile marine edip, 2-3 saat buzdolabında bekletin.
3. Ispanaklı yassı ekmek için; ıspanakları orta ateşte 1 dakika kavurun.
4.  Süzgece alıp bastırarak iyice suyunu çıkarın.
5.  Blender’da püre haline getirin.
6.  Un, maya ve tuzu karıştırın.
7.  Yoğurt ve 50 ml sıcak suyu karıştırarak un karışımına ekleyip yoğurun.
8.  Daha sonra ıspanakları ekleyip yumuşak hamur elde edinceye kadar tekrar yoğurun.
9.  Gerekirse ekstra un ekleyin.
10.  İçi yağlanmış derin bir kase içine alın ve streç film ile üzerini kaplayıp kabarmasını bekleyin.
11.  6 eşit bezeye bölün ve her birini 3 mm kalınlığında açın.
12.  Orta-yüksek ateşte yapışmaz yüzeyli bir tavada pişirin.
13. Avokadolu salsa için; ızgara tavasını ocağa alıp iyice ısıtın.
14.  Tüm malzemeleri tavaya ekleyerek hafif soteleyin.
15.  Lime’ı ikiye bölün ve iç kısımlarını tavada hafif kızartın.
16. Marine ettiğiniz tavukları çıkarıp üzerine tekrar yağ gezdirin.
17.  Izgara tavasında çevirerek 6-7 dakika pişirin.
18.  5 dakika bekletip 1 parmak kalınlığında dilimleyin.
19. Servis için; yassı ekmeklerin üzerine süzme yoğurdu yayın, sonra tavuk dilimlerini, ikiye kesilmiş domatesleri, salsayı ve kişniş yapraklarını ekleyip yarım lime ile servis yapın.

name: Avocado And Chocolate Popsicles Recipe
original_name: Receta de paletas heladas de aguacate y chocolate
instructions: Saca la pulpa de los aguacates y colócala en la licuadora
Agrega la leche de coco, el coco rallado y la leche condensada
Licúa todo muy bien
Llena vasitos o moldes para paleta y congela durante al menos 4 horas
Derrite las dos barras de chocolate a baño María y retira del calor
Baña tus paletas ya congeladas con el chocolate y vuelve a meter al congelador un rato más
Disfruta

name: Avocado And Corn Salsa

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Gently stir avocados, corn, cilantro, lime juice, shallots, and chile pepper together in a large bowl; season with salt and black pepper.
Store in the refrigerator until ready to serve.

name: Avocado And Crab Soup
instructions: Mix crabmeat, celery, chervil and lemon zest in a bowl. Cover and chill crab salad.

Halve and pit avocados; scoop flesh into a blender. Add vegetable stock, crème fraîche, lime juice, kosher salt, and 1 1/4 cups water. Purée until smooth. Season soup to taste with salt and pepper; chill.
Divide soup among 4 bowls. Spoon crab salad into center of each bowl.

name: Avocado And Egg Breakfast Sandwich

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Toast sliced bagel in a toaster until golden brown.
While the bagel is toasting, heat oil in a frying pan over medium heat and add egg. Pan-fry until set, 3 to 4 minutes.
Mash avocado (a fork will do the job nicely!) in a medium bowl; sprinkle with salt and black pepper.
Spread 1 tablespoon cream cheese on each toasted bagel half. Top with mashed avocado and egg, and add more salt and pepper if desired.

name: Avocado And Grapefruit Salad

ingredients.item: Verjus* or 3 1/2 teaspoons white grape juice and 2 1/2 teaspoons apple cider vinegar

ingredients.prep: halved, pitted, peeled, thinly sliced, rinsed under cold water
all peel and white pith cut away, segments cut from between membranes

instructions: Whisk first 3 ingredients in small bowl to blend. Gradually whisk in both oils. Season dressing to taste with sea salt and pepper.
Arrange lettuce on platter. Top with avocado and grapefruit, then dressing.

name: Avocado And Grapefruit Salad With Edamame

ingredients.prep: peel and pith removed, cut into segments

instructions: Toss together watercress, grapefruit, avocado, edamame, oil, and lemon juice in a medium bowl. Top with pistachios.

name: Avocado And Olive Pancakes
instructions: Descasque os abacates, coloque a polpa numa picadora, junte as azeitonas, os ovos, o leite, a farinha e o fermento, tempere com sal e pimenta e triture tudo, até obter uma consistência homogénea (se necessário, adicione um pouco de leite).
Aqueça uma frigideira antiaderente, deite nela colheradas do preparado anterior e deixe-as corar, de ambos os lados. Retire e reserve.
Bata o queijo creme com a mostarda e a maionese. Adicione o alho em pó, tempere com sal, pimenta e sumo de limão e envolva. Sirva com as panquecas.

name: Avocado And Quinoa Salad Recipe
original_name: Receta de ensalada de aguacate y quinoa
instructions: Lava muy bien la quinoa hasta que retires todas las impurezas.
Coloca la quinoa lavada con dos tazas a de agua a hervir por aproximadamente 30 minutos o hasta que quede bien esponjada.
Una vez lista, apaga, escurre muy bien y deja enfriar.
Cuando la quinoa esté lista, coloca en un bol y agrega los tomates cortados y la cebolla.
Agrega el aguacate y el cilantro troceado. Sazona con sal al gusto, el zumo de limón y un chorrito de aceite de oliva. Mezcla hasta que quede todo integrado.
Sirve en un plato, decora con más cilantro y listo.

name: Avocado And Roasted Chickpea Toast
instructions: Spread mashed avocado over toast, and top with roasted chickpeas and a dash of hot sauce.
Enjoy!

name: Avocado And Shrimp Salad
instructions: Coza o camarão em água com sal, escorra e deixe arrefecer. Descasque o abacate, retire-lhe o caroço e corte-o em fatias. Regue-o depois com o sumo de limão para não oxidar. Corte o queijo em cubos pequenos.

Disponha a mistura de alfaces e a rúcula numa saladeira. Coloque por cima o queijo, o camarão e o abacate. Tempere com vinagre balsâmico, azeite, sal e orégãos. Acrescentes algumas nozes e sirva de imediato.

name: Avocado And Tangerine Salad With Jalapeno Vinaigrette

ingredients.prep: arugula, or watercress, thick stems trimmed

instructions: Simmer tangerine juice in a small saucepan until syrupy and reduced to about 2 Tbsp., 5–8 minutes. Let cool.

Heat a small heavy skillet over medium- high heat. Cook jalapeño, turning occa-sionally, until blistered and charred all over, about 8 minutes. (Alternatively, roast jalapeño directly over gas flame, turning occasionally.) Let cool; remove stem, skin, and seeds, then finely chop.

Whisk shallot, vinegar, reduced tangerine juice, and half of jalapeño in a medium bowl; season with salt and pepper. Whisk in vegetable oil, then olive oil. Add remaining jalapeño, if desired. Set vinaigrette aside.
Toss avocados, tangerines, purslane, mint, and vinaigrette in a large bowl; top with feta.
DO AHEAD: Vinaigrette can be made 1 day ahead; cover and chill.

name: Avocado And Tomato Salad
instructions: Combine all ingredients in a bowl and gently stir to combine.
Cover, and store in the refrigerator until ready to serve.
Enjoy!

name: Avocado Breakfast Sandwich

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat. Crack eggs into skillet; cook for 1 to 2 minutes. Flip and cook egg until done, 2 to 5 minutes more. Transfer eggs to a plate and season with salt and pepper.

Spread butter onto 1 side of each bread slice. Heat a skillet over medium heat. Lay bread slices in the hot skillet, butter-side down. Quickly layer Swiss cheese, 1 fried egg, Cheddar cheese, 1 fried egg, avocado, and remaining bread slice, butter-side up.
Carefully flip sandwich to grill other side until golden brown, 3 to 4 minutes.
Remove sandwich from skillet and cut in half.

name: Avocado Breakfast Toast

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Heat a skillet over medium heat; fry bacon until slightly crunchy, about 5 minutes. Transfer to a cutting board; reserve grease in the pan. Cut bacon into tiny pieces.
Butter both sides of the bread slices.

Mix together avocado, lemon juice, minced garlic, turmeric, cumin, garlic salt, cayenne pepper, salt, and pepper in a bowl until avocado spread is creamy. Add chopped bacon and tomato; stir to combine.

Heat bacon grease in the skillet over medium heat. Fry eggs over easy: break eggs into the skillet and cook until whites are firm, about 3 minutes. Slide a spatula under each egg and gently flip. Cook about 1 minute more. Season eggs with salt and pepper and move them to the side of the skillet.

Reduce heat and place buttered bread in the skillet. Toast lightly, about 1 minute. Turn over and place a slice of cheese on the toasted sides. Slather a generous portion of the avocado spread on top of the cheese. Cover the skillet so cheese can melt quickly, and cook until the bottom of the toast is golden brown, about 2 minutes more. Remove toast from pan and place on plates. Place over-easy eggs on top.

name: Avocado Chicken Salad
instructions: Combine avocado, yogurt, lime, garlic powder, black pepper, and salt in a medium bowl. Mash the avocado to desired consistency.
Add onion, celery, jalapeño, and chicken into the avocado mixture and stir to coat evenly.
Serve on toast with optional topping of sriracha and cilantro.
Enjoy!

name: Avocado Chickpea Salad With Chili Lime Dressing
instructions: For the dressing, combine dressing ingredients in a small bowl. Whisk together until mixed thoroughly.
In a large bowl, combine chickpeas, cucumber, tomatoes, onion, avocado, carrots, and dressing. Toss together until evenly combined.
Serve and garnish.
Enjoy!

name: Avocado Corn Salsa
instructions: In a large bowl, mix corn, olives, red bell pepper and onion.
In a small bowl, mix garlic, olive oil, lemon juice, cider vinegar, oregano, salt and pepper. Pour into the corn mixture and toss to coat. Cover and chill in the refrigerator 8 hours, or overnight.
Stir avocados into the mixture before serving.

name: Avocado Couscous With Smoked Salmon
instructions: 1. Tütsülenmiş somonlu avokadolu kuskus tarifi için malzemeler hazırsa başlayabilirsiniz.
2. Öncelikle kuskusu haşlayıp soğuk suda süzün.
3.  İncecik kıyılmış taze soğan ve dereotu ile harmanlayın.
4.  Biraz limon ve zeytinyağı ile tatlandırıp bir kenarda bekletin.
5. Bu arada fileto balığı çok az zeytinyağı ile sıvazlayın ki yüzeyi tuz, karabiber ve taze kekik ile hafifçe kaplamanıza imkan tanısın.
6.  İnce tabanlı geniş bir tencerenin dibine kiraz ağacı talaşı serpin.
7.  Üzerine tencerenin içine sığabilecek bir ızgara koyun (Mikrodalga ızgaraları olabilir).
8.  Balığı yerleştirin, kapağını kapatın.
9.  Su ve ayrıca yağ olmayacak.
10.  Önce yüksek ardından orta ateşte 15 ile 20 dakika arası (Filetonun büyüklüğüne göre) tütsüleyin.
11. Servis tabağına kuskusu yayın.
12.  Bir kasede, avokado dilimlerin, zeytinyağı, tuz, karabiber, biraz da limon suyu ile karıştırın ve servis tabağına alın.
13.  Üzerine tütsülenmiş somon etini koyup servis yapın.
14. Bu yemeğin makarnasına kapari de eklemek hayalimdi ama ne tabağı hazırlarken ne de yerken aklıma geldi.
15.  Şu anda yazıyı yazarken hatırladım! Siz unutmayın, çok güzel bir ekşilik verecektir.
16. Balığı tütsülemek için yurt dışından aldığım bir füme tenceresi kullanıyorum.
17.  Çok basit bir mekanizma.
18.  İnce tabanlı bir tencere de aynı işi görür.
19.  Sadece tabandan balığı iki parmak yükseklikte tutacak tel bir ızgaraya ihtiyacınız olacak.

name: Avocado Cream
instructions: Process avocados, sour cream, vinegar, oil, 2 Tbsp. cilantro, and 2 Tbsp. fennel fronds in a food processor until mixture is very smooth, light, and thick. Season with salt.
Transfer avocado cream to a small bowl and top with cilantro leaves and more fennel fronds. Serve with chips.

name: Avocado Cream Sauce
instructions: Combine avocados, green onions, garlic, cilantro, lime juice, and tarragon in the bowl of a food processor; purée until smooth.

Melt butter in a saucepan over low heat. Stir in avocado purée; cook and stir occasionally until heated through, about 5 minutes. Add cream; cook until heated through, but not boiling. Season with salt.

name: Avocado Crema

ingredients.prep: pitted, peeled and cut into wedges

instructions: Combine ingredients in a blender in the following order: lime juice, cilantro, garlic, avocado, crema, oil, salt, and pepper. Blend until smooth.

name: Avocado Cucumber Pasta Salad

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil; cook rotini at a boil until tender yet firm to the bite, about 8 minutes. Drain and let cool, 10 to 15 minutes.
Mix rotini pasta, tomatoes, cucumbers, olives, Italian dressing, Parmesan cheese, salt, and pepper together in a large bowl. Chill until flavors combine, about 1 hour.
Toss avocado with lemon juice in a bowl. Mix into the pasta salad before serving.

name: Avocado Cups With Pomegranate Salsa Verde
instructions: Mix cilantro, mint, oil, pomegranate seeds, lemon juice, and preserved lemon peel in a small bowl; season dressing with salt. Spoon over and into avocados; sprinkle with sea salt.

name: Avocado Dip
instructions: Βάζουμε όλα τα υλικά μας για το ντιπ αβοκάντο μέσα στο μπλέντερ.
Τα πολτοποιούμε.
Παγώνουμε το ντιπάκι στο ψυγείο.

name: Avocado Dip With Tahini And Crispy Breadcrumbs
original_name: Ντιπ αβοκάντο με ταχίνι και τραγανά πιτάκια

ingredients.item: 1μεγάλη ντομάτα χωρίς σπόρους και φλούδα (μόνο τα πέταλα) ψιλοκομμένη
1μεγάλη ντομάτα χωρίς σπόρους και φλούδα (μόνο τα πέταλα) ψιλοκομμένη

instructions: Ανοίγουμε πρώτα τη συσκευασία με τις αραβικές πίτες και τις χωρίζουμε στη μέση.
Τις σχίζουμε, τις ραντίζουμε με λίγο ελαιόλαδο και με ένα μαχαίρι τις κόβουμε σε μέγεθος μπουκιάς σε ακανόνιστα κομμάτια.
Τις αραδιάζουμε σε λαμαρίνα και τις ξεροψήνουμε να γίνουν σαν τσιπς ή τις τηγανίζουμε για λίγα λεπτά σε σπορέλαιο να ροδίσουν ελαφρά (για 2’).
Για να γίνει τέλειο το ντιπ πρέπει τα αβοκάντο να είναι ώριμα.
Κόβουμε στη μέση το αβοκάντο, καρφώνουμε τη λάμα μεγάλου μαχαιριού στο κουκούτσι.
Στρίβουμε ελαφρά να το ξεκολλήσουμε.
Αδειάζουμε το αβοκάντο με κουτάλι σε μεγάλο γουδί ή μπολ, το λιώνουμε με το γουδοχέρι ή με πιρούνι.
Προσθέτουμε όλα τα υπόλοιπα υλικά.
Με το γουδοχέρι ανακατεύουμε τα υλικά, δεν πολτοποιούμε.
Αλατίζουμε κατά βούληση.
Καλύπτουμε με μεμβράνη για να μην οξειδώνεται και μαυρίζει.
Παγώνουμε λίγο.
Τελευταία στιγμή προσθέτουμε τις ντομάτες και ελέγχουμε το αλάτι και το πιπέρι. Ανακατεύουμε.

name: Avocado Enchiladas
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Combine ¾ cup Cheddar cheese, avocados, black beans, bell pepper, salt, cumin, garlic powder, and onion powder in a medium bowl; gently toss together.

Pour 1 can enchilada sauce into bottom of a 9x13-inch baking dish. Divide avocado mixture between corn tortillas. Roll tortillas to enclose filling; place seam-sides down into the baking dish. Top with remaining 1 can enchilada sauce; sprinkle with remaining 1 ¾ cups Cheddar cheese.
Bake in the preheated oven just until cheese is melted and filling is heated through, about 20 minutes. Top with sour cream, pico de gallo, and cilantro.

name: Avocado Fava Recipe

ingredients.item: 2–3 dal taze nane veya dereotu (süsleme için)
Nohut veya kuru fasulye ile de yapılabilir.
Dilersen haşlanmış yeşil mercimek kullanarak daha kısa sürede hazırlayabilirsin, kıvam ve tat biraz değişir.
Olgun mango veya kabak püresi ile kıvam verilebilir, ancak tat farklı olur.
Vegan bir alternatif için sadece baklayı püre yapıp zeytinyağı ile lezzetlendirebilirsin.
Beyaz soğan yerine pırasa veya arpacık soğan kullanabilirsin.
Kavrulmadan direkt eklemek daha hafif bir tat verir, kavrulmuş soğan ise tatlılık katar.
Tereyağı veya avokado yağı ile değiştirilebilir.
Daha hafif bir seçenek için az miktarda zeytinyağı da kullanılabilir.
Kekik veya taze kekik yaprakları da farklı bir aroma katabilir.
Limon yerine nar ekşisi veya sirke kullanılarak asidik denge sağlanabilir.

instructions: 1. Kuru baklaları bir gece önceden suda bekletin.
2.  Sonra tencerede üzerini geçecek kadar su ile yumuşayana kadar haşlayın.
3. Ayrı bir tavada zeytinyağı ile ince doğranmış soğanları pembeleşene kadar kavurun.
4. Haşlanmış baklaları süzüp blender’a alın.
5.  İçine kavrulmuş soğan, tuz, karabiber ve zeytinyağını ekleyin.
6.  Pürüzsüz bir kıvam alana kadar çekin.
7. Olgun avokadoyu kabuğundan çıkarıp püreye ekleyin.
8.  Tekrar blenderdan geçirin, kıvamını ayarlamak için az miktarda su veya zeytinyağı ekleyebilirsiniz.
9. Favanın üzerine biraz limon suyu gezdirin ve taze nane veya dereotu ile süsleyin.
10.  İsteğe göre zeytinyağı damlatabilirsiniz.
11.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Avocado Feta Salad
instructions: Place avocado cubes in a bowl.
Whisk olive oil, lime juice, lemon juice, garlic, salt, and pepper together in a bowl; mix in feta cheese.
Pour dressing over avocado cubes; toss to coat.

name: Avocado Feta Salsa
instructions: In a bowl, gently stir together tomatoes, avocados, onion, and garlic. Mix in parsley and oregano. Gently stir in olive oil and vinegar, then stir in feta cheese. Cover and chill for 2 to 6 hours.

name: Avocado Gazpacho

ingredients.prep: pitted, and cut into bite-sized pieces

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Mix tomato-vegetable juice, vegetable broth, tomatoes, avocados, cucumber, canned tomatoes with juice, green bell pepper, red bell pepper, olive oil, green onions, lemon juice, cilantro, vinegar, hot pepper sauce, salt, and black pepper together in a large bowl. Cover and chill for at least 3 hours before serving to allow flavors to blend.

name: Avocado Hummus
instructions: Add chickpeas, avocado, garlic, lime juice, and seasonings to the bowl of a 2-quart food processor. Blend until smooth.
While blending, slowly add in the olive oil until hummus is creamy and smooth.
Garnish with chopped cilantro, some diced tomatoes, and a drizzle of olive oil.
Enjoy!

name: Avocado Hummus, And Healthy
original_name: Hummus de aguacate, fácil y saludable

ingredients.item: ¼ cucharadita de pimienta negra molida

instructions: Tritura con un tenedor el aguacate
Añade el tahini, el cilantro, el zumo de limón, el aceite de oliva, el ajo, el comino, la sal y la pimienta. Combina hasta obtener una consistencia suave y cremosa.
Espolvorea por encima semillas de sésamo y un chorrito de aceite de oliva. Puedes espolvorear también un poco de pimentón dulce.
category: Recetas de Aperitivos, Tapas y Pinchos

name: Avocado Lime Salmon
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400˚F (200˚C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
On the prepared baking sheet, rub the salmon with the garlic, olive oil, salt, pepper, and paprika.
Bake for 10-12 minutes, until cooked through.
Make the avocado topping: In a small bowl, gently mix together the avocado, red onion, cilantro, olive oil, salt, pepper, and lime juice. Don’t overmix or you'll break up the avocado.
Spoon the avocado topping over the salmon.
Enjoy!

name: Avocado Mango Salsa
instructions: Place avocado in a serving bowl and mix with lime juice.
Add mango, onion, habanero, cilantro, and salt; toss until evenly combined.
Enjoy!

name: Avocado Margarita
instructions: Toss salt and 1 tsp. lime zest on a small plate. Rub the rim of each margarita glass with lime wedge and dip into salt mixture.
Purée avocado, tequila, triple sec, lime juice, cilantro, cayenne, remaining 1 tsp. lime zest, and 2½ cups ice, preferably crushed, in a blender until smooth.
Divide among prepared glasses and garnish each with a lime wheel.

name: Avocado Mayonnaise, And Healthy
original_name: Mayonesa de aguacate casera, fácil y saludable

ingredients.item: 125 ml de aceite de oliva suave o de girasol
1 cucharada de zumo de limón o lima

instructions: Abrimos el aguacate, retiramos el hueso y sacamos la pulpa con una cuchara.
La ponemos en el vaso de la batidora junto con el huevo, el zumo de limón y una pizca de sal.
Metemos la batidora hasta el fondo del vaso, añadimos el aceite por encima y empezamos a batir sin moverla.
Cuando veamos que la mezcla empieza a emulsionar en la base, subimos y bajamos suavemente la batidora hasta integrar todo bien.
Probamos y ajustamos de sal o limón si hace falta.   Guardamos en un tarro hermético en la nevera hasta el momento de usarla.

name: Avocado Mousse

ingredients.item: 3πολύ ώριμα και μαλακά αβοκάντο κομμένα σε κομμάτια
½ φλ.κρέμα γάλακτος με χαμηλά λιπαρά (ή κρέμα καρύδας)
3πολύ ώριμα και μαλακά αβοκάντο κομμένα σε κομμάτια
½ φλ.κρέμα γάλακτος με χαμηλά λιπαρά (ή κρέμα καρύδας)

instructions: Είναι πολύ βασικό, τα αβοκάντο να είναι πολύ ώριμα και πολύ μαλακά, ώστε η μους να έχει βελούδινη υφή. Αν είναι πιο σκληρά δεν θα λιώσει το αβοκάντο και δεν θα γίνει η μους λεία και ομοιόμορφη.
Δείτε εδώ πώς να κάνετε το αβοκάντο να ωριμάσει πιο γρήγορα και πως να το τεμαχίσετε εύκολα και γρήγορα .
Βάζουμε όλα τα υλικά στο μπλέντερ και τα χτυπάμε μέχρι να γίνει ομοιόμορφο το μείγμα, και να σχηματιστεί η ελαφριά μους.
Ισομοιράζουμε με ένα κουτάλι σε ψηλά ποτήρια.
Σερβίρεται αμέσως ή ακόμα πιο δροσερή από το ψυγείο.
Αγαπάτε το αβοκάντο; Δείτε εδώ περισσότερες νόστιμες και υγιεινές συνταγές !

name: Avocado Mousse Recipe
instructions: Descasque os abacates, retire-lhes a polpa, triture-a e regue-a com o sumo de lima. Acrescente o leite condensado e misture.
À parte, bata as natas em chantili e envolva-as no preparado anterior, mexendo delicadamente.
Deite o preparado para uma taça de servir e leve-o ao frio, durante cerca de 1 hora. Sirva polvilhado com miolo de avelã picado.

name: Avocado On Rye Crackers With Smoked Salmon
instructions: Top rye crackers with avocado and salmon. Season with salt and pepper and serve with lemon wedges.

name: Avocado Pate Recipe
original_name: Receta de paté de aguacate fácil
instructions: Corta y retira la semilla del aguacate.
Con la ayuda de una cuchara, retira la pulpa del aguacate y coloca en una licuadora.
Incorpora el yogurt natural, el zumo de limón, el aceite de oliva, el cilantro, la sal y pimienta al gusto.
Procesa ligeramente hasta que todo se integre y quede bien cremoso.
Ajusta de sal y pimienta de ser necesario.
Incorpora el paté en un recipiente hermético y refrigera en la nevera por unos 30 minutos para que se asiente.
Pasado ese tiempo, ya estará listo para disfrutar.

name: Avocado Peanut Butter Brownies | Epicurious
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C.
In a bowl, combine wet ingredients (minus the peanut butter).
In a separate bowl, combine dry ingredients.
Mix wet ingredients into dry ingredients.
Pour mixture into a baking pan sprayed with coconut oil spray.
Top with peanut butter, with a few dollops around the entire pan. Use your knife to drag the peanut butter through the mixture to create swirls.
Bake for 30-35 minutes, or until a toothpick comes out clean.

name: Avocado Pesto
instructions: Καθαρίζουμε τα αβοκάντο και τα βάζουμε στο μπλέντερ.
Προσθέτουμε τα πλυμένα και στεγνά φύλλα βασιλικού, το σκόρδο, το κουκουνάρι και ρίχνουμε λίγες σταγόνες χυμό λεμονιού.
Χτυπάμε να πολτοποιηθούν πλήρως.
Ρίχνουμε σιγά σιγά με ροή κλωστής το ελαιόλαδο, ώστε να γίνει κρέμα το μείγμα.
Προσθέτουμε αλάτι και πιπέρι κατά βούληση.
Αν θέλουμε πιο ρευστή σάλτσα, ρίχνουμε μέσα λίγες σταγόνες νερό.
Αν θέλουμε περισσότερη νοστιμιά προσθέτουμε λίγη ψιλοτριμμένη παρμεζάνα και ανακατεύουμε.

name: Avocado Pudding

ingredients.item: 5 yemek kaşığı bal veya akçaağaç şurubu
1 çay bardağı süt (badem sütü, hindistancevizi sütü veya normal süt)

instructions: 1. Avokadoları ortadan ikiye kesin, çekirdeklerini çıkarın ve iç kısmını kaşıkla alın.
2.  Avokadoları mutfak robotuna veya blender’a koyun.
3.  Üzerine kakao, bal, süt, vanilin ve tuzu ekleyin.
4.  Pürüzsüz ve kremsi bir kıvam alana kadar karıştırın.
5.  Gerekirse kıvamı ayarlamak için biraz daha süt ekleyebilirsiniz.
6.  Karışımı kaselere paylaştırın ve buzdolabında 10-15 dakika dinlendirin.
7.  Avokadolu puding servise hazır.
8.  Üzerini yaban mersini ve file antepfıstığı ile süsleyerek servis edin.

name: Avocado Quinoa Power Salad
instructions: In a small saucepan, bring the water and a pinch of salt to a boil. Add the quinoa, cover, and simmer for 15 minutes, or until the water is absorbed. Transfer to a medium bowl to cool to room temperature, then fluff the quinoa.
Refrigerate the quinoa for 20 minutes.
Add the spinach, cucumber, tomatoes, and avocado to the bowl of quinoa and mix to combine.
Add the lemon juice, olive oil, salt, and pepper, and mix well.
Enjoy!

name: Avocado Ranch Chicken Burrito Recipe
original_name: Receta de Burrito de Pollo Avocado Ranch

ingredients.item: 2  pechugas de pollo ( deshuesadas y sin piel)

instructions: Sazona las pechugas de pollo con el comino, el ajo en polvo, el pimentón, sal y pimienta. Calienta el aceite de oliva en una sartén grande a fuego medio. Cocina las pechugas de pollo durante unos 6-7 minutos por cada lado o hasta que estén doradas y cocidas por completo. Retira del fuego y deja reposar durante 5 minutos antes de cortarlas en tiras o desmenuzarlas.

Mientras se cocina el pollo, pela y deshuesa el aguacate. Coloca el aguacate, la crema agria, el aderezo ranch y el jugo de limón en un procesador de alimentos o licuadora. Mezcla hasta obtener una textura cremosa y suave. Reserva.

Coloca las tortillas sobre una superficie plana. Añade una porción de pollo en el centro de cada tortilla. Luego, añade una capa de la salsa de aguacate ranch, un poco de lechuga, queso cheddar, tomate, cebolla morada y cilantro fresco, si lo deseas.
Dobla los lados de la tortilla hacia el centro, luego enrolla firmemente desde un extremo hasta el otro para formar el burrito.
Puedes servir los burritos directamente o dorarlos en una sartén caliente durante 1-2 minutos por cada lado para darles una textura crujiente.
Si deseas puedes cortarlo por la mitad de forma diagonal, avistarás los ingredientes y será más apetitoso y fácil de comer.

name: Avocado Rose Toast (leo)
instructions: Peel the avocado half, then slice crosswise very thinly, keeping the avocado shape intact as you go. Starting from one end, fan out the sliced avocado in straight line, then curl into a rose shape.
Carefully transfer the avocado rose to the slice of toast. Top with the pomegranate seeds.
Enjoy!

name: Avocado Salad
instructions: 1. Taze otları yıkadıktan sonra sularının iyice süzülmesini sağlayın.
2.  Avokadoyu ikiye bölüp ortasındaki çekirdeği çıkarıp ince dilimleyin.
3.  Çilekleri de yıkadıktan sonra ince dilimleyin.
4.  Rokanın yapraklarını saplarından ayırın.
5.  Roka hariç tüm yeşillikleri ince kıyın ve roka ile beraber karıştırın.
6.  Servis tabağına yeşillikleri alın.
7.  Üzerine avokado ve çilek dilimlerini ekleyin.
8.  Ceviz ve ufalanmış keçi peynirini serpin.
9.  Sos için gerekli malzemeleri iyice karıştırın.
10.  Salatanın üzerine gezdirip karıştırın ve servis yapın.

name: Avocado Salad With Bell Pepper And Tomatoes
instructions: 1. In a small bowl, whisk together olive oil, lime juice, garlic, and cayenne. Season with salt.
2. Scoop out flesh from avocado halves, reserving shells, and chop. Transfer to a bowl and add bell pepper, tomatoes, scallion, and chopped cilantro.
3. Drizzle with dressing and season with salt. Gently stir to combine. Spoon mixture into reserved shells. Garnish with whole cilantro leaves and serve immediately.

name: Avocado Salad With Egg Recipe
original_name: Receta de ensalada de aguacate con huevo

ingredients.item: Pimienta negra recién molida al gusto

instructions: Sancocha los 2 huevos. Una vez listos córtalos en 4 partes cada uno.
Quítale la piel al aguacate y córtalo en rodajas o tiras largas. Retira la semilla.
Pica los tomates en mitades.
Pon todos estos ingredientes en una ensaladera.
Agrega las hojas de lechuga y rúcula previamente lavadas y limpias. Puedes cortar la lechuga en trozos más pequeños para que sea más fácil al comer.
Agrega, sal, pimienta y aceite de oliva al gusto.
Mezcla todos los ingredientes bien.
Listo, ya tienes una deliciosa ensalada para comer.

name: Avocado Salad With Peaches
instructions: Roast bell pepper. Peel and chop pepper; purée with red wine vinegar, vanilla, and sugar in a blender until smooth.
With machine running, gradually add olive oil. Season with salt and pepper.
Halve and pit avocados and season with salt and pepper. Drizzle with olive oil and place cut side sown on a medium-hot grill until nicely charred, about 5 minutes. Peel and thickly slice.
Toss with arugula or sorrel and peaches. Drizzle dressing over.

name: Avocado Salsa
instructions: In a medium bowl, combine all ingredients and gently mix together.
For best flavor, allow to set 30 minutes.
Garnish with additional feta just before serving.
Enjoy!

name: Avocado Sandwich
instructions: 1. Nane ve fesleğeni kıyıp krem peynirle karıştırın.
2.  Ekmek diliminin üzerine taze otlu krem peynirini sürün.
3.  Pancar dilimleri, avokado dilimleri ve roka yapraklarını sırasıyla dizin.
4.  Diğer ekmek parçasını üzerine yerleştirin.
5.  Servis yapın.

name: Avocado Sauce With Yogurt, And Delicious
original_name: Salsa de aguacate con yogurt, casera y deliciosa

ingredients.item: Hojas frescas de perejil al gusto

instructions: Quítale la piel y semilla al aguacate y córtalo en cubos o tiras.
Ponlo en un plato hondo y machácalo con un tenedor.
Agrega la taza de yogurt griego y el jugo de limón.
Mezcla muy bien con una cuchara de madera.
Puedes ayudarte con una batidora de mano para que la salsa obtenga una textura homogénea.
Ponle varias hojas de perejil fresco cortadas muy pequeño.
Agrega una pizca de sal al gusto y mezcla un poco más con la picadora.
Puedes darle una textura más cremosa agregándole alguna cantidad extra de yogurt.
Una vez lista mete en la nevera para que se enfríe antes de usar.
Disfruta.

name: Avocado Semifreddo With Mint And Chocolate
original_name: Semifrio de abacate com hortelã e chocolate

ingredients.item: Granola, miolo de pistácios e hortelã para decorar
100 g de granola de aveia e chocolate

instructions: Forre uma forma tipo bolo inglês (11 x 20 cm), com uma tira de papel vegetal, de modo a que as extremidades fiquem de fora da forma.

Prepare a mousse: demolhe as folhas de gelatina em água fria, durante 5 minutos. Parta o chocolate para uma tigela, adicione o leite condensado e leve a derreter, em banho-maria, mexendo de vez em quando. Retire do lume e junte as folhas de gelatina escorridas, mexendo bem. À parte, bata as natas, até ficarem firmes, e misture-as no chocolate. Deite a mousse na forma, polvilhe bem com a granola e leve ao congelador por cerca de 1 hora.

Prepare o creme de abacate: demolhe as folhas de gelatina em água fria, durante 5 minutos. Deite a água numa caneca e aqueça no micro-ondas. Escorra a gelatina e dissolva-a na água quente. Corte os abacates ao meio, retire-lhes o caroço e, com uma colher, retire a polpa para um liquidificador. Acrescente as folhas de hortelã lavadas e o açúcar, ligue, depois adicione os iogurtes e a gelatina dissolvida e ligue mais um pouco.

Retire o semifrio do congelador, cubra-o com o creme de abacate e leve novamente ao congelador, até solidificar bem. Desenforme, decore com mais granola, pistácios ligeiramente partidos e hortelã e sirva frio, cortado em fatias.

name: Avocado Shrimp Ceviche
instructions: Place the shrimp and lime juice into a large bowl, and stir to coat. Let stand for about 5 minutes, or until shrimp are opaque. The lime juice will cure them. Mix in the tomatoes, onion, and cilantro until coated with lime juice; cover and refrigerate for 1 hour.

Remove from the refrigerator, and mix in the Worcestershire sauce, ketchup, hot sauce, salt and pepper. We have our own hot sauce recipe, but you can use whatever hot sauce you like, or leave it out and let people add their own when serving.
Serve in glass tumblers and top with avocado pieces. Set out extra Worcestershire sauce, ketchup, lime wedges and hot sauce for people to individualize their dish. Serve with saltine crackers.

name: Avocado Smoothie
instructions: Combine avocado, coconut water, agave, if using, and 1 tsp. lime juice in a blender and puree until smooth. Add more lime juice, if desired.

name: Avocado Smoothie With Coconut And Lime
original_name: Batido de abacate com coco e lima
instructions: Descasque o abacate, retire-lhe o caroço e corte a polpa em pedaços para um liquidificador.
Junte os restantes ingredientes indicados, ligue e deixe triturar até o preparado ficar sem grumos. Sirva de imediato.

name: Avocado Soup

ingredients.item: 300 ml  água ou caldo de galinha

instructions: Descasque e pique a cebola e refogue-a num tacho com o azeite, até ficar macia.

Adicione o milho escorrido e a água ou caldo de galinha e deixe levantar fervura. Retire do lume, retifique o sal e junte o chili, cortado em pedaços, e o abacate, descascado e cortado em pedaços também.
Triture a sopa com a varinha mágica, de modo a ficar cremosa, e sirva de imediato, decorada com rodelas de chili.
Dica do Chef: para obter o caldo de galinha, dissolva 1/2 cubo de caldo de galinha em 300 ml de água.

name: Avocado Stuffed Eggs Recipe
original_name: Receta fácil de huevos rellenos de aguacate
instructions: Para comenzar, pela los huevos duros y córtalos por la mitad a lo largo.
Saca la yema de los huevos y reserva.
A continuación, corta el aguacate en cubos pequeños y machácalo un poco con ayuda de un tenedor sin preocuparte mucho por si quedan muchos trozos enteros, de hecho la idea es que queden así.
Pica también la cebolla y el tomate en cubos pequeños.
Ahora vas a mezclar el aguacate en un tazón con la cebolla, el tomate, el jugo de limón y parte yema de huevo.
Sazona con sal y pimienta al gusto. Revuelve bien
Coloca un poco de la mezcla de aguacate en cada mitad de huevo.
Puedes usar una cuchara pequeña para hacer esto de forma fácil.
Luego, decora los huevos rellenos con un poco de cilantro picado.
Sirve y disfruta.

name: Avocado Stuffed With Shrimp. A Fresh Plate
original_name: Aguacate relleno con camarones. un plato fresco

ingredients.item: 4  aguacates maduros  ((deben estar firmes, no aguados))
500 gr de camarones cocidos ((sin conchas ni venas))

instructions: Vamos a iniciar la receta, cortando los camarones a la mitad y los colocarás en un bol.
Añade ahora, la cebolla, el pimentón, el cilantro y el rábano.
Toma los aguacates, córtalos a la mitad, retira la semilla y le sacarás un poco de la pulpa para que le expandas un poco más el orificio y el relleno quepa mejor.
Esa pulpa, la agregarás al bol, junto al zumo de limón. la sal y pimienta al gusto y la mayonesa de cilantro.
Mezcla muy bien hasta que se integre todo perfectamente, prueba y rectifica de sal.
Toma tus aguacates y los rellenarás con la mezcla de camarones, procurando que quede muy bien.
Sírvelos con unas rodajas de limón y listo.
¡Degusta!

name: Avocado Toast And Egg For One

ingredients.item: Freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Combine shallot, red wine vinegar, and a pinch of salt in a bowl; set aside. Mash avocado with lime juice and salt in a second bowl.

Heat 2 to 3 inches of water in a small, shallow saucepan until boiling. Add vinegar and reduce heat to a light simmer. Crack egg into a small ramekin and lower it to the surface of the water, carefully easing it out of the ramekin into the simmering water. Poach egg until white is completely set and yolk is slightly soft, 3 to 4 minutes. Remove with a slotted spoon and transfer to a paper-towel lined plate. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
Toast bread to your liking and remove to a plate. Top with mashed avocado, some of the pickled shallot, and poached egg. Sprinkle with aleppo pepper and serve immediately.

name: Avocado Toast On Rye Bread: And Delicious Recipe
original_name: Tostas de aguacate en pan de centeno: receta fácil y deliciosa

ingredients.item: 2  cucharadas de queso crema (puede ser queso ricotta)
Un puñado de hojas de rúcula o espinacas
Un chorrito de aceite de oliva

instructions: Primero, tienes que tostar las rebanadas de pan de centeno. Si tienes tostadora, adelante, y si no, puedes hacerlo en una sartén a fuego medio, solo asegúrate de que quede crujiente pero sin pasarte.
Mientras el pan se tuesta, corta el aguacate en rodajas bonitas y finitas.

Una vez que el pan esté tostado, unta una capa generosa de queso crema en cada rebanada. No te cortes, este es el toque cremoso que le va a dar vida a tus tostadas. Si estás usando ricotta, aplícala también.
Ahora coloca unas hojas de rúcula o espinacas encima del queso.
Después, coloca las rodajas de aguacate sobre las hojas verdes.

Finalmente, rocía las semillas de calabaza y sésamo por encima. Este es el truco para darle ese toque crunchy. Añade sal y pimienta a gusto y, si te sientes extra sofisticado, un chorrito de aceite de oliva le da un toque final perfecto.

name: Avocado Toast Recipe
instructions: 1. Avokadoyu ezin ve üzerine limon suyu, tuz ve karabiber ekleyin.
2. Dilersen hafifçe zeytinyağı da katabilirsiniz.
3. Ekmeği kızartın, böylece tost daha çıtır ve lezzetli olur.
4. Kızarmış ekmeklerin üzerine avokado karışımını eşit şekilde yayın.
5. İsteğe bağlı olarak domates, roka, haşlanmış yumurta veya baharat ekleyin.
6. Hemen servis yapın, istersen üzerine biraz pul biber veya taze çekilmiş karabiber serpiştirebilirsiniz.

name: Avocado Toast With Egg
instructions: Melt butter in a skillet over medium-low heat. Crack eggs into the skillet side by side and cook until eggs are white on the bottom layer and firm enough to flip, 2 to 3 minutes. Flip eggs, trying not to crack the yolk, and cook until egg reaches desired doneness, 2 to 5 minutes more.
Meanwhile, toast bread slices to desired doneness, 3 to 5 minutes.
Mash avocado in a bowl; stir in lemon juice, cayenne pepper, and sea salt. Spread avocado mixture onto toast. Top with fried egg and season with sea salt and pepper.

name: Avocado Toast With Grilled Cheese
instructions: {'step': '1', 'text': "Set an oven rack about 6 inches from the heat source and preheat the oven\\'s broiler."}
{'step': '2', 'text': 'Place bread slices on a baking sheet under the preheated broiler until toasted, 1 to 2 minutes.'}
{'step': '3', 'text': 'Mix together mashed avocados, red onion, and cilantro in a bowl. Spread on toasted bread and sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.'}
{'step': '4', 'text': 'Return to broiler until cheese is melted, 2 to 3 minutes.'}

name: Avocado Toast With Tomato-corn Salsa

ingredients.item: Crusty white bread (such as country bread)

instructions: Combine tomatoes, scallions, jalapeño, corn, and lime juice in a medium bowl. Season with salt. Using a fork, gently smash avocado slices evenly onto each toast. Top each generously with tomato-corn salsa.

name: Avocado Toasties With Kiwi Salsa And Bacon
instructions: Cook bacon in large skillet over medium heat until crisp. Transfer to paper towels to drain. Whisk 1 tablespoon lime juice and honey in medium bowl. Add kiwi cubes, cilantro, green onions, and hot sauce. Season kiwi salsa with salt; toss gently.
Heat griddle over medium-high heat. Place 1 bread half, cut side down, on griddle. Cook until cut surface is crisp and brown in spots, 5 to 6 minutes. Repeat with second bread half.
Mash avocado in medium bowl. Add remaining 2 teaspoons lime juice; season with salt and pepper.
Cut each bread half crosswise into 4 rectangles. Spread each with about 3 tablespoonfuls mashed avocado. Top each with salsa and 1 bacon slice.

name: Avocado Tuna Boats

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Mix tuna, onion, mustard, mayonnaise, relish, salt, and pepper together in a small bowl.
Put mixture on top of the avocado and garnish with bagel seasoning.

name: Avocado Tuna Sandwich Recipe

ingredients.item: Bir avuç bebek ıspanak ya da marul yaprağı

instructions: 1. Ton balığını süzdükten sonra bir kaseye alın.
2.  Üzerine doğranmış kornişon turşu ve mayonezi ekleyip iyice karıştırın, tuz ve karabiberle tatlandırın.
3.  Ekmek dilimlerinin bir yüzeyine ton balıklı karışımdan sürün.
4.  Üzerine avokado dilimlerini ve marul/ıspanak yapraklarını yerleştirin.
5.  Diğer ekmek dilimini üzerine kapatın.
6.  Sandviçi çapraz şekilde keserek servis tabağına alın ve servis edin.

name: Avocado Water
instructions: Scoop avocado flesh into a blender and add lime juice, sugar, salt, ½ cup ice cubes, and 2 cups cold water. Purée until smooth; blend in another splash of water if mixture is too thick. Pour into glasses, filled with ice if desired.

name: Avocado Whole Wheat Pasta Salad

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Cook the rotini at a boil until tender yet firm to the bite, about 10 minutes; drain and run under cold water to prevent sticking.
Whisk olive oil, vinegar, lemon juice, and honey together in a bowl until dressing is smooth.

Mix pasta, avocados, green bell pepper, carrot, green onions, celery, garlic, basil, parsley, and cilantro together in a bowl. Drizzle dressing over pasta mixture and toss to coat. Add lemon zest, salt, and pepper to pasta salad. Serve at room temperature.

name: Avocado With Egg On Horseback
instructions: Abra os abacates ao meio, no sentido do comprimento, elimine-lhes o caroço e retire a polpa para uma tigela, mantendo a casca inteira.
Corte a polpa em cubos, regue com o sumo da lima, junte o fiambre cortado em pedacinhos, tempere com sal e pimenta e envolva tudo. Recheie as cascas do abacate com este preparado.
Abra uma pequena cavidade no centro do recheio e disponha aí um ovo. Coloque num tabuleiro e leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 180ºC, por cerca de 5 minutos. Retire e sirva de seguida.

name: Avocado With Radish And Carrot And Pickled Onion

ingredients.prep: peeled, shaved into ribbons with a vegetable peeler
trimmed, very thinly sliced on mandoline
trimmed, very thinly sliced on mandoline

instructions: Combine onion, lemon juice, and salt in a small bowl. Cover and chill until onion is bright pink, at least 8 hours.
Do Ahead: Onion can be pickled 2 days ahead. Keep chilled.
Mix garlic, parsley, mint, tarragon, oil, and lemon juice in a small bowl; season chimichurri with salt.

Arrange avocado on a platter. Spoon chimichurri over. Drain onions and scatter over avocado. Toss carrot and radishes with oil and lemon juice in a medium bowl; arrange over avocado. Sprinkle with sea salt.

name: Avocado With String Cheese
instructions: 1. Avokadonun kabuğunu soyup çekirdeğini çıkarın ve ortadan ikiye kesin.
2.  Önce portakal suyuna, sonra pudra şekere, ardından esmer toz şekere bulayın.
3.  Ortasına labne peyniri ve Erzurum tel peyniri yerleştirip 180 dereceye ayarlanmış fırında 15 dakika pişirin.
4.  Üzerine ayva reçeli gezdirip servis yapın.

name: Avocado With Tahini
instructions: 1. Avokadoların kabuğunu sebze soyacağı ile soyup, çekirdeğini çıkartın.
2.  Üzerine ��nce nar ekşisi ile tahini dökün.
3.  Daha sonra lor peynirini, ceviz içi ile haşhaş tohumunu serpin.
4.  Bekletmeden servis yapın.

name: Avocado, Kale, Pineapple, And Coconut Smoothie

ingredients.item: Coconut water or iced green tea

instructions: Using smoothie or ice crush setting, purée avocado, kale, pineapple, coconut meat, coconut water, lemon juice, matcha, agave, salt, and ½ cup ice in a blender until smooth.

name: Avocado, Peppermint And Lemon Dip Recipe
original_name: Receta de dip de aguacate, hierbabuena y limón
instructions: Lava y corta los aguacates y retira la piel y la semilla.
Añade en una trituradora de alimentos los  aguacates, los dientes de ajo, la cebolla, la hierbabuena.
Seguidamente incorpora  el cebollino, el cilantro, el jugo de limón, el aceite de oliva y la sal.
Tritura bien, debe quedarte una pasta homogénea.
Sirve. Disfruta con totopos, verdura o pan.

name: Avocado, Tomato And Mango Salsa
instructions: Combine tomatoes, mango, avocado, jalapeño, cilantro, and garlic in a medium bowl; stir in red onion, olive oil, lime juice, and salt. Refrigerate to blend the flavors, about 30 minutes.

name: Avocado, Tuna, And Tomato Salad
instructions: Split avocado. Save skins and discard pit. Scoop contents into a bowl; slightly mash.
Mix mashed avocado, tuna, tomato, feta cheese, jalapeno pepper, green onion, feta cheese, garlic, cilantro, lime juice, salt, and pepper together in a bowl.
Scoop mixture back into reserved avocado skins and serve immediately or chill until serving.

name: Avocado-alfalfa Turkey Burger
instructions: In a bowl, combine ketchup and molasses; season with salt and pepper. In another bowl, crush avocado with juice; season with salt. Form turkey into four patties. Coat a grill pan or grill rack with cooking spray. Grill patties over medium-high heat until internal temperature reaches 74°C, 20 minutes. Top each with 1 cheese slice. Divide ketchup mixture, burgers, tomatoes, avocado mixture and alfalfa sprouts among buns.

name: Avocado-lime Ice Pops
instructions: Scoop avocado flesh into a blender; add mint, lime juice, simple syrup, and salt and purée until smooth. Divide among ice-pop molds and insert sticks. Freeze until solid, at least 2 hours.
Do Ahead: Ice pops can be made 1 week ahead. Keep frozen.

name: Avocado-lime Ranch Dressing
instructions: Combine avocado and garlic in a blender or large food processor and process until well pureed.

Stir mayonnaise, sour cream, and lime juice together in a bowl until well blended. Pour over avocado mixture in the blender. Add dill, parsley, chives, salt, onion powder, and pepper. Puree until liquefied. Serve immediately, or store in the refrigerator until ready to use.

name: Avocado-lime Sauce Vierge

ingredients.item: Fine sea salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions:
Combine oil, avocado, jalapeño, garlic, and shallot in a medium bowl. Squeeze limes into avocado mixture. Using a spoon, scrape pulp out of limes into mixture. Stir to combine.
Do ahead: Sauce can be made 4 days ahead. Press a piece of plastic wrap directly onto surface of sauce. Cover and chill. Bring sauce to room temperature before continuing.
Stir basil and cilantro into sauce just before serving. Season with salt and pepper.

name: Avocado-mango Salsa
instructions: Toss mango, bell pepper, onion, vinegar, sugar, and olive oil together in a bowl; gently fold in avocado. Season with salt.

name: Avocado-nut Bread
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Grease a 9x5-inch loaf pan.
Sift flour, sweetener, baking powder, cinnamon, baking soda, and salt in a bowl; set aside.
Mix avocado, buttermilk, egg, and vanilla together in a separate bowl. Add dry ingredients and mix until just combined. Stir in pecans. Pour batter into the prepared pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted in center comes out clean, 60 to 75 minutes. Cool in the pan for 10 minutes. Invert onto a wire rack and cool completely before slicing.

name: Avocado-tomatillo Salsa Verde
instructions: Scoop avocado flesh into a blender and add lettuce, chile, onion, garlic, tomatillos, and cilantro and blend until smooth; season with salt.
Do Ahead: Salsa can be made 2 days ahead. Cover and chill.

name: Avşor Soup Recipe

ingredients.item: 50–60 g kavram yağı (tereyağı veya kuyruk yağı alternatif olarak kullanılabilir)
1 yemek kaşığı tatlı kırmızı toz biber

instructions: 1. Kuzu incikleri derin bir tencereye yerleştirin.
2. Üzerine suyu ve kavram yağını ekleyin.
3. Tencereyi yüksek ateşe koyun ve suyu kaynatın.
4. Kaynadıktan sonra ateşi kısın ve etleri kemiklerinden ayrılana kadar yavaşça pişirin.
5. Kavram yağını tencereden çıkartın.
6. Etleri sudan alın, kemiklerinden ayırın ve tekrar çorbaya yerleştirin.
7. Kaya tuzu ve tatlı kırmızı toz biberi ekleyin.
8. Çorbayı 10 dakika daha kaynatın.
9. Çorbayı kaselere paylaştırın ve sıcak olarak servis edin.
10.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Award-winning Apple Cream Pie
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C).
Unroll 1 pie crust on a work surface. Cut out 2- to 3-inch hearts (or desired shape) with a cookie cutter. Transfer to an ungreased cookie sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until light golden brown, about 8 minutes. Set aside to cool.
Mix cream cheese, white sugar, egg, lemon zest, and salt in a medium bowl with an electric mixer on medium speed until smooth.
Mix sliced apples, brown sugar, and cinnamon together in a large bowl.
Unroll the second pie crust in an ungreased, 9-inch glass pie plate.

Roll almond paste into a thin, 7-inch circle between 2 sheets of waxed paper. Remove the top sheet of waxed paper and turn the almond paste circle into the crust-lined pie plate; gently press into the pie crust and remove the waxed paper. Spread cream cheese mixture over almond paste and arrange apples in a circular pattern over top.
Bake in the preheated oven until filling is set and slightly puffed, 40 to 45 minutes.
Microwave apricot jam in a small, microwave-safe bowl, uncovered, at medium power (50%) for 1 minute. Brush over apples. Top with heart cutouts. Cool until filling sets, about 1 hour.

name: Award-winning Italian Cream Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease and flour three 9-inch round cake pans.

Beat 2 cups white sugar, 1 cup butter, and egg yolks together in a bowl with an electric mixer. Beat in flour, alternating with buttermilk, beating briefly after each addition. Beat in baking soda, then beat in 1 cup walnuts and coconut.
Beat egg whites in a glass, metal, or ceramic bowl with an electric mixer until stiff peaks form; fold into batter. Divide batter evenly among the prepared pans.

Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into centers comes out clean, 20 to 25 minutes. Cool cakes in pans, 5 to 10 minutes, before turning out onto wire racks to cool completely, 25 to 30 minutes.
Meanwhile, beat confectioners' sugar, cream cheese, remaining 1/2 cup butter, and vanilla extract together in a bowl with an electric mixer until smooth and creamy.
Spread frosting onto cooled cake layers. Stack layers; frost sides if desired. Place remaining 1/4 cup walnuts on top cake.

name: Award-winning White Chicken Chili
instructions: Layer chicken, great northern beans, and corn in a slow cooker.
Mix chicken broth, condensed soup, chile peppers, and taco seasoning together in a bowl. Pour broth mixture over top.

Cover and cook on Low until chicken is no longer pink in the center and the juices run clear, 8 to 10 hours. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read at least 74°C (74 degrees C).
Transfer chicken to a cutting board. Shred with two forks or cut into bite-sized pieces. Return to the slow cooker.
Stir in sour cream and pepper Jack cheese; cover and cook on Low until cheese is melted, 3 to 5 minutes.

name: Awesome Irish Nachos
instructions: Preheat the oven to 232°C (230 degrees C).
Arrange waffle fries in a single layer on a rimmed baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until light golden in color, 12 to 20 minutes.
Meanwhile, cook and stir ground beef in a large skillet until browned and crumbly, 5 to 7 minutes. Drain excess grease. Stir in taco seasoning and cook for 1 to 2 minutes more.
Transfer baked fries to a 9x13-inch baking pan. Spread seasoned ground beef evenly over fries. Cover beef with cheese.
Return to the oven until cheese has melted, about 5 minutes.
Garnish with tomatoes, olives, jalapeños, and lettuce to serve. Dollop sour cream and guacamole on top.

name: Awesome Macaroni Salad (enough To Feed A Crowd!)
instructions: Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Cook elbow macaroni in the boiling water, stirring occasionally until cooked through but firm to the bite, 8 minutes; drain. Rinse macaroni with cold water until chilled; drain.

Mix mayonnaise, white vinegar, seasoned salt, sugar, garlic powder, and black pepper in a large bowl with a whisk until smooth. Stir tuna, baby shrimp, cucumber, and sweet onion into the mayonnaise mixture to coat ingredients completely; add chopped eggs and stir. Pour chilled macaroni into the bowl and stir; top with sliced eggs. Garnish salad with paprika.
Cover bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate at least 1 hour to overnight before serving.

name: Awesome Sausage, Apple, And Cranberry Stuffing
instructions: Spread white and whole wheat bread cubes in a single layer on a large baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until evenly toasted, 5 to 7 minutes. Transfer toasted bread cubes to a large bowl.

Cook sausage and onions in a large skillet over medium heat, stirring and breaking up lumps, until evenly browned, 6 to 8 minutes. Add celery, sage, rosemary, and thyme; cook and stir until flavors blend, about 2 minutes.
Pour sausage mixture over bread in bowl. Mix in chopped apple, dried cranberries, parsley, and liver. Drizzle with turkey stock and melted butter; mix lightly.
Allow stuffing to cool completely before loosely stuffing a turkey.

name: Awesome Sweet Potato Casserole
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease a 9x13-inch baking dish.

Beat sweet potatoes, white sugar, pineapple, coconut, 1/2 cup melted butter, milk, eggs, and vanilla extract together in a large bowl until smooth; pour into the prepared pan and set aside. Combine brown sugar, pecans, flour, and 1/3 cup melted butter in a separate bowl; sprinkle over sweet potato mixture.
Bake in the preheated oven until casserole is bubbly and topping is browned, about 30 minutes.

name: Awesome Vegan Pesto
instructions: Combine basil, pine nuts, nutritional yeast, garlic, sun-dried tomatoes, salt, pepper, and paprika in a food processor. Blend, gradually pouring in olive oil, until liquefied.

name: Awesome Yogurt Coffee Cake With Brown Sugar-cinnamon Topping
instructions: Combine 1/4 cup flour, brown sugar, 1/4 cup butter, walnuts, pecans, and cinnamon in a bowl until crumbly; set topping aside.
Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Coat a fluted tube pan (such as Bundt) with cooking spray.

Beat white sugar, yogurt, remaining 3/4 cup butter, milk, eggs, baking powder, and salt in a large bowl with an electric mixer until smooth. Slowly mix in remaining 3 cups flour until combined; batter will be thick. Pour 1/2 batter into bottom of the prepared pan; generously spread 1/2 brown sugar-cinnamon topping over batter. Top with remaining 1/2 batter followed by remaining 1/2 topping.

Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into center comes out clean, 45 to 50 minutes. Cool on a wire rack for 5 minutes. Run a table knife around the edges to loosen; tap the pan firmly a few times, then shake it gently to loosen the cake. Place a wire rack over the pan and invert to release cake onto the rack, then invert onto a plate, brown sugar-cinnamon-side up.

name: Aypare Dessert Recipe

ingredients.item: Yarım tereyağı + yarım sıvı yağ kullanarak daha yumuşak bir doku elde edebilirsiniz.
Daha yoğun aroma için sadeyağ (ghee) tercih edilebilir.
Pudra şekeri yerine rondodan çekilmiş toz şeker kullanılabilir.
Daha hafif bir tat için şeker miktarı azaltılabilir.
Esmer şeker ile hafif karamelimsi bir aroma elde edebilirsiniz.
İrmik miktarını biraz artırarak daha tane dokulu bir yapı elde edebilirsiniz.
İrmik yerine çok az hindistan cevizi ekleyerek farklı bir aroma katabilirsiniz.
çekilmiş ceviz yerine fındık veya badem kullanabilirsiniz.
Daha aromatik bir tat için kavrulmuş ceviz tercih edilebilir.
Yumurta kullanmak istemeyenler için 2 yemek kaşığı yoğurt bağlayıcı olarak kullanılabilir (kıvam ayarı yapılmalıdır).
Şerbete küçük bir parça çubuk tarçın eklenebilir.
Limon yerine birkaç damla portakal suyu farklı bir aroma verir.
Daha hafif şerbet için şeker miktarı biraz azaltılabilir.
Toz antep fıstığı yerine hindistan cevizi serpilebilir.
File badem ile daha şık bir sunum yapılabilir.
üzerine çok az pudra şekeri serperek farklı bir görünüm elde edebilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Öncelikle şerbeti hazırlayın.
2.  Şeker, su, limon dilimi ve limon suyunu tencereye alıp orta ateşte kaynamaya bırakın.
3.  Kaynamaya başladıktan sonra yaklaşık 15 dakika daha kaynatın ve ocaktan alarak oda sıcaklığında tamamen soğumaya bırakın.
4. Hamur için tüm malzemeleri geniş bir yoğurma kabına alın ve ele yapışmayan, yumuşak bir kıvam elde edene kadar yoğurun.
5.  Hazırladığınız hamuru üç eşit parçaya bölün.
6.  Her bir bezeyi tezgâhta rulo şeklinde uzatın.
7.  Ardından elinizle hafifçe bastırarak yassılaştırın.
8.  Çay bardağının ağız kısmıyla yarım daireler keserek hamura ay formu verin.
9. Şekil verdiğiniz parçaları yağlı kağıt serilmiş fırın tepsisine dizin.
10.  Üzerlerine fırça yardımıyla yumurta sarısı sürün.
11.  Önceden ısıtılmış 170 derece fırında üzerleri güzelce kızarana kadar pişirin.
12. Fırından çıkan tatlıların ilk sıcaklığı geçtikten sonra, soğumuş şerbeti üzerlerine gezdirin.
13.  Şerbeti çekmeleri için en az 1–2 saat dinlendirin.
14. Servis ederken üzerine toz Antep fıstığı serperek sunabilirsiniz.
15.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Ayran
instructions: Pour yogurt into a bowl and beat until smooth, add water and continue beating until thoroughly blended, or combine in an electric blender and blend until smooth.
Season to taste with salt and dried mint.
Chill thoroughly and serve in tall glasses, with ice.

name: Ayran Pastry
instructions: 1. Su, margarin ve tuzu tencereye alıp karıştırın.
2.  Su kaynamaya başladığında unu ilave edip tahta kaşıkla ezerek karıştırın.
3.  Hamuru ocaktan alıp ılındırın.
4.  Hamuru tepsiye yayın.
5.  Üzerini kaşığın tersiyle düzeltin.
6.  Bıçakla küçük kareler şeklinde kesin.
7.  Önceden ısıtılmış 190 dereceye ayarlı fırında 25 dakika pişirin.
8.  Fırından alıp ılındırın.
9.  Karelere kestiğiniz böreği bir tepsinin kenar kısımlarına yayın.
10.  Ortasına bir kase içinde buzlu ayranı yerleştirip servis yapın.

name: Ayva Kalye
instructions: 1. Kıymayı tencereye alın.
2.  Orta ateşte bıraktığı suyu çekene kadar kavurun.
3.  Tuz ekleyip karıştırın.
4.  Ilık suyla üzüm pekmezini karıştırın.
5.  Ete ilave edin.
6.  Et yumuşayana kadar pişirin.
7.  Ayvaların kabuğunu soyup sekiz dilime ayırın.
8.  Tereyağını tavada eritip ayva dilimlerini ekleyin ve hafifçe kızartın.
9.  Ayva dilimlerini yağıyla birlikte ete ilave edin.
10.  Ayvalar yumuşayana kadar pişirin.
11.  Sıcak servis yapın.

name: Ayvali Bulgur Pilaf
instructions: 1. Ayvanın kabuğunu soyun.
2.  Tavla zarı şeklinde doğrayın.
3.  Ayçiçeği yağını tavaya alın, ısınınca ayvaları ekleyin.
4.  3 dakika sonra ince kıyılmış soğanı ilave edin.
5.  Soğan yumuşayınca salçayı da aktarıp karıştırın.
6.  Yıkanmış bulgur ve tuzu ekleyin.
7.  Biraz kavurduktan sonra suyu ilave edip kapağını kapatın.
8.  Kaynamaya başlayınca kısık ateşte 10 dakika pişirin.
9.  Servis yapın.

name: Ayvalı Colaf
instructions: 1. Ayvaların kabuklarını soyup çekirdeklerini çıkarın ve küp şeklinde doğrayın.
2.  Tencereye alıp üzerine toz şekeri ekleyin ve kısık ateşte diri kalacak şekilde pişirin.
3.  Tencereyi ocaktan alıp ayvaların üzerine tarçını serpiştirin ve soğumaya bırakın.
4. Ayvaları dört servis kadehine paylaştırıp üzerine çam fıstıklarını ilave edin.

name: Azeitão Pies
instructions: Comece por preparar o recheio: deite o açúcar e a farinha num tacho e misture. Junte depois as gemas e a água e leve ao lume, mexendo até engrossar e sem deixar ferver. Retire do lume e deixe arrefecer.

Entretanto, forre dois tabuleiros com papel vegetal e unte-os com margarina. Numa tigela, bata os ovos, adicionando o açúcar aos poucos até que fique uma mistura esbranquiçada. Adicione a farinha maisena peneirada e envolva suavemente. Verta para os tabuleiros e leve ao forno durante 15 minutos ou até que fiquem bem cozido.

Retire do forno, desenforme os rectângulos de bolo em cima de papel vegetal e deixe-os amornar. Barre-os depois com o creme do recheio, corte em tiras e enrole-as em forma de tortinhas. Pode polvilhar com açúcar em pó.

name: Azorean Honey Pudding
instructions: Deite o açúcar num tacho e molhe com um pouco de água. Leve ao lume, sem mexer, até obter um caramelo dourado. Retire do lume, regue com 50 ml de água e mexa bem. Caramelize uma forma de pudim e reserve.
Ferva o leite com o mel e um pouco de essência de baunilha. Bata os ovos numa tigela e junte-lhes o preparado anterior, em fio e mexendo sempre.
Deite o preparado na forma e leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 180ºc, em banho-maria, durante cerca de 35 minutos. Retire e deixe arrefecer. Desenforme e sirva decorado a gosto.

name: Azorean-style Chicken
instructions: Bata os peitos de frango com um martelo de cozinha, tempere-os com sal e pimenta e aloure-os, de ambos os lados, numa frigideira com a manteiga. Adicione a mostarda, envolva e retire para um prato.
Junte o vinho do porto e as natas, mexa bem, depois adicione as rodelas de ananás e, por fim, os peitos de frango. Envolva, retire do lume e reserve quente.
Descasque as cenouras, corte-as em palitos finos e frite-os em óleo quente. Retire, escorra sobre papel absorvente e sirva com o frango e com o arroz branco.

name: Açai-blackberry Sorbet

ingredients.item: -ounce packet frozen açai puree (from one 14.11-ounce package)

instructions: Puree berries in processor until smooth; strain into small bowl. Discard solids. Reserve enough puree to measure 1 cup.

Bring 1/2 cup water, sugar, and agave nectar to simmer in medium saucepan, stirring until sugar dissolves. Remove from heat. Stir in blackberry puree, açai, and lemon juice. Chill until cold, about 1 hour.
Process sorbet in ice cream maker according to manufacturer's instructions. Transfer sorbet to freezer container. Cover and freeze until firm, about 4 hours.
